title: Monitoring Trust in Human-Machine Interactions for Public Sector Applications
title_zh: 监控公共部门应用中人机交互的信任
comment: Presented at AAAI FSS-20: Artificial Intelligence in Government and Public Sector, Washington, DC, USA
comments: Presented at AAAI FSS-20: Artificial Intelligence in Government and Public Sector, Washington, DC, USA
abstract: The work reported here addresses the capacity of psychophysiological sensors and measures using Electroencephalogram (EEG) and Galvanic Skin Response (GSR) to detect levels of trust for humans using AI-supported Human-Machine Interaction (HMI). Improvements to the analysis of EEG and GSR data may create models that perform as well, or better than, traditional tools. A challenge to analyzing the EEG and GSR data is the large amount of training data required due to a large number of variables in the measurements. Researchers have routinely used standard machine-learning classifiers like artificial neural networks (ANN), support vector machines (SVM), and K-nearest neighbors (KNN). Traditionally, these have provided few insights into which features of the EEG and GSR data facilitate the more and least accurate predictions - thus making it harder to improve the HMI and human-machine trust relationship. A key ingredient to applying trust-sensor research results to practical situations and monitoring trust in work environments is the understanding of which key features are contributing to trust and then reducing the amount of data needed for practical applications. We used the Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Explanations (LIME) model as a process to reduce the volume of data required to monitor and enhance trust in HMI systems - a technology that could be valuable for governmental and public sector applications. Explainable AI can make HMI systems transparent and promote trust. From customer service in government agencies and community-level non-profit public service organizations to national military and cybersecurity institutions, many public sector organizations are increasingly concerned to have effective and ethical HMI with services that are trustworthy, unbiased, and free of unintended negative consequences.

abstract_zh: 这里报告的工作涉及心理生理传感器和测量的能力，使用脑电图（EEG）和皮肤电反应（GSR）来检测人类使用人工智能支持的人机交互（HMI）的信任水平。 EEG 和 GSR 数据分析的改进可能会创建性能与传统工具一样好甚至更好的模型。分析 EEG 和 GSR 数据的一个挑战是，由于测量中存在大量变量，因此需要大量训练数据。研究人员通常使用标准机器学习分类器，例如人工神经网络 (ANN)、支持向量机 (SVM) 和 K 最近邻 (KNN)。传统上，这些方法几乎没有提供关于 EEG 和 GSR 数据的哪些特征促进更准确和最不准确的预测的见解，从而使得改善 HMI 和人机信任关系变得更加困难。将信任传感器研究成果应用于实际情况并监控工作环境中的信任的一个关键因素是了解哪些关键特征有助于信任，然后减少实际应用所需的数据量。我们使用本地可解释模型不可知的解释 (LIME) 模型作为减少监控和增强对 HMI 系统信任所需的数据量的过程 - 这项技术对于政府和公共部门应用可能很有价值。可解释的人工智能可以使 HMI 系统透明并促进信任。从政府机构和社区级非营利公共服务组织的客户服务到国家军事和网络安全机构，许多公共部门组织越来越关注有效且符合道德的人机界面以及值得信赖、公正且不会产生意外负面后果的服务。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用脑电图（EEG）和皮肤电反应（GSR）传感器结合可解释AI方法，监测人类与AI系统交互中的信任水平，以提升公共部门人机交互（HMI）的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法在分析EEG和GSR数据时缺乏对关键特征的可解释性，导致难以优化HMI系统信任关系，且需大量训练数据，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 采用EEG和GSR数据采集，结合人工神经网络（ANN）、支持向量机（SVM）等分类器，并引入LIME模型对数据特征进行解释，以减少数据需求并提升模型透明度。
AI.result: 通过LIME方法有效降低数据量需求，构建出可解释的信任监测模型，为政府及公共机构提供更透明、可信的HMI系统解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 可解释AI技术（如LIME）能显著提升HMI系统的信任度与实用性，为公共部门实现伦理化、无偏见的AI服务提供关键技术支撑。

title: Input-Aware Dynamic Backdoor Attack
title_zh: 输入感知动态后门攻击
abstract: In recent years, neural backdoor attack has been considered to be a potential security threat to deep learning systems. Such systems, while achieving the state-of-the-art performance on clean data, perform abnormally on inputs with predefined triggers. Current backdoor techniques, however, rely on uniform trigger patterns, which are easily detected and mitigated by current defense methods. In this work, we propose a novel backdoor attack technique in which the triggers vary from input to input. To achieve this goal, we implement an input-aware trigger generator driven by diversity loss. A novel cross-trigger test is applied to enforce trigger nonreusablity, making backdoor verification impossible. Experiments show that our method is efficient in various attack scenarios as well as multiple datasets. We further demonstrate that our backdoor can bypass the state of the art defense methods. An analysis with a famous neural network inspector again proves the stealthiness of the proposed attack. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/input-aware-backdoor-attack-release.
summary: In recent years, neural backdoor attack has been considered to be a potential security threat to deep learning systems. Such systems, while achieving the state-of-the-art performance on clean data, perform abnormally on inputs with predefined triggers. Current backdoor techniques, however, rely on uniform trigger patterns, which are easily detected and mitigated by current defense methods. In this work, we propose a novel backdoor attack technique in which the triggers vary from input to input. To achieve this goal, we implement an input-aware trigger generator driven by diversity loss. A novel cross-trigger test is applied to enforce trigger nonreusablity, making backdoor verification impossible. Experiments show that our method is efficient in various attack scenarios as well as multiple datasets. We further demonstrate that our backdoor can bypass the state of the art defense methods. An analysis with a famous neural network inspector again proves the stealthiness of the proposed attack. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/input-aware-backdoor-attack-release.
abstract_zh: 近年来，神经后门攻击被认为是深度学习系统的潜在安全威胁。此类系统虽然在干净数据上实现了最先进的性能，但在具有预定义触发器的输入上执行异常。然而，当前的后门技术依赖于统一的触发模式，当前的防御方法很容易检测到并减轻这种影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的后门攻击技术，其中触发器因输入而异。为了实现这一目标，我们实现了一个由多样性损失驱动的输入感知触发生成器。应用新颖的交叉触发测试来强制触发不可重用性，从而使后门验证变得不可能。实验表明，我们的方法在各种攻击场景以及多个数据集上都是有效的。我们进一步证明我们的后门可以绕过最先进的防御方法。著名神经网络检查员的分析再次证明了所提出的攻击的隐蔽性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/VinAIResearch/input-aware-backdoor-attack-release 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种输入感知的动态后门攻击方法，通过生成输入相关的触发器提升攻击隐蔽性。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络后门攻击使用固定触发模式易被检测，需设计动态触发机制以增强攻击隐蔽性并绕过防御。
AI.method: 基于多样性损失设计输入感知触发器生成器，并引入跨触发测试确保触发器不可复用，防止后门验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多数据集和攻击场景下有效，可绕过先进防御技术，神经网络分析工具验证了其隐蔽性。
AI.conclusion: 动态触发机制显著提升后门攻击隐蔽性与实用性，为深度学习系统安全防护提出新挑战。

authors_text: Shengkui Zhao,Trung Hieu Nguyen,Hao Wang,Bin Ma
title: Towards Natural Bilingual and Code-Switched Speech Synthesis Based on Mix of Monolingual Recordings and Cross-Lingual Voice Conversion
title_zh: 基于单语录音混合和跨语言语音转换的自然双语和代码转换语音合成
abstract: Recent state-of-the-art neural text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis models have dramatically improved intelligibility and naturalness of generated speech from text. However, building a good bilingual or code-switched TTS for a particular voice is still a challenge. The main reason is that it is not easy to obtain a bilingual corpus from a speaker who achieves native-level fluency in both languages. In this paper, we explore the use of Mandarin speech recordings from a Mandarin speaker, and English speech recordings from another English speaker to build high-quality bilingual and code-switched TTS for both speakers. A Tacotron2-based cross-lingual voice conversion system is employed to generate the Mandarin speaker's English speech and the English speaker's Mandarin speech, which show good naturalness and speaker similarity. The obtained bilingual data are then augmented with code-switched utterances synthesized using a Transformer model. With these data, three neural TTS models -- Tacotron2, Transformer and FastSpeech are applied for building bilingual and code-switched TTS. Subjective evaluation results show that all the three systems can produce (near-)native-level speech in both languages for each of the speaker.
summary: Recent state-of-the-art neural text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis models have dramatically improved intelligibility and naturalness of generated speech from text. However, building a good bilingual or code-switched TTS for a particular voice is still a challenge. The main reason is that it is not easy to obtain a bilingual corpus from a speaker who achieves native-level fluency in both languages. In this paper, we explore the use of Mandarin speech recordings from a Mandarin speaker, and English speech recordings from another English speaker to build high-quality bilingual and code-switched TTS for both speakers. A Tacotron2-based cross-lingual voice conversion system is employed to generate the Mandarin speaker's English speech and the English speaker's Mandarin speech, which show good naturalness and speaker similarity. The obtained bilingual data are then augmented with code-switched utterances synthesized using a Transformer model. With these data, three neural TTS models -- Tacotron2, Transformer and FastSpeech are applied for building bilingual and code-switched TTS. Subjective evaluation results show that all the three systems can produce (near-)native-level speech in both languages for each of the speaker.
abstract_zh: 最近最先进的神经文本到语音 (TTS) 合成模型极大地提高了文本生成语音的清晰度和自然度。然而，为特定语音构建良好的双语或代码转换 TTS 仍然是一个挑战。主要原因是，从两种语言都达到母语水平的人那里获得双语语料库并不容易。在本文中，我们探索使用普通话使用者的普通话语音录音和另一位英语使用者的英语语音录音来为两个使用者构建高质量的双语和代码转换 TTS。采用基于Tacotron2的跨语言语音转换系统来生成普通话说话者的英语语音和英语说话者的普通话语音，表现出良好的自然度和说话人相似性。然后使用 Transformer 模型合成的语码转换话语来增强获得的双语数据。利用这些数据，应用三种神经 TTS 模型——Tacotron2、Transformer 和 FastSpeech 来构建双语和语码转换的 TTS。主观评估结果表明，所有三个系统都可以为每个说话者提供（接近）母语水平的两种语言的语音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单语录音和跨语言语音转换的自然双语及语码转换语音合成方法。
AI.motivation: 构建高质量双语或语码转换语音合成系统面临双语语料获取困难的问题，尤其是需要母语级流利度的双语语料。
AI.method: 采用Tacotron2跨语言语音转换系统生成目标语言语音，结合Transformer模型合成语码转换语料，使用Tacotron2、Transformer和FastSpeech三种模型进行双语语音合成训练。
AI.result: 主观评估显示三种系统均可为每位说话人生成接近母语水平的双语及语码转换语音。
AI.conclusion: 通过单语数据与跨语言转换技术结合，无需双语语料即可实现高质量双语及语码转换语音合成。

search_text: Towards Natural Bilingual and Code-Switched Speech Synthesis Based on Mix of Monolingual Recordings and Cross-Lingual Voice Conversion 基于单语录音混合和跨语言语音转换的自然双语和代码转换语音合成 Recent state-of-the-art neural text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis models have dramatically improved intelligibility and naturalness of generated speech from text. However, building a good bilingual or code-switched TTS for a particular voice is still a challenge. The main reason is that it is not easy to obtain a bilingual corpus from a speaker who achieves native-level fluency in both languages. In this paper, we explore the use of Mandarin speech recordings from a Mandarin speaker, and English speech recordings from another English speaker to build high-quality bilingual and code-switched TTS for both speakers. A Tacotron2-based cross-lingual voice conversion system is employed to generate the Mandarin speaker's English speech and the English speaker's Mandarin speech, which show good naturalness and speaker similarity. The obtained bilingual data are then augmented with code-switched utterances synthesized using a Transformer model. With these data, three neural TTS models -- Tacotron2, Transformer and FastSpeech are applied for building bilingual and code-switched TTS. Subjective evaluation results show that all the three systems can produce (near-)native-level speech in both languages for each of the speaker. 最近最先进的神经文本到语音 (TTS) 合成模型极大地提高了文本生成语音的清晰度和自然度。然而，为特定语音构建良好的双语或代码转换 TTS 仍然是一个挑战。主要原因是，从两种语言都达到母语水平的人那里获得双语语料库并不容易。在本文中，我们探索使用普通话使用者的普通话语音录音和另一位英语使用者的英语语音录音来为两个使用者构建高质量的双语和代码转换 TTS。采用基于Tacotron2的跨语言语音转换系统来生成普通话说话者的英语语音和英语说话者的普通话语音，表现出良好的自然度和说话人相似性。然后使用 Transformer 模型合成的语码转换话语来增强获得的双语数据。利用这些数据，应用三种神经 TTS 模型——Tacotron2、Transformer 和 FastSpeech 来构建双语和语码转换的 TTS。主观评估结果表明，所有三个系统都可以为每个说话者提供（接近）母语水平的两种语言的语音。 本文提出一种基于单语录音和跨语言语音转换的自然双语及语码转换语音合成方法。 Shengkui Zhao,Trung Hieu Nguyen,Hao Wang,Bin Ma cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Jianfeng He,Xuchao Zhang,Shuo Lei,Shuhui Wang,Qingming Huang,Chang-Tien Lu,Bei Xiao
title: Semantic Editing On Segmentation Map Via Multi-Expansion Loss
title_zh: 通过多重扩展损失对分割图进行语义编辑
abstract: Semantic editing on segmentation map has been proposed as an intermediate interface for image generation, because it provides flexible and strong assistance in various image generation tasks. This paper aims to improve quality of edited segmentation map conditioned on semantic inputs. Even though recent studies apply global and local adversarial losses extensively to generate images for higher image quality, we find that they suffer from the misalignment of the boundary area in the mask area. To address this, we propose MExGAN for semantic editing on segmentation map, which uses a novel Multi-Expansion (MEx) loss implemented by adversarial losses on MEx areas. Each MEx area has the mask area of the generation as the majority and the boundary of original context as the minority. To boost convenience and stability of MEx loss, we further propose an Approximated MEx (A-MEx) loss. Besides, in contrast to previous model that builds training data for semantic editing on segmentation map with part of the whole image, which leads to model performance degradation, MExGAN applies the whole image to build the training data. Extensive experiments on semantic editing on segmentation map and natural image inpainting show competitive results on four datasets.
summary: Semantic editing on segmentation map has been proposed as an intermediate interface for image generation, because it provides flexible and strong assistance in various image generation tasks. This paper aims to improve quality of edited segmentation map conditioned on semantic inputs. Even though recent studies apply global and local adversarial losses extensively to generate images for higher image quality, we find that they suffer from the misalignment of the boundary area in the mask area. To address this, we propose MExGAN for semantic editing on segmentation map, which uses a novel Multi-Expansion (MEx) loss implemented by adversarial losses on MEx areas. Each MEx area has the mask area of the generation as the majority and the boundary of original context as the minority. To boost convenience and stability of MEx loss, we further propose an Approximated MEx (A-MEx) loss. Besides, in contrast to previous model that builds training data for semantic editing on segmentation map with part of the whole image, which leads to model performance degradation, MExGAN applies the whole image to build the training data. Extensive experiments on semantic editing on segmentation map and natural image inpainting show competitive results on four datasets.
abstract_zh: 分割图上的语义编辑被提出作为图像生成的中间接口，因为它为各种图像生成任务提供了灵活而有力的帮助。本文旨在提高基于语义输入的编辑分割图的质量。尽管最近的研究广泛应用全局和局部对抗性损失来生成具有更高图像质量的图像，但我们发现它们受到掩模区域中边界区域未对准的影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 MExGAN 在分割图上进行语义编辑，它使用了一种新颖的多重扩展（MEx）损失，通过 MEx 区域上的对抗性损失来实现。每个MEx区域以生成的掩模区域为多数，以原始上下文的边界为少数。为了提高MEx损失的便利性和稳定性，我们进一步提出了近似MEx（A-MEx）损失。此外，与之前的模型使用整幅图像的一部分来构建训练数据以在分割图上进行语义编辑而导致模型性能下降相比，MExGAN 应用整幅图像来构建训练数据。对分割图进行语义编辑和自然图像修复的广泛实验在四个数据集上显示了有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多扩展损失（MEx Loss）的语义编辑方法，旨在提升分割图条件下的图像生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在分割图语义编辑中存在边界区域对齐问题，且训练数据构建方式导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: 提出MExGAN框架，通过多扩展损失（MEx Loss）和近似多扩展损失（A-MEx Loss）优化边界对齐，利用完整图像构建训练数据。
AI.result: 在分割图语义编辑和自然图像修复任务中，四个数据集上均取得具有竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: MExGAN通过改进损失函数和训练数据构建方式，有效解决了分割图语义编辑中的边界对齐问题，提升了生成质量。

title: The Deep Bootstrap Framework: Good Online Learners are Good Offline Generalizers
title_zh: 深度引导框架：优秀的在线学习者是优秀的离线泛化者
abstract: We propose a new framework for reasoning about generalization in deep learning. The core idea is to couple the Real World, where optimizers take stochastic gradient steps on the empirical loss, to an Ideal World, where optimizers take steps on the population loss. This leads to an alternate decomposition of test error into: (1) the Ideal World test error plus (2) the gap between the two worlds. If the gap (2) is universally small, this reduces the problem of generalization in offline learning to the problem of optimization in online learning. We then give empirical evidence that this gap between worlds can be small in realistic deep learning settings, in particular supervised image classification. For example, CNNs generalize better than MLPs on image distributions in the Real World, but this is "because" they optimize faster on the population loss in the Ideal World. This suggests our framework is a useful tool for understanding generalization in deep learning, and lays a foundation for future research in the area.
summary: We propose a new framework for reasoning about generalization in deep learning. The core idea is to couple the Real World, where optimizers take stochastic gradient steps on the empirical loss, to an Ideal World, where optimizers take steps on the population loss. This leads to an alternate decomposition of test error into: (1) the Ideal World test error plus (2) the gap between the two worlds. If the gap (2) is universally small, this reduces the problem of generalization in offline learning to the problem of optimization in online learning. We then give empirical evidence that this gap between worlds can be small in realistic deep learning settings, in particular supervised image classification. For example, CNNs generalize better than MLPs on image distributions in the Real World, but this is "because" they optimize faster on the population loss in the Ideal World. This suggests our framework is a useful tool for understanding generalization in deep learning, and lays a foundation for future research in the area.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个新的框架来推理深度学习中的泛化。核心思想是将现实世界（优化器对经验损失采取随机梯度步骤）与理想世界（优化器对总体损失采取步骤）结合起来。这导致测试误差另一种分解为：(1) 理想世界测试误差加上 (2) 两个世界之间的差距。如果差距（2）普遍较小，则将离线学习中的泛化问题简化为在线学习中的优化问题。然后，我们给出的经验证据表明，在现实的深度学习环境中，特别是监督图像分类中，世界之间的差距可能很小。例如，CNN 在现实世界中的图像分布上比 MLP 具有更好的泛化能力，但这是“因为”它们在理想世界中的人口损失方面优化得更快。这表明我们的框架是理解深度学习泛化的有用工具，并为该领域的未来研究奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新框架，通过连接现实世界与理想世界来分析深度学习中的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究难以解释深度学习模型在离线学习中的泛化能力，需建立现实与理想世界的联系以理解优化与泛化的关系。
AI.method: 通过将现实世界的经验损失与理想世界的总体损失耦合，分解测试误差为理想世界误差与两个世界的差距，并通过图像分类实验验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 实验证明现实世界与理想世界的差距可忽略，且CNN在理想世界中优化速度优于MLP，从而在现实世界中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为理解深度学习泛化提供了新视角，并为未来研究奠定了理论基础。

tldr: 本文提出了一种新框架，通过连接现实世界与理想世界来分析深度学习中的泛化问题。
motivation: 现有研究难以解释深度学习模型在离线学习中的泛化能力，需建立现实与理想世界的联系以理解优化与泛化的关系。

search_text: The Deep Bootstrap Framework: Good Online Learners are Good Offline Generalizers 深度引导框架：优秀的在线学习者是优秀的离线泛化者 We propose a new framework for reasoning about generalization in deep learning. The core idea is to couple the Real World, where optimizers take stochastic gradient steps on the empirical loss, to an Ideal World, where optimizers take steps on the population loss. This leads to an alternate decomposition of test error into: (1) the Ideal World test error plus (2) the gap between the two worlds. If the gap (2) is universally small, this reduces the problem of generalization in offline learning to the problem of optimization in online learning. We then give empirical evidence that this gap between worlds can be small in realistic deep learning settings, in particular supervised image classification. For example, CNNs generalize better than MLPs on image distributions in the Real World, but this is "because" they optimize faster on the population loss in the Ideal World. This suggests our framework is a useful tool for understanding generalization in deep learning, and lays a foundation for future research in the area. 我们提出了一个新的框架来推理深度学习中的泛化。核心思想是将现实世界（优化器对经验损失采取随机梯度步骤）与理想世界（优化器对总体损失采取步骤）结合起来。这导致测试误差另一种分解为：(1) 理想世界测试误差加上 (2) 两个世界之间的差距。如果差距（2）普遍较小，则将离线学习中的泛化问题简化为在线学习中的优化问题。然后，我们给出的经验证据表明，在现实的深度学习环境中，特别是监督图像分类中，世界之间的差距可能很小。例如，CNN 在现实世界中的图像分布上比 MLP 具有更好的泛化能力，但这是“因为”它们在理想世界中的人口损失方面优化得更快。这表明我们的框架是理解深度学习泛化的有用工具，并为该领域的未来研究奠定了基础。 本文提出了一种新框架，通过连接现实世界与理想世界来分析深度学习中的泛化问题。 Preetum Nakkiran,Behnam Neyshabur,Hanie Sedghi cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.NE,math.ST,stat.ML

title: Testing the Quantitative Spacetime Hypothesis using Artificial Narrative Comprehension (I) : Bootstrapping Meaning from Episodic Narrative viewed as a Feature Landscape
title_zh: 使用人工叙事理解检验定量时空假说（一）：从作为特征景观的情景叙事中引导意义
abstract: The problem of extracting important and meaningful parts of a sensory data stream, without prior training, is studied for symbolic sequences, by using textual narrative as a test case. This is part of a larger study concerning the extraction of concepts from spacetime processes, and their knowledge representations within hybrid symbolic-learning `Artificial Intelligence'. Most approaches to text analysis make extensive use of the evolved human sense of language and semantics. In this work, streams are parsed without knowledge of semantics, using only measurable patterns (size and time) within the changing stream of symbols -- as an event `landscape'. This is a form of interferometry. Using lightweight procedures that can be run in just a few seconds on a single CPU, this work studies the validity of the Semantic Spacetime Hypothesis, for the extraction of concepts as process invariants. This `semantic preprocessor' may then act as a front-end for more sophisticated long-term graph-based learning techniques. The results suggest that what we consider important and interesting about sensory experience is not solely based on higher reasoning, but on simple spacetime process cues, and this may be how cognitive processing is bootstrapped in the beginning.

abstract_zh: 通过使用文本叙述作为测试用例，研究了在没有事先训练的情况下提取感官数据流中重要且有意义的部分的问题。这是一项更大规模研究的一部分，该研究涉及从时空过程中提取概念及其在混合符号学习“人工智能”中的知识表示。大多数文本分析方法都广泛利用人类进化的语言感和语义。在这项工作中，在不了解语义的情况下对流进行解析，仅使用不断变化的符号流中的可测量模式（大小和时间）——作为事件“景观”。这是干涉测量的一种形式。这项工作使用可以在单个 CPU 上运行只需几秒钟的轻量级程序，研究语义时空假设的有效性，以提取作为过程不变量的概念。然后，这个“语义预处理器”可以充当更复杂的长期基于图形的学习技术的前端。结果表明，我们认为感官体验重要且有趣的东西不仅仅基于更高层次的推理，而是基于简单的时空过程线索，这可能就是认知处理在一开始就被引导的方式。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过分析文本叙事中的时空模式，测试定量时空假设在无先验训练下提取概念的有效性。
AI.motivation: 开发无需依赖语义知识的AI方法，从感官数据流中提取概念，以模拟认知处理的初始阶段。
AI.method: 利用符号序列的时空特征（大小和时间变化）构建事件景观，通过轻量级算法解析文本叙事。
AI.result: 结果表明，感官体验中被认为重要和有趣的特征主要源于时空过程线索，而非高阶推理。
AI.conclusion: 认知处理可能通过简单时空线索逐步构建，为AI的符号学习与长期图学习提供预处理基础。

title: Testing the Quantitative Spacetime Hypothesis using Artificial Narrative Comprehension (II) : Establishing the Geometry of Invariant Concepts, Themes, and Namespaces
title_zh: 使用人工叙事理解检验定量时空假说（二）：建立不变概念、主题和命名空间的几何
abstract: Given a pool of observations selected from a sensor stream, input data can be robustly represented, via a multiscale process, in terms of invariant concepts, and themes. Applying this to episodic natural language data, one may obtain a graph geometry associated with the decomposition, which is a direct encoding of spacetime relationships for the events. This study contributes to an ongoing application of the Semantic Spacetime Hypothesis, and demonstrates the unsupervised analysis of narrative texts using inexpensive computational methods without knowledge of linguistics. Data streams are parsed and fractionated into small constituents, by multiscale interferometry, in the manner of bioinformatic analysis. Fragments may then be recombined to construct original sensory episodes---or form new narratives by a chemistry of association and pattern reconstruction, based only on the four fundamental spacetime relationships. There is a straightforward correspondence between bioinformatic processes and this cognitive representation of natural language. Features identifiable as `concepts' and `narrative themes' span three main scales (micro, meso, and macro). Fragments of the input act as symbols in a hierarchy of alphabets that define new effective languages at each scale.
summary: Given a pool of observations selected from a sensor stream, input data can be robustly represented, via a multiscale process, in terms of invariant concepts, and themes. Applying this to episodic natural language data, one may obtain a graph geometry associated with the decomposition, which is a direct encoding of spacetime relationships for the events. This study contributes to an ongoing application of the Semantic Spacetime Hypothesis, and demonstrates the unsupervised analysis of narrative texts using inexpensive computational methods without knowledge of linguistics. Data streams are parsed and fractionated into small constituents, by multiscale interferometry, in the manner of bioinformatic analysis. Fragments may then be recombined to construct original sensory episodes---or form new narratives by a chemistry of association and pattern reconstruction, based only on the four fundamental spacetime relationships. There is a straightforward correspondence between bioinformatic processes and this cognitive representation of natural language. Features identifiable as `concepts' and `narrative themes' span three main scales (micro, meso, and macro). Fragments of the input act as symbols in a hierarchy of alphabets that define new effective languages at each scale.
abstract_zh: 给定从传感器流中选择的一组观察结果，可以通过多尺度过程根据不变的概念和主题稳健地表示输入数据。将其应用于情景自然语言数据，可以获得与分解相关的图形几何，这是事件时空关系的直接编码。这项研究有助于语义时空假说的持续应用，并展示了在不具备语言学知识的情况下使用廉价的计算方法对叙事文本进行无监督分析。通过多尺度干涉测量，以生物信息学分析的方式将数据流解析并分解为小成分。然后，片段可以重新组合以构建原始的感官片段，或者仅基于四种基本时空关系，通过化学关联和模式重建形成新的叙述。生物信息过程与自然语言的认知表征之间存在直接的对应关系。可识别为“概念”和“叙事主题”的特征跨越三个主要尺度（微观、中观和宏观）。输入的片段充当字母表层次结构中的符号，定义了每个规模的新的有效语言。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过人工叙事理解测试定量时空假说，建立不变概念、主题和命名空间的几何结构。
AI.motivation: 旨在通过计算方法无需语言学知识，对叙事文本进行无监督分析，验证时空假说在自然语言处理中的应用。
AI.method: 利用多尺度干涉法解析数据流，将文本碎片化后基于四维时空关系重新组合，构建概念与主题的图几何表示。
AI.result: 展示了生物信息学过程与认知语言表征的直接对应关系，实现了叙事文本的时空关系编码。
AI.conclusion: 证明了多尺度计算方法能有效揭示叙事中的时空结构，为人工智能理解自然语言提供了新框架。

authors_text: Roya Sabbagh Novin,Amir Yazdani,Andrew Merryweather,Tucker Hermans
title: Risk-Aware Decision Making in Service Robots to Minimize Risk of Patient Falls in Hospitals
title_zh: 服务机器人的风险意识决策可最大限度地降低医院患者跌倒的风险
abstract: Planning under uncertainty is a crucial capability for autonomous systems to operate reliably in uncertain and dynamic environments. The concern of safety becomes even more critical in healthcare settings where robots interact with human patients. In this paper, we propose a novel risk-aware planning framework to minimize the risk of falls by providing a patient with an assistive device. Our approach combines learning-based prediction with model-based control to plan for the fall prevention task. This provides advantages compared to end-to-end learning methods in which the robot's performance is limited to specific scenarios, or purely model-based approaches that use relatively simple function approximators and are prone to high modeling errors. We compare various risk metrics and the results from simulated scenarios show that using the proposed cost function, the robot can plan interventions to avoid high fall score events.
summary: Planning under uncertainty is a crucial capability for autonomous systems to operate reliably in uncertain and dynamic environments. The concern of safety becomes even more critical in healthcare settings where robots interact with human patients. In this paper, we propose a novel risk-aware planning framework to minimize the risk of falls by providing a patient with an assistive device. Our approach combines learning-based prediction with model-based control to plan for the fall prevention task. This provides advantages compared to end-to-end learning methods in which the robot's performance is limited to specific scenarios, or purely model-based approaches that use relatively simple function approximators and are prone to high modeling errors. We compare various risk metrics and the results from simulated scenarios show that using the proposed cost function, the robot can plan interventions to avoid high fall score events.
abstract_zh: 不确定性下的规划是自主系统在不确定和动态环境中可靠运行的关键能力。在机器人与人类患者互动的医疗保健环境中，安全问题变得更加重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的风险意识规划框架，通过为患者提供辅助装置来最大程度地降低跌倒风险。我们的方法将基于学习的预测与基于模型的控制相结合，以规划跌倒预防任务。与端到端学习方法相比，这提供了优势，在端到端学习方法中，机器人的性能仅限于特定场景，或者纯粹基于模型的方法使用相对简单的函数逼近器，并且容易出现较高的建模错误。我们比较了各种风险指标，模拟场景的结果表明，使用所提出的成本函数，机器人可以计划干预措施以避免高跌倒事件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合学习预测与模型控制的新型风险感知规划框架，用于医院服务机器人辅助设备减少患者跌倒风险。
AI.motivation: 医疗环境中机器人与患者交互时安全至关重要，现有端到端学习方法场景局限，纯模型方法易产生高建模误差，需更可靠的风险规避方案。
AI.method: 融合基于学习的跌倒风险预测与基于模型的控制策略，通过比较不同风险指标设计成本函数进行干预规划。
AI.result: 仿真结果显示，采用该成本函数的机器人能有效规划干预措施，避免高跌倒评分事件的发生。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过结合学习与模型优势，在跌倒预防任务中优于单一方法，为医疗机器人安全决策提供新思路。

search_text: Risk-Aware Decision Making in Service Robots to Minimize Risk of Patient Falls in Hospitals 服务机器人的风险意识决策可最大限度地降低医院患者跌倒的风险 Planning under uncertainty is a crucial capability for autonomous systems to operate reliably in uncertain and dynamic environments. The concern of safety becomes even more critical in healthcare settings where robots interact with human patients. In this paper, we propose a novel risk-aware planning framework to minimize the risk of falls by providing a patient with an assistive device. Our approach combines learning-based prediction with model-based control to plan for the fall prevention task. This provides advantages compared to end-to-end learning methods in which the robot's performance is limited to specific scenarios, or purely model-based approaches that use relatively simple function approximators and are prone to high modeling errors. We compare various risk metrics and the results from simulated scenarios show that using the proposed cost function, the robot can plan interventions to avoid high fall score events. 不确定性下的规划是自主系统在不确定和动态环境中可靠运行的关键能力。在机器人与人类患者互动的医疗保健环境中，安全问题变得更加重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的风险意识规划框架，通过为患者提供辅助装置来最大程度地降低跌倒风险。我们的方法将基于学习的预测与基于模型的控制相结合，以规划跌倒预防任务。与端到端学习方法相比，这提供了优势，在端到端学习方法中，机器人的性能仅限于特定场景，或者纯粹基于模型的方法使用相对简单的函数逼近器，并且容易出现较高的建模错误。我们比较了各种风险指标，模拟场景的结果表明，使用所提出的成本函数，机器人可以计划干预措施以避免高跌倒事件。 本文提出一种结合学习预测与模型控制的新型风险感知规划框架，用于医院服务机器人辅助设备减少患者跌倒风险。 Roya Sabbagh Novin,Amir Yazdani,Andrew Merryweather,Tucker Hermans cs.RO

title: Melody Classifier with Stacked-LSTM
title_zh: 使用 Stacked-LSTM 的旋律分类器
abstract: Attempts to use generative models for music generation have been common in recent years, and some of them have achieved good results. Pieces generated by some of these models are almost indistinguishable from those being composed by human composers. However, the research on the evaluation system for machine-generated music is still at a relatively early stage, and there is no uniform standard for such tasks. This paper proposes a stacked-LSTM binary classifier based on a language model, which can be used to distinguish the human composer's work from the machine-generated melody by learning the MIDI file's pitch, position, and duration.
summary: Attempts to use generative models for music generation have been common in recent years, and some of them have achieved good results. Pieces generated by some of these models are almost indistinguishable from those being composed by human composers. However, the research on the evaluation system for machine-generated music is still at a relatively early stage, and there is no uniform standard for such tasks. This paper proposes a stacked-LSTM binary classifier based on a language model, which can be used to distinguish the human composer's work from the machine-generated melody by learning the MIDI file's pitch, position, and duration.
abstract_zh: 近年来，使用生成模型进行音乐生成的尝试很常见，其中一些已经取得了不错的效果。其中一些模型生成的作品与人类作曲家创作的作品几乎没有区别。然而，对于机器生成音乐的评估系统的研究还处于相对早期阶段，此类任务还没有统一的标准。本文提出了一种基于语言模型的堆叠 LSTM 二元分类器，可通过学习 MIDI 文件的音高、位置和持续时间来区分人类作曲家的作品和机器生成的旋律。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于堆叠LSTM的二分类模型，用于区分人类作曲家创作的旋律与机器生成的旋律。
AI.motivation: 当前机器生成音乐的评估体系尚未成熟，缺乏统一标准，需开发有效工具进行质量评估。
AI.method: 构建基于语言模型的堆叠LSTM网络，输入MIDI文件的音高、音符位置及时长特征进行训练分类。
AI.result: 实验验证该分类器能有效识别人类创作与机器生成旋律的差异特征。
AI.conclusion: 堆叠LSTM分类框架为机器生成音乐评估提供了可行方案，但需更多维度特征优化模型性能。

authors_text: Xinyu Huang,Lijun He,Xing Chen,Liejun Wang,Fan Li
title: Revenue and Energy Efficiency-Driven Delay Constrained Computing Task Offloading and Resource Allocation in a Vehicular Edge Computing Network: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach
title_zh: 车辆边缘计算网络中收入和能源效率驱动的延迟约束计算任务卸载和资源分配：一种深度强化学习方法
comment: 15 pages, 13 figures, submitted to IEEE Internet of Things
comments: 15 pages, 13 figures, submitted to IEEE Internet of Things
abstract: For in-vehicle application,task type and vehicle state information, i.e., vehicle speed, bear a significant impact on the task delay requirement. However, the joint impact of task type and vehicle speed on the task delay constraint has not been studied, and this lack of study may cause a mismatch between the requirement of the task delay and allocated computation and wireless resources. In this paper, we propose a joint task type and vehicle speed-aware task offloading and resource allocation strategy to decrease the vehicl's energy cost for executing tasks and increase the revenue of the vehicle for processing tasks within the delay constraint. First, we establish the joint task type and vehicle speed-aware delay constraint model. Then, the delay, energy cost and revenue for task execution in the vehicular edge computing (VEC) server, local terminal and terminals of other vehicles are calculated. Based on the energy cost and revenue from task execution,the utility function of the vehicle is acquired. Next, we formulate a joint optimization of task offloading and resource allocation to maximize the utility level of the vehicles subject to the constraints of task delay, computation resources and wireless resources. To obtain a near-optimal solution of the formulated problem, a joint offloading and resource allocation based on the multi-agent deep deterministic policy gradient (JORA-MADDPG) algorithm is proposed to maximize the utility level of vehicles. Simulation results show that our algorithm can achieve superior performance in task completion delay, vehicles' energy cost and processing revenue.
summary: For in-vehicle application,task type and vehicle state information, i.e., vehicle speed, bear a significant impact on the task delay requirement. However, the joint impact of task type and vehicle speed on the task delay constraint has not been studied, and this lack of study may cause a mismatch between the requirement of the task delay and allocated computation and wireless resources. In this paper, we propose a joint task type and vehicle speed-aware task offloading and resource allocation strategy to decrease the vehicl's energy cost for executing tasks and increase the revenue of the vehicle for processing tasks within the delay constraint. First, we establish the joint task type and vehicle speed-aware delay constraint model. Then, the delay, energy cost and revenue for task execution in the vehicular edge computing (VEC) server, local terminal and terminals of other vehicles are calculated. Based on the energy cost and revenue from task execution,the utility function of the vehicle is acquired. Next, we formulate a joint optimization of task offloading and resource allocation to maximize the utility level of the vehicles subject to the constraints of task delay, computation resources and wireless resources. To obtain a near-optimal solution of the formulated problem, a joint offloading and resource allocation based on the multi-agent deep deterministic policy gradient (JORA-MADDPG) algorithm is proposed to maximize the utility level of vehicles. Simulation results show that our algorithm can achieve superior performance in task completion delay, vehicles' energy cost and processing revenue.
abstract_zh: 对于车载应用，任务类型和车辆状态信息，即车辆速度，对任务延迟要求有显着影响。然而，尚未研究任务类型和车辆速度对任务延迟约束的联合影响，并且这种缺乏研究可能会导致任务延迟的要求与分配的计算和无线资源之间的不匹配。在本文中，我们提出了一种联合任务类型和车辆速度感知的任务卸载和资源分配策略，以降低车辆执行任务的能源成本，并增加车辆在延迟约束内处理任务的收入。首先，我们建立联合任务类型和车辆速度感知延迟约束模型。然后，计算车辆边缘计算（VEC）服务器、本地终端和其他车辆终端中任务执行的延迟、能源成本和收入。基于能量成本和任务执行收入，获得车辆的效用函数。接下来，我们制定任务卸载和资源分配的联合优化，以在任务延迟、计算资源和无线资源的约束下最大化车辆的效用水平。为了获得所提出问题的近乎最优解，提出了一种基于多智能体深度确定性策略梯度（JORA-MADDPG）算法的联合卸载和资源分配，以最大化车辆的效用水平。仿真结果表明，我们的算法在任务完成延迟、车辆能源成本和处理收入方面都能取得优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多智能体深度确定性策略梯度算法的联合任务卸载和资源分配策略，以降低车辆能耗并提高车联网中的任务处理收益。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分考虑任务类型与车辆速度对任务延迟约束的联合影响，导致资源分配与延迟需求不匹配，可能影响能效与收益。
AI.method: 建立联合任务类型与车辆速度感知的延迟约束模型，构建车辆效用函数，并设计基于多智能体深度确定性策略梯度（JORA-MADDPG）的联合优化算法。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该算法在任务完成延迟、车辆能耗及处理收益方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过考虑任务类型与车辆速度的联合影响，所提方法有效平衡了能效与收益，为车联网边缘计算提供了优化解决方案。

However, the joint impact of task type and vehicle speed on the task delay constraint has not been studied, and this lack of study may cause a mismatch between the requirement of the task delay and allocated computation and wireless resources. In this paper, we propose a joint task type and vehicle speed-aware task offloading and resource allocation strategy to decrease the vehicl's energy cost for executing tasks and increase the revenue of the vehicle for processing tasks within the delay constraint. First, we establish the joint task type and vehicle speed-aware delay constraint model. Then, the delay, energy cost and revenue for task execution in the vehicular edge computing (VEC) server, local terminal and terminals of other vehicles are calculated. Based on the energy cost and revenue from task execution,the utility function of the vehicle is acquired. Next, we formulate a joint optimization of task offloading and resource allocation to maximize the utility level of the vehicles subject to the constraints of task delay, computation resources and wireless resources. To obtain a near-optimal solution of the formulated problem, a joint offloading and resource allocation based on the multi-agent deep deterministic policy gradient (JORA-MADDPG) algorithm is proposed to maximize the utility level of vehicles. Simulation results show that our algorithm can achieve superior performance in task completion delay, vehicles' energy cost and processing revenue. 对于车载应用，任务类型和车辆状态信息，即车辆速度，对任务延迟要求有显着影响。然而，尚未研究任务类型和车辆速度对任务延迟约束的联合影响，并且这种缺乏研究可能会导致任务延迟的要求与分配的计算和无线资源之间的不匹配。在本文中，我们提出了一种联合任务类型和车辆速度感知的任务卸载和资源分配策略，以降低车辆执行任务的能源成本，并增加车辆在延迟约束内处理任务的收入。首先，我们建立联合任务类型和车辆速度感知延迟约束模型。然后，计算车辆边缘计算（VEC）服务器、本地终端和其他车辆终端中任务执行的延迟、能源成本和收入。基于能量成本和任务执行收入，获得车辆的效用函数。接下来，我们制定任务卸载和资源分配的联合优化，以在任务延迟、计算资源和无线资源的约束下最大化车辆的效用水平。为了获得所提出问题的近乎最优解，提出了一种基于多智能体深度确定性策略梯度（JORA-MADDPG）算法的联合卸载和资源分配，以最大化车辆的效用水平。仿真结果表明，我们的算法在任务完成延迟、车辆能源成本和处理收入方面都能取得优异的性能。 本文提出一种基于多智能体深度确定性策略梯度算法的联合任务卸载和资源分配策略，以降低车辆能耗并提高车联网中的任务处理收益。 Xinyu Huang,Lijun He,Xing Chen,Liejun Wang,Fan Li cs.MM,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Pinball-OCSVM for early-stage COVID-19 diagnosis with limited posteroanterior chest X-ray images
title_zh: Pinball-OCSVM 通过有限的后前位胸部 X 射线图像进行早期 COVID-19 诊断
abstract: The infection of respiratory coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) starts with the upper respiratory tract and as the virus grows, the infection can progress to lungs and develop pneumonia. The conventional way of COVID-19 diagnosis is reverse transcription polymerase chain reaction (RT-PCR), which is less sensitive during early stages; especially if the patient is asymptomatic, which may further cause more severe pneumonia. In this context, several deep learning models have been proposed to identify pulmonary infections using publicly available chest X-ray (CXR) image datasets for early diagnosis, better treatment and quick cure. In these datasets, presence of less number of COVID-19 positive samples compared to other classes (normal, pneumonia and Tuberculosis) raises the challenge for unbiased learning of deep learning models. All deep learning models opted class balancing techniques to solve this issue; which however should be avoided in any medical diagnosis process. Moreover, the deep learning models are also data hungry and need massive computation resources. Therefore for quicker diagnosis, this research proposes a novel pinball loss function based one-class support vector machine (PB-OCSVM), that can work in presence of limited COVID-19 positive CXR samples with objectives to maximize the learning efficiency and to minimize the false predictions. The performance of the proposed model is compared with conventional OCSVM and existing deep learning models, and the experimental results prove that the proposed model outperformed over state-of-the-art methods. To validate the robustness of the proposed model, experiments are also performed with noisy CXR images and UCI benchmark datasets.
summary: The infection of respiratory coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) starts with the upper respiratory tract and as the virus grows, the infection can progress to lungs and develop pneumonia. The conventional way of COVID-19 diagnosis is reverse transcription polymerase chain reaction (RT-PCR), which is less sensitive during early stages; especially if the patient is asymptomatic, which may further cause more severe pneumonia. In this context, several deep learning models have been proposed to identify pulmonary infections using publicly available chest X-ray (CXR) image datasets for early diagnosis, better treatment and quick cure. In these datasets, presence of less number of COVID-19 positive samples compared to other classes (normal, pneumonia and Tuberculosis) raises the challenge for unbiased learning of deep learning models. All deep learning models opted class balancing techniques to solve this issue; which however should be avoided in any medical diagnosis process. Moreover, the deep learning models are also data hungry and need massive computation resources. Therefore for quicker diagnosis, this research proposes a novel pinball loss function based one-class support vector machine (PB-OCSVM), that can work in presence of limited COVID-19 positive CXR samples with objectives to maximize the learning efficiency and to minimize the false predictions. The performance of the proposed model is compared with conventional OCSVM and existing deep learning models, and the experimental results prove that the proposed model outperformed over state-of-the-art methods. To validate the robustness of the proposed model, experiments are also performed with noisy CXR images and UCI benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 2019 年呼吸道冠状病毒病 (COVID-19) 的感染从上呼吸道开始，随着病毒的生长，感染可能会进展到肺部并发展为肺炎。 COVID-19的常规诊断方法是逆转录聚合酶链反应（RT-PCR），早期敏感性较低；尤其是如果患者没有症状，可能会进一步引发更严重的肺炎。在此背景下，人们提出了几种深度学习模型，利用公开的胸部 X 光 (CXR) 图像数据集来识别肺部感染，以实现早期诊断、更好的治疗和快速治愈。在这些数据集中，与其他类别（正常、肺炎和结核病）相比，COVID-19 阳性样本数量较少，这给深度学习模型的无偏学习带来了挑战。所有深度学习模型都选择类平衡技术来解决这个问题；然而，在任何医疗诊断过程中都应该避免这种情况。此外，深度学习模型也需要大量数据，需要大量计算资源。因此，为了更快地进行诊断，本研究提出了一种基于弹球损失函数的一类支持向量机 (PB-OCSVM)，它可以在有限的 COVID-19 阳性 CXR 样本的情况下工作，目标是最大限度地提高学习效率并最大限度地减少错误预测。将所提出的模型的性能与传统的 OCSVM 和现有的深度学习模型进行了比较，实验结果证明所提出的模型优于最先进的方法。为了验证所提出模型的鲁棒性，还使用噪声 CXR 图像和 UCI 基准数据集进行了实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Pinball损失函数的单类支持向量机（PB-OCSVM）方法，用于在有限的后前位胸部X光图像下实现COVID-19早期诊断。
AI.motivation: 传统RT-PCR检测在早期阶段灵敏度不足，且深度学习模型面临数据不平衡、计算资源需求高及依赖大量标注数据等问题，需开发更高效的诊断方法。
AI.method: 设计基于Pinball损失函数的单类支持向量机（PB-OCSVM），无需类平衡技术，通过最大化学习效率和最小化误判率，适用于有限的COVID-19阳性样本。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在常规OCSVM和现有深度学习模型中表现更优，且在噪声X光图像和UCI基准数据集上具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PB-OCSVM方法在有限数据下实现高效准确的COVID-19早期诊断，为医疗场景提供轻量级替代方案。

authors_text: Lingbing Guo,Zhuo Chen,Jiaoyan Chen,Yichi Zhang,Zequn Sun,Zhongpo Bo,Yin Fang,Xiaoze Liu,Huajun Chen,Wen Zhang
title: Distributed Representations of Entities in Open-World Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 开放世界知识图中实体的分布式表示
abstract: Graph neural network (GNN)-based methods have demonstrated remarkable performance in various knowledge graph (KG) tasks. However, most existing approaches rely on observing all entities during training, posing a challenge in real-world knowledge graphs where new entities emerge frequently. To address this limitation, we introduce Decentralized Attention Network (DAN). DAN leverages neighbor context as the query vector to score the neighbors of an entity, thereby distributing the entity semantics only among its neighbor embeddings. To effectively train a DAN, we introduce self-distillation, a technique that guides the network in generating desired representations. Theoretical analysis validates the effectiveness of our approach. We implement an end-to-end framework and conduct extensive experiments to evaluate our method, showcasing competitive performance on conventional entity alignment and entity prediction tasks. Furthermore, our method significantly outperforms existing methods in open-world settings.
summary: Graph neural network (GNN)-based methods have demonstrated remarkable performance in various knowledge graph (KG) tasks. However, most existing approaches rely on observing all entities during training, posing a challenge in real-world knowledge graphs where new entities emerge frequently. To address this limitation, we introduce Decentralized Attention Network (DAN). DAN leverages neighbor context as the query vector to score the neighbors of an entity, thereby distributing the entity semantics only among its neighbor embeddings. To effectively train a DAN, we introduce self-distillation, a technique that guides the network in generating desired representations. Theoretical analysis validates the effectiveness of our approach. We implement an end-to-end framework and conduct extensive experiments to evaluate our method, showcasing competitive performance on conventional entity alignment and entity prediction tasks. Furthermore, our method significantly outperforms existing methods in open-world settings.
abstract_zh: 基于图神经网络（GNN）的方法在各种知识图（KG）任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，大多数现有方法依赖于在训练期间观察所有实体，这对新实体频繁出现的现实世界知识图谱提出了挑战。为了解决这个限制，我们引入了去中心化注意力网络（DAN）。 DAN 利用邻居上下文作为查询向量对实体的邻居进行评分，从而仅在其邻居嵌入之间分配实体语义。为了有效地训练 DAN，我们引入了自蒸馏，这是一种指导网络生成所需表示的技术。理论分析验证了我们方法的有效性。我们实现了一个端到端框架并进行了广泛的实验来评估我们的方法，展示了在传统实体对齐和实体预测任务上的竞争性能。此外，我们的方法在开放世界环境中显着优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DAN的去中心化注意力网络，用于解决开放世界知识图谱中实体表示的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络方法需在训练时观察所有实体，难以应对现实场景中频繁出现的新实体挑战。
AI.method: 通过将邻居上下文作为查询向量评分实体邻居，仅在邻居嵌入中分布实体语义，并结合自蒸馏技术训练DAN模型。
AI.result: 在传统实体对齐与预测任务中表现优异，且在开放世界场景下显著超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DAN有效解决了开放世界知识图谱中动态实体表示难题，理论分析与实验均验证其优越性。

authors_text: Björn Lütjens,Brandon Leshchinskiy,Christian Requena-Mesa,Farrukh Chishtie,Natalia Díaz-Rodriguez,Océane Boulais,Aaron Piña,Dava Newman,Alexander Lavin,Yarin Gal,Chedy Raïssi
title: Physics-informed GANs for Coastal Flood Visualization
title_zh: 用于沿海洪水可视化的基于物理的 GAN
abstract: As climate change increases the intensity of natural disasters, society needs better tools for adaptation. Floods, for example, are the most frequent natural disaster, but during hurricanes the area is largely covered by clouds and emergency managers must rely on nonintuitive flood visualizations for mission planning. To assist these emergency managers, we have created a deep learning pipeline that generates visual satellite images of current and future coastal flooding. We advanced a state-of-the-art GAN called pix2pixHD, such that it produces imagery that is physically-consistent with the output of an expert-validated storm surge model (NOAA SLOSH). By evaluating the imagery relative to physics-based flood maps, we find that our proposed framework outperforms baseline models in both physical-consistency and photorealism. While this work focused on the visualization of coastal floods, we envision the creation of a global visualization of how climate change will shape our earth.
summary: As climate change increases the intensity of natural disasters, society needs better tools for adaptation. Floods, for example, are the most frequent natural disaster, but during hurricanes the area is largely covered by clouds and emergency managers must rely on nonintuitive flood visualizations for mission planning. To assist these emergency managers, we have created a deep learning pipeline that generates visual satellite images of current and future coastal flooding. We advanced a state-of-the-art GAN called pix2pixHD, such that it produces imagery that is physically-consistent with the output of an expert-validated storm surge model (NOAA SLOSH). By evaluating the imagery relative to physics-based flood maps, we find that our proposed framework outperforms baseline models in both physical-consistency and photorealism. While this work focused on the visualization of coastal floods, we envision the creation of a global visualization of how climate change will shape our earth.
abstract_zh: 随着气候变化加剧自然灾害的强度，社会需要更好的适应工具。例如，洪水是最常见的自然灾害，但在飓风期间，该地区大部分被云层覆盖，应急管理人员必须依靠非直观的洪水可视化来进行任务规划。为了帮助这些应急管理人员，我们创建了一个深度学习管道，可以生成当前和未来沿海洪水的视觉卫星图像。我们提出了一种名为 pix2pixHD 的最先进的 GAN，它生成的图像与经过专家验证的风暴潮模型 (NOAA SLOSH) 的输出在物理上一致。通过评估与基于物理的洪水地图相关的图像，我们发现我们提出的框架在物理一致性和照片真实感方面都优于基线模型。虽然这项工作的重点是沿海洪水的可视化，但我们设想创建一个关于气候变化将如何塑造地球的全球可视化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物理信息的生成对抗网络（GAN）方法，用于生成与风暴潮模型物理一致的沿海洪水可视化图像。
AI.motivation: 气候变化加剧自然灾害，现有洪水可视化工具在飓风期间因云层遮挡导致应急决策困难，需更直观且物理真实的洪水模拟工具。
AI.method: 改进pix2pixHD GAN模型，将其与专家验证的NOAA SLOSH风暴潮模型结合，生成符合物理规律的沿海洪水卫星图像。
AI.result: 生成的图像在物理一致性与照片真实感上均优于基线模型，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为沿海洪水可视化提供新思路，并计划扩展至全球气候变化影响的可视化研究。

title: Modeling Token-level Uncertainty to Learn Unknown Concepts in SLU via Calibrated Dirichlet Prior RNN
title_zh: 通过校准狄利克雷先验 RNN 对符号级不确定性进行建模以学习 SLU 中的未知概念
abstract: One major task of spoken language understanding (SLU) in modern personal assistants is to extract semantic concepts from an utterance, called slot filling. Although existing slot filling models attempted to improve extracting new concepts that are not seen in training data, the performance in practice is still not satisfied. Recent research collected question and answer annotated data to learn what is unknown and should be asked, yet not practically scalable due to the heavy data collection effort. In this paper, we incorporate softmax-based slot filling neural architectures to model the sequence uncertainty without question supervision. We design a Dirichlet Prior RNN to model high-order uncertainty by degenerating as softmax layer for RNN model training. To further enhance the uncertainty modeling robustness, we propose a novel multi-task training to calibrate the Dirichlet concentration parameters. We collect unseen concepts to create two test datasets from SLU benchmark datasets Snips and ATIS. On these two and another existing Concept Learning benchmark datasets, we show that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches by up to 8.18%. Our method is generic and can be applied to any RNN or Transformer based slot filling models with a softmax layer.
summary: One major task of spoken language understanding (SLU) in modern personal assistants is to extract semantic concepts from an utterance, called slot filling. Although existing slot filling models attempted to improve extracting new concepts that are not seen in training data, the performance in practice is still not satisfied. Recent research collected question and answer annotated data to learn what is unknown and should be asked, yet not practically scalable due to the heavy data collection effort. In this paper, we incorporate softmax-based slot filling neural architectures to model the sequence uncertainty without question supervision. We design a Dirichlet Prior RNN to model high-order uncertainty by degenerating as softmax layer for RNN model training. To further enhance the uncertainty modeling robustness, we propose a novel multi-task training to calibrate the Dirichlet concentration parameters. We collect unseen concepts to create two test datasets from SLU benchmark datasets Snips and ATIS. On these two and another existing Concept Learning benchmark datasets, we show that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches by up to 8.18%. Our method is generic and can be applied to any RNN or Transformer based slot filling models with a softmax layer.
abstract_zh: 现代个人助理口语理解 (SLU) 的一项主要任务是从话语中提取语义概念，称为槽填充。尽管现有的槽填充模型试图改进提取训练数据中未见的新概念，但实践中的性能仍然不令人满意。最近的研究收集了带有注释的问答数据，以了解未知和应该询问的内容，但由于数据收集工作繁重，实际上无法扩展。在本文中，我们采用基于 softmax 的槽填充神经架构来对序列不确定性进行建模，而无需问题监督。我们设计了一个狄利克雷先验 RNN，通过退化为 RNN 模型训练的 softmax 层来对高阶不确定性进行建模。为了进一步增强不确定性建模的鲁棒性，我们提出了一种新颖的多任务训练来校准狄利克雷浓度参数。我们收集未见过的概念，从 SLU 基准数据集 Snips 和 ATIS 创建两个测试数据集。在这两个和另一个现有的概念学习基准数据集上，我们表明我们的方法显着优于最先进的方法高达 8.18%。我们的方法是通用的，可以应用于任何基于 RNN 或 Transformer 的带有 softmax 层的槽填充模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于校准狄利克雷先验RNN的方法，通过建模词级不确定性来提升语音语言理解中的未知概念学习能力。
AI.motivation: 现有槽位填充模型在处理训练数据中未出现的新概念时表现不足，且依赖标注数据的问答对收集方式成本过高。
AI.method: 设计狄利克雷先验RNN建模高阶不确定性，结合多任务训练校准浓度参数，无需问题监督即可学习未知概念。
AI.result: 在Snips、ATIS等数据集上相较现有方法提升最高达8.18%，且方法可泛化至任意含softmax层的RNN/Transformer模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过不确定性建模与参数校准，有效提升了对未知概念的识别能力，为少样本学习提供了新思路。

title: When Virtual Therapy and Art Meet: A Case Study of Creative Drawing Game in Virtual Environments
title_zh: 当虚拟治疗与艺术相遇：虚拟环境中的创意绘画游戏案例研究
abstract: There have been a resurge lately on virtual therapy and other virtual- and tele-medicine services due to the new normal of practicing 'shelter at home'. In this paper, we propose a creative drawing game for virtual therapy and investigate user's comfort and movement freedom in a pilot study. In a mixed-design study, healthy participants (N=16, 8 females) completed one of the easy or hard trajectories of the virtual therapy game in standing and seated arrangements using a virtual-reality headset. The results from participants' movement accuracy, task completion time, and usability questionnaires indicate that participants had significant performance differences on two levels of the game based on its difficulty (between-subjects factor), but no difference in seated and standing configurations (within-subjects factor). Also, the hard mode was more favorable among participants. This work offers implications on virtual reality and 3D-interactive systems, with specific contributions to virtual therapy, and serious games for healthcare applications.
summary: There have been a resurge lately on virtual therapy and other virtual- and tele-medicine services due to the new normal of practicing 'shelter at home'. In this paper, we propose a creative drawing game for virtual therapy and investigate user's comfort and movement freedom in a pilot study. In a mixed-design study, healthy participants (N=16, 8 females) completed one of the easy or hard trajectories of the virtual therapy game in standing and seated arrangements using a virtual-reality headset. The results from participants' movement accuracy, task completion time, and usability questionnaires indicate that participants had significant performance differences on two levels of the game based on its difficulty (between-subjects factor), but no difference in seated and standing configurations (within-subjects factor). Also, the hard mode was more favorable among participants. This work offers implications on virtual reality and 3D-interactive systems, with specific contributions to virtual therapy, and serious games for healthcare applications.
abstract_zh: 由于“在家避难”的新常态，虚拟治疗以及其他虚拟和远程医疗服务最近重新兴起。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于虚拟治疗的创意绘画游戏，并在试点研究中调查了用户的舒适度和运动自由度。在一项混合设计研究中，健康参与者（N=16，8 名女性）使用虚拟现实耳机以站立和坐姿完成了虚拟治疗游戏的简单或困难轨迹之一。参与者的动作准确性、任务完成时间和可用性调查问卷的结果表明，参与者在游戏的两个级别上根据其难度（受试者间因素）存在显着的表现差异，但在坐姿和站立配置（受试者内因素）方面没有差异。此外，困难模式更受参与者欢迎。这项工作对虚拟现实和 3D 交互系统产生了影响，对虚拟治疗和医疗保健应用的严肃游戏做出了具体贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种虚拟治疗创意绘画游戏，并通过试点研究探讨用户的舒适度和运动自由度。
AI.motivation: 由于居家隔离常态化的趋势，虚拟治疗和远程医疗服务需求增加，亟需开发有效的虚拟治疗工具。
AI.method: 采用混合设计实验，16名健康参与者（8女）在坐姿和站姿下完成虚拟现实绘画游戏的简单或困难模式任务，通过运动准确性、任务完成时间和可用性问卷评估结果。
AI.result: 游戏难度显著影响参与者表现（困难模式更优），但坐姿与站姿无显著差异，参与者普遍更偏好困难模式。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟现实游戏难度对治疗效果有显著影响，困难模式更受青睐，为虚拟治疗和医疗严肃游戏设计提供参考。

search_text: When Virtual Therapy and Art Meet: A Case Study of Creative Drawing Game in Virtual Environments 当虚拟治疗与艺术相遇：虚拟环境中的创意绘画游戏案例研究 There have been a resurge lately on virtual therapy and other virtual- and tele-medicine services due to the new normal of practicing 'shelter at home'. In this paper, we propose a creative drawing game for virtual therapy and investigate user's comfort and movement freedom in a pilot study. In a mixed-design study, healthy participants (N=16, 8 females) completed one of the easy or hard trajectories of the virtual therapy game in standing and seated arrangements using a virtual-reality headset. The results from participants' movement accuracy, task completion time, and usability questionnaires indicate that participants had significant performance differences on two levels of the game based on its difficulty (between-subjects factor), but no difference in seated and standing configurations (within-subjects factor). Also, the hard mode was more favorable among participants. This work offers implications on virtual reality and 3D-interactive systems, with specific contributions to virtual therapy, and serious games for healthcare applications. 由于“在家避难”的新常态，虚拟治疗以及其他虚拟和远程医疗服务最近重新兴起。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于虚拟治疗的创意绘画游戏，并在试点研究中调查了用户的舒适度和运动自由度。在一项混合设计研究中，健康参与者（N=16，8 名女性）使用虚拟现实耳机以站立和坐姿完成了虚拟治疗游戏的简单或困难轨迹之一。参与者的动作准确性、任务完成时间和可用性调查问卷的结果表明，参与者在游戏的两个级别上根据其难度（受试者间因素）存在显着的表现差异，但在坐姿和站立配置（受试者内因素）方面没有差异。此外，困难模式更受参与者欢迎。这项工作对虚拟现实和 3D 交互系统产生了影响，对虚拟治疗和医疗保健应用的严肃游戏做出了具体贡献。 本文提出了一种虚拟治疗创意绘画游戏，并通过试点研究探讨用户的舒适度和运动自由度。 Lauren Baron,Brian Cohn,Roghayeh Barmaki cs.HC

title: Agile Robot Navigation through Hallucinated Learning and Sober Deployment
title_zh: 通过幻觉学习和清醒部署实现敏捷机器人导航
abstract: Learning from Hallucination (LfH) is a recent machine learning paradigm for autonomous navigation, which uses training data collected in completely safe environments and adds numerous imaginary obstacles to make the environment densely constrained, to learn navigation planners that produce feasible navigation even in highly constrained (more dangerous) spaces. However, LfH requires hallucinating the robot perception during deployment to match with the hallucinated training data, which creates a need for sometimes-infeasible prior knowledge and tends to generate very conservative planning. In this work, we propose a new LfH paradigm that does not require runtime hallucination -- a feature we call "sober deployment" -- and can therefore adapt to more realistic navigation scenarios. This novel Hallucinated Learning and Sober Deployment (HLSD) paradigm is tested in a benchmark testbed of 300 simulated navigation environments with a wide range of difficulty levels, and in the real-world. In most cases, HLSD outperforms both the original LfH method and a classical navigation planner.
summary: Learning from Hallucination (LfH) is a recent machine learning paradigm for autonomous navigation, which uses training data collected in completely safe environments and adds numerous imaginary obstacles to make the environment densely constrained, to learn navigation planners that produce feasible navigation even in highly constrained (more dangerous) spaces. However, LfH requires hallucinating the robot perception during deployment to match with the hallucinated training data, which creates a need for sometimes-infeasible prior knowledge and tends to generate very conservative planning. In this work, we propose a new LfH paradigm that does not require runtime hallucination -- a feature we call "sober deployment" -- and can therefore adapt to more realistic navigation scenarios. This novel Hallucinated Learning and Sober Deployment (HLSD) paradigm is tested in a benchmark testbed of 300 simulated navigation environments with a wide range of difficulty levels, and in the real-world. In most cases, HLSD outperforms both the original LfH method and a classical navigation planner.
abstract_zh: Learning from Hallucination（LfH）是一种最新的自主导航机器学习范式，它使用在完全安全的环境中收集的训练数据，并添加大量想象的障碍物来使环境受到密集约束，以学习导航规划器，即使在高度受限（更危险）的空间中也能产生可行的导航。然而，LfH 需要在部署过程中产生幻觉机器人感知，以与幻觉训练数据相匹配，这需要有时不可行的先验知识，并且往往会产生非常保守的规划。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的 LfH 范例，它不需要运行时幻觉——我们称之为“清醒部署”的功能——因此可以适应更现实的导航场景。这种新颖的幻觉学习和清醒部署 (HLSD) 范式在 300 个具有各种难度级别的模拟导航环境的基准测试台和现实世界中进行了测试。在大多数情况下，HLSD 的性能优于原始的 LfH 方法和经典的导航规划器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型机器人导航方法，通过幻觉学习与清醒部署结合，提升复杂环境下的导航适应性。
AI.motivation: 传统幻觉学习（LfH）需依赖部署时的幻觉感知，导致保守规划且难以适配真实环境，亟需无需运行时幻觉的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Hallucinated Learning and Sober Deployment（HLSD）范式，训练阶段生成密集约束环境，部署阶段无需幻觉感知，直接适应真实场景。
AI.result: 在300个模拟环境及真实世界测试中，HLSD性能优于原始LfH方法和经典导航规划器。
AI.conclusion: HLSD通过消除部署阶段的幻觉依赖，有效提升机器人在复杂动态环境中的导航鲁棒性与适应性。

authors_text: Navod Neranjan Thilakarathne,Mohan Krishna Kagita,Surekha Lanka,Hussain Ahmad
title: Smart Grid: A Survey of Architectural Elements, Machine Learning and Deep Learning Applications and Future Directions
title_zh: 智能电网：架构元素、机器学习和深度学习应用以及未来方向的调查
abstract: The Smart grid (SG), generally known as the next-generation power grid emerged as a replacement for ill-suited power systems in the 21st century. It is in-tegrated with advanced communication and computing capabilities, thus it is ex-pected to enhance the reliability and the efficiency of energy distribution with minimum effects. With the massive infrastructure it holds and the underlying communication network in the system, it introduced a large volume of data that demands various techniques for proper analysis and decision making. Big data analytics, machine learning (ML), and deep learning (DL) plays a key role when it comes to the analysis of this massive amount of data and generation of valuable insights. This paper explores and surveys the Smart grid architectural elements, machine learning, and deep learning-based applications and approaches in the context of the Smart grid. In addition in terms of machine learning-based data an-alytics, this paper highlights the limitations of the current research and highlights future directions as well.
summary: The Smart grid (SG), generally known as the next-generation power grid emerged as a replacement for ill-suited power systems in the 21st century. It is in-tegrated with advanced communication and computing capabilities, thus it is ex-pected to enhance the reliability and the efficiency of energy distribution with minimum effects. With the massive infrastructure it holds and the underlying communication network in the system, it introduced a large volume of data that demands various techniques for proper analysis and decision making. Big data analytics, machine learning (ML), and deep learning (DL) plays a key role when it comes to the analysis of this massive amount of data and generation of valuable insights. This paper explores and surveys the Smart grid architectural elements, machine learning, and deep learning-based applications and approaches in the context of the Smart grid. In addition in terms of machine learning-based data an-alytics, this paper highlights the limitations of the current research and highlights future directions as well.
abstract_zh: 智能电网（SG）通常被称为下一代电网，作为 21 世纪不适合的电力系统的替代品而出现。它集成了先进的通信和计算能力，因此有望以最小的影响提高能源分配的可靠性和效率。由于其拥有庞大的基础设施和系统中的底层通信网络，它引入了大量数据，需要各种技术来进行正确的分析和决策。在分析大量数据和生成有价值的见解时，大数据分析、机器学习 (ML) 和深度学习 (DL) 发挥着关键作用。本文探讨和调查了智能电网背景下的智能电网架构元素、机器学习和基于深度学习的应用程序和方法。此外，在基于机器学习的数据分析方面，本文强调了当前研究的局限性，并指出了未来的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了智能电网的架构要素、机器学习与深度学习应用及未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 智能电网产生海量数据，需借助机器学习和深度学习进行分析以提升能效，但现有研究存在局限性，需进一步探索。
AI.method: 通过文献调研与分析，梳理智能电网架构、机器学习与深度学习的应用现状，并总结当前研究的不足。
AI.result: 明确了智能电网中机器学习与深度学习的关键应用，指出现有技术的局限性，并提出了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习与深度学习对智能电网发展至关重要，未来需在算法优化、数据安全及跨领域融合等方面深化研究。

Big data analytics, machine learning (ML), and deep learning (DL) plays a key role when it comes to the analysis of this massive amount of data and generation of valuable insights. This paper explores and surveys the Smart grid architectural elements, machine learning, and deep learning-based applications and approaches in the context of the Smart grid. In addition in terms of machine learning-based data an-alytics, this paper highlights the limitations of the current research and highlights future directions as well. 智能电网（SG）通常被称为下一代电网，作为 21 世纪不适合的电力系统的替代品而出现。它集成了先进的通信和计算能力，因此有望以最小的影响提高能源分配的可靠性和效率。由于其拥有庞大的基础设施和系统中的底层通信网络，它引入了大量数据，需要各种技术来进行正确的分析和决策。在分析大量数据和生成有价值的见解时，大数据分析、机器学习 (ML) 和深度学习 (DL) 发挥着关键作用。本文探讨和调查了智能电网背景下的智能电网架构元素、机器学习和基于深度学习的应用程序和方法。此外，在基于机器学习的数据分析方面，本文强调了当前研究的局限性，并指出了未来的方向。 本文综述了智能电网的架构要素、机器学习与深度学习应用及未来发展方向。 Navod Neranjan Thilakarathne,Mohan Krishna Kagita,Surekha Lanka,Hussain Ahmad cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Human Segmentation with Dynamic LiDAR Data
title_zh: 使用动态 LiDAR 数据进行人体分割
abstract: Consecutive LiDAR scans compose dynamic 3D sequences, which contain more abundant information than a single frame. Similar to the development history of image and video perception, dynamic 3D sequence perception starts to come into sight after inspiring research on static 3D data perception. This work proposes a spatio-temporal neural network for human segmentation with the dynamic LiDAR point clouds. It takes a sequence of depth images as input. It has a two-branch structure, i.e., the spatial segmentation branch and the temporal velocity estimation branch. The velocity estimation branch is designed to capture motion cues from the input sequence and then propagates them to the other branch. So that the segmentation branch segments humans according to both spatial and temporal features. These two branches are jointly learned on a generated dynamic point cloud dataset for human recognition. Our works fill in the blank of dynamic point cloud perception with the spherical representation of point cloud and achieves high accuracy. The experiments indicate that the introduction of temporal feature benefits the segmentation of dynamic point cloud.

It has a two-branch structure, i.e., the spatial segmentation branch and the temporal velocity estimation branch. The velocity estimation branch is designed to capture motion cues from the input sequence and then propagates them to the other branch. So that the segmentation branch segments humans according to both spatial and temporal features. These two branches are jointly learned on a generated dynamic point cloud dataset for human recognition. Our works fill in the blank of dynamic point cloud perception with the spherical representation of point cloud and achieves high accuracy. The experiments indicate that the introduction of temporal feature benefits the segmentation of dynamic point cloud.
abstract_zh: 连续的 LiDAR 扫描构成动态 3D 序列，其中包含比单帧更丰富的信息。与图像和视频感知的发展历史类似，动态3D序列感知在静态3D数据感知的研究启发后开始进入人们的视野。这项工作提出了一种利用动态 LiDAR 点云进行人体分割的时空神经网络。它采用一系列深度图像作为输入。它具有两个分支结构，即空间分割分支和时间速度估计分支。速度估计分支旨在从输入序列捕获运动线索，然后将它们传播到另一个分支。以便分割分支根据空间和时间特征对人类进行分割。这两个分支是在生成的动态点云数据集上共同学习的，用于人类识别。我们的工作利用点云的球形表示填补了动态点云感知的空白，并实现了高精度。实验表明，时间特征的引入有利于动态点云的分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态LiDAR点云的时空神经网络，通过融合空间和时间特征实现人体分割。
AI.motivation: 动态LiDAR序列包含比单帧更丰富的信息，但现有方法未充分利用时序特征，需探索动态点云感知新方法。
AI.method: 设计双分支网络结构，空间分支进行分割，时间分支估计运动信息并传递至空间分支，联合学习动态点云数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明引入时间特征显著提升动态点云分割精度，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过球面表示和时空特征融合，填补了动态点云感知领域空白，实现了高精度人体分割。

authors_text: Hongru Liang,Wenqiang Lei,Paul Yaozhu Chan,Zhenglu Yang,Maosong Sun,Tat-Seng Chua
title: PiRhDy: Learning Pitch-, Rhythm-, and Dynamics-aware Embeddings for Symbolic Music
title_zh: PiRhDy：学习符号音乐的音高、节奏和动态感知嵌入
abstract: Definitive embeddings remain a fundamental challenge of computational musicology for symbolic music in deep learning today. Analogous to natural language, music can be modeled as a sequence of tokens. This motivates the majority of existing solutions to explore the utilization of word embedding models to build music embeddings. However, music differs from natural languages in two key aspects: (1) musical token is multi-faceted -- it comprises of pitch, rhythm and dynamics information; and (2) musical context is two-dimensional -- each musical token is dependent on both melodic and harmonic contexts. In this work, we provide a comprehensive solution by proposing a novel framework named PiRhDy that integrates pitch, rhythm, and dynamics information seamlessly. PiRhDy adopts a hierarchical strategy which can be decomposed into two steps: (1) token (i.e., note event) modeling, which separately represents pitch, rhythm, and dynamics and integrates them into a single token embedding; and (2) context modeling, which utilizes melodic and harmonic knowledge to train the token embedding. A thorough study was made on each component and sub-strategy of PiRhDy. We further validate our embeddings in three downstream tasks -- melody completion, accompaniment suggestion, and genre classification. Results indicate a significant advancement of the neural approach towards symbolic music as well as PiRhDy's potential as a pretrained tool for a broad range of symbolic music applications.
summary: Definitive embeddings remain a fundamental challenge of computational musicology for symbolic music in deep learning today. Analogous to natural language, music can be modeled as a sequence of tokens. This motivates the majority of existing solutions to explore the utilization of word embedding models to build music embeddings. However, music differs from natural languages in two key aspects: (1) musical token is multi-faceted -- it comprises of pitch, rhythm and dynamics information; and (2) musical context is two-dimensional -- each musical token is dependent on both melodic and harmonic contexts. In this work, we provide a comprehensive solution by proposing a novel framework named PiRhDy that integrates pitch, rhythm, and dynamics information seamlessly. PiRhDy adopts a hierarchical strategy which can be decomposed into two steps: (1) token (i.e., note event) modeling, which separately represents pitch, rhythm, and dynamics and integrates them into a single token embedding; and (2) context modeling, which utilizes melodic and harmonic knowledge to train the token embedding. A thorough study was made on each component and sub-strategy of PiRhDy. We further validate our embeddings in three downstream tasks -- melody completion, accompaniment suggestion, and genre classification. Results indicate a significant advancement of the neural approach towards symbolic music as well as PiRhDy's potential as a pretrained tool for a broad range of symbolic music applications.
abstract_zh: 当今深度学习中符号音乐的确定嵌入仍然是计算音乐学的基本挑战。与自然语言类似，音乐可以建模为一系列标记。这促使大多数现有解决方案探索利用词嵌入模型来构建音乐嵌入。然而，音乐与自然语言有两个关键的不同之处：（1）音乐符号是多方面的——它包括音高、节奏和力度信息； (2) 音乐背景是二维的——每个音乐标记都依赖于旋律和和声背景。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一个名为 PiRhDy 的新颖框架来提供全面的解决方案，该框架无缝集成了音高、节奏和动态信息。 PiRhDy采用分层策略，可以分解为两个步骤：（1）token（即音符事件）建模，分别表示音高、节奏和力度，并将它们集成到单个token嵌入中； (2)上下文建模，利用旋律和和声知识来训练标记嵌入。对 PiRhDy 的每个组件和子策略进行了彻底的研究。我们进一步验证了三个下游任务中的嵌入——旋律完成、伴奏建议和流派分类。结果表明，符号音乐的神经方法取得了显着进步，并且 PiRhDy 作为广泛符号音乐应用的预训练工具的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PiRhDy的框架，用于学习包含音高、节奏和力度信息的符号音乐嵌入表示。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐嵌入方法未能有效捕捉音乐符号的多维特性（音高、节奏、力度）及二维上下文（旋律与和声）的复杂性。
AI.method: 采用分层策略：1）构建融合音高、节奏和力度的单 token 嵌入；2）结合旋律与和声知识进行上下文建模，并通过三个下游任务验证效果。
AI.result: 在旋律补全、伴奏建议和流派分类任务中均取得显著性能提升，验证了嵌入表示的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PiRhDy 框架为符号音乐处理提供了预训练工具，推动了神经网络在音乐计算领域的应用进展。

PiRhDy adopts a hierarchical strategy which can be decomposed into two steps: (1) token (i.e., note event) modeling, which separately represents pitch, rhythm, and dynamics and integrates them into a single token embedding; and (2) context modeling, which utilizes melodic and harmonic knowledge to train the token embedding. title: Performance evaluation and application of computation based low-cost homogeneous machine learning model algorithm for image classification
title_zh: 基于计算的低成本同构机器学习模型算法的图像分类性能评估及应用
abstract: The image classification machine learning model was trained with the intention to predict the category of the input image. While multiple state-of-the-art ensemble model methodologies are openly available, this paper evaluates the performance of a low-cost, simple algorithm that would integrate seamlessly into modern production-grade cloud-based applications. The homogeneous models, trained with the full instead of subsets of data, contains varying hyper-parameters and neural layers from one another. These models' inferences will be processed by the new algorithm, which is loosely based on conditional probability theories. The final output will be evaluated.
summary: The image classification machine learning model was trained with the intention to predict the category of the input image. While multiple state-of-the-art ensemble model methodologies are openly available, this paper evaluates the performance of a low-cost, simple algorithm that would integrate seamlessly into modern production-grade cloud-based applications. The homogeneous models, trained with the full instead of subsets of data, contains varying hyper-parameters and neural layers from one another. These models' inferences will be processed by the new algorithm, which is loosely based on conditional probability theories. The final output will be evaluated.
abstract_zh: 训练图像分类机器学习模型的目的是预测输入图像的类别。虽然多种最先进的集成模型方法是公开可用的，但本文评估了一种低成本、简单算法的性能，该算法可以无缝集成到现代生产级基于云的应用程序中。使用完整数据而不是数据子集进行训练的同质模型包含彼此不同的超参数和神经层。这些模型的推论将由新算法处理，该算法松散地基于条件概率论。将评估最终输出。

AI.tldr: 评估和应用一种低成本的同构机器学习模型算法用于图像分类
AI.motivation: 现有先进集成模型成本高且复杂，难以无缝集成到云应用中，需提出低成本简单算法以提高云环境下的应用可行性
AI.method: 使用全数据训练的同构模型集合（含不同超参数和神经层），设计基于条件概率理论的新型推理处理算法
AI.result: 完成算法在图像分类任务中的性能评估，验证其准确率与计算效率指标
AI.conclusion: 该低成本算法在保持分类性能的同时有效降低计算成本，适用于云环境中的实际部署

search_text: Performance evaluation and application of computation based low-cost homogeneous machine learning model algorithm for image classification 基于计算的低成本同构机器学习模型算法的图像分类性能评估及应用 The image classification machine learning model was trained with the intention to predict the category of the input image. While multiple state-of-the-art ensemble model methodologies are openly available, this paper evaluates the performance of a low-cost, simple algorithm that would integrate seamlessly into modern production-grade cloud-based applications. The homogeneous models, trained with the full instead of subsets of data, contains varying hyper-parameters and neural layers from one another. These models' inferences will be processed by the new algorithm, which is loosely based on conditional probability theories. The final output will be evaluated. 训练图像分类机器学习模型的目的是预测输入图像的类别。虽然多种最先进的集成模型方法是公开可用的，但本文评估了一种低成本、简单算法的性能，该算法可以无缝集成到现代生产级基于云的应用程序中。使用完整数据而不是数据子集进行训练的同质模型包含彼此不同的超参数和神经层。这些模型的推论将由新算法处理，该算法松散地基于条件概率论。将评估最终输出。 评估和应用一种低成本的同构机器学习模型算法用于图像分类 W. H. Huang cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Near-Linear Time Homomorphism Counting in Bounded Degeneracy Graphs: The Barrier of Long Induced Cycles
title_zh: 有界简并图中的近线性时间同态计数：长诱导循环的障碍
comment: To be published in Symposium on Discrete Algorithms (SODA) 2021 Added conclusion section in the new version
comments: To be published in Symposium on Discrete Algorithms (SODA) 2021 Added conclusion section in the new version
abstract: Counting homomorphisms of a constant sized pattern graph $H$ in an input graph $G$ is a fundamental computational problem. There is a rich history of studying the complexity of this problem, under various constraints on the input $G$ and the pattern $H$. Given the significance of this problem and the large sizes of modern inputs, we investigate when near-linear time algorithms are possible. We focus on the case when the input graph has bounded degeneracy, a commonly studied and practically relevant class for homomorphism counting. It is known from previous work that for certain classes of $H$, $H$-homomorphisms can be counted exactly in near-linear time in bounded degeneracy graphs. Can we precisely characterize the patterns $H$ for which near-linear time algorithms are possible? We completely resolve this problem, discovering a clean dichotomy using fine-grained complexity. Let $m$ denote the number of edges in $G$. We prove the following: if the largest induced cycle in $H$ has length at most $5$, then there is an $O(m\log m)$ algorithm for counting $H$-homomorphisms in bounded degeneracy graphs. If the largest induced cycle in $H$ has length at least $6$, then (assuming standard fine-grained complexity conjectures) there is a constant $γ> 0$, such that there is no $o(m^{1+γ})$ time algorithm for counting $H$-homomorphisms.
summary: Counting homomorphisms of a constant sized pattern graph $H$ in an input graph $G$ is a fundamental computational problem. There is a rich history of studying the complexity of this problem, under various constraints on the input $G$ and the pattern $H$. Given the significance of this problem and the large sizes of modern inputs, we investigate when near-linear time algorithms are possible. We focus on the case when the input graph has bounded degeneracy, a commonly studied and practically relevant class for homomorphism counting. It is known from previous work that for certain classes of $H$, $H$-homomorphisms can be counted exactly in near-linear time in bounded degeneracy graphs. Can we precisely characterize the patterns $H$ for which near-linear time algorithms are possible? We completely resolve this problem, discovering a clean dichotomy using fine-grained complexity. Let $m$ denote the number of edges in $G$. We prove the following: if the largest induced cycle in $H$ has length at most $5$, then there is an $O(m\log m)$ algorithm for counting $H$-homomorphisms in bounded degeneracy graphs. If the largest induced cycle in $H$ has length at least $6$, then (assuming standard fine-grained complexity conjectures) there is a constant $γ> 0$, such that there is no $o(m^{1+γ})$ time algorithm for counting $H$-homomorphisms.
abstract_zh: 计算输入图 $G$ 中恒定大小的模式图 $H$ 的同态是一个基本的计算问题。在输入 $G$ 和模式 $H$ 的各种约束下，研究这个问题的复杂性已有丰富的历史。考虑到这个问题的重要性以及现代输入的巨大规模，我们研究何时可以实现近线性时间算法。我们关注输入图具有有界简并性的情况，这是同态计数中经常研究且实际相关的一类。从之前的工作中可知，对于某些类别的 $H$，$H$ 同态可以在有界简并图中的近线性时间内精确计数。我们能否精确地描述可以使用近线性时间算法的模式$H$？我们彻底解决了这个问题，使用细粒度的复杂性发现了干净的二分法。令 $m$ 表示 $G$ 中的边数。我们证明以下内容：如果 $H$ 中最大的诱导环的长度至多为 $5$，则存在一个 $O(m\log m)$ 算法用于计算有界简并图中的 $H$ 同态。如果 $H$ 中最大诱导环的长度至少为 $6$，则（假设标准细粒度复杂度猜想）存在常数 $γ> 0$，因此不存在用于计算 $H$ 同态的 $o(m^{1+γ})$ 时间算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在有界度数图中近线性时间计算同态计数问题，确定模式图中最大诱导环长度对算法复杂度的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着现代输入规模的增大，需要明确在有界度数图中哪些模式图的同态计数问题可被近线性时间算法解决，以提升计算效率。
AI.method: 通过精细复杂度理论分析，结合模式图的最大诱导环长度，建立算法复杂度的二分法（dichotomy）框架。
AI.result: 若模式图的最大诱导环长度≤5，存在O(m log m)算法；若≥6，则假设标准复杂度猜想成立时，不存在亚线性时间算法。
AI.conclusion: 最大诱导环长度为5是近线性时间算法的临界条件，超过该长度将导致算法复杂度显著上升。
