authors_text: Emre Sariyildiz,Satoshi Hangai,Tarik Uzunovic,Takahiro Nozaki,Kouhei Ohnishi
title: Stability and Robustness of the Disturbance Observer-based Motion Control Systems in Discrete-Time Domain
title_zh: 基于扰动观测器的离散时域运动控制系统的稳定性和鲁棒性
abstract: This paper analyses the robust stability and performance of the Disturbance Observer- (DOb-) based digital motion control systems in discrete-time domain. It is shown that the phase margin and the robustness of the digital motion controller can be directly adjusted by tuning the nominal plant model and the bandwidth of the observer. However, they have upper and lower bounds due to robust stability and performance constraints as well as noise-sensitivity. The constraints on the design parameters of the DOb change when the digital motion controller is synthesised by measuring different states of a servo system. For example, the bandwidth of the DOb is limited by noise-sensitivity and waterbed effect when velocity and position measurements are employed in the digital robust motion controller synthesis. The robustness constraint due to the waterbed effect is removed when the DOb is implemented by acceleration measurement. The design constraints on the nominal plant model and the bandwidth of the observer are analytically derived by employing the generalised Bode Integral Theorem in discrete-time. The proposed design constraints allow one to systematically synthesise a high-performance DOb-based digital robust motion controller. Experimental results are given to verify the proposed analysis and synthesis methods.
summary: This paper analyses the robust stability and performance of the Disturbance Observer- (DOb-) based digital motion control systems in discrete-time domain. It is shown that the phase margin and the robustness of the digital motion controller can be directly adjusted by tuning the nominal plant model and the bandwidth of the observer. However, they have upper and lower bounds due to robust stability and performance constraints as well as noise-sensitivity. The constraints on the design parameters of the DOb change when the digital motion controller is synthesised by measuring different states of a servo system. For example, the bandwidth of the DOb is limited by noise-sensitivity and waterbed effect when velocity and position measurements are employed in the digital robust motion controller synthesis. The robustness constraint due to the waterbed effect is removed when the DOb is implemented by acceleration measurement. The design constraints on the nominal plant model and the bandwidth of the observer are analytically derived by employing the generalised Bode Integral Theorem in discrete-time. The proposed design constraints allow one to systematically synthesise a high-performance DOb-based digital robust motion controller. Experimental results are given to verify the proposed analysis and synthesis methods.
abstract_zh: 本文分析了离散时间域中基于扰动观测器（DOb）的数字运动控制系统的鲁棒稳定性和性能。结果表明，数字运动控制器的相位裕度和鲁棒性可以通过调整标称被控对象模型和观测器的带宽来直接调整。然而，由于稳健的稳定性和性能限制以及噪声敏感性，它们具有上限和下限。当通过测量伺服系统的不同状态来合成数字运动控制器时，对 DOb 设计参数的约束发生了变化。例如，当在数字鲁棒运动控制器合成中采用速度和位置测量时，DOb 的带宽受到噪声敏感性和水床效应的限制。当 DOb 通过加速度测量实现时，由于水床效应造成的鲁棒性约束被消除。通过采用离散时间的广义波德积分定理，分析导出了标称被控对象模型和观测器带宽的设计约束。所提出的设计约束允许人们系统地综合一种基于 DOb 的高性能数字鲁棒运动控制器。实验结果验证了所提出的分析和合成方法。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了离散时间域中基于扰动观测器（DOb）的运动控制系统的鲁棒稳定性和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数字运动控制器在调整相位裕度和鲁棒性时面临噪声敏感性和水床效应等约束，需系统化设计方法以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过离散时间广义Bode积分定理，推导出名义植株模型和观测器带宽的设计约束，并通过实验验证分析方法。
AI.result: 提出的设计约束条件可系统合成高性能DOb数字鲁棒运动控制器，实验结果验证了理论分析的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过考虑噪声敏感性和水床效应约束，为离散时间DOb控制器设计提供了理论依据和系统化方案。

Experimental results are given to verify the proposed analysis and synthesis methods. 本文分析了离散时间域中基于扰动观测器（DOb）的数字运动控制系统的鲁棒稳定性和性能。结果表明，数字运动控制器的相位裕度和鲁棒性可以通过调整标称被控对象模型和观测器的带宽来直接调整。然而，由于稳健的稳定性和性能限制以及噪声敏感性，它们具有上限和下限。当通过测量伺服系统的不同状态来合成数字运动控制器时，对 DOb 设计参数的约束发生了变化。例如，当在数字鲁棒运动控制器合成中采用速度和位置测量时，DOb 的带宽受到噪声敏感性和水床效应的限制。当 DOb 通过加速度测量实现时，由于水床效应造成的鲁棒性约束被消除。通过采用离散时间的广义波德积分定理，分析导出了标称被控对象模型和观测器带宽的设计约束。所提出的设计约束允许人们系统地综合一种基于 DOb 的高性能数字鲁棒运动控制器。实验结果验证了所提出的分析和合成方法。 本文分析了离散时间域中基于扰动观测器（DOb）的运动控制系统的鲁棒稳定性和性能。 Emre Sariyildiz,Satoshi Hangai,Tarik Uzunovic,Takahiro Nozaki,Kouhei Ohnishi eess.SY,cs.RO

authors_text: Abrar Hasin Kamal,Md. Asifuzzaman Jishan,Nafees Mansoor
title: TextMage: The Automated Bangla Caption Generator Based On Deep Learning
title_zh: TextMage：基于深度学习的自动孟加拉语字幕生成器
abstract: Neural Networks and Deep Learning have seen an upsurge of research in the past decade due to the improved results. Generates text from the given image is a crucial task that requires the combination of both sectors which are computer vision and natural language processing in order to understand an image and represent it using a natural language. However existing works have all been done on a particular lingual domain and on the same set of data. This leads to the systems being developed to perform poorly on images that belong to specific locales' geographical context. TextMage is a system that is capable of understanding visual scenes that belong to the Bangladeshi geographical context and use its knowledge to represent what it understands in Bengali. Hence, we have trained a model on our previously developed and published dataset named BanglaLekhaImageCaptions. This dataset contains 9,154 images along with two annotations for each image. In order to access performance, the proposed model has been implemented and evaluated.
summary: Neural Networks and Deep Learning have seen an upsurge of research in the past decade due to the improved results. Generates text from the given image is a crucial task that requires the combination of both sectors which are computer vision and natural language processing in order to understand an image and represent it using a natural language. However existing works have all been done on a particular lingual domain and on the same set of data. This leads to the systems being developed to perform poorly on images that belong to specific locales' geographical context. TextMage is a system that is capable of understanding visual scenes that belong to the Bangladeshi geographical context and use its knowledge to represent what it understands in Bengali. Hence, we have trained a model on our previously developed and published dataset named BanglaLekhaImageCaptions. This dataset contains 9,154 images along with two annotations for each image. In order to access performance, the proposed model has been implemented and evaluated.
abstract_zh: 由于结果的改进，神经网络和深度学习在过去十年中出现了研究热潮。从给定图像生成文本是一项至关重要的任务，需要结合计算机视觉和自然语言处理两个领域，以便理解图像并使用自然语言表示它。然而，现有的工作都是在特定的语言领域和同一组数据上完成的。这导致所开发的系统在处理属于特定地点地理环境的图像时表现不佳。 TextMage 是一个能够理解属于孟加拉国地理环境的视觉场景并使用其知识来表示其所理解的孟加拉语内容的系统。因此，我们在之前开发和发布的数据集 BanglaLekhaImageCaptions 上训练了一个模型。该数据集包含 9,154 张图像以及每个图像的两个注释。为了获得性能，所提出的模型已被实施和评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TextMage，一个基于深度学习的孟加拉语图像字幕生成系统，专注于理解孟加拉国地理背景的视觉场景。
AI.motivation: 现有图像字幕生成系统多依赖特定语言数据集，难以适应地域性视觉场景，需开发针对孟加拉国地理语境的本地化解决方案。
AI.method: 结合计算机视觉与自然语言处理技术，基于作者发布的BanglaLekhaImageCaptions数据集（含9,154张图像及双注释）训练深度学习模型。
AI.result: 成功实现并评估了针对孟加拉地理特征的图像字幕生成模型，但未明确给出具体性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 通过本地化数据集训练，TextMage提升了孟加拉国特定场景图像的理解与孟加拉语描述能力，为地域性AI应用提供参考。

authors_text: Omar Mohamed Awad,Mostafa Mahmoud,Isak Edo,Ali Hadi Zadeh,Ciaran Bannon,Anand Jayarajan,Gennady Pekhimenko,Andreas Moshovos
title: FPRaker: A Processing Element For Accelerating Neural Network Training
title_zh: FPRaker：加速神经网络训练的处理元件
abstract: We present FPRaker, a processing element for composing training accelerators. FPRaker processes several floating-point multiply-accumulation operations concurrently and accumulates their result into a higher precision accumulator. FPRaker boosts performance and energy efficiency during training by taking advantage of the values that naturally appear during training. Specifically, it processes the significand of the operands of each multiply-accumulate as a series of signed powers of two. The conversion to this form is done on-the-fly. This exposes ineffectual work that can be skipped: values when encoded have few terms and some of them can be discarded as they would fall outside the range of the accumulator given the limited precision of floating-point. We demonstrate that FPRaker can be used to compose an accelerator for training and that it can improve performance and energy efficiency compared to using conventional floating-point units under ISO-compute area constraints. We also demonstrate that FPRaker delivers additional benefits when training incorporates pruning and quantization. Finally, we show that FPRaker naturally amplifies performance with training methods that use a different precision per layer.
summary: We present FPRaker, a processing element for composing training accelerators. FPRaker processes several floating-point multiply-accumulation operations concurrently and accumulates their result into a higher precision accumulator. FPRaker boosts performance and energy efficiency during training by taking advantage of the values that naturally appear during training. Specifically, it processes the significand of the operands of each multiply-accumulate as a series of signed powers of two. The conversion to this form is done on-the-fly. This exposes ineffectual work that can be skipped: values when encoded have few terms and some of them can be discarded as they would fall outside the range of the accumulator given the limited precision of floating-point. We demonstrate that FPRaker can be used to compose an accelerator for training and that it can improve performance and energy efficiency compared to using conventional floating-point units under ISO-compute area constraints. We also demonstrate that FPRaker delivers additional benefits when training incorporates pruning and quantization. Finally, we show that FPRaker naturally amplifies performance with training methods that use a different precision per layer.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 FPRaker，这是一个用于组成训练加速器的处理元素。 FPRaker 同时处理多个浮点乘法累加运算，并将其结果累加到更高精度的累加器中。 FPRaker 通过利用训练期间自然出现的值来提高训练期间的性能和能源效率。具体来说，它将每个乘法累加操作数的有效数处理为一系列有符号的 2 幂。到这种形式的转换是即时完成的。这暴露了可以跳过的无效工作：编码时的值只有很少的项，并且其中一些项可以被丢弃，因为考虑到浮点精度有限，它们将超出累加器的范围。我们证明 FPRaker 可用于构建训练加速器，并且与在 ISO 计算区域限制下使用传统浮点单元相比，它可以提高性能和能源效率。我们还证明，当训练结合剪枝和量化时，FPRaker 可以带来额外的好处。最后，我们证明 FPRaker 通过每层使用不同精度的训练方法自然地增强了性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FPRaker处理元件，通过优化浮点乘加运算提升神经网络训练性能与能效。
AI.motivation: 传统浮点单元在训练中存在冗余计算，且难以适应剪枝、量化等训练方法的精度需求。
AI.method: 将乘加操作数的尾数实时转换为有符号2的幂次方序列，通过丢弃超出累加器精度范围的项减少无效计算。
AI.result: 在相同面积约束下，FPRaker相比传统浮点单元提升性能与能效，且在剪枝/量化训练中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: FPRaker通过动态精度优化有效加速训练，适配多种训练方法并提升硬件资源利用率。

authors_text: Shakeeb Ahmad,Zachary N. Sunberg,J. Sean Humbert
title: APF-PF: Probabilistic Depth Perception for 3D Reactive Obstacle Avoidance
title_zh: APF-PF：用于 3D 反应性避障的概率深度感知
comment: Accepted to appear at 2021 American Control Conference (ACC), New Orleans, Louisiana (8 pages, 11 figures)
comments: Accepted to appear at 2021 American Control Conference (ACC), New Orleans, Louisiana (8 pages, 11 figures)
abstract: This paper proposes a framework for 3D obstacle avoidance in the presence of partial observability of environment obstacles. The method focuses on the utility of the Artificial Potential Function (APF) controller in a practical setting where noisy and incomplete information about the proximity is inevitable. We propose a Particle Filter (PF) approach to estimate potential obstacle locations in an input depth image stream. The probable candidates are then used to generate an action that maneuvers the robot towards the negative gradient of potential at each time instant. Rigorous experimental validation on a quadrotor UAV highlights the robustness and reliability of the method when robot's sensitivity to incorrect perception information can be concerning. The proposed perception and control stack is run onboard the UAV, demonstrating the computational feasibility for real-time applications and agile robots.
summary: This paper proposes a framework for 3D obstacle avoidance in the presence of partial observability of environment obstacles. The method focuses on the utility of the Artificial Potential Function (APF) controller in a practical setting where noisy and incomplete information about the proximity is inevitable. We propose a Particle Filter (PF) approach to estimate potential obstacle locations in an input depth image stream. The probable candidates are then used to generate an action that maneuvers the robot towards the negative gradient of potential at each time instant. Rigorous experimental validation on a quadrotor UAV highlights the robustness and reliability of the method when robot's sensitivity to incorrect perception information can be concerning. The proposed perception and control stack is run onboard the UAV, demonstrating the computational feasibility for real-time applications and agile robots.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种在环境障碍物部分可观测的情况下进行 3D 避障的框架。该方法重点关注人工势函数 (APF) 控制器在实际环境中的实用性，在实际环境中，有关接近度的噪声和不完整信息是不可避免的。我们提出了一种粒子滤波器（PF）方法来估计输入深度图像流中潜在的障碍物位置。然后，可能的候选者被用来生成一个动作，在每个时刻操纵机器人朝向负电位梯度。当机器人对不正确感知信息的敏感性可能受到影响时，对四旋翼无人机的严格实验验证凸显了该方法的稳健性和可靠性。所提出的感知和控制堆栈在无人机上运行，​​展示了实时应用程序和敏捷机器人的计算可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合概率深度感知与人工势场的三维避障框架，用于部分可观测环境中的实时障碍物规避。
AI.motivation: 在实际环境中，障碍物感知常面临噪声和信息不完整问题，传统方法易受错误感知影响，需更鲁棒的实时避障方案。
AI.method: 采用粒子滤波器（PF）估计深度图像中的潜在障碍物位置，结合人工势场（APF）控制器生成沿势场负梯度的避障动作。
AI.result: 在四旋翼无人机上的实验验证了方法在部分可观测环境下的鲁棒性与可靠性，并展示了其计算可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了感知不确定性下的实时避障问题，适用于敏捷机器人和无人机等实时应用场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合概率深度感知与人工势场的三维避障框架，用于部分可观测环境中的实时障碍物规避。
ai_content.motivation: 在实际环境中，障碍物感知常面临噪声和信息不完整问题，传统方法易受错误感知影响，需更鲁棒的实时避障方案。
ai_content.method: 采用粒子滤波器（PF）估计深度图像中的潜在障碍物位置，结合人工势场（APF）控制器生成沿势场负梯度的避障动作。
ai_content.result: 在四旋翼无人机上的实验验证了方法在部分可观测环境下的鲁棒性与可靠性，并展示了其计算可行性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了感知不确定性下的实时避障问题，适用于敏捷机器人和无人机等实时应用场景。

search_text: APF-PF: Probabilistic Depth Perception for 3D Reactive Obstacle Avoidance APF-PF：用于 3D 反应性避障的概率深度感知 This paper proposes a framework for 3D obstacle avoidance in the presence of partial observability of environment obstacles. The method focuses on the utility of the Artificial Potential Function (APF) controller in a practical setting where noisy and incomplete information about the proximity is inevitable. We propose a Particle Filter (PF) approach to estimate potential obstacle locations in an input depth image stream. The probable candidates are then used to generate an action that maneuvers the robot towards the negative gradient of potential at each time instant. Rigorous experimental validation on a quadrotor UAV highlights the robustness and reliability of the method when robot's sensitivity to incorrect perception information can be concerning. The proposed perception and control stack is run onboard the UAV, demonstrating the computational feasibility for real-time applications and agile robots. 本文提出了一种在环境障碍物部分可观测的情况下进行 3D 避障的框架。该方法重点关注人工势函数 (APF) 控制器在实际环境中的实用性，在实际环境中，有关接近度的噪声和不完整信息是不可避免的。我们提出了一种粒子滤波器（PF）方法来估计输入深度图像流中潜在的障碍物位置。然后，可能的候选者被用来生成一个动作，在每个时刻操纵机器人朝向负电位梯度。当机器人对不正确感知信息的敏感性可能受到影响时，对四旋翼无人机的严格实验验证凸显了该方法的稳健性和可靠性。所提出的感知和控制堆栈在无人机上运行，​​展示了实时应用程序和敏捷机器人的计算可行性。 本文提出一种结合概率深度感知与人工势场的三维避障框架，用于部分可观测环境中的实时障碍物规避。 Shakeeb Ahmad,Zachary N. Sunberg,J. Sean Humbert cs.RO,eess.SY

title: IoT Platform for COVID-19 Prevention and Control: A Survey
title_zh: COVID-19 预防和控制物联网平台：调查
comment: 12 pages; Submitted to IEEE Internet of Things Journal
comments: 12 pages; Submitted to IEEE Internet of Things Journal
abstract: As a result of the worldwide transmission of severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2), coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) has evolved into an unprecedented pandemic. Currently, with unavailable pharmaceutical treatments and vaccines, this novel coronavirus results in a great impact on public health, human society, and global economy, which is likely to last for many years. One of the lessons learned from the COVID-19 pandemic is that a long-term system with non-pharmaceutical interventions for preventing and controlling new infectious diseases is desirable to be implemented. Internet of things (IoT) platform is preferred to be utilized to achieve this goal, due to its ubiquitous sensing ability and seamless connectivity. IoT technology is changing our lives through smart healthcare, smart home, and smart city, which aims to build a more convenient and intelligent community. This paper presents how the IoT could be incorporated into the epidemic prevention and control system. Specifically, we demonstrate a potential fog-cloud combined IoT platform that can be used in the systematic and intelligent COVID-19 prevention and control, which involves five interventions including COVID-19 Symptom Diagnosis, Quarantine Monitoring, Contact Tracing & Social Distancing, COVID-19 Outbreak Forecasting, and SARS-CoV-2 Mutation Tracking. We investigate and review the state-of-the-art literatures of these five interventions to present the capabilities of IoT in countering against the current COVID-19 pandemic or future infectious disease epidemics.

abstract_zh: 由于严重急性呼吸综合征冠状病毒 2 (SARS-CoV-2) 在全球范围内传播，2019 年冠状病毒病 (COVID-19) 已演变成一场前所未有的大流行。目前，在药物治疗和疫苗尚不成熟的情况下，新型冠状病毒对公共卫生、人类社会和全球经济造成巨大影响，且影响可能持续多年。从 COVID-19 大流行中汲取的教训之一是，需要实施一种非药物干预措施的长期系统来预防和控制新的传染病。物联网（IoT）平台因其无处不在的传感能力和无缝连接而成为实现这一目标的首选。物联网技术正在通过智慧医疗、智能家居、智慧城市改变我们的生活，旨在构建更加便捷、智能的社区。本文介绍了如何将物联网纳入疫情防控体系。具体来说，我们展示了一个潜在的雾云组合物联网平台，可用于系统化、智能化的COVID-19预防和控制，其中涉及五种干预措施，包括COVID-19症状诊断、检疫监测、接触者追踪和社交距离、COVID-19爆发预测和SARS-CoV-2突变跟踪。我们调查并回顾了这五种干预措施的最新文献，以展示物联网在应对当前 COVID-19 大流行或未来传染病流行方面的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种雾-云结合的物联网平台，用于系统化和智能化的新冠疫情预防与控制，并综述了该平台在五个关键干预措施中的应用。
AI.motivation: 由于缺乏有效药物和疫苗，新冠疫情对公共健康和社会经济造成长期影响，亟需非药物干预的长期防控系统，物联网技术因其感知和连接能力成为理想方案。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分析物联网在新冠症状诊断、隔离监测、接触追踪、疫情预测和病毒变异追踪五个干预措施中的现有技术能力。
AI.result: 总结了物联网在疫情防控中的技术潜力，提出了雾-云协同架构的物联网平台设计方案，为未来传染病防控提供技术参考。
AI.conclusion: 物联网技术能有效提升疫情防控的系统性和智能化水平，其架构设计对应对未来公共卫生危机具有重要价值。

authors_text: Keshav Bhandari,Mario A. DeLaGarza,Ziliang Zong,Hugo Latapie,Yan Yan
title: Egok360: A 360 Egocentric Kinetic Human Activity Video Dataset
title_zh: Egok360：360 以自我为中心的动态人类活动视频数据集
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, 2020 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
comments: 5 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, 2020 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
abstract: Recently, there has been a growing interest in wearable sensors which provides new research perspectives for 360 ° video analysis. However, the lack of 360 ° datasets in literature hinders the research in this field. To bridge this gap, in this paper we propose a novel Egocentric (first-person) 360° Kinetic human activity video dataset (EgoK360). The EgoK360 dataset contains annotations of human activity with different sub-actions, e.g., activity Ping-Pong with four sub-actions which are pickup-ball, hit, bounce-ball and serve. To the best of our knowledge, EgoK360 is the first dataset in the domain of first-person activity recognition with a 360° environmental setup, which will facilitate the egocentric 360 ° video understanding. We provide experimental results and comprehensive analysis of variants of the two-stream network for 360 egocentric activity recognition. The EgoK360 dataset can be downloaded from https://egok360.github.io/.
summary: Recently, there has been a growing interest in wearable sensors which provides new research perspectives for 360 ° video analysis. However, the lack of 360 ° datasets in literature hinders the research in this field. To bridge this gap, in this paper we propose a novel Egocentric (first-person) 360° Kinetic human activity video dataset (EgoK360). The EgoK360 dataset contains annotations of human activity with different sub-actions, e.g., activity Ping-Pong with four sub-actions which are pickup-ball, hit, bounce-ball and serve. To the best of our knowledge, EgoK360 is the first dataset in the domain of first-person activity recognition with a 360° environmental setup, which will facilitate the egocentric 360 ° video understanding. We provide experimental results and comprehensive analysis of variants of the two-stream network for 360 egocentric activity recognition. The EgoK360 dataset can be downloaded from https://egok360.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们对可穿戴传感器越来越感兴趣，它为 360° 视频分析提供了新的研究视角。然而文献中缺乏360°数据集阻碍了该领域的研究。为了弥补这一差距，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的以自我为中心（第一人称）360°动态人类活动视频数据集（EgoK360）。 EgoK360 数据集包含具有不同子动作的人类活动的注释，例如，乒乓球活动具有四个子动作，即接球、击球、弹跳球和发球。据我们所知，EgoK360 是第一人称活动识别领域第一个具有 360° 环境设置的数据集，这将有助于以自我为中心的 360° 视频理解。我们提供了用于 360 度自我中心活动识别的双流网络变体的实验结果和综合分析。 EgoK360数据集可以从https://egok360.github.io/下载。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为EgoK360的360度第一人称动态人类活动视频数据集，用于推动第一视角360度视频理解研究。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏第一人称视角的360度活动视频数据集，制约了相关算法的发展。
AI.method: 构建包含多子动作标注的360度视频数据集，并采用双流网络结构进行实验分析。
AI.result: 验证了双流网络在360度第一人称活动识别中的有效性，并公开了数据集资源。
AI.conclusion: EgoK360是首个第一人称360度活动识别数据集，为相关研究提供了重要基准。

To bridge this gap, in this paper we propose a novel Egocentric (first-person) 360° Kinetic human activity video dataset (EgoK360). The EgoK360 dataset contains annotations of human activity with different sub-actions, e.g., activity Ping-Pong with four sub-actions which are pickup-ball, hit, bounce-ball and serve. To the best of our knowledge, EgoK360 is the first dataset in the domain of first-person activity recognition with a 360° environmental setup, which will facilitate the egocentric 360 ° video understanding. We provide experimental results and comprehensive analysis of variants of the two-stream network for 360 egocentric activity recognition. The EgoK360 dataset can be downloaded from https://egok360.github.io/. 最近，人们对可穿戴传感器越来越感兴趣，它为 360° 视频分析提供了新的研究视角。然而文献中缺乏360°数据集阻碍了该领域的研究。为了弥补这一差距，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的以自我为中心（第一人称）360°动态人类活动视频数据集（EgoK360）。 EgoK360 数据集包含具有不同子动作的人类活动的注释，例如，乒乓球活动具有四个子动作，即接球、击球、弹跳球和发球。据我们所知，EgoK360 是第一人称活动识别领域第一个具有 360° 环境设置的数据集，这将有助于以自我为中心的 360° 视频理解。我们提供了用于 360 度自我中心活动识别的双流网络变体的实验结果和综合分析。 EgoK360数据集可以从https://egok360.github.io/下载。 本文提出一个名为EgoK360的360度第一人称动态人类活动视频数据集，用于推动第一视角360度视频理解研究。 Keshav Bhandari,Mario A. DeLaGarza,Ziliang Zong,Hugo Latapie,Yan Yan cs.CV

title: Pose Estimation for Robot Manipulators via Keypoint Optimization and Sim-to-Real Transfer
title_zh: 通过关键点优化和模拟到真实传输的机器人操纵器姿态估计
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures. Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters January, 2022
comments: 8 pages, 9 figures. Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters January, 2022
abstract: Keypoint detection is an essential building block for many robotic applications like motion capture and pose estimation. Historically, keypoints are detected using uniquely engineered markers such as checkerboards or fiducials. More recently, deep learning methods have been explored as they have the ability to detect user-defined keypoints in a marker-less manner. However, different manually selected keypoints can have uneven performance when it comes to detection and localization. An example of this can be found on symmetric robotic tools where DNN detectors cannot solve the correspondence problem correctly. In this work, we propose a new and autonomous way to define the keypoint locations that overcomes these challenges. The approach involves finding the optimal set of keypoints on robotic manipulators for robust visual detection and localization. Using a robotic simulator as a medium, our algorithm utilizes synthetic data for DNN training, and the proposed algorithm is used to optimize the selection of keypoints through an iterative approach. The results show that when using the optimized keypoints, the detection performance of the DNNs improved significantly. We further use the optimized keypoints for real robotic applications by using domain randomization to bridge the reality gap between the simulator and the physical world. The physical world experiments show how the proposed method can be applied to the wide-breadth of robotic applications that require visual feedback, such as camera-to-robot calibration, robotic tool tracking, and end-effector pose estimation.

abstract_zh: 关键点检测是许多机器人应用（例如运动捕捉和姿势估计）的重要构建块。从历史上看，关键点是使用独特设计的标记（例如棋盘或基准点）来检测的。最近，人们对深度学习方法进行了探索，因为它们能够以无标记的方式检测用户定义的关键点。然而，不同的手动选择的关键点在检测和定位方面可能表现参差不齐。对称机器人工具就是一个例子，其中 DNN 检测器无法正确解决对应问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的自主方法来定义克服这些挑战的关键点位置。该方法涉及寻找机器人操纵器上的最佳关键点集，以实现稳健的视觉检测和定位。我们的算法使用机器人模拟器作为媒介，利用合成数据进行 DNN 训练，并且所提出的算法用于通过迭代方法优化关键点的选择。结果表明，当使用优化后的关键点时，DNN 的检测性能显着提高。我们通过使用域随机化来弥合模拟器和物理世界之间的现实差距，进一步将优化的关键点用于真实的机器人应用。物理世界实验展示了所提出的方法如何广泛应用于需要视觉反馈的机器人应用，例如相机到机器人校准、机器人工具跟踪和末端执行器姿态估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过关键点优化和模拟到现实迁移的机械臂姿态估计方法，解决传统关键点检测在对称工具上的对应问题。
AI.motivation: 传统关键点检测依赖人工标记或深度学习方法，但手动选择的关键点在对称机械工具上存在检测性能不均和对应问题，需自主优化关键点位置。
AI.method: 利用模拟器生成合成数据训练DNN，通过迭代优化选择关键点，并采用领域随机化技术缩小模拟与现实差距，实现实际应用。
AI.result: 优化后关键点显著提升DNN检测性能，实际实验验证了方法在机械臂校准、工具跟踪等任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为需要视觉反馈的机器人应用提供了鲁棒的姿态估计方案，可广泛应用于工具跟踪和末端执行器定位等场景。

authors_text: Nivedita Dey,Mrityunjay Ghosh,Subhra Samir kundu,Amlan Chakrabarti
title: QDLC -- The Quantum Development Life Cycle
title_zh: QDLC——量子开发生命周期
abstract: The magnificence grandeur of quantum computing lies in the inherent nature of quantum particles to exhibit true parallelism, which can be realized by indubitably fascinating theories of quantum physics. The possibilities opened by quantum computation (QC) is no where analogous to any classical simulation as quantum computers can efficiently simulate the complex dynamics of strongly correlated inter-facial systems. But, unfolding mysteries and leading to revolutionary breakthroughs in quantum computing are often challenged by lack of research and development potential in developing qubits with longer coherence interval, scaling qubit count, incorporating quantum error correction to name a few. Putting the first footstep into explorative quantum research by researchers and developers is also inherently ambiguous - due to lack of definitive steps in building up a quantum enabled customized computing stack. Difference in behavioral pattern of underlying system, early-stage noisy device, implementation barriers and performance metric cause hindrance in full adoption of existing classical SDLC suites for quantum product development. This in turn, necessitates to devise systematic and cost-effective techniques to quantum software development through a Quantum Development Life Cycle (QDLC) model, specifying the distinguished features and functionalities of quantum feasibility study, quantum requirement specification, quantum system design, quantum software coding and implementation, quantum testing and quantum software quality management.
summary: The magnificence grandeur of quantum computing lies in the inherent nature of quantum particles to exhibit true parallelism, which can be realized by indubitably fascinating theories of quantum physics. The possibilities opened by quantum computation (QC) is no where analogous to any classical simulation as quantum computers can efficiently simulate the complex dynamics of strongly correlated inter-facial systems. But, unfolding mysteries and leading to revolutionary breakthroughs in quantum computing are often challenged by lack of research and development potential in developing qubits with longer coherence interval, scaling qubit count, incorporating quantum error correction to name a few. Putting the first footstep into explorative quantum research by researchers and developers is also inherently ambiguous - due to lack of definitive steps in building up a quantum enabled customized computing stack. Difference in behavioral pattern of underlying system, early-stage noisy device, implementation barriers and performance metric cause hindrance in full adoption of existing classical SDLC suites for quantum product development. This in turn, necessitates to devise systematic and cost-effective techniques to quantum software development through a Quantum Development Life Cycle (QDLC) model, specifying the distinguished features and functionalities of quantum feasibility study, quantum requirement specification, quantum system design, quantum software coding and implementation, quantum testing and quantum software quality management.
abstract_zh: 量子计算的伟大之处在于量子粒子具有真正的并行性，这可以通过无疑令人着迷的量子物理理论来实现。量子计算（QC）所带来的可能性与任何经典模拟都不相同，因为量子计算机可以有效地模拟强相关界面系统的复杂动力学。但是，揭开量子计算的谜团并带来革命性的突破，往往会受到缺乏研发潜力的挑战，例如开发具有更长相干间隔的量子位、扩大量子位计数、结合量子纠错等等。研究人员和开发人员迈出探索性量子研究的第一步本质上也是模糊的——因为在构建支持量子的定制计算堆栈方面缺乏明确的步骤。底层系统的行为模式、早期噪声设备、实施障碍和性能指标的差异导致了量子产品开发中充分采用现有经典SDLC套件的障碍。这反过来又需要通过量子开发生命周期（QDLC）模型设计系统且具有成本效益的量子软件开发技术，指定量子可行性研究、量子需求规范、量子系统设计、量子软件编码和实现、量子测试和量子软件质量管理的显着特征和功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出量子开发生命周期（QDLC）模型，以解决量子计算领域软件开发缺乏系统性方法的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有经典软件开发周期（SDLC）难以适配量子计算的特殊性，如量子比特相干性、噪声设备及性能指标差异，导致量子产品研发面临系统性方法缺失的挑战。
AI.method: 通过分析量子计算特性与开发障碍，构建包含可行性研究、需求规范、系统设计、编码实现、测试及质量管理的QDLC框架。
AI.result: 形成针对量子软件开发的系统化流程模型，明确各阶段特征与功能，为量子产品开发提供方法论支持。
AI.conclusion: QDLC模型为量子计算领域提供了成本效益高的系统化开发路径，有助于推动量子技术的工程化应用。

title: A Learning Approach to Robot-Agnostic Force-Guided High Precision Assembly
title_zh: 一种与机器人无关的力引导高精度装配的学习方法
abstract: In this work we propose a learning approach to high-precision robotic assembly problems. We focus on the contact-rich phase, where the assembly pieces are in close contact with each other. Unlike many learning-based approaches that heavily rely on vision or spatial tracking, our approach takes force/torque in task space as the only observation. Our training environment is robotless, as the end-effector is not attached to any specific robot. Trained policies can then be applied to different robotic arms without re-training. This approach can greatly reduce complexity to perform contact-rich robotic assembly in the real world, especially in unstructured settings such as in architectural construction. To achieve it, we have developed a new distributed RL agent, named Recurrent Distributed DDPG (RD2), which extends Ape-X DDPG with recurrency and makes two structural improvements on prioritized experience replay. Our results show that RD2 is able to solve two fundamental high-precision assembly tasks, lap-joint and peg-in-hole, and outperforms two state-of-the-art algorithms, Ape-X DDPG and PPO with LSTM. We have successfully evaluated our robot-agnostic policies on three robotic arms, Kuka KR60, Franka Panda, and UR10, in simulation. The video presenting our experiments is available at https://sites.google.com/view/rd2-rl
summary: In this work we propose a learning approach to high-precision robotic assembly problems. We focus on the contact-rich phase, where the assembly pieces are in close contact with each other. Unlike many learning-based approaches that heavily rely on vision or spatial tracking, our approach takes force/torque in task space as the only observation. Our training environment is robotless, as the end-effector is not attached to any specific robot. Trained policies can then be applied to different robotic arms without re-training. This approach can greatly reduce complexity to perform contact-rich robotic assembly in the real world, especially in unstructured settings such as in architectural construction. To achieve it, we have developed a new distributed RL agent, named Recurrent Distributed DDPG (RD2), which extends Ape-X DDPG with recurrency and makes two structural improvements on prioritized experience replay. Our results show that RD2 is able to solve two fundamental high-precision assembly tasks, lap-joint and peg-in-hole, and outperforms two state-of-the-art algorithms, Ape-X DDPG and PPO with LSTM. We have successfully evaluated our robot-agnostic policies on three robotic arms, Kuka KR60, Franka Panda, and UR10, in simulation. The video presenting our experiments is available at https://sites.google.com/view/rd2-rl
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种解决高精度机器人装配问题的学习方法。我们专注于接触丰富的阶段，其中组装件彼此紧密接触。与许多严重依赖视觉或空间跟踪的基于学习的方法不同，我们的方法将任务空间中的力/扭矩作为唯一的观察。我们的训练环境是无机器人的，因为末端执行器没有连接到任何特定的机器人。然后，经过训练的策略可以应用于不同的机械臂，而无需重新训练。这种方法可以大大降低现实世界中执行富含接触的机器人装配的复杂性，特别是在建筑施工等非结构化环境中。为了实现这一目标，我们开发了一种新的分布式强化学习代理，名为循环分布式 DDPG (RD2)，它通过循环扩展了 Ape-X DDPG，并对优先体验重放进行了两项结构改进。我们的结果表明，RD2 能够解决搭接和孔中钉这两种基本的高精度装配任务，并且优于两种最先进的算法：Ape-X DDPG 和带有 LSTM 的 PPO。我们已经在模拟中成功评估了三种机器人手臂（Kuka KR60、Franka Panda 和 UR10）的机器人不可知策略。展示我们实验的视频可在 https://sites.google.com/view/rd2-rl 上找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需依赖特定机器人的学习方法，通过力/扭矩观测实现高精度机器人装配。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉或空间跟踪方法在非结构化环境中复杂度高，本文旨在降低接触密集型装配的实现难度，提升实际应用可行性。
AI.method: 开发了具有循环结构的分布式强化学习代理RD2，在Ape-X DDPG基础上改进优先经验回放机制，仅依赖力/扭矩观测进行训练。
AI.result: RD2在拉接关节和插孔装配任务中优于Ape-X DDPG和PPO with LSTM，成功在三种不同机械臂（Kuka KR60、Franka Panda、UR10）仿真中验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过力反馈学习实现了跨机器人平台的高精度装配，为复杂场景下的机器人应用提供了新思路。

title: Revisiting Optical Flow Estimation in 360 Videos
title_zh: 重新审视 360 度视频中的光流估计
comment: 8 Pages, 7 figures, 1 Table, 5 Equations, 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition Milan, Italy
comments: 8 Pages, 7 figures, 1 Table, 5 Equations, 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition Milan, Italy
abstract: Nowadays 360 video analysis has become a significant research topic in the field since the appearance of high-quality and low-cost 360 wearable devices. In this paper, we propose a novel LiteFlowNet360 architecture for 360 videos optical flow estimation. We design LiteFlowNet360 as a domain adaptation framework from perspective video domain to 360 video domain. We adapt it from simple kernel transformation techniques inspired by Kernel Transformer Network (KTN) to cope with inherent distortion in 360 videos caused by the sphere-to-plane projection. First, we apply an incremental transformation of convolution layers in feature pyramid network and show that further transformation in inference and regularization layers are not important, hence reducing the network growth in terms of size and computation cost. Second, we refine the network by training with augmented data in a supervised manner. We perform data augmentation by projecting the images in a sphere and re-projecting to a plane. Third, we train LiteFlowNet360 in a self-supervised manner using target domain 360 videos. Experimental results show the promising results of 360 video optical flow estimation using the proposed novel architecture.
summary: Nowadays 360 video analysis has become a significant research topic in the field since the appearance of high-quality and low-cost 360 wearable devices. In this paper, we propose a novel LiteFlowNet360 architecture for 360 videos optical flow estimation. We design LiteFlowNet360 as a domain adaptation framework from perspective video domain to 360 video domain. We adapt it from simple kernel transformation techniques inspired by Kernel Transformer Network (KTN) to cope with inherent distortion in 360 videos caused by the sphere-to-plane projection. First, we apply an incremental transformation of convolution layers in feature pyramid network and show that further transformation in inference and regularization layers are not important, hence reducing the network growth in terms of size and computation cost. Second, we refine the network by training with augmented data in a supervised manner. We perform data augmentation by projecting the images in a sphere and re-projecting to a plane. Third, we train LiteFlowNet360 in a self-supervised manner using target domain 360 videos. Experimental results show the promising results of 360 video optical flow estimation using the proposed novel architecture.
abstract_zh: 随着高质量、低成本的360度可穿戴设备的出现，360度视频分析已成为该领域的一个重要研究课题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 LiteFlowNet360 架构，用于 360 度视频光流估计。我们设计LiteFlowNet360作为从透视视频域到360视频域的域适应框架。我们从受内核变换网络 (KTN) 启发的简单内核变换技术对其进行了改编，以应对由球体到平面投影引起的 360 度视频中的固有失真。首先，我们在特征金字塔网络中应用卷积层的增量变换，并表明推理和正则化层的进一步变换并不重要，因此减少了网络大小和计算成本的增长。其次，我们通过以监督方式使用增强数据进行训练来完善网络。我们通过将图像投影到球体中并重新投影到平面来执行数据增强。第三，我们使用目标域 360 视频以自我监督的方式训练 LiteFlowNet360。实验结果表明，使用所提出的新颖架构进行 360 度视频光流估计具有良好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LiteFlowNet360的新架构，用于360度视频的光流估计，通过领域自适应框架解决球面投影导致的失真问题。
AI.motivation: 360度视频因设备普及成为研究热点，但现有方法难以处理球面到平面投影引起的失真，且计算成本较高。
AI.method: 基于Kernel Transformer Network（KTN）的核变换技术，设计领域自适应框架：1）优化特征金字塔网络的卷积层变换，减少冗余计算；2）通过球面投影数据增强进行监督训练；3）利用目标领域360视频进行自监督训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，LiteFlowNet360在360度视频光流估计任务中取得有竞争力的性能，同时降低计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: LiteFlowNet360通过领域自适应和网络优化有效解决了360度视频光流估计的失真问题，为相关研究提供新思路。

title: Ranked enumeration of MSO logic on words
title_zh: MSO逻辑对词的排序枚举
comment: 29 pages (with appendix), 2 figures, submitted to the ICDT21 conference
comments: 29 pages (with appendix), 2 figures, submitted to the ICDT21 conference
abstract: In the last years, enumeration algorithms with bounded delay have attracted a lot of attention for several data management tasks. Given a query and the data, the task is to preprocess the data and then enumerate all the answers to the query one by one and without repetitions. This enumeration scheme is typically useful when the solutions are treated on the fly or when we want to stop the enumeration once the pertinent solutions have been found. However, with the current schemes, there is no restriction on the order how the solutions are given and this order usually depends on the techniques used and not on the relevance for the user. In this paper we study the enumeration of monadic second order logic (MSO) over words when the solutions are ranked. We present a framework based on MSO cost functions that allows to express MSO formulae on words with a cost associated with each solution. We then demonstrate the generality of our framework which subsumes, for instance, document spanners and regular complex event processing queries and adds ranking to them. The main technical result of the paper is an algorithm for enumerating all the solutions of formulae in increasing order of cost efficiently, namely, with a linear preprocessing phase and logarithmic delay between solutions. The novelty of this algorithm is based on using functional data structures, in particular, by extending functional Brodal queues to suit with the ranked enumeration of MSO on words.

The main technical result of the paper is an algorithm for enumerating all the solutions of formulae in increasing order of cost efficiently, namely, with a linear preprocessing phase and logarithmic delay between solutions. The novelty of this algorithm is based on using functional data structures, in particular, by extending functional Brodal queues to suit with the ranked enumeration of MSO on words.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，具有有限延迟的枚举算法在一些数据管理任务中引起了广泛的关注。给定一个查询和数据，任务是预处理数据，然后一一枚举查询的所有答案，并且不重复。当动态处理解决方案时或者当我们想要在找到相关解决方案后停止枚举时，此枚举方案通常很有用。然而，对于当前的方案，对如何给出解决方案的顺序没有限制，并且该顺序通常取决于所使用的技术而不是与用户的相关性。在本文中，我们研究了对解进行排序时对单词的一元二阶逻辑（MSO）的枚举。我们提出了一个基于 MSO 成本函数的框架，该框架允许在单词上表达 MSO 公式以及与每个解决方案相关的成本。然后，我们展示了我们框架的通用性，例如，该框架包含文档扳手和常规复杂事件处理查询，并为其添加排名。本文的主要技术成果是一种以成本高效的递增顺序枚举公式的所有解的算法，即具有线性预处理阶段和解之间的对数延迟。该算法的新颖性基于使用函数式数据结构，特别是通过扩展函数式 Brodal 队列以适应 MSO 对单词的排名枚举。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于MSO代价函数的框架，用于对单词上的MSO逻辑公式进行有序枚举，实现解决方案按代价递增的高效生成。
AI.motivation: 现有枚举算法无法控制解的顺序，导致结果与用户需求相关性不足。需为MSO逻辑添加排名机制以提升实际应用（如文档提取、事件处理）的实用性。
AI.method: 构建基于MSO代价函数的框架，结合功能型数据结构（如扩展的Brodal队列），实现线性预处理和对数延迟的有序枚举算法。
AI.result: 设计出可高效枚举MSO公式解的算法，支持文档跨度器和复杂事件处理查询，并实现线性预处理与对数级解间延迟。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为MSO逻辑的有序枚举提供了通用方法，通过功能数据结构创新解决了排名问题，显著提升了相关应用场景的效率与灵活性。

search_text: Ranked enumeration of MSO logic on words MSO逻辑对词的排序枚举 In the last years, enumeration algorithms with bounded delay have attracted a lot of attention for several data management tasks. Given a query and the data, the task is to preprocess the data and then enumerate all the answers to the query one by one and without repetitions. This enumeration scheme is typically useful when the solutions are treated on the fly or when we want to stop the enumeration once the pertinent solutions have been found. However, with the current schemes, there is no restriction on the order how the solutions are given and this order usually depends on the techniques used and not on the relevance for the user. In this paper we study the enumeration of monadic second order logic (MSO) over words when the solutions are ranked. We present a framework based on MSO cost functions that allows to express MSO formulae on words with a cost associated with each solution. We then demonstrate the generality of our framework which subsumes, for instance, document spanners and regular complex event processing queries and adds ranking to them. The main technical result of the paper is an algorithm for enumerating all the solutions of formulae in increasing order of cost efficiently, namely, with a linear preprocessing phase and logarithmic delay between solutions. The novelty of this algorithm is based on using functional data structures, in particular, by extending functional Brodal queues to suit with the ranked enumeration of MSO on words. 在过去的几年里，具有有限延迟的枚举算法在一些数据管理任务中引起了广泛的关注。给定一个查询和数据，任务是预处理数据，然后一一枚举查询的所有答案，并且不重复。当动态处理解决方案时或者当我们想要在找到相关解决方案后停止枚举时，此枚举方案通常很有用。然而，对于当前的方案，对如何给出解决方案的顺序没有限制，并且该顺序通常取决于所使用的技术而不是与用户的相关性。在本文中，我们研究了对解进行排序时对单词的一元二阶逻辑（MSO）的枚举。我们提出了一个基于 MSO 成本函数的框架，该框架允许在单词上表达 MSO 公式以及与每个解决方案相关的成本。然后，我们展示了我们框架的通用性，例如，该框架包含文档扳手和常规复杂事件处理查询，并为其添加排名。本文的主要技术成果是一种以成本高效的递增顺序枚举公式的所有解的算法，即具有线性预处理阶段和解之间的对数延迟。该算法的新颖性基于使用函数式数据结构，特别是通过扩展函数式 Brodal 队列以适应 MSO 对单词的排名枚举。 本文提出了一种基于MSO代价函数的框架，用于对单词上的MSO逻辑公式进行有序枚举，实现解决方案按代价递增的高效生成。 Pierre Bourhis,Alejandro Grez,Louis Jachiet,Cristian Riveros cs.FL,cs.DS

title: Why Layer-Wise Learning is Hard to Scale-up and a Possible Solution via Accelerated Downsampling
title_zh: 为什么逐层学习难以扩展以及通过加速下采样的可能解决方案
abstract: Layer-wise learning, as an alternative to global back-propagation, is easy to interpret, analyze, and it is memory efficient. Recent studies demonstrate that layer-wise learning can achieve state-of-the-art performance in image classification on various datasets. However, previous studies of layer-wise learning are limited to networks with simple hierarchical structures, and the performance decreases severely for deeper networks like ResNet. This paper, for the first time, reveals the fundamental reason that impedes the scale-up of layer-wise learning is due to the relatively poor separability of the feature space in shallow layers. This argument is empirically verified by controlling the intensity of the convolution operation in local layers. We discover that the poorly-separable features from shallow layers are mismatched with the strong supervision constraint throughout the entire network, making the layer-wise learning sensitive to network depth. The paper further proposes a downsampling acceleration approach to weaken the poor learning of shallow layers so as to transfer the learning emphasis to deep feature space where the separability matches better with the supervision restraint. Extensive experiments have been conducted to verify the new finding and demonstrate the advantages of the proposed downsampling acceleration in improving the performance of layer-wise learning.
summary: Layer-wise learning, as an alternative to global back-propagation, is easy to interpret, analyze, and it is memory efficient. Recent studies demonstrate that layer-wise learning can achieve state-of-the-art performance in image classification on various datasets. However, previous studies of layer-wise learning are limited to networks with simple hierarchical structures, and the performance decreases severely for deeper networks like ResNet. This paper, for the first time, reveals the fundamental reason that impedes the scale-up of layer-wise learning is due to the relatively poor separability of the feature space in shallow layers. This argument is empirically verified by controlling the intensity of the convolution operation in local layers. We discover that the poorly-separable features from shallow layers are mismatched with the strong supervision constraint throughout the entire network, making the layer-wise learning sensitive to network depth. The paper further proposes a downsampling acceleration approach to weaken the poor learning of shallow layers so as to transfer the learning emphasis to deep feature space where the separability matches better with the supervision restraint. Extensive experiments have been conducted to verify the new finding and demonstrate the advantages of the proposed downsampling acceleration in improving the performance of layer-wise learning.
abstract_zh: 分层学习作为全局反向传播的替代方案，易于解释、分析，并且内存效率高。最近的研究表明，分层学习可以在各种数据集上的图像分类中实现最先进的性能。然而，之前的分层学习研究仅限于具有简单层次结构的网络，对于像ResNet这样的更深层次的网络，性能会严重下降。该论文首次揭示了阻碍分层学习规模化的根本原因是浅层特征空间的可分离性相对较差。通过控制局部层中卷积运算的强度，这一论点得到了实证验证。我们发现浅层的难分离特征与整个网络的强监督约束不匹配，使得分层学习对网络深度敏感。论文进一步提出了一种下采样加速方法来弱化浅层的学习不良，从而将学习重点转移到可分离性与监督约束更好匹配的深层特征空间。已经进行了大量的实验来验证这一新发现，并证明了所提出的下采样加速在提高分层学习性能方面的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了分层学习在深度网络中扩展困难的原因，并提出通过加速下采样方法提升其性能。
AI.motivation: 分层学习在浅层网络表现良好，但面对深层网络（如ResNet）时性能显著下降，主要因浅层特征空间可分性不足导致与全局监督约束不匹配。
AI.method: 通过控制局部层卷积强度验证浅层特征可分性不足，并提出加速下采样方法，削弱浅层学习以增强深层特征空间的可分性。
AI.result: 实验验证了浅层特征可分性不足是扩展瓶颈，并证明加速下采样方法有效提升了分层学习在深层网络中的性能。
AI.conclusion: 浅层特征可分性不足是分层学习扩展的核心障碍，加速下采样通过转移学习重点至深层可分性更好的区域，为分层学习的扩展提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了分层学习在深度网络中扩展困难的原因，并提出通过加速下采样方法提升其性能。

title: Overfitting or Underfitting? Understand Robustness Drop in Adversarial Training
title_zh: 过拟合还是欠拟合？了解对抗训练中的鲁棒性下降
abstract: Our goal is to understand why the robustness drops after conducting adversarial training for too long. Although this phenomenon is commonly explained as overfitting, our analysis suggest that its primary cause is perturbation underfitting. We observe that after training for too long, FGSM-generated perturbations deteriorate into random noise. Intuitively, since no parameter updates are made to strengthen the perturbation generator, once this process collapses, it could be trapped in such local optima. Also, sophisticating this process could mostly avoid the robustness drop, which supports that this phenomenon is caused by underfitting instead of overfitting. In the light of our analyses, we propose APART, an adaptive adversarial training framework, which parameterizes perturbation generation and progressively strengthens them. Shielding perturbations from underfitting unleashes the potential of our framework. In our experiments, APART provides comparable or even better robustness than PGD-10, with only about 1/4 of its computational cost.
summary: Our goal is to understand why the robustness drops after conducting adversarial training for too long. Although this phenomenon is commonly explained as overfitting, our analysis suggest that its primary cause is perturbation underfitting. We observe that after training for too long, FGSM-generated perturbations deteriorate into random noise. Intuitively, since no parameter updates are made to strengthen the perturbation generator, once this process collapses, it could be trapped in such local optima. Also, sophisticating this process could mostly avoid the robustness drop, which supports that this phenomenon is caused by underfitting instead of overfitting. In the light of our analyses, we propose APART, an adaptive adversarial training framework, which parameterizes perturbation generation and progressively strengthens them. Shielding perturbations from underfitting unleashes the potential of our framework. In our experiments, APART provides comparable or even better robustness than PGD-10, with only about 1/4 of its computational cost.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是了解为什么在进行对抗性训练太长时间后鲁棒性会下降。尽管这种现象通常被解释为过度拟合，但我们的分析表明其主要原因是扰动欠拟合。我们观察到，训练时间过长后，FGSM 生成的扰动会恶化为随机噪声。直观上，由于没有进行参数更新来增强扰动生成器，因此一旦该过程崩溃，它可能会陷入这种局部最优。此外，完善这个过程可以在很大程度上避免鲁棒性下降，这支持这种现象是由欠拟合而不是过度拟合引起的。根据我们的分析，我们提出了 APART，一种自适应对抗训练框架，它参数化扰动的生成并逐步加强它们。屏蔽欠拟合的扰动释放了我们框架的潜力。在我们的实验中，APART 提供了与 PGD-10 相当甚至更好的鲁棒性，而计算成本仅为其约 1/4。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在分析对抗训练中鲁棒性下降的原因，并提出一种自适应框架以解决该问题。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练中鲁棒性随训练时间延长而下降的现象通常被归因于过拟合，但作者认为其主因是扰动生成的欠拟合问题，需重新审视并提出解决方案。
AI.method: 提出APART框架，通过参数化扰动生成过程并逐步增强扰动强度，防止扰动生成器陷入局部最优，从而缓解欠拟合问题。
AI.result: APART在计算成本仅为PGD-10约1/4的情况下，实现了与PGD-10相当甚至更优的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒性下降主要由扰动欠拟合而非过拟合引起，APART通过动态调整扰动生成过程有效解决了这一问题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在分析对抗训练中鲁棒性下降的原因，并提出一种自适应框架以解决该问题。
ai_content.motivation: 对抗训练中鲁棒性随训练时间延长而下降的现象通常被归因于过拟合，但作者认为其主因是扰动生成的欠拟合问题，需重新审视并提出解决方案。
ai_content.method: 提出APART框架，通过参数化扰动生成过程并逐步增强扰动强度，防止扰动生成器陷入局部最优，从而缓解欠拟合问题。
ai_content.result: APART在计算成本仅为PGD-10约1/4的情况下，实现了与PGD-10相当甚至更优的鲁棒性。
ai_content.conclusion: 鲁棒性下降主要由扰动欠拟合而非过拟合引起，APART通过动态调整扰动生成过程有效解决了这一问题。

search_text: Overfitting or Underfitting? Understand Robustness Drop in Adversarial Training 过拟合还是欠拟合？了解对抗训练中的鲁棒性下降 Our goal is to understand why the robustness drops after conducting adversarial training for too long. Although this phenomenon is commonly explained as overfitting, our analysis suggest that its primary cause is perturbation underfitting. We observe that after training for too long, FGSM-generated perturbations deteriorate into random noise. Intuitively, since no parameter updates are made to strengthen the perturbation generator, once this process collapses, it could be trapped in such local optima. Also, sophisticating this process could mostly avoid the robustness drop, which supports that this phenomenon is caused by underfitting instead of overfitting. In the light of our analyses, we propose APART, an adaptive adversarial training framework, which parameterizes perturbation generation and progressively strengthens them. Shielding perturbations from underfitting unleashes the potential of our framework. In our experiments, APART provides comparable or even better robustness than PGD-10, with only about 1/4 of its computational cost. 我们的目标是了解为什么在进行对抗性训练太长时间后鲁棒性会下降。尽管这种现象通常被解释为过度拟合，但我们的分析表明其主要原因是扰动欠拟合。我们观察到，训练时间过长后，FGSM 生成的扰动会恶化为随机噪声。直观上，由于没有进行参数更新来增强扰动生成器，因此一旦该过程崩溃，它可能会陷入这种局部最优。此外，完善这个过程可以在很大程度上避免鲁棒性下降，这支持这种现象是由欠拟合而不是过度拟合引起的。根据我们的分析，我们提出了 APART，一种自适应对抗训练框架，它参数化扰动的生成并逐步加强它们。屏蔽欠拟合的扰动释放了我们框架的潜力。在我们的实验中，APART 提供了与 PGD-10 相当甚至更好的鲁棒性，而计算成本仅为其约 1/4。 本文旨在分析对抗训练中鲁棒性下降的原因，并提出一种自适应框架以解决该问题。 Zichao Li,Liyuan Liu,Chengyu Dong,Jingbo Shang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: QReLU and m-QReLU: Two novel quantum activation functions to aid medical diagnostics
title_zh: QReLU 和 m-QReLU：两种新颖的量子激活函数有助于医疗诊断
comment: 30 pages, 4 listings/Python code snippets, 2 figures, 8 tables
comments: 30 pages, 4 listings/Python code snippets, 2 figures, 8 tables
abstract: The ReLU activation function (AF) has been extensively applied in deep neural networks, in particular Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), for image classification despite its unresolved dying ReLU problem, which poses challenges to reliable applications. This issue has obvious important implications for critical applications, such as those in healthcare. Recent approaches are just proposing variations of the activation function within the same unresolved dying ReLU challenge. This contribution reports a different research direction by investigating the development of an innovative quantum approach to the ReLU AF that avoids the dying ReLU problem by disruptive design. The Leaky ReLU was leveraged as a baseline on which the two quantum principles of entanglement and superposition were applied to derive the proposed Quantum ReLU (QReLU) and the modified-QReLU (m-QReLU) activation functions. Both QReLU and m-QReLU are implemented and made freely available in TensorFlow and Keras. This original approach is effective and validated extensively in case studies that facilitate the detection of COVID-19 and Parkinson Disease (PD) from medical images. The two novel AFs were evaluated in a two-layered CNN against nine ReLU-based AFs on seven benchmark datasets, including images of spiral drawings taken via graphic tablets from patients with Parkinson Disease and healthy subjects, and point-of-care ultrasound images on the lungs of patients with COVID-19, those with pneumonia and healthy controls. Despite a higher computational cost, results indicated an overall higher classification accuracy, precision, recall and F1-score brought about by either quantum AFs on five of the seven bench-mark datasets, thus demonstrating its potential to be the new benchmark or gold standard AF in CNNs and aid image classification tasks involved in critical applications, such as medical diagnoses of COVID-19 and PD.

This original approach is effective and validated extensively in case studies that facilitate the detection of COVID-19 and Parkinson Disease (PD) from medical images. abstract_zh: ReLU 激活函数（AF）已广泛应用于深度神经网络，特别是卷积神经网络（CNN）中的图像分类，尽管其尚未解决的 ReLU 垂死问题给可靠应用带来了挑战。这个问题对关键应用（例如医疗保健领域的应用）具有明显的重要影响。最近的方法只是在同一未解决的垂死 ReLU 挑战中提出激活函数的变化。该贡献通过研究 ReLU AF 创新量子方法的开发，报告了不同的研究方向，该方法通过颠覆性设计避免了垂死的 ReLU 问题。利用 Leaky ReLU 作为基线，应用纠缠和叠加这两个量子原理来推导所提出的量子 ReLU (QReLU) 和改进的 QReLU (m-QReLU) 激活函数。 QReLU 和 m-QReLU 均在 TensorFlow 和 Keras 中实现并免费提供。这种原始方法非常有效，并在案例研究中得到了广泛验证，有助于从医学图像中检测 COVID-19 和帕金森病 (PD)。这两种新颖的 AF 在两层 CNN 中与七个基准数据集上的 9 个基于 ReLU 的 AF 进行了评估，其中包括通过绘图板从帕金森病患者和健康受试者身上拍摄的螺旋图图像，以及 COVID-19 患者、肺炎患者和健康对照者肺部的护理点超声图像。尽管计算成本较高，但结果表明，量子 AF 在七个基准数据集中的五个上带来了总体更高的分类准确度、精确度、召回率和 F1 分数，从而证明了其成为 CNN 中新基准或黄金标准 AF 的潜力，并有助于关键应用中涉及的图像分类任务，例如 COVID-19 和 PD 的医疗诊断。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于量子原理的新型激活函数QReLU和m-QReLU，用于改进医疗影像分类中的深度神经网络性能。
AI.motivation: 传统ReLU激活函数存在'死亡ReLU'问题，影响医疗等关键领域的可靠性，现有改进方案未能根本解决该问题。
AI.method: 以Leaky ReLU为基准，引入量子纠缠与叠加原理设计QReLU和m-QReLU，并在TensorFlow/Keras中实现，通过七组医疗影像数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在五组基准数据集上，量子激活函数在分类准确率、精确率、召回率和F1分数上均优于九种ReLU变体，但计算成本较高。
AI.conclusion: 量子激活函数展现出作为CNN新基准的潜力，可提升医疗影像诊断（如新冠/帕金森检测）的可靠性，但需平衡计算成本。

title: Fundamental Linear Algebra Problem of Gaussian Inference
title_zh: 高斯推理的基本线性代数问题
abstract: Underlying many Bayesian inference techniques that seek to approximate the posterior as a Gaussian distribution is a fundamental linear algebra problem that must be solved for both the mean and key entries of the covariance. Even when the true posterior is not Gaussian (e.g., in the case of nonlinear measurement functions) we can use variational schemes that repeatedly solve this linear algebra problem at each iteration. In most cases, the question is not whether a solution to this problem exists, but rather how we can exploit problem-specific structure to find it efficiently. Our contribution is to clearly state the Fundamental Linear Algebra Problem of Gaussian Inference (FLAPOGI) and to provide a novel presentation (using Kronecker algebra) of the not-so-well-known result of Takahashi et al. (1973) that makes it possible to solve for key entries of the covariance matrix. We first provide a global solution and then a local version that can be implemented using local message passing amongst a collection of agents calculating in parallel. Contrary to belief propagation, our local scheme is guaranteed to converge in both the mean and desired covariance quantities to the global solution even when the underlying factor graph is loopy; in the case of synchronous updates, we provide a bound on the number of iterations required for convergence. Compared to belief propagation, this guaranteed convergence comes at the cost of additional storage, calculations, and communication links in the case of loops; however, we show how these can be automatically constructed on the fly using only local information.

Even when the true posterior is not Gaussian (e.g., in the case of nonlinear measurement functions) we can use variational schemes that repeatedly solve this linear algebra problem at each iteration. In most cases, the question is not whether a solution to this problem exists, but rather how we can exploit problem-specific structure to find it efficiently. Our contribution is to clearly state the Fundamental Linear Algebra Problem of Gaussian Inference (FLAPOGI) and to provide a novel presentation (using Kronecker algebra) of the not-so-well-known result of Takahashi et al. (1973) that makes it possible to solve for key entries of the covariance matrix. We first provide a global solution and then a local version that can be implemented using local message passing amongst a collection of agents calculating in parallel. Contrary to belief propagation, our local scheme is guaranteed to converge in both the mean and desired covariance quantities to the global solution even when the underlying factor graph is loopy; in the case of synchronous updates, we provide a bound on the number of iterations required for convergence. Compared to belief propagation, this guaranteed convergence comes at the cost of additional storage, calculations, and communication links in the case of loops; however, we show how these can be automatically constructed on the fly using only local information.
abstract_zh: 许多试图将后验近似为高斯分布的贝叶斯推理技术的基础是一个基本的线性代数问题，必须解决协方差的均值和关键项。即使真正的后验不是高斯分布（例如，在非线性测量函数的情况下），我们也可以使用变分方案在每次迭代时重复解决这个线性代数问题。在大多数情况下，问题不在于该问题是否存在解决方案，而在于我们如何利用特定于问题的结构来有效地找到它。我们的贡献是清楚地阐述高斯推理的基本线性代数问题（FLAPOGI），并为 Takahashi 等人不太知名的结果提供新颖的呈现（使用克罗内克代数）。 （1973）这使得求解协方差矩阵的关键条目成为可能。我们首先提供一个全局解决方案，然后提供一个本地版本，可以使用在并行计算的代理集合之间传递本地消息来实现。与置信传播相反，即使底层因子图是循环的，我们的局部方案也能保证在均值和期望协方差量上收敛到全局解；在同步更新的情况下，我们提供了收敛所需迭代次数的限制。与置信传播相比，这种有保证的收敛是以额外的存储、计算和循环情况下的通信链路为代价的；然而，我们展示了如何仅使用本地信息动态自动构建这些。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在明确高斯推断中的基本线性代数问题（FLAPOGI），并提出一种基于Kronecker代数的新方法，以高效求解协方差矩阵的关键条目。
AI.motivation: 许多贝叶斯推断技术依赖于将后验近似为高斯分布，但即使在非线性测量函数的情况下，也需要解决FLAPOGI问题。现有的方法在处理复杂结构时效率较低，因此需要更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 本文提出了使用Kronecker代数的FLAPOGI新表述，并给出了全局和局部两种求解方法。局部方法通过并行计算的代理之间进行局部消息传递，保证在有环因子图中也能收敛。
AI.result: 本文提出的方法能够在有环因子图中保证收敛，并且在同步更新下提供了收敛所需的迭代次数的上界。与信念传播相比，该方法的收敛性得到了保证，但需要更多的存储和计算资源。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过Kronecker代数明确了FLAPOGI问题，并提出了局部和全局求解方法，保证了收敛性，为高斯推断提供了更有效的计算框架。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在明确高斯推断中的基本线性代数问题（FLAPOGI），并提出一种基于Kronecker代数的新方法，以高效求解协方差矩阵的关键条目。
ai_content.motivation: 许多贝叶斯推断技术依赖于将后验近似为高斯分布，但即使在非线性测量函数的情况下，也需要解决FLAPOGI问题。现有的方法在处理复杂结构时效率较低，因此需要更高效的解决方案。
ai_content.method: 本文提出了使用Kronecker代数的FLAPOGI新表述，并给出了全局和局部两种求解方法。局部方法通过并行计算的代理之间进行局部消息传递，保证在有环因子图中也能收敛。
ai_content.result: 本文提出的方法能够在有环因子图中保证收敛，并且在同步更新下提供了收敛所需的迭代次数的上界。与信念传播相比，该方法的收敛性得到了保证，但需要更多的存储和计算资源。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文通过Kronecker代数明确了FLAPOGI问题，并提出了局部和全局求解方法，保证了收敛性，为高斯推断提供了更有效的计算框架。

search_text: Fundamental Linear Algebra Problem of Gaussian Inference 高斯推理的基本线性代数问题 Underlying many Bayesian inference techniques that seek to approximate the posterior as a Gaussian distribution is a fundamental linear algebra problem that must be solved for both the mean and key entries of the covariance. Even when the true posterior is not Gaussian (e.g., in the case of nonlinear measurement functions) we can use variational schemes that repeatedly solve this linear algebra problem at each iteration. In most cases, the question is not whether a solution to this problem exists, but rather how we can exploit problem-specific structure to find it efficiently. Our contribution is to clearly state the Fundamental Linear Algebra Problem of Gaussian Inference (FLAPOGI) and to provide a novel presentation (using Kronecker algebra) of the not-so-well-known result of Takahashi et al. (1973) that makes it possible to solve for key entries of the covariance matrix. We first provide a global solution and then a local version that can be implemented using local message passing amongst a collection of agents calculating in parallel. Contrary to belief propagation, our local scheme is guaranteed to converge in both the mean and desired covariance quantities to the global solution even when the underlying factor graph is loopy; in the case of synchronous updates, we provide a bound on the number of iterations required for convergence. Compared to belief propagation, this guaranteed convergence comes at the cost of additional storage, calculations, and communication links in the case of loops; however, we show how these can be automatically constructed on the fly using only local information. 许多试图将后验近似为高斯分布的贝叶斯推理技术的基础是一个基本的线性代数问题，必须解决协方差的均值和关键项。即使真正的后验不是高斯分布（例如，在非线性测量函数的情况下），我们也可以使用变分方案在每次迭代时重复解决这个线性代数问题。在大多数情况下，问题不在于该问题是否存在解决方案，而在于我们如何利用特定于问题的结构来有效地找到它。我们的贡献是清楚地阐述高斯推理的基本线性代数问题（FLAPOGI），并为 Takahashi 等人不太知名的结果提供新颖的呈现（使用克罗内克代数）。 （1973）这使得求解协方差矩阵的关键条目成为可能。我们首先提供一个全局解决方案，然后提供一个本地版本，可以使用在并行计算的代理集合之间传递本地消息来实现。与置信传播相反，即使底层因子图是循环的，我们的局部方案也能保证在均值和期望协方差量上收敛到全局解；在同步更新的情况下，我们提供了收敛所需迭代次数的限制。与置信传播相比，这种有保证的收敛是以额外的存储、计算和循环情况下的通信链路为代价的；然而，我们展示了如何仅使用本地信息动态自动构建这些。 本文旨在明确高斯推断中的基本线性代数问题（FLAPOGI），并提出一种基于Kronecker代数的新方法，以高效求解协方差矩阵的关键条目。 Timothy D Barfoot cs.LG,cs.RO,math.ST

title: MAST: Multimodal Abstractive Summarization with Trimodal Hierarchical Attention
title_zh: MAST：具有三模态层次注意力的多模态抽象概括
comment: To appear in the first EMNLP Workshop on NLP Beyond Text, 2020. Aman Khullar and Udit Arora have equal contribution
comments: To appear in the first EMNLP Workshop on NLP Beyond Text, 2020. Aman Khullar and Udit Arora have equal contribution
abstract: This paper presents MAST, a new model for Multimodal Abstractive Text Summarization that utilizes information from all three modalities -- text, audio and video -- in a multimodal video. Prior work on multimodal abstractive text summarization only utilized information from the text and video modalities. We examine the usefulness and challenges of deriving information from the audio modality and present a sequence-to-sequence trimodal hierarchical attention-based model that overcomes these challenges by letting the model pay more attention to the text modality. MAST outperforms the current state of the art model (video-text) by 2.51 points in terms of Content F1 score and 1.00 points in terms of Rouge-L score on the How2 dataset for multimodal language understanding.
summary: This paper presents MAST, a new model for Multimodal Abstractive Text Summarization that utilizes information from all three modalities -- text, audio and video -- in a multimodal video. Prior work on multimodal abstractive text summarization only utilized information from the text and video modalities. We examine the usefulness and challenges of deriving information from the audio modality and present a sequence-to-sequence trimodal hierarchical attention-based model that overcomes these challenges by letting the model pay more attention to the text modality. MAST outperforms the current state of the art model (video-text) by 2.51 points in terms of Content F1 score and 1.00 points in terms of Rouge-L score on the How2 dataset for multimodal language understanding.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 MAST，一种多模态抽象文本摘要的新模型，它利用多模态视频中所有三种模态（文本、音频和视频）的信息。先前关于多模态抽象文本摘要的工作仅利用来自文本和视频模态的信息。我们研究了从音频模态获取信息的有用性和挑战，并提出了一种基于序列到序列三模态分层注意力的模型，该模型通过让模型更多地关注文本模态来克服这些挑战。在多模态语言理解的 How2 数据集上，MAST 在内容 F1 分数方面比当前最先进的模型（视频文本）高出 2.51 分，在 Rouge-L 分数方面高出 1.00 分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAST模型，通过融合文本、音频和视频三种模态信息，实现多模态摘要生成。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅利用文本和视频模态进行多模态摘要，未充分挖掘音频信息的价值，且面临跨模态对齐与注意力分配的挑战。
AI.method: 设计基于序列到序列框架的三模态层次化注意力机制，通过动态调整文本模态的注意力权重，有效整合音频与视频信息。
AI.result: 在How2数据集上，MAST相较现有最优模型（视频-文本）提升Content F1 2.51分、Rouge-L 1.00分。
AI.conclusion: 音频模态的引入显著提升摘要质量，三模态层次化注意力机制有效解决了多模态信息融合的挑战。

authors_text: Wei Chen,Yu Liu,Weiping Wang,Tinne Tuytelaars,Erwin M. Bakker,Michael Lew
title: On the Exploration of Incremental Learning for Fine-grained Image Retrieval
title_zh: 细粒度图像检索增量学习的探索
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of fine-grained image retrieval in an incremental setting, when new categories are added over time. On the one hand, repeatedly training the representation on the extended dataset is time-consuming. On the other hand, fine-tuning the learned representation only with the new classes leads to catastrophic forgetting. To this end, we propose an incremental learning method to mitigate retrieval performance degradation caused by the forgetting issue. Without accessing any samples of the original classes, the classifier of the original network provides soft "labels" to transfer knowledge to train the adaptive network, so as to preserve the previous capability for classification. More importantly, a regularization function based on Maximum Mean Discrepancy is devised to minimize the discrepancy of new classes features from the original network and the adaptive network, respectively. Extensive experiments on two datasets show that our method effectively mitigates the catastrophic forgetting on the original classes while achieving high performance on the new classes.
summary: In this paper, we consider the problem of fine-grained image retrieval in an incremental setting, when new categories are added over time. On the one hand, repeatedly training the representation on the extended dataset is time-consuming. On the other hand, fine-tuning the learned representation only with the new classes leads to catastrophic forgetting. To this end, we propose an incremental learning method to mitigate retrieval performance degradation caused by the forgetting issue. Without accessing any samples of the original classes, the classifier of the original network provides soft "labels" to transfer knowledge to train the adaptive network, so as to preserve the previous capability for classification. More importantly, a regularization function based on Maximum Mean Discrepancy is devised to minimize the discrepancy of new classes features from the original network and the adaptive network, respectively. Extensive experiments on two datasets show that our method effectively mitigates the catastrophic forgetting on the original classes while achieving high performance on the new classes.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑随着时间的推移添加新类别时增量设置中的细粒度图像检索问题。一方面，在扩展数据集上重复训练表示非常耗时。另一方面，仅使用新类对学习到的表示进行微调会导致灾难性的遗忘。为此，我们提出了一种增量学习方法来减轻遗忘问题引起的检索性能下降。在不访问原始类的任何样本的情况下，原始网络的分类器提供软“标签”来传递知识来训练自适应网络，从而保留先前的分类能力。更重要的是，设计了基于最大平均差异的正则化函数，以最小化新类别特征分别与原始网络和自适应网络的差异。对两个数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法有效地减轻了原始类的灾难性遗忘，同时在新类上实现了高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在增量学习框架下细粒度图像检索的问题，旨在解决新增类别时原有类别性能下降的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在增量学习中要么需要重复训练全部数据（耗时），要么仅微调新类别（导致原有类别性能退化），亟需平衡新旧类别性能的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出无需原始类别样本的增量学习方法：利用原始分类器生成软标签训练适配网络，并设计基于最大均值差异的正则化函数，最小化新旧网络特征分布差异。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上的实验表明，该方法有效缓解了原有类别的灾难性遗忘，同时在新类别上保持了高检索性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过知识迁移与特征对齐机制，在增量细粒度图像检索任务中实现了新旧类别性能的兼顾，为增量学习提供了有效解决方案。

Without accessing any samples of the original classes, the classifier of the original network provides soft "labels" to transfer knowledge to train the adaptive network, so as to preserve the previous capability for classification. More importantly, a regularization function based on Maximum Mean Discrepancy is devised to minimize the discrepancy of new classes features from the original network and the adaptive network, respectively. Extensive experiments on two datasets show that our method effectively mitigates the catastrophic forgetting on the original classes while achieving high performance on the new classes. 在本文中，我们考虑随着时间的推移添加新类别时增量设置中的细粒度图像检索问题。一方面，在扩展数据集上重复训练表示非常耗时。另一方面，仅使用新类对学习到的表示进行微调会导致灾难性的遗忘。为此，我们提出了一种增量学习方法来减轻遗忘问题引起的检索性能下降。在不访问原始类的任何样本的情况下，原始网络的分类器提供软“标签”来传递知识来训练自适应网络，从而保留先前的分类能力。更重要的是，设计了基于最大平均差异的正则化函数，以最小化新类别特征分别与原始网络和自适应网络的差异。对两个数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法有效地减轻了原始类的灾难性遗忘，同时在新类上实现了高性能。 本文探讨了在增量学习框架下细粒度图像检索的问题，旨在解决新增类别时原有类别性能下降的灾难性遗忘问题。 Wei Chen,Yu Liu,Weiping Wang,Tinne Tuytelaars,Erwin M. Bakker,Michael Lew cs.CV

authors: H. F. Machiel Van der Loos
authors_json: H. F. Machiel Van der Loos
authors_text: Wesley P. Chan,Sina Radmard,Zhao Quan Hew,Jon Morris,Elizabeth Croft,H. F. Machiel Van der Loos
title: Autonomous Person-Specific Following Robot
title_zh: 自主仿人跟随机器人
comment: ef:In Proceedings of the Australasian Conference on Robotics and Automation (ACRA 2020). 2020
comments: ef:In Proceedings of the Australasian Conference on Robotics and Automation (ACRA 2020). 2020
abstract: Following a specific user is a desired or even required capability for service robots in many human-robot collaborative applications. However, most existing person-following robots follow people without knowledge of who it is following. In this paper, we proposed an identity-specific person tracker, capable of tracking and identifying nearby people, to enable person-specific following. Our proposed method uses a Sequential Nearest Neighbour with Thresholding Selection algorithm we devised to fuse together an anonymous person tracker and a face recogniser. Experiment results comparing our proposed method with alternative approaches showed that our method achieves better performance in tracking and identifying people, as well as improved robot performance in following a target individual.
summary: Following a specific user is a desired or even required capability for service robots in many human-robot collaborative applications. However, most existing person-following robots follow people without knowledge of who it is following. In this paper, we proposed an identity-specific person tracker, capable of tracking and identifying nearby people, to enable person-specific following. Our proposed method uses a Sequential Nearest Neighbour with Thresholding Selection algorithm we devised to fuse together an anonymous person tracker and a face recogniser. Experiment results comparing our proposed method with alternative approaches showed that our method achieves better performance in tracking and identifying people, as well as improved robot performance in following a target individual.
abstract_zh: 在许多人机协作应用中，跟踪特定用户是服务机器人所期望甚至必需的能力。然而，大多数现有的跟随机器人在不知道跟随者是谁的情况下跟随人。在本文中，我们提出了一种特定身份的人员跟踪器，能够跟踪和识别附近的人，以实现特定于人的跟踪。我们提出的方法使用带有阈值选择算法的顺序最近邻，我们设计将匿名人员跟踪器和面部识别器融合在一起。将我们提出的方法与其他方法进行比较的实验结果表明，我们的方法在跟踪和识别人员方面取得了更好的性能，并且在跟踪目标个体方面提高了机器人的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于身份识别的个性化跟随机器人系统，实现对特定目标人物的精准跟踪与识别。
AI.motivation: 现有跟随机器人缺乏对目标身份的识别能力，难以满足需要精准跟随特定人员的场景需求。
AI.method: 设计融合匿名跟踪器与人脸识别的SNN-TS算法，通过阈值选择机制实现跟踪与识别的协同优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在目标跟踪准确率、身份识别率及机器人跟随稳定性方面均优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的身份感知跟踪方法有效提升了机器人对特定目标的跟随能力，为服务机器人应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Siyi Tang,Amirata Ghorbani,Rikiya Yamashita,Sameer Rehman,Jared A. Dunnmon,James Zou,Daniel L. Rubin
title: Data Valuation for Medical Imaging Using Shapley Value: Application on A Large-scale Chest X-ray Dataset
title_zh: 使用 Shapley 值进行医学影像数据评估：在大规模胸部 X 射线数据集上的应用
abstract: The reliability of machine learning models can be compromised when trained on low quality data. Many large-scale medical imaging datasets contain low quality labels extracted from sources such as medical reports. Moreover, images within a dataset may have heterogeneous quality due to artifacts and biases arising from equipment or measurement errors. Therefore, algorithms that can automatically identify low quality data are highly desired. In this study, we used data Shapley, a data valuation metric, to quantify the value of training data to the performance of a pneumonia detection algorithm in a large chest X-ray dataset. We characterized the effectiveness of data Shapley in identifying low quality versus valuable data for pneumonia detection. We found that removing training data with high Shapley values decreased the pneumonia detection performance, whereas removing data with low Shapley values improved the model performance. Furthermore, there were more mislabeled examples in low Shapley value data and more true pneumonia cases in high Shapley value data. Our results suggest that low Shapley value indicates mislabeled or poor quality images, whereas high Shapley value indicates data that are valuable for pneumonia detection. Our method can serve as a framework for using data Shapley to denoise large-scale medical imaging datasets.
summary: The reliability of machine learning models can be compromised when trained on low quality data. Many large-scale medical imaging datasets contain low quality labels extracted from sources such as medical reports. Moreover, images within a dataset may have heterogeneous quality due to artifacts and biases arising from equipment or measurement errors. Therefore, algorithms that can automatically identify low quality data are highly desired. In this study, we used data Shapley, a data valuation metric, to quantify the value of training data to the performance of a pneumonia detection algorithm in a large chest X-ray dataset. We characterized the effectiveness of data Shapley in identifying low quality versus valuable data for pneumonia detection. We found that removing training data with high Shapley values decreased the pneumonia detection performance, whereas removing data with low Shapley values improved the model performance. Furthermore, there were more mislabeled examples in low Shapley value data and more true pneumonia cases in high Shapley value data. Our results suggest that low Shapley value indicates mislabeled or poor quality images, whereas high Shapley value indicates data that are valuable for pneumonia detection. Our method can serve as a framework for using data Shapley to denoise large-scale medical imaging datasets.
abstract_zh: 当使用低质量数据进行训练时，机器学习模型的可靠性可能会受到影响。许多大规模医学成像数据集包含从医学报告等来源提取的低质量标签。此外，由于设备或测量误差产生的伪影和偏差，数据集中的图像可能具有异质质量。因此，非常需要能够自动识别低质量数据的算法。在本研究中，我们使用数据 Shapley（一种数据评估指标）来量化训练数据对大型胸部 X 射线数据集中肺炎检测算法性能的价值。我们表征了 Shapley 数据在识别肺炎检测的低质量数据与有价值数据方面的有效性。我们发现，删除具有高 Shapley 值的训练数据会降低肺炎检测性能，而删除具有低 Shapley 值的数据会提高模型性能。此外，低沙普利值数据中错误标记的例子较多，而高沙普利值数据中真实的肺炎病例较多。我们的结果表明，低 Shapley 值表示标签错误或质量差的图像，而高 Shapley 值表示对肺炎检测有价值的数据。我们的方法可以作为使用数据 Shapley 对大规模医学成像数据集进行去噪的框架。

AI.tldr: 本研究应用Shapley值数据评估方法，量化大规模胸部X光数据集中训练数据对肺炎检测算法的贡献，以识别低质量数据。
AI.motivation: 医疗影像数据集常存在标签质量低、图像质量异质性等问题，影响机器学习模型可靠性，需自动识别低质量数据的方法。
AI.method: 采用数据Shapley值指标，评估每个训练样本对肺炎检测模型的贡献度，并通过移除高/低Shapley值数据验证其对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 移除高Shapley值数据导致模型性能下降，而移除低Shapley值数据提升性能；低Shapley值数据包含更多误标签，高值数据包含更多真实肺炎病例。
AI.conclusion: Shapley值可有效区分低质量与高质量数据，为大规模医疗影像数据集的去噪提供框架，提升模型可靠性。

title: Maximum-Entropy Adversarial Data Augmentation for Improved Generalization and Robustness
title_zh: 最大熵对抗数据增强以提高泛化性和鲁棒性
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2020. Code is available at https://github.com/garyzhao/ME-ADA
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2020. Code is available at https://github.com/garyzhao/ME-ADA
abstract: Adversarial data augmentation has shown promise for training robust deep neural networks against unforeseen data shifts or corruptions. However, it is difficult to define heuristics to generate effective fictitious target distributions containing "hard" adversarial perturbations that are largely different from the source distribution. In this paper, we propose a novel and effective regularization term for adversarial data augmentation. We theoretically derive it from the information bottleneck principle, which results in a maximum-entropy formulation. Intuitively, this regularization term encourages perturbing the underlying source distribution to enlarge predictive uncertainty of the current model, so that the generated "hard" adversarial perturbations can improve the model robustness during training. Experimental results on three standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms the existing state of the art by a statistically significant margin.
summary: Adversarial data augmentation has shown promise for training robust deep neural networks against unforeseen data shifts or corruptions. However, it is difficult to define heuristics to generate effective fictitious target distributions containing "hard" adversarial perturbations that are largely different from the source distribution. In this paper, we propose a novel and effective regularization term for adversarial data augmentation. We theoretically derive it from the information bottleneck principle, which results in a maximum-entropy formulation. Intuitively, this regularization term encourages perturbing the underlying source distribution to enlarge predictive uncertainty of the current model, so that the generated "hard" adversarial perturbations can improve the model robustness during training. Experimental results on three standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms the existing state of the art by a statistically significant margin.
abstract_zh: 对抗性数据增强已显示出训练强大的深度神经网络以应对不可预见的数据变化或损坏的希望。然而，很难定义启发式方法来生成有效的虚拟目标分布，其中包含与源分布有很大不同的“硬”对抗性扰动。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且有效的正则化项，用于对抗性数据增强。从理论上讲，我们从信息瓶颈原理中推导出来，从而得出最大熵公式。直观上，该正则化项鼓励扰动底层源分布以扩大当前模型的预测不确定性，以便生成的“硬”对抗性扰动可以提高训练期间模型的鲁棒性。三个标准基准的实验结果表明，我们的方法始终以统计上显着的优势优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最大熵的对抗性数据增强方法，通过引入新的正则化项提升模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗性数据增强方法难以生成与源分布差异显著的'硬'对抗扰动，导致模型鲁棒性提升有限。
AI.method: 从信息瓶颈原理推导出最大熵正则化项，通过扰动源分布扩大模型预测不确定性，生成有效对抗样本。
AI.result: 在三个标准基准测试中，该方法在统计显著性水平上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 最大熵正则化框架有效提升了对抗性数据增强的效果，增强了模型对分布偏移和噪声的鲁棒性。

ai_content.result: 在三个标准基准测试中，该方法在统计显著性水平上优于现有最先进方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 最大熵正则化框架有效提升了对抗性数据增强的效果，增强了模型对分布偏移和噪声的鲁棒性。
