search_text: Maximum-Entropy Adversarial Data Augmentation for Improved Generalization and Robustness 最大熵对抗数据增强以提高泛化性和鲁棒性 Adversarial data augmentation has shown promise for training robust deep neural networks against unforeseen data shifts or corruptions. However, it is difficult to define heuristics to generate effective fictitious target distributions containing "hard" adversarial perturbations that are largely different from the source distribution. In this paper, we propose a novel and effective regularization term for adversarial data augmentation. We theoretically derive it from the information bottleneck principle, which results in a maximum-entropy formulation. Intuitively, this regularization term encourages perturbing the underlying source distribution to enlarge predictive uncertainty of the current model, so that the generated "hard" adversarial perturbations can improve the model robustness during training. Experimental results on three standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms the existing state of the art by a statistically significant margin. 对抗性数据增强已显示出训练强大的深度神经网络以应对不可预见的数据变化或损坏的希望。然而，很难定义启发式方法来生成有效的虚拟目标分布，其中包含与源分布有很大不同的“硬”对抗性扰动。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且有效的正则化项，用于对抗性数据增强。从理论上讲，我们从信息瓶颈原理中推导出来，从而得出最大熵公式。直观上，该正则化项鼓励扰动底层源分布以扩大当前模型的预测不确定性，以便生成的“硬”对抗性扰动可以提高训练期间模型的鲁棒性。三个标准基准的实验结果表明，我们的方法始终以统计上显着的优势优于现有技术。 本文提出一种基于最大熵的对抗性数据增强方法，通过引入新的正则化项提升模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性。 Long Zhao,Ting Liu,Xi Peng,Dimitris Metaxas cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Jie Lei,Licheng Yu,Tamara L. Berg,Mohit Bansal
title: What is More Likely to Happen Next? Video-and-Language Future Event Prediction
title_zh: 接下来更有可能发生什么？视频和语言未来事件预测
abstract: Given a video with aligned dialogue, people can often infer what is more likely to happen next. Making such predictions requires not only a deep understanding of the rich dynamics underlying the video and dialogue, but also a significant amount of commonsense knowledge. In this work, we explore whether AI models are able to learn to make such multimodal commonsense next-event predictions. To support research in this direction, we collect a new dataset, named Video-and-Language Event Prediction (VLEP), with 28,726 future event prediction examples (along with their rationales) from 10,234 diverse TV Show and YouTube Lifestyle Vlog video clips. In order to promote the collection of non-trivial challenging examples, we employ an adversarial human-and-model-in-the-loop data collection procedure. We also present a strong baseline incorporating information from video, dialogue, and commonsense knowledge. Experiments show that each type of information is useful for this challenging task, and that compared to the high human performance on VLEP, our model provides a good starting point but leaves large room for future work. Our dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/jayleicn/VideoLanguageFuturePred
summary: Given a video with aligned dialogue, people can often infer what is more likely to happen next. Making such predictions requires not only a deep understanding of the rich dynamics underlying the video and dialogue, but also a significant amount of commonsense knowledge. In this work, we explore whether AI models are able to learn to make such multimodal commonsense next-event predictions. To support research in this direction, we collect a new dataset, named Video-and-Language Event Prediction (VLEP), with 28,726 future event prediction examples (along with their rationales) from 10,234 diverse TV Show and YouTube Lifestyle Vlog video clips. In order to promote the collection of non-trivial challenging examples, we employ an adversarial human-and-model-in-the-loop data collection procedure. We also present a strong baseline incorporating information from video, dialogue, and commonsense knowledge. Experiments show that each type of information is useful for this challenging task, and that compared to the high human performance on VLEP, our model provides a good starting point but leaves large room for future work. Our dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/jayleicn/VideoLanguageFuturePred
abstract_zh: 鉴于对话一致的视频，人们通常可以推断出接下来更有可能发生的事情。做出这样的预测不仅需要深入了解视频和对话背后的丰富动态，还需要大量的常识性知识。在这项工作中，我们探索人工智能模型是否能够学习做出这种多模式常识性的下一事件预测。为了支持这一方向的研究，我们收集了一个名为视频和语言事件预测 (VLEP) 的新数据集，其中包含来自 10,234 个不同电视节目和 YouTube 生活方式 Vlog 视频剪辑的 28,726 个未来事件预测示例（及其基本原理）。为了促进收集不平凡的挑战性示例，我们采用了对抗性的人类和模型在环数据收集程序。我们还提出了一个强有力的基线，结合了来自视频、对话和常识知识的信息。实验表明，每种类型的信息对于这项具有挑战性的任务都是有用的，并且与 VLEP 上人类的高表现相比，我们的模型提供了一个良好的起点，但为未来的工作留下了很大的空间。我们的数据集和代码位于：https://github.com/jayleicn/VideoLanguageFuturePred

AI.tldr: 该论文研究基于视频和对话内容预测未来事件的多模态AI模型，同时构建了包含视频、对话及常识推理的VLEP数据集。
AI.motivation: 探索AI是否能像人类一样通过视频与对话理解动态情境并结合常识知识预测未来事件，推动多模态推理研究。
AI.method: 采用对抗性人机协同方法收集VLEP数据集，设计结合视频分析、对话理解及常识知识的多模态基线模型进行预测。
AI.result: 实验表明视频、对话和常识信息均对预测任务有效，但模型性能与人类水平仍存在显著差距。
AI.conclusion: VLEP数据集和基线模型为多模态未来事件预测研究提供了基础，但模型在常识推理和动态理解方面仍有较大提升空间。

authors_text: Yanyan Li,Raza Yunus,Nikolas Brasch,Nassir Navab,Federico Tombari
title: RGB-D SLAM with Structural Regularities
title_zh: 具有结构规律的 RGB-D SLAM
abstract: This work proposes a RGB-D SLAM system specifically designed for structured environments and aimed at improved tracking and mapping accuracy by relying on geometric features that are extracted from the surrounding. Structured environments offer, in addition to points, also an abundance of geometrical features such as lines and planes, which we exploit to design both the tracking and mapping components of our SLAM system. For the tracking part, we explore geometric relationships between these features based on the assumption of a Manhattan World (MW). We propose a decoupling-refinement method based on points, lines, and planes, as well as the use of Manhattan relationships in an additional pose refinement module. For the mapping part, different levels of maps from sparse to dense are reconstructed at a low computational cost. We propose an instance-wise meshing strategy to build a dense map by meshing plane instances independently. The overall performance in terms of pose estimation and reconstruction is evaluated on public benchmarks and shows improved performance compared to state-of-the-art methods. The code is released at \url{https://github.com/yanyan-li/PlanarSLAM}
summary: This work proposes a RGB-D SLAM system specifically designed for structured environments and aimed at improved tracking and mapping accuracy by relying on geometric features that are extracted from the surrounding. Structured environments offer, in addition to points, also an abundance of geometrical features such as lines and planes, which we exploit to design both the tracking and mapping components of our SLAM system. For the tracking part, we explore geometric relationships between these features based on the assumption of a Manhattan World (MW). We propose a decoupling-refinement method based on points, lines, and planes, as well as the use of Manhattan relationships in an additional pose refinement module. For the mapping part, different levels of maps from sparse to dense are reconstructed at a low computational cost. We propose an instance-wise meshing strategy to build a dense map by meshing plane instances independently. The overall performance in terms of pose estimation and reconstruction is evaluated on public benchmarks and shows improved performance compared to state-of-the-art methods. The code is released at \url{https://github.com/yanyan-li/PlanarSLAM}
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种专为结构化环境设计的 RGB-D SLAM 系统，旨在通过依赖从周围环境中提取的几何特征来提高跟踪和建图精度。除了点之外，结构化环境还提供丰富的几何特征，例如直线和平面，我们利用这些几何特征来设计 SLAM 系统的跟踪和地图组件。对于跟踪部分，我们基于曼哈顿世界（MW）的假设探索这些特征之间的几何关系。我们提出了一种基于点、线和平面的解耦细化方法，以及在附加姿态细化模块中使用曼哈顿关系。对于映射部分，以较低的计算成本重建从稀疏到密集的不同级别的映射。我们提出了一种实例级网格划分策略，通过独立地对平面实例进行网格划分来构建密集地图。姿态估计和重建方面的整体性能是在公共基准上进行评估的，并且与最先进的方法相比显示出改进的性能。代码发布于\url{https://github.com/yanyan-li/PlanarSLAM}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对结构化环境的RGB-D SLAM系统，通过利用几何特征提升跟踪和建图精度。
AI.motivation: 结构化环境包含丰富的几何特征（如线、面），传统基于点的方法难以充分利用这些信息，导致跟踪和建图精度不足。
AI.method: 基于曼哈顿世界假设，设计解耦-优化方法，结合点、线、面特征进行位姿估计；采用分层地图重建策略与实例级网格化方法构建稠密地图。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实验表明，该方法在位姿估计和重建精度上优于现有最先进的SLAM方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用结构化环境的几何先验，提出的SLAM系统在计算效率和地图质量方面均取得显著提升。

title: An Algorithm for Learning Smaller Representations of Models With Scarce Data
title_zh: 一种利用稀缺数据学习较小模型表示的算法
comment: Accepted to Information Geometry--see the journal for the final, authenticated version
comments: Accepted to Information Geometry--see the journal for the final, authenticated version
abstract: We present an algorithm for solving binary classification problems when the dataset is not fully representative of the problem being solved, and obtaining more data is not possible. It relies on a trained model with loose accuracy constraints, an iterative hyperparameter searching-and-pruning procedure over a search space $Θ$, and a data-generating function. Our algorithm works by reconstructing up to homology the manifold on which lies the support of the underlying distribution. We provide an analysis on correctness and runtime complexity under ideal conditions and an extension to deep neural networks. In the former case, if $\sizeΘ$ is the number of hyperparameter sets in the search space, this algorithm returns a solution that is up to $2(1 - {2^{-\sizeΘ}})$ times better than simply training with an enumeration of $Θ$ and picking the best model. As part of our analysis we also prove that an open cover of a dataset has the same homology as the manifold on which lies the support of the underlying probability distribution, if and only said dataset is learnable. This latter result acts as a formal argument to explain the effectiveness of data expansion techniques.
summary: We present an algorithm for solving binary classification problems when the dataset is not fully representative of the problem being solved, and obtaining more data is not possible. It relies on a trained model with loose accuracy constraints, an iterative hyperparameter searching-and-pruning procedure over a search space $Θ$, and a data-generating function. Our algorithm works by reconstructing up to homology the manifold on which lies the support of the underlying distribution. We provide an analysis on correctness and runtime complexity under ideal conditions and an extension to deep neural networks. In the former case, if $\sizeΘ$ is the number of hyperparameter sets in the search space, this algorithm returns a solution that is up to $2(1 - {2^{-\sizeΘ}})$ times better than simply training with an enumeration of $Θ$ and picking the best model. As part of our analysis we also prove that an open cover of a dataset has the same homology as the manifold on which lies the support of the underlying probability distribution, if and only said dataset is learnable. This latter result acts as a formal argument to explain the effectiveness of data expansion techniques.
abstract_zh: 当数据集不能完全代表正在解决的问题并且不可能获得更多数据时，我们提出了一种解决二元分类问题的算法。它依赖于具有宽松精度约束的训练模型、搜索空间 $θ$ 上的迭代超参数搜索和修剪过程以及数据生成函数。我们的算法的工作原理是重建流形的同源性，流形是基础分布的支持。我们提供了理想条件下正确性和运行时复杂性的分析以及深度神经网络的扩展。在前一种情况下，如果 $\sizeθ$ 是搜索空间中超参数集的数量，则该算法返回的解决方案比简单地使用 $θ$ 枚举进行训练并选择最佳模型要好高达 $2(1 - {2^{-\sizeθ}})$ 倍。作为我们分析的一部分，我们还证明数据集的开放覆盖与支持基础概率分布的流形具有相同的同源性，当且仅当所述数据集是可学习的时。后一个结果可以作为解释数据扩展技术有效性的正式论据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在数据稀缺情况下解决二分类问题的算法，通过重构底层分布流形并优化超参数来提升模型表现。
AI.motivation: 当数据集无法代表实际问题且无法获取更多数据时，传统方法效果有限，需开发无需额外数据的高效学习算法。
AI.method: 基于预训练模型和数据生成函数，结合迭代超参数搜索与剪枝策略，通过同调理论重构数据流形结构，并扩展至深度神经网络。
AI.result: 算法在理想条件下证明其性能优于简单枚举超参数方法，改进因子为$2(1 - {2^{-\\sizeΘ}})$，并建立数据集可学习性与流形同调的理论联系。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过流形重构和超参数优化有效应对数据稀缺问题，理论分析为数据增强技术提供了同调层面的解释依据。

As part of our analysis we also prove that an open cover of a dataset has the same homology as the manifold on which lies the support of the underlying probability distribution, if and only said dataset is learnable. This latter result acts as a formal argument to explain the effectiveness of data expansion techniques. 当数据集不能完全代表正在解决的问题并且不可能获得更多数据时，我们提出了一种解决二元分类问题的算法。它依赖于具有宽松精度约束的训练模型、搜索空间 $θ$ 上的迭代超参数搜索和修剪过程以及数据生成函数。我们的算法的工作原理是重建流形的同源性，流形是基础分布的支持。我们提供了理想条件下正确性和运行时复杂性的分析以及深度神经网络的扩展。在前一种情况下，如果 $\sizeθ$ 是搜索空间中超参数集的数量，则该算法返回的解决方案比简单地使用 $θ$ 枚举进行训练并选择最佳模型要好高达 $2(1 - {2^{-\sizeθ}})$ 倍。作为我们分析的一部分，我们还证明数据集的开放覆盖与支持基础概率分布的流形具有相同的同源性，当且仅当所述数据集是可学习的时。后一个结果可以作为解释数据扩展技术有效性的正式论据。 本文提出了一种在数据稀缺情况下解决二分类问题的算法，通过重构底层分布流形并优化超参数来提升模型表现。 Adrian de Wynter cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DS

title: An Empowerment-based Solution to Robotic Manipulation Tasks with Sparse Rewards
title_zh: 基于赋权的稀疏奖励机器人操作任务解决方案
abstract: In order to provide adaptive and user-friendly solutions to robotic manipulation, it is important that the agent can learn to accomplish tasks even if they are only provided with very sparse instruction signals. To address the issues reinforcement learning algorithms face when task rewards are sparse, this paper proposes an intrinsic motivation approach that can be easily integrated into any standard reinforcement learning algorithm and can allow robotic manipulators to learn useful manipulation skills with only sparse extrinsic rewards. Through integrating and balancing empowerment and curiosity, this approach shows superior performance compared to other state-of-the-art intrinsic exploration approaches during extensive empirical testing. Qualitative analysis also shows that when combined with diversity-driven intrinsic motivations, this approach can help manipulators learn a set of diverse skills which could potentially be applied to other more complicated manipulation tasks and accelerate their learning process.
summary: In order to provide adaptive and user-friendly solutions to robotic manipulation, it is important that the agent can learn to accomplish tasks even if they are only provided with very sparse instruction signals. To address the issues reinforcement learning algorithms face when task rewards are sparse, this paper proposes an intrinsic motivation approach that can be easily integrated into any standard reinforcement learning algorithm and can allow robotic manipulators to learn useful manipulation skills with only sparse extrinsic rewards. Through integrating and balancing empowerment and curiosity, this approach shows superior performance compared to other state-of-the-art intrinsic exploration approaches during extensive empirical testing. Qualitative analysis also shows that when combined with diversity-driven intrinsic motivations, this approach can help manipulators learn a set of diverse skills which could potentially be applied to other more complicated manipulation tasks and accelerate their learning process.
abstract_zh: 为了为机器人操作提供自适应且用户友好的解决方案，重要的是代理能够学习完成任务，即使它们仅提供非常稀疏的指令信号。为了解决强化学习算法在任务奖励稀疏时面临的问题，本文提出了一种内在动机方法，该方法可以轻松集成到任何标准强化学习算法中，并且可以允许机器人操纵器仅通过稀疏的外在奖励就可以学习有用的操作技能。通过整合和平衡赋权和好奇心，在广泛的实证测试中，与其他最先进的内在探索方法相比，该方法显示出优越的性能。定性分析还表明，当与多样性驱动的内在动机相结合时，这种方法可以帮助操纵者学习一系列不同的技能，这些技能可能适用于其他更复杂的操纵任务，并加速他们的学习过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于赋能的解决方案，解决稀疏奖励下机器人操作任务的学习问题。
AI.motivation: 稀疏奖励导致传统强化学习算法难以有效指导机器人学习复杂操作任务，需设计更高效的内在激励机制。
AI.method: 整合赋能（环境控制能力）与好奇心驱动的内在动机，构建可嵌入标准RL算法的探索策略。
AI.result: 实证测试显示该方法优于现有先进内在探索方法，能学习多样化操作技能并加速复杂任务学习。
AI.conclusion: 赋能与好奇心结合的内在动机机制有效提升稀疏奖励场景下的机器人操作学习性能与技能泛化能力。

title: Impact of Action Unit Occurrence Patterns on Detection
title_zh: 动作单元发生模式对检测的影响
abstract: Detecting action units is an important task in face analysis, especially in facial expression recognition. This is due, in part, to the idea that expressions can be decomposed into multiple action units. In this paper we investigate the impact of action unit occurrence patterns on detection of action units. To facilitate this investigation, we review state of the art literature, for AU detection, on 2 state-of-the-art face databases that are commonly used for this task, namely DISFA, and BP4D. Our findings, from this literature review, suggest that action unit occurrence patterns strongly impact evaluation metrics (e.g. F1-binary). Along with the literature review, we also conduct multi and single action unit detection, as well as propose a new approach to explicitly train deep neural networks using the occurrence patterns to boost the accuracy of action unit detection. These experiments validate that action unit patterns directly impact the evaluation metrics.
summary: Detecting action units is an important task in face analysis, especially in facial expression recognition. This is due, in part, to the idea that expressions can be decomposed into multiple action units. In this paper we investigate the impact of action unit occurrence patterns on detection of action units. To facilitate this investigation, we review state of the art literature, for AU detection, on 2 state-of-the-art face databases that are commonly used for this task, namely DISFA, and BP4D. Our findings, from this literature review, suggest that action unit occurrence patterns strongly impact evaluation metrics (e.g. F1-binary). Along with the literature review, we also conduct multi and single action unit detection, as well as propose a new approach to explicitly train deep neural networks using the occurrence patterns to boost the accuracy of action unit detection. These experiments validate that action unit patterns directly impact the evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 检测动作单元是面部分析中的一项重要任务，尤其是面部表情识别中。这部分是由于表达式可以分解为多个动作单元的想法。在本文中，我们研究了动作单元发生模式对动作单元检测的影响。为了促进这项调查，我们回顾了有关 AU 检测的最新文献，涉及该任务常用的 2 个最先进的人脸数据库，即 DISFA 和 BP4D。我们的研究结果表明，行动单元的发生模式强烈影响评估指标（例如 F1-二元）。除了文献综述之外，我们还进行了多动作单元和单动作单元检测，并提出了一种使用发生模式显式训练深度神经网络的新方法，以提高动作单元检测的准确性。这些实验验证了行动单元模式直接影响评估指标。

AI.tldr: 本文研究动作单元（AU）出现模式对动作单元检测的影响，并提出基于模式的深度学习方法以提升检测准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分考虑动作单元出现模式对检测性能的影响，而该模式可能显著影响评估指标（如F1-binary）。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析DISFA和BP4D数据库的检测方法，对比单/多动作单元检测，并提出利用出现模式训练深度神经网络的新方法。
AI.result: 实验验证动作单元出现模式直接影响评估指标，新方法通过显式建模模式有效提升了检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 动作单元出现模式是影响检测性能的关键因素，基于模式的深度学习方法可有效优化检测效果。

search_text: Impact of Action Unit Occurrence Patterns on Detection 动作单元发生模式对检测的影响 Detecting action units is an important task in face analysis, especially in facial expression recognition. This is due, in part, to the idea that expressions can be decomposed into multiple action units. In this paper we investigate the impact of action unit occurrence patterns on detection of action units. To facilitate this investigation, we review state of the art literature, for AU detection, on 2 state-of-the-art face databases that are commonly used for this task, namely DISFA, and BP4D. Our findings, from this literature review, suggest that action unit occurrence patterns strongly impact evaluation metrics (e.g. F1-binary). Along with the literature review, we also conduct multi and single action unit detection, as well as propose a new approach to explicitly train deep neural networks using the occurrence patterns to boost the accuracy of action unit detection. These experiments validate that action unit patterns directly impact the evaluation metrics. 检测动作单元是面部分析中的一项重要任务，尤其是面部表情识别中。这部分是由于表达式可以分解为多个动作单元的想法。在本文中，我们研究了动作单元发生模式对动作单元检测的影响。为了促进这项调查，我们回顾了有关 AU 检测的最新文献，涉及该任务常用的 2 个最先进的人脸数据库，即 DISFA 和 BP4D。我们的研究结果表明，行动单元的发生模式强烈影响评估指标（例如 F1-二元）。除了文献综述之外，我们还进行了多动作单元和单动作单元检测，并提出了一种使用发生模式显式训练深度神经网络的新方法，以提高动作单元检测的准确性。这些实验验证了行动单元模式直接影响评估指标。 本文研究动作单元（AU）出现模式对动作单元检测的影响，并提出基于模式的深度学习方法以提升检测准确率。 Saurabh Hinduja,Shaun Canavan,Saandeep Aathreya cs.CV

authors_text: John J. Howard,Yevgeniy B. Sirotin,Jerry L. Tipton,Arun R. Vemury
title: Quantifying the Extent to Which Race and Gender Features Determine Identity in Commercial Face Recognition Algorithms
title_zh: 量化商业人脸识别算法中种族和性别特征决定身份的程度
abstract: Human face features can be used to determine individual identity as well as demographic information like gender and race. However, the extent to which black-box commercial face recognition algorithms (CFRAs) use gender and race features to determine identity is poorly understood despite increasing deployments by government and industry. In this study, we quantified the degree to which gender and race features influenced face recognition similarity scores between different people, i.e. non-mated scores. We ran this study using five different CFRAs and a sample of 333 diverse test subjects. As a control, we compared the behavior of these non-mated distributions to a commercial iris recognition algorithm (CIRA). Confirming prior work, all CFRAs produced higher similarity scores for people of the same gender and race, an effect known as "broad homogeneity". No such effect was observed for the CIRA. Next, we applied principal components analysis (PCA) to similarity score matrices. We show that some principal components (PCs) of CFRAs cluster people by gender and race, but the majority do not. Demographic clustering in the PCs accounted for only 10 % of the total CFRA score variance. No clustering was observed for the CIRA. This demonstrates that, although CFRAs use some gender and race features to establish identity, most features utilized by current CFRAs are unrelated to gender and race, similar to the iris texture patterns utilized by the CIRA. Finally, reconstruction of similarity score matrices using only PCs that showed no demographic clustering reduced broad homogeneity effects, but also decreased the separation between mated and non-mated scores. This suggests it's possible for CFRAs to operate on features unrelated to gender and race, albeit with somewhat lower recognition accuracy, but that this is not the current commercial practice.

abstract_zh: 人脸特征可用于确定个人身份以及性别和种族等人口统计信息。然而，尽管政府和行业的部署不断增加，但人们对黑盒商业人脸识别算法 (CFRA) 使用性别和种族特征来确定身份的程度仍知之甚少。在这项研究中，我们量化了性别和种族特征对不同人之间面部识别相似度得分（即非交配得分）的影响程度。我们使用 5 种不同的 CFRA 和 333 名不同的测试对象样本进行了这项研究。作为对照，我们将这些非配对分布的行为与商业虹膜识别算法（CIRA）进行了比较。证实了之前的工作，所有 CFRA 对相同性别和种族的人产生了更高的相似性分数，这种效应被称为“广泛同质性”。 CIRA 没有观察到这种效应。接下来，我们将主成分分析（PCA）应用于相似性得分矩阵。我们表明，CFRA 的一些主要成分 (PC) 按性别和种族对人们进行聚类，但大多数情况并非如此。 PC 中的人口统计聚类仅占 CFRA 总分方差的 10%。 CIRA 没有观察到聚类。这表明，尽管 CFRA 使用一些性别和种族特征来建立身份，但当前 CFRA 使用的大多数特征与性别和种族无关，类似于 CIRA 使用的虹膜纹理图案。最后，仅使用未显示人口统计聚类的 PC 重建相似性得分矩阵，减少了广泛的同质性效应，但也减少了配对分数和非配对分数之间的分离。这表明 CFRA 可以对与性别和种族无关的特征进行操作，尽管识别准确度稍低，但这不是当前的商业实践。

AI.tldr: 该论文量化分析了商业人脸识别算法在确定身份时，性别和种族特征的影响程度。
AI.motivation: 尽管政府和行业广泛部署人脸识别算法，但其如何利用性别和种族特征确定身份仍不明确，需评估潜在的偏见和合规性问题。
AI.method: 使用五种商业人脸识别算法（CFRAs）和333名多样化测试对象，对比非匹配分数分布并引入虹膜识别算法（CIRA）作为对照。通过主成分分析（PCA）分解相似度矩阵，评估性别和种族聚类的影响。
AI.result: 所有CFRAs均表现出同质性效应（同类人群相似度更高），而CIRA无此现象。PCA显示仅10%的CFRA分数方差与人口统计学聚类相关，去除相关主成分会降低识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 当前CFRAs虽部分利用性别和种族特征，但多数特征与之无关，类似虹膜纹理模式。若剔除人口统计学特征，算法准确率会下降，但技术上可行。

authors_text: Junjie Hu,Melvin Johnson,Orhan Firat,Aditya Siddhant,Graham Neubig
title: Explicit Alignment Objectives for Multilingual Bidirectional Encoders
title_zh: 多语言双向编码器的显式对齐目标
abstract: Pre-trained cross-lingual encoders such as mBERT (Devlin et al., 2019) and XLMR (Conneau et al., 2020) have proven to be impressively effective at enabling transfer-learning of NLP systems from high-resource languages to low-resource languages. This success comes despite the fact that there is no explicit objective to align the contextual embeddings of words/sentences with similar meanings across languages together in the same space. In this paper, we present a new method for learning multilingual encoders, AMBER (Aligned Multilingual Bidirectional EncodeR). AMBER is trained on additional parallel data using two explicit alignment objectives that align the multilingual representations at different granularities. We conduct experiments on zero-shot cross-lingual transfer learning for different tasks including sequence tagging, sentence retrieval and sentence classification. Experimental results show that AMBER obtains gains of up to 1.1 average F1 score on sequence tagging and up to 27.3 average accuracy on retrieval over the XLMR-large model which has 3.2x the parameters of AMBER. Our code and models are available at http://github.com/junjiehu/amber.
summary: Pre-trained cross-lingual encoders such as mBERT (Devlin et al., 2019) and XLMR (Conneau et al., 2020) have proven to be impressively effective at enabling transfer-learning of NLP systems from high-resource languages to low-resource languages. This success comes despite the fact that there is no explicit objective to align the contextual embeddings of words/sentences with similar meanings across languages together in the same space. In this paper, we present a new method for learning multilingual encoders, AMBER (Aligned Multilingual Bidirectional EncodeR). AMBER is trained on additional parallel data using two explicit alignment objectives that align the multilingual representations at different granularities. We conduct experiments on zero-shot cross-lingual transfer learning for different tasks including sequence tagging, sentence retrieval and sentence classification. Experimental results show that AMBER obtains gains of up to 1.1 average F1 score on sequence tagging and up to 27.3 average accuracy on retrieval over the XLMR-large model which has 3.2x the parameters of AMBER. Our code and models are available at http://github.com/junjiehu/amber.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，mBERT（Devlin 等人，2019）和 XLMR（Conneau 等人，2020）等预训练的跨语言编码器在实现 NLP 系统从高资源语言到低资源语言的迁移学习方面非常有效。尽管没有明确的目标将跨语言的具有相似含义的单词/句子的上下文嵌入在同一空间中对齐，但还是取得了成功。在本文中，我们提出了一种学习多语言编码器的新方法，AMBER（对齐多语言双向编码器）。 AMBER 使用两个显式对齐目标对额外的并行数据进行训练，这些对齐目标以不同的粒度对齐多语言表示。我们针对序列标记、句子检索和句子分类等不同任务进行了零样本跨语言迁移学习实验。实验结果表明，与 XLMR-large 模型（其参数是 AMBER 的 3.2 倍）相比，AMBER 在序列标记方面获得了高达 1.1 的平均 F1 分数，在检索方面获得了高达 27.3 的平均准确率。我们的代码和模型可在 http://github.com/junjiehu/amber 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AMBER模型，通过显式对齐目标改进多语言双向编码器的跨语言表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练跨语言编码器（如mBERT/XLMR）虽有效，但缺乏显式对齐不同语言语义表示的目标，限制了其跨语言迁移性能。
AI.method: 在平行语料上引入两个粒度的显式对齐目标：1）句级对比学习 2）词级对齐损失，训练多语言双向编码器AMBER。
AI.result: 在零样本跨语言任务中，AMBER在序列标注任务上较XLMR-large提升1.1 F1，在句子检索任务上提升27.3准确率，参数量仅为XLMR的1/3。
AI.conclusion: 显式对齐目标能有效提升多语言表示的跨语言一致性，参数效率优于现有大模型。

We conduct experiments on zero-shot cross-lingual transfer learning for different tasks including sequence tagging, sentence retrieval and sentence classification. Experimental results show that AMBER obtains gains of up to 1.1 average F1 score on sequence tagging and up to 27.3 average accuracy on retrieval over the XLMR-large model which has 3.2x the parameters of AMBER. Our code and models are available at http://github.com/junjiehu/amber. 事实证明，mBERT（Devlin 等人，2019）和 XLMR（Conneau 等人，2020）等预训练的跨语言编码器在实现 NLP 系统从高资源语言到低资源语言的迁移学习方面非常有效。尽管没有明确的目标将跨语言的具有相似含义的单词/句子的上下文嵌入在同一空间中对齐，但还是取得了成功。在本文中，我们提出了一种学习多语言编码器的新方法，AMBER（对齐多语言双向编码器）。 AMBER 使用两个显式对齐目标对额外的并行数据进行训练，这些对齐目标以不同的粒度对齐多语言表示。我们针对序列标记、句子检索和句子分类等不同任务进行了零样本跨语言迁移学习实验。实验结果表明，与 XLMR-large 模型（其参数是 AMBER 的 3.2 倍）相比，AMBER 在序列标记方面获得了高达 1.1 的平均 F1 分数，在检索方面获得了高达 27.3 的平均准确率。我们的代码和模型可在 http://github.com/junjiehu/amber 获取。 本文提出AMBER模型，通过显式对齐目标改进多语言双向编码器的跨语言表示学习。 Junjie Hu,Melvin Johnson,Orhan Firat,Aditya Siddhant,Graham Neubig cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zuxin Liu,Hongyi Zhou,Baiming Chen,Sicheng Zhong,Martial Hebert,Ding Zhao
title: Constrained Model-based Reinforcement Learning with Robust Cross-Entropy Method
title_zh: 基于约束模型的鲁棒交叉熵强化学习
abstract: This paper studies the constrained/safe reinforcement learning (RL) problem with sparse indicator signals for constraint violations. We propose a model-based approach to enable RL agents to effectively explore the environment with unknown system dynamics and environment constraints given a significantly small number of violation budgets. We employ the neural network ensemble model to estimate the prediction uncertainty and use model predictive control as the basic control framework. We propose the robust cross-entropy method to optimize the control sequence considering the model uncertainty and constraints. We evaluate our methods in the Safety Gym environment. The results show that our approach learns to complete the tasks with a much smaller number of constraint violations than state-of-the-art baselines. Additionally, we are able to achieve several orders of magnitude better sample efficiency when compared with constrained model-free RL approaches. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/liuzuxin/safe-mbrl}.
summary: This paper studies the constrained/safe reinforcement learning (RL) problem with sparse indicator signals for constraint violations. We propose a model-based approach to enable RL agents to effectively explore the environment with unknown system dynamics and environment constraints given a significantly small number of violation budgets. We employ the neural network ensemble model to estimate the prediction uncertainty and use model predictive control as the basic control framework. We propose the robust cross-entropy method to optimize the control sequence considering the model uncertainty and constraints. We evaluate our methods in the Safety Gym environment. The results show that our approach learns to complete the tasks with a much smaller number of constraint violations than state-of-the-art baselines. Additionally, we are able to achieve several orders of magnitude better sample efficiency when compared with constrained model-free RL approaches. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/liuzuxin/safe-mbrl}.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了约束违规的稀疏指示信号的约束/安全强化学习（RL）问题。我们提出了一种基于模型的方法，使 RL 智能体能够在违规预算数量极少的情况下，有效地探索具有未知系统动力学和环境约束的环境。我们采用神经网络集成模型来估计预测不确定性，并使用模型预测控制作为基本控制框架。考虑到模型的不确定性和约束，我们提出了鲁棒交叉熵方法来优化控制序列。我们在 Safety Gym 环境中评估我们的方法。结果表明，与最先进的基线相比，我们的方法学会以更少数量的约束违规来完成任务。此外，与受约束的无模型强化学习方法相比，我们能够实现好几个数量级的样本效率。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/liuzuxin/safe-mbrl} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在约束/安全强化学习问题中，如何利用稀疏指示信号处理约束违规，并提出了一种基于模型的方法以在有限的违规预算下有效探索环境。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理稀疏约束信号和有限违规预算时效率低下，难以平衡探索与安全约束。
AI.method: 采用神经网络集成模型估计预测不确定性，结合模型预测控制框架，并提出鲁棒交叉熵方法优化控制序列以应对模型不确定性和约束。
AI.result: 在Safety Gym环境中，该方法以远少于最先进基线的约束违规次数完成任务，且相比约束模型自由RL方法样本效率提升多个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在安全强化学习任务中实现了高效探索与约束遵守的平衡，具有显著的样本效率优势。

title: Efficient constructions of the Prefer-same and Prefer-opposite de Bruijn sequences
title_zh: Prefer-same 和 Prefer-opposite de Bruijn 序列的高效构建
abstract: The greedy Prefer-same de Bruijn sequence construction was first presented by Eldert et al.[AIEE Transactions 77 (1958)]. As a greedy algorithm, it has one major downside: it requires an exponential amount of space to store the length $2^n$ de Bruijn sequence. Though de Bruijn sequences have been heavily studied over the last 60 years, finding an efficient construction for the Prefer-same de Bruijn sequence has remained a tantalizing open problem. In this paper, we unveil the underlying structure of the Prefer-same de Bruijn sequence and solve the open problem by presenting an efficient algorithm to construct it using $O(n)$ time per bit and only $O(n)$ space. Following a similar approach, we also present an efficient algorithm to construct the Prefer-opposite de Bruijn sequence.
summary: The greedy Prefer-same de Bruijn sequence construction was first presented by Eldert et al.[AIEE Transactions 77 (1958)]. As a greedy algorithm, it has one major downside: it requires an exponential amount of space to store the length $2^n$ de Bruijn sequence. Though de Bruijn sequences have been heavily studied over the last 60 years, finding an efficient construction for the Prefer-same de Bruijn sequence has remained a tantalizing open problem. In this paper, we unveil the underlying structure of the Prefer-same de Bruijn sequence and solve the open problem by presenting an efficient algorithm to construct it using $O(n)$ time per bit and only $O(n)$ space. Following a similar approach, we also present an efficient algorithm to construct the Prefer-opposite de Bruijn sequence.
abstract_zh: 贪婪的 Prefer-same de Bruijn 序列构造首先由 Eldert 等人提出。[AIEE Transactions 77 (1958)]。作为一种贪婪算法，它有一个主要缺点：它需要指数级的空间来存储长度为 $2^n$ de Bruijn 的序列。尽管 de Bruijn 序列在过去 60 年里得到了深入研究，但寻找 Prefer-same de Bruijn 序列的有效构造仍然是一个诱人的开放问题。在本文中，我们揭示了 Prefer-same de Bruijn 序列的底层结构，并通过提出一种有效的算法来解决开放问题，该算法使用每比特 $O(n)$ 时间和仅 $O(n)$ 空间来构造它。按照类似的方法，我们还提出了一种有效的算法来构造 Prefer-opposite de Bruijn 序列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效构造Prefer-same和Prefer-opposite de Bruijn序列的算法。
AI.motivation: 传统的Prefer-same de Bruijn序列构造算法需要指数级空间，而高效构造方法长期未被解决。
AI.method: 通过揭示Prefer-same序列的内在结构，设计了基于线性时间和空间复杂度的构造算法，并扩展至Prefer-opposite序列。
AI.result: 实现了每个bit仅需O(n)时间且总空间复杂度为O(n)的高效构造方法，解决了长期未决的开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: 成功构建了两种de Bruijn序列的高效生成算法，显著优化了存储和计算效率。

title: Video Object Segmentation with Adaptive Feature Bank and Uncertain-Region Refinement
title_zh: 具有自适应特征库和不确定区域细化的视频对象分割
abstract: We propose a new matching-based framework for semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS). Recently, state-of-the-art VOS performance has been achieved by matching-based algorithms, in which feature banks are created to store features for region matching and classification. However, how to effectively organize information in the continuously growing feature bank remains under-explored, and this leads to inefficient design of the bank. We introduce an adaptive feature bank update scheme to dynamically absorb new features and discard obsolete features. We also design a new confidence loss and a fine-grained segmentation module to enhance the segmentation accuracy in uncertain regions. On public benchmarks, our algorithm outperforms existing state-of-the-arts.
summary: We propose a new matching-based framework for semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS). Recently, state-of-the-art VOS performance has been achieved by matching-based algorithms, in which feature banks are created to store features for region matching and classification. However, how to effectively organize information in the continuously growing feature bank remains under-explored, and this leads to inefficient design of the bank. We introduce an adaptive feature bank update scheme to dynamically absorb new features and discard obsolete features. We also design a new confidence loss and a fine-grained segmentation module to enhance the segmentation accuracy in uncertain regions. On public benchmarks, our algorithm outperforms existing state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的基于匹配的半监督视频对象分割（VOS）框架。最近，最先进的 VOS 性能是通过基于匹配的算法实现的，其中创建特征库来存储区域匹配和分类的特征。然而，如何在不断增长的特征库中有效地组织信息仍有待探索，这导致特征库的设计效率低下。我们引入了一种自适应特征库更新方案来动态吸收新特征并丢弃过时的特征。我们还设计了新的置信度损失和细粒度分割模块，以提高不确定区域的分割精度。在公共基准测试中，我们的算法优于现有的最先进算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于匹配的半监督视频对象分割框架，通过自适应特征库和不确定区域优化提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于特征库的视频分割方法在动态管理特征信息和提升不确定区域分割精度方面存在不足。
AI.method: 引入自适应特征库更新机制动态管理特征，结合置信度损失函数与细粒度分割模块优化不确定区域。
AI.result: 在公开基准测试中优于当前最先进的视频对象分割算法。
AI.conclusion: 自适应特征库与不确定区域优化策略有效提升了视频分割性能，为后续研究提供新方向。

search_text: Video Object Segmentation with Adaptive Feature Bank and Uncertain-Region Refinement 具有自适应特征库和不确定区域细化的视频对象分割 We propose a new matching-based framework for semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS). Recently, state-of-the-art VOS performance has been achieved by matching-based algorithms, in which feature banks are created to store features for region matching and classification. However, how to effectively organize information in the continuously growing feature bank remains under-explored, and this leads to inefficient design of the bank. We introduce an adaptive feature bank update scheme to dynamically absorb new features and discard obsolete features. We also design a new confidence loss and a fine-grained segmentation module to enhance the segmentation accuracy in uncertain regions. On public benchmarks, our algorithm outperforms existing state-of-the-arts. 我们提出了一种新的基于匹配的半监督视频对象分割（VOS）框架。最近，最先进的 VOS 性能是通过基于匹配的算法实现的，其中创建特征库来存储区域匹配和分类的特征。然而，如何在不断增长的特征库中有效地组织信息仍有待探索，这导致特征库的设计效率低下。我们引入了一种自适应特征库更新方案来动态吸收新特征并丢弃过时的特征。我们还设计了新的置信度损失和细粒度分割模块，以提高不确定区域的分割精度。在公共基准测试中，我们的算法优于现有的最先进算法。 本文提出一种基于匹配的半监督视频对象分割框架，通过自适应特征库和不确定区域优化提升分割效果。 Yongqing Liang,Xin Li,Navid Jafari,Qin Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Alexander Ku,Peter Anderson,Roma Patel,Eugene Ie,Jason Baldridge
title: Room-Across-Room: Multilingual Vision-and-Language Navigation with Dense Spatiotemporal Grounding
title_zh: 房间跨房间：具有密集时空基础的多语言视觉和语言导航
abstract: We introduce Room-Across-Room (RxR), a new Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) dataset. RxR is multilingual (English, Hindi, and Telugu) and larger (more paths and instructions) than other VLN datasets. It emphasizes the role of language in VLN by addressing known biases in paths and eliciting more references to visible entities. Furthermore, each word in an instruction is time-aligned to the virtual poses of instruction creators and validators. We establish baseline scores for monolingual and multilingual settings and multitask learning when including Room-to-Room annotations. We also provide results for a model that learns from synchronized pose traces by focusing only on portions of the panorama attended to in human demonstrations. The size, scope and detail of RxR dramatically expands the frontier for research on embodied language agents in simulated, photo-realistic environments.
summary: We introduce Room-Across-Room (RxR), a new Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) dataset. RxR is multilingual (English, Hindi, and Telugu) and larger (more paths and instructions) than other VLN datasets. It emphasizes the role of language in VLN by addressing known biases in paths and eliciting more references to visible entities. Furthermore, each word in an instruction is time-aligned to the virtual poses of instruction creators and validators. We establish baseline scores for monolingual and multilingual settings and multitask learning when including Room-to-Room annotations. We also provide results for a model that learns from synchronized pose traces by focusing only on portions of the panorama attended to in human demonstrations. The size, scope and detail of RxR dramatically expands the frontier for research on embodied language agents in simulated, photo-realistic environments.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 Room-Across-Room (RxR)，一个新的视觉和语言导航 (VLN) 数据集。 RxR 是多语言的（英语、印地语和泰卢固语），并且比其他 VLN 数据集更大（更多路径和指令）。它通过解决路径中已知的偏差并引出更多对可见实体的引用来强调语言在 VLN 中的作用。此外，指令中的每个单词都与指令创建者和验证者的虚拟姿势在时间上对齐。当包括房间到房间注释时，我们为单语言和多语言设置以及多任务学习建立基线分数。我们还提供了一个模型的结果，该模型通过仅关注人类演示中关注的全景部分来从同步姿势轨迹中学习。 RxR 的大小、范围和细节极大地扩展了模拟、逼真环境中的具体语言代理的研究前沿。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Room-Across-Room (RxR)的多语言视觉与语言导航数据集，通过更丰富的路径和指令、语言与时空对齐以及多任务学习方法，推动具身语言代理的研究。
AI.motivation: 现有VLN数据集存在路径偏差、语言参考不足及多语言支持有限的问题，需构建更大规模、更注重语言作用的多语言数据集以推进研究。
AI.method: 构建包含英语、印地语和泰卢固语的多语言数据集，实现指令词汇与虚拟姿态的时间对齐；采用多任务学习结合Room-to-Room注释，并设计基于人类演示注意力区域的同步姿态轨迹学习模型。
AI.result: 建立了单语、多语及多任务学习的基线分数，验证了同步姿态轨迹模型的有效性，数据集规模与细节显著提升了具身语言代理的研究水平。
AI.conclusion: RxR数据集通过多语言支持、时空对齐及精细注释，为模拟真实环境中具身语言代理的研究提供了更全面的基础，推动了该领域的发展。

authors_text: Charvi Rastogi,Yunfeng Zhang,Dennis Wei,Kush R. Varshney,Amit Dhurandhar,Richard Tomsett
title: Deciding Fast and Slow: The Role of Cognitive Biases in AI-assisted Decision-making
title_zh: 快速决策和慢速决策：认知偏差在人工智能辅助决策中的作用
abstract: Several strands of research have aimed to bridge the gap between artificial intelligence (AI) and human decision-makers in AI-assisted decision-making, where humans are the consumers of AI model predictions and the ultimate decision-makers in high-stakes applications. However, people's perception and understanding are often distorted by their cognitive biases, such as confirmation bias, anchoring bias, availability bias, to name a few. In this work, we use knowledge from the field of cognitive science to account for cognitive biases in the human-AI collaborative decision-making setting, and mitigate their negative effects on collaborative performance. To this end, we mathematically model cognitive biases and provide a general framework through which researchers and practitioners can understand the interplay between cognitive biases and human-AI accuracy. We then focus specifically on anchoring bias, a bias commonly encountered in human-AI collaboration. We implement a time-based de-anchoring strategy and conduct our first user experiment that validates its effectiveness in human-AI collaborative decision-making. With this result, we design a time allocation strategy for a resource-constrained setting that achieves optimal human-AI collaboration under some assumptions. We, then, conduct a second user experiment which shows that our time allocation strategy with explanation can effectively de-anchor the human and improve collaborative performance when the AI model has low confidence and is incorrect.
summary: Several strands of research have aimed to bridge the gap between artificial intelligence (AI) and human decision-makers in AI-assisted decision-making, where humans are the consumers of AI model predictions and the ultimate decision-makers in high-stakes applications. However, people's perception and understanding are often distorted by their cognitive biases, such as confirmation bias, anchoring bias, availability bias, to name a few. In this work, we use knowledge from the field of cognitive science to account for cognitive biases in the human-AI collaborative decision-making setting, and mitigate their negative effects on collaborative performance. To this end, we mathematically model cognitive biases and provide a general framework through which researchers and practitioners can understand the interplay between cognitive biases and human-AI accuracy. We then focus specifically on anchoring bias, a bias commonly encountered in human-AI collaboration. We implement a time-based de-anchoring strategy and conduct our first user experiment that validates its effectiveness in human-AI collaborative decision-making. With this result, we design a time allocation strategy for a resource-constrained setting that achieves optimal human-AI collaboration under some assumptions. We, then, conduct a second user experiment which shows that our time allocation strategy with explanation can effectively de-anchor the human and improve collaborative performance when the AI model has low confidence and is incorrect.
abstract_zh: 多项研究旨在弥合人工智能 (AI) 与人工智能辅助决策中人类决策者之间的差距，其中人类是人工智能模型预测的消费者，也是高风险应用中的最终决策者。然而，人们的感知和理解往往会被认知偏差所扭曲，例如确认偏差、锚定偏差、可用性偏差等。在这项工作中，我们利用认知科学领域的知识来解释人类与人工智能协作决策环境中的认知偏差，并减轻其对协作绩效的负面影响。为此，我们对认知偏差进行数学建模，并提供一个通用框架，研究人员和从业者可以通过该框架了解认知偏差和人类人工智能准确性之间的相互作用。然后，我们特别关注锚定偏差，这是人类与人工智能协作中常见的偏差。我们实施了基于时间的去锚定策略，并进行了首次用户实验，验证了其在人类与人工智能协作决策中的有效性。根据这一结果，我们为资源受限的环境设计了一种时间分配策略，在某些假设下实现最佳的人机协作。然后，我们进行了第二次用户实验，结果表明，当人工智能模型的置信度较低且不正确时，我们的带有解释的时间分配策略可以有效地解除人类的束缚并提高协作性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在AI辅助决策中认知偏差的影响，并提出策略以减轻其负面影响，提升人机协作决策效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分考虑认知偏差对人机协作决策的影响，导致AI辅助决策效果受限，需探索减轻偏差的方法以提升协作性能。
AI.method: 建立认知偏差数学模型，提出时间基去锚定策略，并通过用户实验验证，设计资源受限下的时间分配策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，去锚定策略有效减少锚定效应，时间分配策略在AI低置信度时显著提升人机协作表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模认知偏差并设计干预策略，可优化人机协作决策，未来需扩展至其他偏差类型及更复杂场景。

title: Convolutional Neural Network for Blur Images Detection as an Alternative for Laplacian Method
title_zh: 用于模糊图像检测的卷积神经网络作为拉普拉斯方法的替代方法
abstract: With the prevalence of digital cameras, the number of digital images increases quickly, which raises the demand for non-manual image quality assessment. While there are many methods considered useful for detecting blurriness, in this paper we propose and evaluate a new method that uses a deep convolutional neural network, which can determine whether an image is blurry or not. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed scheme and are compared to deterministic methods using the confusion matrix.
summary: With the prevalence of digital cameras, the number of digital images increases quickly, which raises the demand for non-manual image quality assessment. While there are many methods considered useful for detecting blurriness, in this paper we propose and evaluate a new method that uses a deep convolutional neural network, which can determine whether an image is blurry or not. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed scheme and are compared to deterministic methods using the confusion matrix.
abstract_zh: 随着数码相机的普及，数字图像的数量迅速增加，这提出了非手动图像质量评估的需求。虽然有许多方法被认为对检测模糊有用，但在本文中，我们提出并评估了一种使用深度卷积神经网络的新方法，该方法可以确定图像是否模糊。实验结果证明了所提出方案的有效性，并与使用混淆矩阵的确定性方法进行了比较。

AI.motivation: 随着数字图像数量激增，亟需自动化图像质量评估方法，而传统方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计并训练深度卷积神经网络模型，通过混淆矩阵与传统方法进行性能对比。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提方法的有效性，在模糊检测任务中表现优于传统确定性方法。
AI.conclusion: 卷积神经网络可作为传统Laplacian方法的高效替代方案用于图像模糊检测。

authors_text: Kyongsik Yun,Changrak Choi,Ryan Alimo,Anthony Davis,Linda Forster,Amir Rahmani,Muhammad Adil,Ramtin Madani
title: Multi-Agent Motion Planning using Deep Learning for Space Applications
title_zh: 使用深度学习进行空间应用的多智能体运动规划
abstract: State-of-the-art motion planners cannot scale to a large number of systems. Motion planning for multiple agents is an NP (non-deterministic polynomial-time) hard problem, so the computation time increases exponentially with each addition of agents. This computational demand is a major stumbling block to the motion planner's application to future NASA missions involving the swarm of space vehicles. We applied a deep neural network to transform computationally demanding mathematical motion planning problems into deep learning-based numerical problems. We showed optimal motion trajectories can be accurately replicated using deep learning-based numerical models in several 2D and 3D systems with multiple agents. The deep learning-based numerical model demonstrates superior computational efficiency with plans generated 1000 times faster than the mathematical model counterpart.
summary: State-of-the-art motion planners cannot scale to a large number of systems. Motion planning for multiple agents is an NP (non-deterministic polynomial-time) hard problem, so the computation time increases exponentially with each addition of agents. This computational demand is a major stumbling block to the motion planner's application to future NASA missions involving the swarm of space vehicles. We applied a deep neural network to transform computationally demanding mathematical motion planning problems into deep learning-based numerical problems. We showed optimal motion trajectories can be accurately replicated using deep learning-based numerical models in several 2D and 3D systems with multiple agents. The deep learning-based numerical model demonstrates superior computational efficiency with plans generated 1000 times faster than the mathematical model counterpart.
abstract_zh: 最先进的运动规划器无法扩展到大量系统。多个智能体的运动规划是一个 NP（非确定性多项式时间）难题，因此计算时间随着每个智能体的添加呈指数增长。这种计算需求是运动规划器应用于未来涉及太空飞行器集群的 NASA 任务的主要障碍。我们应用深度神经网络将计算要求较高的数学运动规划问题转化为基于深度学习的数值问题。我们证明，在具有多个智能体的多个 2D 和 3D 系统中，可以使用基于深度学习的数值模型准确地复制最佳运动轨迹。基于深度学习的数值模型展示了卓越的计算效率，生成计划的速度比数学模型快 1000 倍。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用深度学习解决多智能体在太空应用中的运动规划问题，以提高计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统运动规划方法在处理大量智能体时计算复杂度呈指数增长，难以满足未来NASA航天器群任务的需求。
AI.method: 采用深度神经网络将复杂的数学运动规划问题转化为数值计算模型，通过训练实现轨迹生成。
AI.result: 在多个2D/3D多智能体系统中，深度学习模型能准确复现最优轨迹，计算速度较传统方法提升1000倍。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习为多智能体太空运动规划提供了高效解决方案，具有显著计算优势和应用前景。

title: LTN: Long-Term Network for Long-Term Motion Prediction
title_zh: LTN：用于长期运动预测的长期网络
abstract: Making accurate motion prediction of surrounding agents such as pedestrians and vehicles is a critical task when robots are trying to perform autonomous navigation tasks. Recent research on multi-modal trajectory prediction, including regression and classification approaches, perform very well at short-term prediction. However, when it comes to long-term prediction, most Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) based models tend to diverge far away from the ground truth. Therefore, in this work, we present a two-stage framework for long-term trajectory prediction, which is named as Long-Term Network (LTN). Our Long-Term Network integrates both the regression and classification approaches. We first generate a set of proposed trajectories with our proposed distribution using a Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE), and then classify them with binary labels, and output the trajectories with the highest score. We demonstrate our Long-Term Network's performance with experiments on two real-world pedestrian datasets: ETH/UCY, Stanford Drone Dataset (SDD), and one challenging real-world driving forecasting dataset: nuScenes. The results show that our method outperforms multiple state-of-the-art approaches in long-term trajectory prediction in terms of accuracy.
summary: Making accurate motion prediction of surrounding agents such as pedestrians and vehicles is a critical task when robots are trying to perform autonomous navigation tasks. Recent research on multi-modal trajectory prediction, including regression and classification approaches, perform very well at short-term prediction. However, when it comes to long-term prediction, most Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) based models tend to diverge far away from the ground truth. Therefore, in this work, we present a two-stage framework for long-term trajectory prediction, which is named as Long-Term Network (LTN). Our Long-Term Network integrates both the regression and classification approaches. We first generate a set of proposed trajectories with our proposed distribution using a Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE), and then classify them with binary labels, and output the trajectories with the highest score. We demonstrate our Long-Term Network's performance with experiments on two real-world pedestrian datasets: ETH/UCY, Stanford Drone Dataset (SDD), and one challenging real-world driving forecasting dataset: nuScenes. The results show that our method outperforms multiple state-of-the-art approaches in long-term trajectory prediction in terms of accuracy.
abstract_zh: 当机器人尝试执行自主导航任务时，对行人和车辆等周围主体进行准确的运动预测是一项关键任务。最近关于多模态轨迹预测的研究，包括回归和分类方法，在短期预测方面表现非常好。然而，当涉及长期预测时，大多数基于长短期记忆（LSTM）的模型往往与真实情况相差甚远。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于长期轨迹预测的两阶段框架，称为长期网络（LTN）。我们的长期网络集成了回归和分类方法。我们首先使用条件变分自动编码器（CVAE）根据我们提出的分布生成一组提出的轨迹，然后用二进制标签对它们进行分类，并输出得分最高的轨迹。我们通过对两个现实世界行人数据集：ETH/UCY、斯坦福无人机数据集 (SDD) 和一个具有挑战性的现实世界驾驶预测数据集：nuScenes 的实验来展示我们的长期网络的性能。结果表明，我们的方法在长期轨迹预测方面的准确性优于多种最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LTN的两阶段框架，用于提高长期运动预测的准确性，特别是在自动驾驶场景中对行人和车辆轨迹的预测。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LSTM的模型在长期轨迹预测中容易偏离真实值，而短期预测方法难以满足长期需求，因此需要一种更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合回归与分类方法，首先使用条件变分自编码器（CVAE）生成候选轨迹，再通过二分类标签筛选出最优轨迹。
AI.result: 在ETH/UCY、SDD和nuScenes数据集上的实验表明，LTN在长期轨迹预测的准确性上优于多种先进方法。
AI.conclusion: LTN框架通过整合生成与分类机制，有效解决了长期运动预测中的偏差问题，为自动驾驶提供了更可靠的预测工具。

authors_text: Hao Li,Chenxin Tao,Xizhou Zhu,Xiaogang Wang,Gao Huang,Jifeng Dai
title: Auto Seg-Loss: Searching Metric Surrogates for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 自动分段丢失：搜索语义分段的度量替代
abstract: Designing proper loss functions is essential in training deep networks. Especially in the field of semantic segmentation, various evaluation metrics have been proposed for diverse scenarios. Despite the success of the widely adopted cross-entropy loss and its variants, the mis-alignment between the loss functions and evaluation metrics degrades the network performance. Meanwhile, manually designing loss functions for each specific metric requires expertise and significant manpower. In this paper, we propose to automate the design of metric-specific loss functions by searching differentiable surrogate losses for each metric. We substitute the non-differentiable operations in the metrics with parameterized functions, and conduct parameter search to optimize the shape of loss surfaces. Two constraints are introduced to regularize the search space and make the search efficient. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and Cityscapes demonstrate that the searched surrogate losses outperform the manually designed loss functions consistently. The searched losses can generalize well to other datasets and networks. Code shall be released.
summary: Designing proper loss functions is essential in training deep networks. Especially in the field of semantic segmentation, various evaluation metrics have been proposed for diverse scenarios. Despite the success of the widely adopted cross-entropy loss and its variants, the mis-alignment between the loss functions and evaluation metrics degrades the network performance. Meanwhile, manually designing loss functions for each specific metric requires expertise and significant manpower. In this paper, we propose to automate the design of metric-specific loss functions by searching differentiable surrogate losses for each metric. We substitute the non-differentiable operations in the metrics with parameterized functions, and conduct parameter search to optimize the shape of loss surfaces. Two constraints are introduced to regularize the search space and make the search efficient. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and Cityscapes demonstrate that the searched surrogate losses outperform the manually designed loss functions consistently. The searched losses can generalize well to other datasets and networks. Code shall be released.
abstract_zh: 设计适当的损失函数对于训练深度网络至关重要。特别是在语义分割领域，针对不同的场景提出了各种评估指标。尽管广泛采用的交叉熵损失及其变体取得了成功，但损失函数和评估指标之间的不一致会降低网络性能。同时，为每个特定指标手动设计损失函数需要专业知识和大量人力。在本文中，我们建议通过搜索每个指标的可微替代损失来自动设计特定于指标的损失函数。我们用参数化函数代替度量中的不可微运算，并进行参数搜索来优化损失曲面的形状。引入两个约束来规范搜索空间并使搜索高效。对 PASCAL VOC 和 Cityscapes 的大量实验表明，搜索的替代损失始终优于手动设计的损失函数。搜索到的损失可以很好地推广到其他数据集和网络。代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动化设计语义分割任务中与评价指标对齐的损失函数的方法，通过搜索可微分的替代损失函数来优化模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统损失函数（如交叉熵）与评价指标存在不匹配问题，导致网络性能下降，而手动设计特定指标的损失函数需要大量专家经验和人力成本。
AI.method: 将指标中的非可微操作替换为参数化函数，通过参数搜索优化损失曲面形状，并引入两个约束条件以提高搜索效率。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和Cityscapes数据集上，搜索到的替代损失函数持续优于手动设计的损失函数，且具有良好的跨数据集和跨网络泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 自动化搜索的损失函数能有效提升语义分割性能，证明了该方法在损失函数设计中的可行性和优越性。

authors_text: Nils Funk,Juan Tarrio,Sotiris Papatheodorou,Marija Popovic,Pablo F. Alcantarilla,Stefan Leutenegger
title: Multi-Resolution 3D Mapping with Explicit Free Space Representation for Fast and Accurate Mobile Robot Motion Planning
title_zh: 具有显式自由空间表示的多分辨率 3D 映射，可实现快速准确的移动机器人运动规划
abstract: With the aim of bridging the gap between high quality reconstruction and mobile robot motion planning, we propose an efficient system that leverages the concept of adaptive-resolution volumetric mapping, which naturally integrates with the hierarchical decomposition of space in an octree data structure. Instead of a Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF), we adopt mapping of occupancy probabilities in log-odds representation, which allows to represent both surfaces, as well as the entire free, i.e. observed space, as opposed to unobserved space. We introduce a method for choosing resolution -- on the fly -- in real-time by means of a multi-scale max-min pooling of the input depth image. The notion of explicit free space mapping paired with the spatial hierarchy in the data structure, as well as map resolution, allows for collision queries, as needed for robot motion planning, at unprecedented speed. We quantitatively evaluate mapping accuracy, memory, runtime performance, and planning performance showing improvements over the state of the art, particularly in cases requiring high resolution maps.
summary: With the aim of bridging the gap between high quality reconstruction and mobile robot motion planning, we propose an efficient system that leverages the concept of adaptive-resolution volumetric mapping, which naturally integrates with the hierarchical decomposition of space in an octree data structure. Instead of a Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF), we adopt mapping of occupancy probabilities in log-odds representation, which allows to represent both surfaces, as well as the entire free, i.e. observed space, as opposed to unobserved space. We introduce a method for choosing resolution -- on the fly -- in real-time by means of a multi-scale max-min pooling of the input depth image. The notion of explicit free space mapping paired with the spatial hierarchy in the data structure, as well as map resolution, allows for collision queries, as needed for robot motion planning, at unprecedented speed. We quantitatively evaluate mapping accuracy, memory, runtime performance, and planning performance showing improvements over the state of the art, particularly in cases requiring high resolution maps.
abstract_zh: 为了弥合高质量重建和移动机器人运动规划之间的差距，我们提出了一种有效的系统，该系统利用自适应分辨率体积映射的概念，该系统自然地与八叉树数据结构中的空间分层分解集成。我们采用对数赔率表示形式的占用概率映射来代替截断符号距离函数（TSDF），这允许表示两个表面以及整个自由（即观察到的空间），而不是未观察到的空间。我们引入了一种通过输入深度图像的多尺度最大最小池化实时选择分辨率的方法。显式自由空间映射的概念与数据结构中的空间层次结构以及地图分辨率相结合，允许以前所未有的速度根据机器人运动规划的需要进行碰撞查询。我们定量评估地图准确性、内存、运行时性能和规划性能，显示出相对于现有技术的改进，特别是在需要高分辨率地图的情况下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多分辨率3D映射系统，通过显式自由空间表示实现快速准确的移动机器人运动规划。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在高质量重建与机器人运动规划间存在效率与精度的矛盾，需开发兼顾高分辨率与实时性的映射方案。
AI.method: 采用自适应分辨率体素映射与八叉树结构，以对数奇偶性表示占据概率并结合多尺度最大-最小池化实时调整深度图像分辨率。
AI.result: 在映射精度、内存占用、运行时延及规划性能上优于现有方法，尤其在高分辨率场景下表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多分辨率映射与显式自由空间表示，为机器人运动规划提供了更高效且精确的解决方案。

Alcantarilla,Stefan Leutenegger cs.RO

authors_text: Jovana Mitrovic,Brian McWilliams,Jacob Walker,Lars Buesing,Charles Blundell
title: Representation Learning via Invariant Causal Mechanisms
title_zh: 通过不变因果机制进行表征学习
abstract: Self-supervised learning has emerged as a strategy to reduce the reliance on costly supervised signal by pretraining representations only using unlabeled data. These methods combine heuristic proxy classification tasks with data augmentations and have achieved significant success, but our theoretical understanding of this success remains limited. In this paper we analyze self-supervised representation learning using a causal framework. We show how data augmentations can be more effectively utilized through explicit invariance constraints on the proxy classifiers employed during pretraining. Based on this, we propose a novel self-supervised objective, Representation Learning via Invariant Causal Mechanisms (ReLIC), that enforces invariant prediction of proxy targets across augmentations through an invariance regularizer which yields improved generalization guarantees. Further, using causality we generalize contrastive learning, a particular kind of self-supervised method, and provide an alternative theoretical explanation for the success of these methods. Empirically, ReLIC significantly outperforms competing methods in terms of robustness and out-of-distribution generalization on ImageNet, while also significantly outperforming these methods on Atari achieving above human-level performance on $51$ out of $57$ games.
summary: Self-supervised learning has emerged as a strategy to reduce the reliance on costly supervised signal by pretraining representations only using unlabeled data. These methods combine heuristic proxy classification tasks with data augmentations and have achieved significant success, but our theoretical understanding of this success remains limited. In this paper we analyze self-supervised representation learning using a causal framework. We show how data augmentations can be more effectively utilized through explicit invariance constraints on the proxy classifiers employed during pretraining. Based on this, we propose a novel self-supervised objective, Representation Learning via Invariant Causal Mechanisms (ReLIC), that enforces invariant prediction of proxy targets across augmentations through an invariance regularizer which yields improved generalization guarantees. Further, using causality we generalize contrastive learning, a particular kind of self-supervised method, and provide an alternative theoretical explanation for the success of these methods. Empirically, ReLIC significantly outperforms competing methods in terms of robustness and out-of-distribution generalization on ImageNet, while also significantly outperforming these methods on Atari achieving above human-level performance on $51$ out of $57$ games.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习已经成为一种策略，通过仅使用未标记的数据预训练表示来减少对昂贵的监督信号的依赖。这些方法将启发式代理分类任务与数据增强相结合，并取得了重大成功，但我们对这一成功的理论理解仍然有限。在本文中，我们使用因果框架分析自监督表示学习。我们展示了如何通过对预训练期间使用的代理分类器的显式不变性约束来更有效地利用数据增强。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督目标，即通过不变因果机制进行表示学习（ReLIC），它通过不变性正则化器在增强过程中强制代理目标的不变预测，从而产生改进的泛化保证。此外，利用因果关系，我们概括了对比学习（一种特殊的自我监督方法），并为这些方法的成功提供了另一种理论解释。根据经验，ReLIC 在 ImageNet 上的鲁棒性和分布外泛化方面显着优于竞争方法，同时在 Atari 上也显着优于这些方法，在 57 美元游戏中的 51 美元上实现了高于人类水平的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不变因果机制的自监督表示学习方法ReLIC，通过因果框架提升模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法依赖启发式任务和数据增强，缺乏理论支撑，导致泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 设计ReLIC目标函数，在预训练中通过不变性正则化约束代理分类器，强制预测目标在不同增强数据间保持一致。
AI.result: ReLIC在ImageNet上显著提升鲁棒性和分布外泛化能力，在Atari游戏中51/57款超越人类水平。
AI.conclusion: 因果框架为自监督学习提供了理论解释，不变性约束有效增强了表示学习的泛化性能。

ai_content_json.method: 设计ReLIC目标函数，在预训练中通过不变性正则化约束代理分类器，强制预测目标在不同增强数据间保持一致。
ai_content_json.result: ReLIC在ImageNet上显著提升鲁棒性和分布外泛化能力，在Atari游戏中51/57款超越人类水平。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 因果框架为自监督学习提供了理论解释，不变性约束有效增强了表示学习的泛化性能。

search_text: Representation Learning via Invariant Causal Mechanisms 通过不变因果机制进行表征学习 Self-supervised learning has emerged as a strategy to reduce the reliance on costly supervised signal by pretraining representations only using unlabeled data. These methods combine heuristic proxy classification tasks with data augmentations and have achieved significant success, but our theoretical understanding of this success remains limited. In this paper we analyze self-supervised representation learning using a causal framework. We show how data augmentations can be more effectively utilized through explicit invariance constraints on the proxy classifiers employed during pretraining. Based on this, we propose a novel self-supervised objective, Representation Learning via Invariant Causal Mechanisms (ReLIC), that enforces invariant prediction of proxy targets across augmentations through an invariance regularizer which yields improved generalization guarantees. Further, using causality we generalize contrastive learning, a particular kind of self-supervised method, and provide an alternative theoretical explanation for the success of these methods. Empirically, ReLIC significantly outperforms competing methods in terms of robustness and out-of-distribution generalization on ImageNet, while also significantly outperforming these methods on Atari achieving above human-level performance on $51$ out of $57$ games. 自监督学习已经成为一种策略，通过仅使用未标记的数据预训练表示来减少对昂贵的监督信号的依赖。这些方法将启发式代理分类任务与数据增强相结合，并取得了重大成功，但我们对这一成功的理论理解仍然有限。在本文中，我们使用因果框架分析自监督表示学习。我们展示了如何通过对预训练期间使用的代理分类器的显式不变性约束来更有效地利用数据增强。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督目标，即通过不变因果机制进行表示学习（ReLIC），它通过不变性正则化器在增强过程中强制代理目标的不变预测，从而产生改进的泛化保证。此外，利用因果关系，我们概括了对比学习（一种特殊的自我监督方法），并为这些方法的成功提供了另一种理论解释。根据经验，ReLIC 在 ImageNet 上的鲁棒性和分布外泛化方面显着优于竞争方法，同时在 Atari 上也显着优于这些方法，在 57 美元游戏中的 51 美元上实现了高于人类水平的性能。 本文提出了一种基于不变因果机制的自监督表示学习方法ReLIC，通过因果框架提升模型的泛化能力。 Jovana Mitrovic,Brian McWilliams,Jacob Walker,Lars Buesing,Charles Blundell cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.ML

title: Scheduling Opportunistic Links in Two-Tiered Reconfigurable Datacenters
title_zh: 两层可重构数据中心中的机会链路调度
abstract: Reconfigurable optical topologies are emerging as a promising technology to improve the efficiency of datacenter networks. This paper considers the problem of scheduling opportunistic links in such reconfigurable datacenters. We study the online setting and aim to minimize flow completion times. The problem is a two-tier generalization of classic switch scheduling problems. We present a stable-matching algorithm which is $2\cdot (2/\varepsilon+1)$-competitive against an optimal offline algorithm, in a resource augmentation model: the online algorithm runs $2+\varepsilon$ times faster. Our algorithm and result are fairly general and allow for different link delays and also apply to hybrid topologies which combine fixed and reconfigurable links. Our analysis is based on LP relaxation and dual fitting.
summary: Reconfigurable optical topologies are emerging as a promising technology to improve the efficiency of datacenter networks. This paper considers the problem of scheduling opportunistic links in such reconfigurable datacenters. We study the online setting and aim to minimize flow completion times. The problem is a two-tier generalization of classic switch scheduling problems. We present a stable-matching algorithm which is $2\cdot (2/\varepsilon+1)$-competitive against an optimal offline algorithm, in a resource augmentation model: the online algorithm runs $2+\varepsilon$ times faster. Our algorithm and result are fairly general and allow for different link delays and also apply to hybrid topologies which combine fixed and reconfigurable links. Our analysis is based on LP relaxation and dual fitting.
abstract_zh: 可重构光学拓扑正在成为一种有前景的技术，可提高数据中心网络的效率。本文考虑了此类可重构数据中心中的机会链路调度问题。我们研究在线设置，旨在最大限度地减少流程完成时间。该问题是经典交换机调度问题的两层概括。我们提出了一种稳定匹配算法，在资源增强模型中，该算法与最佳离线算法具有 $2\cdot (2/\varepsilon+1)$ 竞争优势：在线算法的运行速度快 $2+\varepsilon$ 倍。我们的算法和结果相当通用，允许不同的链路延迟，也适用于结合固定和可重新配置链路的混合拓扑。我们的分析基于 LP 松弛和对偶拟合。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在可重构数据中心中调度机会链路的问题，旨在通过在线算法最小化流量完成时间。
AI.motivation: 可重构光拓扑技术有望提升数据中心网络效率，但现有调度方法难以应对动态链路配置和混合拓扑结构带来的挑战，需设计高效算法以优化资源分配。
AI.method: 提出基于稳定匹配的在线算法，结合线性规划松弛与对偶拟合技术，支持不同链路延迟及固定与可重构链路混合的拓扑结构。
AI.result: 所提算法在资源增强模型下达到$2\\cdot (2/\arepsilon+1)$竞争比，且在线算法运行速度为最优离线算法的$2+\arepsilon$倍，适用于多样化场景。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为可重构数据中心提供了通用且高效的调度方案，兼顾理论分析与实际应用需求，推动了动态网络资源优化的研究进展。

title: Multi-Agent Trust Region Policy Optimization
title_zh: 多代理信任域策略优化
abstract: We extend trust region policy optimization (TRPO) to multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) problems. We show that the policy update of TRPO can be transformed into a distributed consensus optimization problem for multi-agent cases. By making a series of approximations to the consensus optimization model, we propose a decentralized MARL algorithm, which we call multi-agent TRPO (MATRPO). This algorithm can optimize distributed policies based on local observations and private rewards. The agents do not need to know observations, rewards, policies or value/action-value functions of other agents. The agents only share a likelihood ratio with their neighbors during the training process. The algorithm is fully decentralized and privacy-preserving. Our experiments on two cooperative games demonstrate its robust performance on complicated MARL tasks.
summary: We extend trust region policy optimization (TRPO) to multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) problems. We show that the policy update of TRPO can be transformed into a distributed consensus optimization problem for multi-agent cases. By making a series of approximations to the consensus optimization model, we propose a decentralized MARL algorithm, which we call multi-agent TRPO (MATRPO). This algorithm can optimize distributed policies based on local observations and private rewards. The agents do not need to know observations, rewards, policies or value/action-value functions of other agents. The agents only share a likelihood ratio with their neighbors during the training process. The algorithm is fully decentralized and privacy-preserving. Our experiments on two cooperative games demonstrate its robust performance on complicated MARL tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们将信任域策略优化（TRPO）扩展到多智能体强化学习（MARL）问题。我们证明 TRPO 的策略更新可以转化为多智能体情况下的分布式共识优化问题。通过对共识优化模型进行一系列近似，我们提出了一种去中心化的 MARL 算法，我们称之为多代理 TRPO (MATRPO)。该算法可以根据局部观察和私人奖励来优化分布式策略。智能体不需要了解其他智能体的观察、奖励、策略或价值/行动价值函数。代理仅在训练过程中与邻居共享似然比。该算法是完全去中心化且保护隐私的。我们对两个合作游戏的实验证明了它在复杂的 MARL 任务上的强大性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于多智能体强化学习的去中心化算法MATRPO，通过将TRPO策略更新转化为分布式共识优化问题，实现基于局部观测和私有奖励的隐私保护式多智能体协作。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL方法常依赖集中式训练或共享敏感信息，难以满足隐私保护和分布式部署需求，需开发无需全局信息且保护隐私的多智能体优化框架。
AI.method: 将TRPO的策略更新转化为多智能体共识优化问题，通过近似处理构建去中心化算法MATRPO，仅需智能体间共享似然比信息，无需交换观测、奖励或策略等敏感数据。
AI.result: 在两个合作型博弈环境中验证了MATRPO算法在复杂MARL任务中的鲁棒性，证实其有效性和隐私保护特性。
AI.conclusion: MATRPO通过分布式共识优化实现了隐私保护的多智能体协作，为复杂MARL场景提供了高效且安全的解决方案。

authors_text: Tina Diao,Samriddhi Singla,Ayan Mukhopadhyay,Ahmed Eldawy,Ross Shachter,Mykel Kochenderfer
title: Uncertainty Aware Wildfire Management
title_zh: 不确定性意识野火管理
comment: Accepted at AI for Social Good Workshop, AAAI Fall Symposium Series 2020
comments: Accepted at AI for Social Good Workshop, AAAI Fall Symposium Series 2020
abstract: Recent wildfires in the United States have resulted in loss of life and billions of dollars, destroying countless structures and forests. Fighting wildfires is extremely complex. It is difficult to observe the true state of fires due to smoke and risk associated with ground surveillance. There are limited resources to be deployed over a massive area and the spread of the fire is challenging to predict. This paper proposes a decision-theoretic approach to combat wildfires. We model the resource allocation problem as a partially-observable Markov decision process. We also present a data-driven model that lets us simulate how fires spread as a function of relevant covariates. A major problem in using data-driven models to combat wildfires is the lack of comprehensive data sources that relate fires with relevant covariates. We present an algorithmic approach based on large-scale raster and vector analysis that can be used to create such a dataset. Our data with over 2 million data points is the first open-source dataset that combines existing fire databases with covariates extracted from satellite imagery. Through experiments using real-world wildfire data, we demonstrate that our forecasting model can accurately model the spread of wildfires. Finally, we use simulations to demonstrate that our response strategy can significantly reduce response times compared to baseline methods.

It is difficult to observe the true state of fires due to smoke and risk associated with ground surveillance. A major problem in using data-driven models to combat wildfires is the lack of comprehensive data sources that relate fires with relevant covariates. We present an algorithmic approach based on large-scale raster and vector analysis that can be used to create such a dataset. Our data with over 2 million data points is the first open-source dataset that combines existing fire databases with covariates extracted from satellite imagery. Through experiments using real-world wildfire data, we demonstrate that our forecasting model can accurately model the spread of wildfires. Finally, we use simulations to demonstrate that our response strategy can significantly reduce response times compared to baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 美国最近发生的野火造成了人员伤亡和数十亿美元的损失，摧毁了无数的建筑物和森林。扑灭野火极其复杂。由于烟雾和地面监视的风险，很难观察火灾的真实状态。在大面积区域部署的资源有限，而且火势蔓延也难以预测。本文提出了一种扑灭野火的决策理论方法。我们将资源分配问题建模为部分可观察的马尔可夫决策过程。我们还提出了一个数据驱动模型，可以让我们模拟火灾如何作为相关协变量的函数蔓延。使用数据驱动模型扑灭野火的一个主要问题是缺乏将火灾与相关协变量联系起来的全面数据源。我们提出了一种基于大规模栅格和矢量分析的算法方法，可用于创建此类数据集。我们的数据包含超过 200 万个数据点，是第一个将现有火灾数据库与从卫星图像中提取的协变量相结合的开源数据集。通过使用真实世界野火数据的实验，我们证明我们的预测模型可以准确地模拟野火的蔓延。最后，我们使用模拟来证明我们的响应策略与基线方法相比可以显着缩短响应时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于决策理论的野火管理方法，结合部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）和数据驱动模型，解决资源分配与火势预测难题，并构建首个开源的野火数据集。
AI.motivation: 野火造成严重生命和财产损失，现有方法面临观测困难、资源有限、预测不准等问题，缺乏结合多源数据的预测模型和响应策略。
AI.method: 将资源分配建模为POMDP，开发数据驱动的火势蔓延模拟模型，利用大规模栅格和矢量分析生成包含200万+数据点的开源数据集，结合卫星影像与火情数据库。
AI.result: 预测模型准确模拟火势蔓延，响应策略相比基线方法显著缩短响应时间，数据集为后续研究提供支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升野火管理效率，开源数据集可推动相关研究，未来需进一步优化模型鲁棒性与实时性。

search_text: Uncertainty Aware Wildfire Management 不确定性意识野火管理 Recent wildfires in the United States have resulted in loss of life and billions of dollars, destroying countless structures and forests. Fighting wildfires is extremely complex. It is difficult to observe the true state of fires due to smoke and risk associated with ground surveillance. There are limited resources to be deployed over a massive area and the spread of the fire is challenging to predict. This paper proposes a decision-theoretic approach to combat wildfires. We model the resource allocation problem as a partially-observable Markov decision process. We also present a data-driven model that lets us simulate how fires spread as a function of relevant covariates. A major problem in using data-driven models to combat wildfires is the lack of comprehensive data sources that relate fires with relevant covariates. We present an algorithmic approach based on large-scale raster and vector analysis that can be used to create such a dataset. Our data with over 2 million data points is the first open-source dataset that combines existing fire databases with covariates extracted from satellite imagery. Through experiments using real-world wildfire data, we demonstrate that our forecasting model can accurately model the spread of wildfires. Finally, we use simulations to demonstrate that our response strategy can significantly reduce response times compared to baseline methods. 美国最近发生的野火造成了人员伤亡和数十亿美元的损失，摧毁了无数的建筑物和森林。扑灭野火极其复杂。由于烟雾和地面监视的风险，很难观察火灾的真实状态。在大面积区域部署的资源有限，而且火势蔓延也难以预测。本文提出了一种扑灭野火的决策理论方法。我们将资源分配问题建模为部分可观察的马尔可夫决策过程。我们还提出了一个数据驱动模型，可以让我们模拟火灾如何作为相关协变量的函数蔓延。使用数据驱动模型扑灭野火的一个主要问题是缺乏将火灾与相关协变量联系起来的全面数据源。我们提出了一种基于大规模栅格和矢量分析的算法方法，可用于创建此类数据集。我们的数据包含超过 200 万个数据点，是第一个将现有火灾数据库与从卫星图像中提取的协变量相结合的开源数据集。通过使用真实世界野火数据的实验，我们证明我们的预测模型可以准确地模拟野火的蔓延。最后，我们使用模拟来证明我们的响应策略与基线方法相比可以显着缩短响应时间。 本文提出一种基于决策理论的野火管理方法，结合部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）和数据驱动模型，解决资源分配与火势预测难题，并构建首个开源的野火数据集。 Tina Diao,Samriddhi Singla,Ayan Mukhopadhyay,Ahmed Eldawy,Ross Shachter,Mykel Kochenderfer cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Bhusan Chettri,Emmanouil Benetos,Bob L. T. Sturm
title: Dataset artefacts in anti-spoofing systems: a case study on the ASVspoof 2017 benchmark
title_zh: 反欺骗系统中的数据集伪影：ASVspoof 2017 基准的案例研究
comment: Accepted to IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing, 2020
comments: Accepted to IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing, 2020
abstract: The Automatic Speaker Verification Spoofing and Countermeasures Challenges motivate research in protecting speech biometric systems against a variety of different access attacks. The 2017 edition focused on replay spoofing attacks, and involved participants building and training systems on a provided dataset (ASVspoof 2017). More than 60 research papers have so far been published with this dataset, but none have sought to answer why countermeasures appear successful in detecting spoofing attacks. This article shows how artefacts inherent to the dataset may be contributing to the apparent success of published systems. We first inspect the ASVspoof 2017 dataset and summarize various artefacts present in the dataset. Second, we demonstrate how countermeasure models can exploit these artefacts to appear successful in this dataset. Third, for reliable and robust performance estimates on this dataset we propose discarding nonspeech segments and silence before and after the speech utterance during training and inference. We create speech start and endpoint annotations in the dataset and demonstrate how using them helps countermeasure models become less vulnerable from being manipulated using artefacts found in the dataset. Finally, we provide several new benchmark results for both frame-level and utterance-level models that can serve as new baselines on this dataset.
summary: The Automatic Speaker Verification Spoofing and Countermeasures Challenges motivate research in protecting speech biometric systems against a variety of different access attacks. The 2017 edition focused on replay spoofing attacks, and involved participants building and training systems on a provided dataset (ASVspoof 2017). More than 60 research papers have so far been published with this dataset, but none have sought to answer why countermeasures appear successful in detecting spoofing attacks. This article shows how artefacts inherent to the dataset may be contributing to the apparent success of published systems. We first inspect the ASVspoof 2017 dataset and summarize various artefacts present in the dataset. Second, we demonstrate how countermeasure models can exploit these artefacts to appear successful in this dataset. Third, for reliable and robust performance estimates on this dataset we propose discarding nonspeech segments and silence before and after the speech utterance during training and inference. We create speech start and endpoint annotations in the dataset and demonstrate how using them helps countermeasure models become less vulnerable from being manipulated using artefacts found in the dataset. Finally, we provide several new benchmark results for both frame-level and utterance-level models that can serve as new baselines on this dataset.
abstract_zh: 自动说话人验证欺骗和对策挑战激发了保护语音生物识别系统免受各种不同访问攻击的研究。 2017 年版本重点关注重放欺骗攻击，并涉及参与者在提供的数据集上构建和训练系统（ASVspoof 2017）。迄今为止，已有 60 多篇关于该数据集的研究论文发表，但没有一篇论文试图回答为什么对策在检测欺骗攻击方面似乎成功。本文展示了数据集固有的人工制品如何有助于发布系统的明显成功。我们首先检查 ASVspoof 2017 数据集并总结数据集中存在的各种人工制品。其次，我们演示了对策模型如何利用这些人工制品在该数据集中显得成功。第三，为了对该数据集进行可靠和鲁棒的性能估计，我们建议在训练和推理过程中丢弃语音前后的非语音片段和沉默。我们在数据集中创建语音起点和终点注释，并演示如何使用它们来帮助对抗模型免受数据集中发现的伪影的影响。最后，我们为帧级和话语级模型提供了几个新的基准结果，可以作为该数据集的新基线。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了ASVspoof 2017数据集中的固有缺陷，并探讨这些缺陷如何影响反欺骗系统的性能评估。
AI.motivation: 已有大量研究基于ASVspoof 2017数据集，但未解释反欺骗系统为何能成功检测攻击，可能因数据集本身存在易被利用的缺陷。
AI.method: 通过分析数据集中的非语音片段和静音问题，提出在训练和推理时移除这些片段，并创建语音起始/结束标注以减少模型对数据集缺陷的依赖。
AI.result: 提出新的基准结果，证明使用语音标注后模型对数据集缺陷的鲁棒性提升，并为帧级和话语级模型提供新基线。
AI.conclusion: 数据集缺陷可能导致模型性能高估，改进的数据处理方法可为更可靠的反欺骗系统评估提供基础。

title: Deep Convolutional Neural Network-based Inverse Filtering Approach for Speech De-reverberation
title_zh: 基于深度卷积神经网络的语音去混响逆滤波方法
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a spectral-domain inverse filtering approach for single-channel speech de-reverberation using deep convolutional neural network (CNN). The main goal is to better handle realistic reverberant conditions where the room impulse response (RIR) filter is longer than the short-time Fourier transform (STFT) analysis window. To this end, we consider the convolutive transfer function (CTF) model for the reverberant speech signal. In the proposed framework, the CNN architecture is trained to directly estimate the inverse filter of the CTF model. Among various choices for the CNN structure, we consider the U-net which consists of a fully-convolutional auto-encoder network with skip-connections. Experimental results show that the proposed method provides better de-reverberation performance than the prevalent benchmark algorithms under various reverberation conditions.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a spectral-domain inverse filtering approach for single-channel speech de-reverberation using deep convolutional neural network (CNN). The main goal is to better handle realistic reverberant conditions where the room impulse response (RIR) filter is longer than the short-time Fourier transform (STFT) analysis window. To this end, we consider the convolutive transfer function (CTF) model for the reverberant speech signal. In the proposed framework, the CNN architecture is trained to directly estimate the inverse filter of the CTF model. Among various choices for the CNN structure, we consider the U-net which consists of a fully-convolutional auto-encoder network with skip-connections. Experimental results show that the proposed method provides better de-reverberation performance than the prevalent benchmark algorithms under various reverberation conditions.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种使用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）进行单通道语音去混响的谱域逆滤波方法。主要目标是更好地处理现实的混响条件，其中房间脉冲响应 (RIR) 滤波器比短时傅立叶变换 (STFT) 分析窗口长。为此，我们考虑混响语音信号的卷积传递函数（CTF）模型。在所提出的框架中，CNN 架构经过训练可以直接估计 CTF 模型的逆滤波器。在 CNN 结构的各种选择中，我们考虑由具有跳跃连接的全卷积自动编码器网络组成的 U-net。实验结果表明，在各种混响条件下，所提出的方法比流行的基准算法提供了更好的去混响性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度卷积神经网络的逆滤波方法，用于解决单通道语音去混响问题，特别针对房间脉冲响应（RIR）长度超过短时傅里叶变换窗口的现实场景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理RIR长度超过STFT分析窗口的复杂混响环境时性能不足，需开发更鲁棒的去混响技术以应对真实场景需求。
AI.method: 采用卷积传输函数（CTF）模型，设计基于U-Net结构的全卷积神经网络，直接估计CTF模型的逆滤波器参数，通过端到端训练优化去混响效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种混响条件下均优于传统基准算法，尤其在长RIR场景下表现出更优的语音清晰度和信噪比提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的CNN逆滤波框架有效解决了长RIR场景下的单通道语音去混响难题，为复杂声学环境下的语音增强提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度卷积神经网络的逆滤波方法，用于解决单通道语音去混响问题，特别针对房间脉冲响应（RIR）长度超过短时傅里叶变换窗口的现实场景。
