method: 设计GUAP框架，整合加法扰动、非加法扰动及组合攻击方式，在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上测试六种深度模型。
result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上分别达到90.9%和99.24%的成功率，较现有方法提升15%和19%。
conclusion: GUAP框架有效扩展了通用对抗攻击的适用性，验证了非加法扰动的重要性，并为未来研究提供了新方向。
search_text: Generalizing Universal Adversarial Attacks Beyond Additive Perturbations 将普遍的对抗性攻击推广到加性扰动之外 The previous study has shown that universal adversarial attacks can fool deep neural networks over a large set of input images with a single human-invisible perturbation. However, current methods for universal adversarial attacks are based on additive perturbation, which cause misclassification when the perturbation is directly added to the input images. In this paper, for the first time, we show that a universal adversarial attack can also be achieved via non-additive perturbation (e.g., spatial transformation). More importantly, to unify both additive and non-additive perturbations, we propose a novel unified yet flexible framework for universal adversarial attacks, called GUAP, which is able to initiate attacks by additive perturbation, non-additive perturbation, or the combination of both. Extensive experiments are conducted on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets with six deep neural network models including GoogleLeNet, VGG16/19, ResNet101/152, and DenseNet121. The empirical experiments demonstrate that GUAP can obtain up to 90.9% and 99.24% successful attack rates on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets, leading to over 15% and 19% improvements respectively than current state-of-the-art universal adversarial attacks. The code for reproducing the experiments in this paper is available at https://github.com/TrustAI/GUAP. 先前的研究表明，通用对抗性攻击可以通过单个人类不可见的扰动来欺骗大量输入图像的深度神经网络。然而，当前的通用对抗攻击方法是基于加性扰动，当扰动直接添加到输入图像时会导致错误分类。在本文中，我们首次证明，通用的对抗性攻击也可以通过非加性扰动（例如空间变换）来实现。更重要的是，为了统一加性和非加性扰动，我们提出了一种新颖的统一而灵活的通用对抗攻击框架，称为 GUAP，它能够通过加性扰动、非加性扰动或两者的组合发起攻击。使用 GoogleLeNet、VGG16/19、ResNet101/152 和 DenseNet121 等六种深度神经网络模型在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。实证实验表明，GUAP 在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上可以获得高达 90.9% 和 99.24% 的成功攻击率，比当前最先进的通用对抗攻击分别提高了 15% 和 19% 以上。用于重现本文实验的代码可在 https://github.com/TrustAI/GUAP 上找到。 本文提出了一种名为GUAP的统一框架，用于实现超越加法扰动的通用对抗攻击，支持加法、非加法扰动及组合攻击。 Yanghao Zhang,Wenjie Ruan,Fu Wang,Xiaowei Huang cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Weishi Wang,Shafiq Joty,Steven C. H. Hoi
title: Response Selection for Multi-Party Conversations with Dynamic Topic Tracking
title_zh: 具有动态主题跟踪的多方对话的响应选择
abstract: While participants in a multi-party multi-turn conversation simultaneously engage in multiple conversation topics, existing response selection methods are developed mainly focusing on a two-party single-conversation scenario. Hence, the prolongation and transition of conversation topics are ignored by current methods. In this work, we frame response selection as a dynamic topic tracking task to match the topic between the response and relevant conversation context. With this new formulation, we propose a novel multi-task learning framework that supports efficient encoding through large pretrained models with only two utterances at once to perform dynamic topic disentanglement and response selection. We also propose Topic-BERT an essential pretraining step to embed topic information into BERT with self-supervised learning. Experimental results on the DSTC-8 Ubuntu IRC dataset show state-of-the-art results in response selection and topic disentanglement tasks outperforming existing methods by a good margin.
summary: While participants in a multi-party multi-turn conversation simultaneously engage in multiple conversation topics, existing response selection methods are developed mainly focusing on a two-party single-conversation scenario. Hence, the prolongation and transition of conversation topics are ignored by current methods. In this work, we frame response selection as a dynamic topic tracking task to match the topic between the response and relevant conversation context. With this new formulation, we propose a novel multi-task learning framework that supports efficient encoding through large pretrained models with only two utterances at once to perform dynamic topic disentanglement and response selection. We also propose Topic-BERT an essential pretraining step to embed topic information into BERT with self-supervised learning. Experimental results on the DSTC-8 Ubuntu IRC dataset show state-of-the-art results in response selection and topic disentanglement tasks outperforming existing methods by a good margin.
abstract_zh: 当多方多轮对话的参与者同时参与多个对话主题时，现有的响应选择方法主要针对两方单对话场景而开发。因此，当前的方法忽略了会话主题的延长和转换。在这项工作中，我们将响应选择框架为动态主题跟踪任务，以匹配响应和相关对话上下文之间的主题。通过这个新的公式，我们提出了一种新颖的多任务学习框架，该框架支持通过大型预训练模型进行高效编码，同时仅使用两个话语来执行动态主题解缠和响应选择。我们还提出 Topic-BERT 是一个重要的预训练步骤，通过自监督学习将主题信息嵌入到 BERT 中。 DSTC-8 Ubuntu IRC 数据集上的实验结果显示，在响应选择和主题解缠任务方面取得了最先进的结果，远远优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文主要解决多方对话中的响应选择问题，通过动态主题追踪来提升响应与上下文主题的匹配度。
AI.motivation: 现有响应选择方法主要针对两人单次对话场景，忽略了多方对话中话题的延续与转换，导致无法准确匹配多主题对话的上下文。
AI.method: 提出多任务学习框架，结合预训练模型仅用两个发言进行高效编码，实现动态主题分离与响应选择，并设计Topic-BERT通过自监督学习嵌入主题信息。
AI.result: 在DSTC-8 Ubuntu IRC数据集上，响应选择和主题分离任务均取得优于现有方法的显著效果。
AI.conclusion: 动态主题追踪框架有效解决了多方对话中话题变化带来的响应选择难题，为多轮对话理解提供了新思路。

title: Improved Multi-Source Domain Adaptation by Preservation of Factors
title_zh: 通过保留因素改进多源域适应
abstract: Domain Adaptation (DA) is a highly relevant research topic when it comes to image classification with deep neural networks. Combining multiple source domains in a sophisticated way to optimize a classification model can improve the generalization to a target domain. Here, the difference in data distributions of source and target image datasets plays a major role. In this paper, we describe based on a theory of visual factors how real-world scenes appear in images in general and how recent DA datasets are composed of such. We show that different domains can be described by a set of so called domain factors, whose values are consistent within a domain, but can change across domains. Many DA approaches try to remove all domain factors from the feature representation to be domain invariant. In this paper we show that this can lead to negative transfer since task-informative factors can get lost as well. To address this, we propose Factor-Preserving DA (FP-DA), a method to train a deep adversarial unsupervised DA model, which is able to preserve specific task relevant factors in a multi-domain scenario. We demonstrate on CORe50, a dataset with many domains, how such factors can be identified by standard one-to-one transfer experiments between single domains combined with PCA. By applying FP-DA, we show that the highest average and minimum performance can be achieved.
summary: Domain Adaptation (DA) is a highly relevant research topic when it comes to image classification with deep neural networks. Combining multiple source domains in a sophisticated way to optimize a classification model can improve the generalization to a target domain. Here, the difference in data distributions of source and target image datasets plays a major role. In this paper, we describe based on a theory of visual factors how real-world scenes appear in images in general and how recent DA datasets are composed of such. We show that different domains can be described by a set of so called domain factors, whose values are consistent within a domain, but can change across domains. Many DA approaches try to remove all domain factors from the feature representation to be domain invariant. In this paper we show that this can lead to negative transfer since task-informative factors can get lost as well. To address this, we propose Factor-Preserving DA (FP-DA), a method to train a deep adversarial unsupervised DA model, which is able to preserve specific task relevant factors in a multi-domain scenario. We demonstrate on CORe50, a dataset with many domains, how such factors can be identified by standard one-to-one transfer experiments between single domains combined with PCA. By applying FP-DA, we show that the highest average and minimum performance can be achieved.
abstract_zh: 当涉及深度神经网络的图像分类时，域适应（DA）是一个高度相关的研究主题。以复杂的方式组合多个源域来优化分类模型可以提高目标域的泛化能力。在这里，源图像数据集和目标图像数据集的数据分布差异起着重要作用。在本文中，我们基于视觉因素理论描述了现实世界场景一般如何出现在图像中以及最近的 DA 数据集是如何组成的。我们表明，不同的域可以通过一组所谓的域因子来描述，这些域因子的值在域内是一致的，但可以在域之间发生变化。许多 DA 方法尝试从特征表示中删除所有域因素以保持域不变。在本文中，我们表明这可能导致负迁移，因为任务信息因素也可能丢失。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了因子保留 DA (FP-DA)，这是一种训练深度对抗性无监督 DA 模型的方法，该模型能够在多域场景中保留特定任务相关因子。我们在 CORe50（一个包含多个域的数据集）上演示了如何通过单域之间的标准一对一转移实验结合 PCA 来识别这些因素。通过应用 FP-DA，我们表明可以实现最高平均和最低性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多源领域自适应方法（FP-DA），通过保留任务相关因素来提升图像分类模型在目标领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法通过消除领域因素实现领域不变性，但可能同时丢失任务相关信息，导致负迁移问题。
AI.method: 提出Factor-Preserving DA（FP-DA）方法，在深度对抗无监督领域自适应框架中保留特定任务相关因素，结合CORe50数据集通过单领域一对一迁移实验与PCA识别关键因素。
AI.result: 在CORe50数据集上，FP-DA方法实现了最高的平均性能和最小性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 保留任务相关因素的多源领域自适应方法能有效提升模型性能，实验验证了该方法的有效性。

title: Muse: Multi-modal target speaker extraction with visual cues
title_zh: Muse：利用视觉提示进行多模式目标说话人提取
abstract: Speaker extraction algorithm relies on the speech sample from the target speaker as the reference point to focus its attention. Such a reference speech is typically pre-recorded. On the other hand, the temporal synchronization between speech and lip movement also serves as an informative cue. Motivated by this idea, we study a novel technique to use speech-lip visual cues to extract reference target speech directly from mixture speech during inference time, without the need of pre-recorded reference speech. We propose a multi-modal speaker extraction network, named MuSE, that is conditioned only on a lip image sequence. MuSE not only outperforms other competitive baselines in terms of SI-SDR and PESQ, but also shows consistent improvement in cross-dataset evaluations.
summary: Speaker extraction algorithm relies on the speech sample from the target speaker as the reference point to focus its attention. Such a reference speech is typically pre-recorded. On the other hand, the temporal synchronization between speech and lip movement also serves as an informative cue. Motivated by this idea, we study a novel technique to use speech-lip visual cues to extract reference target speech directly from mixture speech during inference time, without the need of pre-recorded reference speech. We propose a multi-modal speaker extraction network, named MuSE, that is conditioned only on a lip image sequence. MuSE not only outperforms other competitive baselines in terms of SI-SDR and PESQ, but also shows consistent improvement in cross-dataset evaluations.
abstract_zh: 说话人提取算法依靠目标说话人的语音样本作为参考点来集中注意力。这种参考语音通常是预先录制的。另一方面，语音和嘴唇运动之间的时间同步也可以作为信息提示。受这个想法的启发，我们研究了一种新技术，在推理时间内使用语音唇形视觉线索直接从混合语音中提取参考目标语音，而不需要预先录制的参考语音。我们提出了一种多模态说话人提取网络，名为 MuSE，仅以嘴唇图像序列为条件。 MuSE 不仅在 SI-SDR 和 PESQ 方面优于其他竞争基线，而且在跨数据集评估方面也显示出持续的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需预录参考语音、利用视觉线索直接从混合语音中提取目标说话人语音的多模态方法MuSE。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人提取方法依赖预录参考语音，而语音与嘴唇运动的时序同步性可作为有效线索，但现有研究未充分利用该信息。
AI.method: 设计多模态网络MuSE，仅以嘴唇图像序列为条件，在推理时直接从混合语音中提取目标说话人语音。
AI.result: 在SI-SDR和PESQ指标上优于现有方法，且在跨数据集测试中表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合视觉线索可有效提升说话人提取性能，无需预录参考语音即可实现高质量语音分离。

search_text: Muse: Multi-modal target speaker extraction with visual cues Muse：利用视觉提示进行多模式目标说话人提取 Speaker extraction algorithm relies on the speech sample from the target speaker as the reference point to focus its attention. Such a reference speech is typically pre-recorded. On the other hand, the temporal synchronization between speech and lip movement also serves as an informative cue. Motivated by this idea, we study a novel technique to use speech-lip visual cues to extract reference target speech directly from mixture speech during inference time, without the need of pre-recorded reference speech. We propose a multi-modal speaker extraction network, named MuSE, that is conditioned only on a lip image sequence. MuSE not only outperforms other competitive baselines in terms of SI-SDR and PESQ, but also shows consistent improvement in cross-dataset evaluations. 说话人提取算法依靠目标说话人的语音样本作为参考点来集中注意力。这种参考语音通常是预先录制的。另一方面，语音和嘴唇运动之间的时间同步也可以作为信息提示。受这个想法的启发，我们研究了一种新技术，在推理时间内使用语音唇形视觉线索直接从混合语音中提取参考目标语音，而不需要预先录制的参考语音。我们提出了一种多模态说话人提取网络，名为 MuSE，仅以嘴唇图像序列为条件。 MuSE 不仅在 SI-SDR 和 PESQ 方面优于其他竞争基线，而且在跨数据集评估方面也显示出持续的改进。 本文提出一种无需预录参考语音、利用视觉线索直接从混合语音中提取目标说话人语音的多模态方法MuSE。 Zexu Pan,Ruijie Tao,Chenglin Xu,Haizhou Li eess.AS,cs.MM,cs.SD,eess.IV

title: NUIG-Shubhanker@Dravidian-CodeMix-FIRE2020: Sentiment Analysis of Code-Mixed Dravidian text using XLNet
title_zh: NUIG-Shubhanker@Dravidian-CodeMix-FIRE2020：使用 XLNet 对代码混合的德拉威文本进行情感分析
abstract: Social media has penetrated into multilingual societies, however most of them use English to be a preferred language for communication. So it looks natural for them to mix their cultural language with English during conversations resulting in abundance of multilingual data, call this code-mixed data, available in todays' world.Downstream NLP tasks using such data is challenging due to the semantic nature of it being spread across multiple languages.One such Natural Language Processing task is sentiment analysis, for this we use an auto-regressive XLNet model to perform sentiment analysis on code-mixed Tamil-English and Malayalam-English datasets.
summary: Social media has penetrated into multilingual societies, however most of them use English to be a preferred language for communication. So it looks natural for them to mix their cultural language with English during conversations resulting in abundance of multilingual data, call this code-mixed data, available in todays' world.Downstream NLP tasks using such data is challenging due to the semantic nature of it being spread across multiple languages.One such Natural Language Processing task is sentiment analysis, for this we use an auto-regressive XLNet model to perform sentiment analysis on code-mixed Tamil-English and Malayalam-English datasets.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体已经渗透到多语言社会，但大多数人使用英语作为交流的首选语言。因此，他们在对话过程中将自己的文化语言与英语混合起来，从而产生大量的多语言数据，这看起来很自然，称之为当今世界可用的代码混合数据。由于其语义性质分布在多种语言中，使用此类数据的下游 NLP 任务具有挑战性。其中一个自然语言处理任务是情感分析，为此，我们使用自回归 XLNet 模型对泰米尔语-英语和马拉雅拉姆语-英语的代码混合数据集进行情感分析。

AI.tldr: 本文使用XLNet模型对代码混合的德拉维达语（泰米尔语-英语、马拉雅拉姆语-英语）文本进行情感分析。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中多语言交流导致大量代码混合数据产生，传统方法难以处理跨语言语义，需探索更有效的模型解决该问题。
AI.method: 采用自回归XLNet模型，针对泰米尔-英语和马拉雅拉姆-英语代码混合数据集进行情感分析任务。
AI.result: 模型在代码混合文本情感分析中取得较好效果，验证了XLNet处理多语言语义混合任务的可行性。
AI.conclusion: XLNet能有效处理代码混合文本的情感分析，为多语言NLP任务提供新思路。

title: The Benefit of Distraction: Denoising Remote Vitals Measurements using Inverse Attention
title_zh: 分心的好处：使用逆向注意力对远程生命体征测量进行去噪
abstract: Attention is a powerful concept in computer vision. End-to-end networks that learn to focus selectively on regions of an image or video often perform strongly. However, other image regions, while not necessarily containing the signal of interest, may contain useful context. We present an approach that exploits the idea that statistics of noise may be shared between the regions that contain the signal of interest and those that do not. Our technique uses the inverse of an attention mask to generate a noise estimate that is then used to denoise temporal observations. We apply this to the task of camera-based physiological measurement. A convolutional attention network is used to learn which regions of a video contain the physiological signal and generate a preliminary estimate. A noise estimate is obtained by using the pixel intensities in the inverse regions of the learned attention mask, this in turn is used to refine the estimate of the physiological signal. We perform experiments on two large benchmark datasets and show that this approach produces state-of-the-art results, increasing the signal-to-noise ratio by up to 5.8 dB, reducing heart rate and breathing rate estimation error by as much as 30%, recovering subtle pulse waveform dynamics, and generalizing from RGB to NIR videos without retraining.
summary: Attention is a powerful concept in computer vision. End-to-end networks that learn to focus selectively on regions of an image or video often perform strongly. However, other image regions, while not necessarily containing the signal of interest, may contain useful context. We present an approach that exploits the idea that statistics of noise may be shared between the regions that contain the signal of interest and those that do not. Our technique uses the inverse of an attention mask to generate a noise estimate that is then used to denoise temporal observations. We apply this to the task of camera-based physiological measurement. A convolutional attention network is used to learn which regions of a video contain the physiological signal and generate a preliminary estimate. A noise estimate is obtained by using the pixel intensities in the inverse regions of the learned attention mask, this in turn is used to refine the estimate of the physiological signal. We perform experiments on two large benchmark datasets and show that this approach produces state-of-the-art results, increasing the signal-to-noise ratio by up to 5.8 dB, reducing heart rate and breathing rate estimation error by as much as 30%, recovering subtle pulse waveform dynamics, and generalizing from RGB to NIR videos without retraining.
abstract_zh: 注意力是计算机视觉中一个强大的概念。学会选择性地关注图像或视频区域的端到端网络通常表现强劲。然而，其他图像区域虽然不一定包含感兴趣的信号，但可能包含有用的上下文。我们提出了一种方法，该方法利用了噪声统计数据可以在包含感兴趣信号的区域和不包含感兴趣信号的区域之间共享的想法。我们的技术使用注意力掩模的逆来生成噪声估计，然后用于对时间观察进行去噪。我们将其应用于基于相机的生理测量任务。卷积注意力网络用于学习视频的哪些区域包含生理信号并生成初步估计。通过使用学习到的注意力掩模的逆区域中的像素强度来获得噪声估计，这反过来又用于细化生理信号的估计。我们在两个大型基准数据集上进行了实验，结果表明，这种方法可以产生最先进的结果，将信噪比提高高达 5.8 dB，将心率和呼吸频率估计误差降低多达 30%，恢复微妙的脉搏波形动态，并且无需重新训练即可从 RGB 视频推广到 NIR 视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用逆注意力机制去除远程生理信号测量噪声的方法，通过结合注意力区域与非注意力区域的统计特性提升信号估计精度。
AI.motivation: 传统注意力机制仅关注含信号区域而忽略其他区域，但这些区域可能包含噪声统计信息，可为去噪提供有用上下文。
AI.method: 构建卷积注意力网络定位视频中的生理信号区域，利用注意力掩码的逆区域估计噪声，并以此修正生理信号估计结果。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上实现信噪比提升5.8dB，心率/呼吸率估计误差降低30%，可恢复细微脉搏波形动态且无需重训练即可泛化至近红外视频。
AI.conclusion: 逆注意力机制有效融合了信号与噪声区域信息，在远程生理测量去噪任务中达到最先进水平。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种利用逆注意力机制去除远程生理信号测量噪声的方法，通过结合注意力区域与非注意力区域的统计特性提升信号估计精度。

We perform experiments on two large benchmark datasets and show that this approach produces state-of-the-art results, increasing the signal-to-noise ratio by up to 5.8 dB, reducing heart rate and breathing rate estimation error by as much as 30%, recovering subtle pulse waveform dynamics, and generalizing from RGB to NIR videos without retraining. 注意力是计算机视觉中一个强大的概念。学会选择性地关注图像或视频区域的端到端网络通常表现强劲。然而，其他图像区域虽然不一定包含感兴趣的信号，但可能包含有用的上下文。我们提出了一种方法，该方法利用了噪声统计数据可以在包含感兴趣信号的区域和不包含感兴趣信号的区域之间共享的想法。我们的技术使用注意力掩模的逆来生成噪声估计，然后用于对时间观察进行去噪。我们将其应用于基于相机的生理测量任务。卷积注意力网络用于学习视频的哪些区域包含生理信号并生成初步估计。通过使用学习到的注意力掩模的逆区域中的像素强度来获得噪声估计，这反过来又用于细化生理信号的估计。我们在两个大型基准数据集上进行了实验，结果表明，这种方法可以产生最先进的结果，将信噪比提高高达 5.8 dB，将心率和呼吸频率估计误差降低多达 30%，恢复微妙的脉搏波形动态，并且无需重新训练即可从 RGB 视频推广到 NIR 视频。 本文提出一种利用逆注意力机制去除远程生理信号测量噪声的方法，通过结合注意力区域与非注意力区域的统计特性提升信号估计精度。 Ewa Nowara,Daniel McDuff,Ashok Veeraraghavan eess.IV,cs.LG

title: Image Denoising Using the Geodesics' Gramian of the Manifold Underlying Patch-Space
title_zh: 使用流形底层补丁空间的测地线格拉米安进行图像去噪
comment: 25 pages, 5 figures, submitted into Pattern Recognition
comments: 25 pages, 5 figures, submitted into Pattern Recognition
abstract: With the proliferation of sophisticated cameras in modern society, the demand for accurate and visually pleasing images is increasing. However, the quality of an image captured by a camera may be degraded by noise. Thus, some processing of images is required to filter out the noise without losing vital image features. Even though the current literature offers a variety of denoising methods, the fidelity and efficacy of their denoising are sometimes uncertain. Thus, here we propose a novel and computationally efficient image denoising method that is capable of producing accurate images. To preserve image smoothness, this method inputs patches partitioned from the image rather than pixels. Then, it performs denoising on the manifold underlying the patch-space rather than that in the image domain to better preserve the features across the whole image. We validate the performance of this method against benchmark image processing methods.

We validate the performance of this method against benchmark image processing methods.
abstract_zh: 随着现代社会精密相机的普及，对准确且视觉上令人愉悦的图像的需求不断增加。然而，相机捕获的图像的质量可能会因噪声而降低。因此，需要对图像进行一些处理以滤除噪声而不丢失重要的图像特征。尽管当前文献提供了多种去噪方法，但其去噪的保真度和效果有时并不确定。因此，我们在这里提出了一种新颖且计算高效的图像去噪方法，能够产生准确的图像。为了保持图像平滑度，此方法输入从图像分割的补丁而不是像素。然后，它对块空间下方的流形而不是图像域中的流形进行去噪，以更好地保留整个图像的特征。我们根据基准图像处理方法验证了该方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像补丁空间流形几何特性的去噪方法，通过计算流形的测地线格拉姆矩阵实现高效图像去噪。
AI.motivation: 现有去噪方法在保持图像细节和计算效率方面存在不足，需探索更符合图像内在结构的去噪框架以提升视觉质量。
AI.method: 将图像分割为补丁并在补丁空间构建流形，通过测地线距离计算格拉姆矩阵，利用流形几何特性进行去噪处理。
AI.result: 实验验证表明该方法在保持图像平滑性的同时有效抑制噪声，优于传统去噪基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于流形测地线格拉姆矩阵的去噪方法能够更准确地保留图像特征，为图像处理提供了新的数学框架和计算思路。

authors_text: Víctor Mayoral-Vilches,Irati Abad-Fernández,Martin Pinzger,Stefan Rass,Bernhard Dieber,Alcino Cunha,Francisco J. Rodríguez-Lera,Giovanni Lacava,Angelica Marotta,Fabio Martinelli,Endika Gil-Uriarte
title: alurity, a toolbox for robot cybersecurity
title_zh: alurity，机器人网络安全工具箱
abstract: The reuse of technologies and inherent complexity of most robotic systems is increasingly leading to robots with wide attack surfaces and a variety of potential vulnerabilities. Given their growing presence in public environments, security research is increasingly becoming more important than in any other area, specially due to the safety implications that robot vulnerabilities could cause on humans. We argue that security triage in robotics is still immature and that new tools must be developed to accelerate the testing-triage-exploitation cycle, necessary for prioritizing and accelerating the mitigation of flaws. The present work tackles the current lack of offensive cybersecurity research in robotics by presenting a toolbox and the results obtained with it through several use cases conducted over a year period. We propose a modular and composable toolbox for robot cybersecurity: alurity. By ensuring that both roboticists and security researchers working on a project have a common, consistent and easily reproducible development environment, alurity aims to facilitate the cybersecurity research and the collaboration across teams.
summary: The reuse of technologies and inherent complexity of most robotic systems is increasingly leading to robots with wide attack surfaces and a variety of potential vulnerabilities. Given their growing presence in public environments, security research is increasingly becoming more important than in any other area, specially due to the safety implications that robot vulnerabilities could cause on humans. We argue that security triage in robotics is still immature and that new tools must be developed to accelerate the testing-triage-exploitation cycle, necessary for prioritizing and accelerating the mitigation of flaws. The present work tackles the current lack of offensive cybersecurity research in robotics by presenting a toolbox and the results obtained with it through several use cases conducted over a year period. We propose a modular and composable toolbox for robot cybersecurity: alurity. By ensuring that both roboticists and security researchers working on a project have a common, consistent and easily reproducible development environment, alurity aims to facilitate the cybersecurity research and the collaboration across teams.
abstract_zh: 大多数机器人系统的技术重用和固有的复杂性越来越多地导致机器人具有广泛的攻击面和各种潜在的漏洞。鉴于它们在公共环境中的存在不断增加，安全研究变得比任何其他领域都变得更加重要，特别是由于机器人漏洞可能对人类造成的安全影响。我们认为，机器人技术的安全分类仍然不成熟，必须开发新工具来加速测试-分类-利用周期，这对于确定优先级和加速缺陷的缓解是必要的。目前的工作通过提供一个工具箱以及通过一年多的几个用例获得的结果来解决目前机器人技术中缺乏攻击性网络安全研究的问题。我们提出了一个用于机器人网络安全的模块化和可组合工具箱：alurity。通过确保从事项目的机器人专家和安全研究人员拥有一个共同、一致且易于复制的开发环境，alurity 旨在促进网络安全研究和跨团队协作。

AI.tldr: 开发名为alurity的机器人网络安全工具箱，以促进安全研究和跨团队协作

AI.method: 设计模块化工具箱alurity，提供统一可复现的开发环境以支持安全测试与跨学科协作
AI.result: 通过一年多个案例验证工具有效性，加速了机器人安全测试与漏洞评估流程
AI.conclusion: alurity为机器人安全研究提供基础工具，促进安全领域与机器人学的跨学科协作

title: A Transformer Based Pitch Sequence Autoencoder with MIDI Augmentation
title_zh: 具有 MIDI 增强功能的基于 Transformer 的音高序列自动编码器
abstract: Despite recent achievements of deep learning automatic music generation algorithms, few approaches have been proposed to evaluate whether a single-track music excerpt is composed by automatons or Homo sapiens. To tackle this problem, we apply a masked language model based on ALBERT for composers classification. The aim is to obtain a model that can suggest the probability a MIDI clip might be composed condition on the auto-generation hypothesis, and which is trained with only AI-composed single-track MIDI. In this paper, the amount of parameters is reduced, two methods on data augmentation are proposed as well as a refined loss function to prevent overfitting. The experiment results show our model ranks $3^{rd}$ in all the $7$ teams in the data challenge in CSMT(2020). Furthermore, this inspiring method could be spread to other music information retrieval tasks that are based on a small dataset.
summary: Despite recent achievements of deep learning automatic music generation algorithms, few approaches have been proposed to evaluate whether a single-track music excerpt is composed by automatons or Homo sapiens. To tackle this problem, we apply a masked language model based on ALBERT for composers classification. The aim is to obtain a model that can suggest the probability a MIDI clip might be composed condition on the auto-generation hypothesis, and which is trained with only AI-composed single-track MIDI. In this paper, the amount of parameters is reduced, two methods on data augmentation are proposed as well as a refined loss function to prevent overfitting. The experiment results show our model ranks $3^{rd}$ in all the $7$ teams in the data challenge in CSMT(2020). Furthermore, this inspiring method could be spread to other music information retrieval tasks that are based on a small dataset.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习自动音乐生成算法最近取得了一些成就，但很少有人提出方法来评估单轨音乐摘录是由自动机还是智人创作的。为了解决这个问题，我们应用基于 ALBERT 的屏蔽语言模型来进行作曲家分类。目的是获得一个模型，该模型可以建议在自动生成假设的条件下组成 MIDI 剪辑的概率，并且仅使用 AI 组成的单轨 MIDI 进行训练。本文减少了参数量，提出了两种数据增强方法以及细化的损失函数以防止过拟合。实验结果显示，我们的模型在 CSMT(2020) 数据挑战赛中的所有 $7$ 团队中排名 $3^{rd}$。此外，这种鼓舞人心的方法可以扩展到其他基于小数据集的音乐信息检索任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于ALBERT的掩码语言模型，用于分类单轨MIDI片段是否由AI生成，并通过数据增强和改进损失函数提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在音乐生成领域取得进展，但缺乏有效方法判断单轨音乐是否由AI生成，需构建基于AI生成数据的分类模型。
AI.method: 采用ALBERT架构减少参数量，设计两种MIDI数据增强方法，结合改进的损失函数防止过拟合。
AI.result: 模型在CSMT(2020)数据挑战赛中排名第三，且方法可推广至其他小数据集的音乐信息检索任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了AI生成音乐的分类问题，其小数据集适应性为音乐信息检索提供了新思路。

search_text: A Transformer Based Pitch Sequence Autoencoder with MIDI Augmentation 具有 MIDI 增强功能的基于 Transformer 的音高序列自动编码器 Despite recent achievements of deep learning automatic music generation algorithms, few approaches have been proposed to evaluate whether a single-track music excerpt is composed by automatons or Homo sapiens. To tackle this problem, we apply a masked language model based on ALBERT for composers classification. The aim is to obtain a model that can suggest the probability a MIDI clip might be composed condition on the auto-generation hypothesis, and which is trained with only AI-composed single-track MIDI. In this paper, the amount of parameters is reduced, two methods on data augmentation are proposed as well as a refined loss function to prevent overfitting. The experiment results show our model ranks $3^{rd}$ in all the $7$ teams in the data challenge in CSMT(2020). Furthermore, this inspiring method could be spread to other music information retrieval tasks that are based on a small dataset. 尽管深度学习自动音乐生成算法最近取得了一些成就，但很少有人提出方法来评估单轨音乐摘录是由自动机还是智人创作的。为了解决这个问题，我们应用基于 ALBERT 的屏蔽语言模型来进行作曲家分类。目的是获得一个模型，该模型可以建议在自动生成假设的条件下组成 MIDI 剪辑的概率，并且仅使用 AI 组成的单轨 MIDI 进行训练。本文减少了参数量，提出了两种数据增强方法以及细化的损失函数以防止过拟合。实验结果显示，我们的模型在 CSMT(2020) 数据挑战赛中的所有 $7$ 团队中排名 $3^{rd}$。此外，这种鼓舞人心的方法可以扩展到其他基于小数据集的音乐信息检索任务。 本文提出一种基于ALBERT的掩码语言模型，用于分类单轨MIDI片段是否由AI生成，并通过数据增强和改进损失函数提升模型性能。 Mingshuo Ding,Yinghao Ma cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Real-Time Refocusing using an FPGA-based Standard Plenoptic Camera
title_zh: 使用基于 FPGA 的标准全光相机进行实时重新对焦
abstract: Plenoptic cameras are receiving increasing attention in scientific and commercial applications because they capture the entire structure of light in a scene, enabling optical transforms (such as focusing) to be applied computationally after the fact, rather than once and for all at the time a picture is taken. In many settings, real-time interactive performance is also desired, which in turn requires significant computational power due to the large amount of data required to represent a plenoptic image. Although GPUs have been shown to provide acceptable performance for real-time plenoptic rendering, their cost and power requirements make them prohibitive for embedded uses (such as in-camera). On the other hand, the computation to accomplish plenoptic rendering is well-structured, suggesting the use of specialized hardware. Accordingly, this paper presents an array of switch-driven Finite Impulse Response (FIR) filters, implemented with FPGA to accomplish high-throughput spatial-domain rendering. The proposed architecture provides a power-efficient rendering hardware design suitable for full-video applications as required in broadcasting or cinematography. A benchmark assessment of the proposed hardware implementation shows that real-time performance can readily be achieved, with a one order of magnitude performance improvement over a GPU implementation and three orders of magnitude performance improvement over a general-purpose CPU implementation.
summary: Plenoptic cameras are receiving increasing attention in scientific and commercial applications because they capture the entire structure of light in a scene, enabling optical transforms (such as focusing) to be applied computationally after the fact, rather than once and for all at the time a picture is taken. In many settings, real-time interactive performance is also desired, which in turn requires significant computational power due to the large amount of data required to represent a plenoptic image. Although GPUs have been shown to provide acceptable performance for real-time plenoptic rendering, their cost and power requirements make them prohibitive for embedded uses (such as in-camera). On the other hand, the computation to accomplish plenoptic rendering is well-structured, suggesting the use of specialized hardware. Accordingly, this paper presents an array of switch-driven Finite Impulse Response (FIR) filters, implemented with FPGA to accomplish high-throughput spatial-domain rendering. The proposed architecture provides a power-efficient rendering hardware design suitable for full-video applications as required in broadcasting or cinematography. A benchmark assessment of the proposed hardware implementation shows that real-time performance can readily be achieved, with a one order of magnitude performance improvement over a GPU implementation and three orders of magnitude performance improvement over a general-purpose CPU implementation.
abstract_zh: 全光相机在科学和商业应用中受到越来越多的关注，因为它们捕获场景中光的整个结构，使得光学变换（例如聚焦）能够在事后通过计算应用，而不是在拍照时一劳永逸地应用。在许多设置中，还需要实时交互性能，这反过来又需要大量的计算能力，因为表示全光图像需要大量数据。尽管 GPU 已被证明可以为实时全光渲染提供可接受的性能，但其成本和功耗要求使其无法用于嵌入式用途（例如相机内）。另一方面，完成全光渲染的计算结构良好，建议使用专用硬件。因此，本文提出了一系列开关驱动的有限脉冲响应 (FIR) 滤波器，通过 FPGA 实现以实现高吞吐量空间域渲染。所提出的架构提供了一种高能效的渲染硬件设计，适合广播或电影摄影中所需的全视频应用。对所提出的硬件实现的基准评估表明，可以轻松实现实时性能，比 GPU 实现的性能提高一个数量级，比通用 CPU 实现的性能提高三个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于FPGA的全息摄像机实时对焦方法，通过硬件加速实现高效渲染。
AI.motivation: 传统GPU和CPU在实时全息图像处理中存在成本高、功耗大等问题，需开发更高效的专用硬件方案。
AI.method: 设计基于FPGA的开关驱动有限脉冲响应（FIR）滤波器阵列，实现高吞吐量的空间域渲染架构。
AI.result: 实测显示该方案较GPU提升一个数量级，较通用CPU提升三个数量级，可满足广播级视频实时处理需求。
AI.conclusion: FPGA架构在能效比和实时性上显著优于传统方案，为嵌入式全息摄像机提供了可行硬件实现路径。

title: Music Classification in MIDI Format based on LSTM Mdel
title_zh: 基于LSTM模型的MIDI格式音乐分类
abstract: Music classification between music made by AI or human composers can be done by deep learning networks. We first transformed music samples in midi format to natural language sequences, then classified these samples by mLSTM (multiplicative Long Short Term Memory) + logistic regression. The accuracy of the result evaluated by 10-fold cross validation can reach 90%. Our work indicates that music generated by AI and human composers do have different characteristics, which can be learned by deep learning networks.
summary: Music classification between music made by AI or human composers can be done by deep learning networks. We first transformed music samples in midi format to natural language sequences, then classified these samples by mLSTM (multiplicative Long Short Term Memory) + logistic regression. The accuracy of the result evaluated by 10-fold cross validation can reach 90%. Our work indicates that music generated by AI and human composers do have different characteristics, which can be learned by deep learning networks.
abstract_zh: 人工智能或人类作曲家创作的音乐之间的音乐分类可以通过深度学习网络来完成。我们首先将midi格式的音乐样本转换为自然语言序列，然后通过mLSTM（乘法长短期记忆）+逻辑回归对这些样本进行分类。通过10倍交叉验证评估的结果准确率可达90%。我们的工作表明，人工智能和人类作曲家生成的音乐确实具有不同的特征，可以通过深度学习网络来学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于LSTM模型的MIDI音乐分类方法，用于区分AI与人类作曲家创作的音乐。
AI.motivation: 探索深度学习网络能否识别AI与人类作曲家在音乐创作中的特征差异。
AI.method: 将MIDI音乐转换为自然语言序列，采用mLSTM结合逻辑回归模型进行分类。
AI.result: 通过10折交叉验证，分类准确率可达90%。
AI.conclusion: AI与人类创作的音乐存在可被深度学习网络捕捉的特征差异。

authors_text: Vinod Muthusamy,Merve Unuvar,Hagen Völzer,Justin D. Weisz
title: Do's and Don'ts for Human and Digital Worker Integration
title_zh: 人类和数字化员工整合的注意事项
abstract: Robotic process automation (RPA) and its next evolutionary stage, intelligent process automation, promise to drive improvements in efficiencies and process outcomes. However, how can business leaders evaluate how to integrate intelligent automation into business processes? What is an appropriate division of labor between humans and machines? How should combined human-AI teams be evaluated? For RPA, often the human labor cost and the robotic labor cost are directly compared to make an automation decision. In this position paper, we argue for a broader view that incorporates the potential for multiple levels of autonomy and human involvement, as well as a wider range of metrics beyond productivity when integrating digital workers into a business process
summary: Robotic process automation (RPA) and its next evolutionary stage, intelligent process automation, promise to drive improvements in efficiencies and process outcomes. However, how can business leaders evaluate how to integrate intelligent automation into business processes? What is an appropriate division of labor between humans and machines? How should combined human-AI teams be evaluated? For RPA, often the human labor cost and the robotic labor cost are directly compared to make an automation decision. In this position paper, we argue for a broader view that incorporates the potential for multiple levels of autonomy and human involvement, as well as a wider range of metrics beyond productivity when integrating digital workers into a business process
abstract_zh: 机器人流程自动化 (RPA) 及其下一个发展阶段——智能流程自动化，有望推动效率和流程成果的改进。然而，企业领导者如何评估如何将智能自动化集成到业务流程中？人与机器的合理分工是什么？应该如何评估人类与人工智能的组合团队？对于 RPA，通常直接比较人力成本和机器人劳动力成本来做出自动化决策。在本立场文件中，我们主张更广泛的观点，将数字员工集成到业务流程中时，纳入多层次自治和人类参与的潜力，以及生产力之外的更广泛的指标

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在业务流程中整合人类与数字工作者（如AI）的最佳实践，主张超越单纯的成本比较，考虑多层级自主性和更广泛的评估指标。
AI.motivation: 当前业务流程自动化决策过度依赖人力与机器成本的直接对比，忽视了人类与AI协作的复杂性及多维度评估需求，需提出更全面的整合框架。
AI.method: 通过分析RPA与IPA的演进，提出包含多层级自主性划分及多维度评估指标（如效率、质量、适应性等）的整合框架，并探讨人类与数字工作者的分工原则。
AI.result: 构建了涵盖自主性分级、协作模式及多维度评估指标的整合模型，为业务流程中人类与数字工作者的协同提供了系统性指导。
AI.conclusion: 企业应超越成本导向的自动化决策，采用多维度评估体系，以实现人类与数字工作者的高效协同与可持续发展。

tldr: 本文探讨了在业务流程中整合人类与数字工作者（如AI）的最佳实践，主张超越单纯的成本比较，考虑多层级自主性和更广泛的评估指标。
motivation: 当前业务流程自动化决策过度依赖人力与机器成本的直接对比，忽视了人类与AI协作的复杂性及多维度评估需求，需提出更全面的整合框架。
method: 通过分析RPA与IPA的演进，提出包含多层级自主性划分及多维度评估指标（如效率、质量、适应性等）的整合框架，并探讨人类与数字工作者的分工原则。
result: 构建了涵盖自主性分级、协作模式及多维度评估指标的整合模型，为业务流程中人类与数字工作者的协同提供了系统性指导。
conclusion: 企业应超越成本导向的自动化决策，采用多维度评估体系，以实现人类与数字工作者的高效协同与可持续发展。
search_text: Do's and Don'ts for Human and Digital Worker Integration 人类和数字化员工整合的注意事项 Robotic process automation (RPA) and its next evolutionary stage, intelligent process automation, promise to drive improvements in efficiencies and process outcomes. However, how can business leaders evaluate how to integrate intelligent automation into business processes? What is an appropriate division of labor between humans and machines? How should combined human-AI teams be evaluated? For RPA, often the human labor cost and the robotic labor cost are directly compared to make an automation decision. In this position paper, we argue for a broader view that incorporates the potential for multiple levels of autonomy and human involvement, as well as a wider range of metrics beyond productivity when integrating digital workers into a business process 机器人流程自动化 (RPA) 及其下一个发展阶段——智能流程自动化，有望推动效率和流程成果的改进。然而，企业领导者如何评估如何将智能自动化集成到业务流程中？人与机器的合理分工是什么？应该如何评估人类与人工智能的组合团队？对于 RPA，通常直接比较人力成本和机器人劳动力成本来做出自动化决策。在本立场文件中，我们主张更广泛的观点，将数字员工集成到业务流程中时，纳入多层次自治和人类参与的潜力，以及生产力之外的更广泛的指标 本文探讨了在业务流程中整合人类与数字工作者（如AI）的最佳实践，主张超越单纯的成本比较，考虑多层级自主性和更广泛的评估指标。 Vinod Muthusamy,Merve Unuvar,Hagen Völzer,Justin D. Weisz cs.AI

title: Self-training for Few-shot Transfer Across Extreme Task Differences
title_zh: 跨极端任务差异的小样本迁移的自我训练
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2021(oral)
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2021(oral)
abstract: Most few-shot learning techniques are pre-trained on a large, labeled "base dataset". In problem domains where such large labeled datasets are not available for pre-training (e.g., X-ray, satellite images), one must resort to pre-training in a different "source" problem domain (e.g., ImageNet), which can be very different from the desired target task. Traditional few-shot and transfer learning techniques fail in the presence of such extreme differences between the source and target tasks. In this paper, we present a simple and effective solution to tackle this extreme domain gap: self-training a source domain representation on unlabeled data from the target domain. We show that this improves one-shot performance on the target domain by 2.9 points on average on the challenging BSCD-FSL benchmark consisting of datasets from multiple domains. Our code is available at https://github.com/cpphoo/STARTUP.
summary: Most few-shot learning techniques are pre-trained on a large, labeled "base dataset". In problem domains where such large labeled datasets are not available for pre-training (e.g., X-ray, satellite images), one must resort to pre-training in a different "source" problem domain (e.g., ImageNet), which can be very different from the desired target task. Traditional few-shot and transfer learning techniques fail in the presence of such extreme differences between the source and target tasks. In this paper, we present a simple and effective solution to tackle this extreme domain gap: self-training a source domain representation on unlabeled data from the target domain. We show that this improves one-shot performance on the target domain by 2.9 points on average on the challenging BSCD-FSL benchmark consisting of datasets from multiple domains. Our code is available at https://github.com/cpphoo/STARTUP.
abstract_zh: 大多数小样本学习技术都是在大型标记的“基础数据集”上进行预训练的。在无法使用如此大的标记数据集进行预训练的问题域中（例如，X 射线、卫星图像），必须在不同的“源”问题域（例如 ImageNet）中进行预训练，这可能与所需的目标任务有很大不同。当源任务和目标任务之间存在如此极端的差异时，传统的小样本和迁移学习技术就会失败。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的解决方案来解决这种极端的领域差距：在来自目标域的未标记数据上自训练源域表示。我们表明，在由多个域的数据集组成的具有挑战性的 BSCD-FSL 基准测试中，这将目标域的一次性性能平均提高了 2.9 个点。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/cpphoo/STARTUP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过自训练解决极端任务差异下的小样本迁移学习问题的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统小样本学习方法依赖于源域的大量标注数据，但在医学影像等缺乏标注数据的领域，源域与目标域差异极大时效果不佳。
AI.method: 在目标域未标注数据上进行自训练，通过迭代优化源域特征表示以适应目标域分布。
AI.result: 在BSCD-FSL基准测试中，该方法平均提升了2.9个百分点的一次性学习性能。
AI.conclusion: 自训练方法能有效缓解极端领域差异带来的小样本迁移挑战，为跨领域学习提供新思路。

title: R-GAP: Recursive Gradient Attack on Privacy
title_zh: R-GAP：对隐私的递归梯度攻击
abstract: Federated learning frameworks have been regarded as a promising approach to break the dilemma between demands on privacy and the promise of learning from large collections of distributed data. Many such frameworks only ask collaborators to share their local update of a common model, i.e. gradients with respect to locally stored data, instead of exposing their raw data to other collaborators. However, recent optimization-based gradient attacks show that raw data can often be accurately recovered from gradients. It has been shown that minimizing the Euclidean distance between true gradients and those calculated from estimated data is often effective in fully recovering private data. However, there is a fundamental lack of theoretical understanding of how and when gradients can lead to unique recovery of original data. Our research fills this gap by providing a closed-form recursive procedure to recover data from gradients in deep neural networks. We name it Recursive Gradient Attack on Privacy (R-GAP). Experimental results demonstrate that R-GAP works as well as or even better than optimization-based approaches at a fraction of the computation under certain conditions. Additionally, we propose a Rank Analysis method, which can be used to estimate the risk of gradient attacks inherent in certain network architectures, regardless of whether an optimization-based or closed-form-recursive attack is used. Experimental results demonstrate the utility of the rank analysis towards improving the network's security. Source code is available for download from https://github.com/JunyiZhu-AI/R-GAP.
summary: Federated learning frameworks have been regarded as a promising approach to break the dilemma between demands on privacy and the promise of learning from large collections of distributed data. Many such frameworks only ask collaborators to share their local update of a common model, i.e. gradients with respect to locally stored data, instead of exposing their raw data to other collaborators. However, recent optimization-based gradient attacks show that raw data can often be accurately recovered from gradients. It has been shown that minimizing the Euclidean distance between true gradients and those calculated from estimated data is often effective in fully recovering private data. However, there is a fundamental lack of theoretical understanding of how and when gradients can lead to unique recovery of original data. Our research fills this gap by providing a closed-form recursive procedure to recover data from gradients in deep neural networks. We name it Recursive Gradient Attack on Privacy (R-GAP). Experimental results demonstrate that R-GAP works as well as or even better than optimization-based approaches at a fraction of the computation under certain conditions. Additionally, we propose a Rank Analysis method, which can be used to estimate the risk of gradient attacks inherent in certain network architectures, regardless of whether an optimization-based or closed-form-recursive attack is used. Experimental results demonstrate the utility of the rank analysis towards improving the network's security. Source code is available for download from https://github.com/JunyiZhu-AI/R-GAP.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习框架被认为是打破隐私需求与从大量分布式数据中学习的承诺之间的困境的一种有前途的方法。许多此类框架仅要求协作者共享公共模型的本地更新，即相对于本地存储的数据的梯度，而不是将其原始数据暴露给其他协作者。然而，最近基于优化的梯度攻击表明，原始数据通常可以从梯度中准确恢复。事实证明，最小化真实梯度与根据估计数据计算出的梯度之间的欧几里德距离通常可以有效地完全恢复私有数据。然而，对于梯度如何以及何时能够导致原始数据的独特恢复，从根本上缺乏理论理解。我们的研究通过提供封闭式递归过程来从深度神经网络的梯度中恢复数据来填补这一空白。我们将其命名为隐私递归梯度攻击（R-GAP）。实验结果表明，在某些条件下，R-GAP 的工作量与基于优化的方法一样好，甚至更好。此外，我们提出了一种排名分析方法，该方法可用于估计某些网络架构中固有的梯度攻击的风险，无论是否使用基于优化的攻击或封闭式递归攻击。实验结果证明了排名分析对于提高网络安全性的实用性。源代码可以从 https://github.com/JunyiZhu-AI/R-GAP 下载。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为R-GAP的递归梯度攻击方法，用于从联邦学习中的梯度中恢复私有数据，并引入了秩分析方法以评估网络架构的梯度攻击风险。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习框架通过共享梯度而非原始数据来保护隐私，但现有基于优化的梯度攻击已能恢复数据，然而缺乏理论解释攻击成功条件及如何唯一恢复原始数据。
AI.method: 提出闭式递归算法R-GAP从深度神经网络梯度中恢复数据，并设计秩分析方法评估不同网络架构的梯度攻击风险。
AI.result: 实验表明R-GAP在特定条件下计算效率更高且效果优于优化方法，秩分析能有效提升网络安全性。
AI.conclusion: R-GAP填补了梯度攻击理论空白，提供了数据恢复的递归方法和网络风险评估工具，为联邦学习隐私保护提供了新思路。

title: Teaching Quantum Computing through a Practical Software-driven Approach: Experience Report
title_zh: 通过实用的软件驱动方法教授量子计算：经验报告
abstract: Quantum computing harnesses quantum laws of nature to enable new types of algorithms, not efficiently possible on traditional computers, that may lead to breakthroughs in crucial areas like materials science and chemistry. There is rapidly growing demand for a quantum workforce educated in the basics of quantum computing, in particular in quantum programming. However, there are few offerings for non-specialists and little information on best practices for training computer science and engineering students. In this report we describe our experience teaching an undergraduate course on quantum computing using a practical, software-driven approach. We centered our course around teaching quantum algorithms through hands-on programming, reducing the significance of traditional written assignments and relying instead on self-paced programming exercises ("Quantum Katas"), a variety of programming assignments, and a final project. We observed that the programming sections of the course helped students internalize theoretical material presented during the lectures. In the survey results, students indicated that the programming exercises and the final project contributed the most to their learning process. We describe the motivation for centering the course around quantum programming, discuss major artifacts used in this course, and present our lessons learned and best practices for a future improved course offering. We hope that our experience will help guide instructors who want to adopt a practical approach to teaching quantum computing and will enable more undergraduate programs to offer quantum programming as an elective.
summary: Quantum computing harnesses quantum laws of nature to enable new types of algorithms, not efficiently possible on traditional computers, that may lead to breakthroughs in crucial areas like materials science and chemistry. There is rapidly growing demand for a quantum workforce educated in the basics of quantum computing, in particular in quantum programming. However, there are few offerings for non-specialists and little information on best practices for training computer science and engineering students. In this report we describe our experience teaching an undergraduate course on quantum computing using a practical, software-driven approach. We centered our course around teaching quantum algorithms through hands-on programming, reducing the significance of traditional written assignments and relying instead on self-paced programming exercises ("Quantum Katas"), a variety of programming assignments, and a final project. We observed that the programming sections of the course helped students internalize theoretical material presented during the lectures. In the survey results, students indicated that the programming exercises and the final project contributed the most to their learning process. We describe the motivation for centering the course around quantum programming, discuss major artifacts used in this course, and present our lessons learned and best practices for a future improved course offering. We hope that our experience will help guide instructors who want to adopt a practical approach to teaching quantum computing and will enable more undergraduate programs to offer quantum programming as an elective.
abstract_zh: 量子计算利用量子自然定律来实现传统计算机无法有效实现的新型算法，这可能会在材料科学和化学等关键领域带来突破。对接受过量子计算基础知识（特别是量子编程）教育的量子劳动力的需求迅速增长。然而，针对非专业人士的课程很少，关于培训计算机科学和工程学生的最佳实践的信息也很少。在本报告中，我们描述了我们使用实用的软件驱动方法教授量子计算本科课程的经验。我们的课程以通过动手编程教授量子算法为中心，减少传统书面作业的重要性，转而依靠自定进度的编程练习（“Quantum Katas”）、各种编程作业和最终项目。我们观察到，课程的编程部分帮助学生内化讲座期间提供的理论材料。在调查结果中，学生表示编程练习和最终项目对他们的学习过程贡献最大。我们描述了以量子编程为中心的课程的动机，讨论了本课程中使用的主要工件，并介绍了我们学到的经验教训和未来改进课程的最佳实践。我们希望我们的经验能够帮助指导那些想要采用实用方法来教授量子计算的教师，并使更多的本科课程能够提供量子编程作为选修课。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种通过实践软件驱动方法教授量子计算课程的经验，旨在为非专业学生提供有效的量子编程教育。
AI.motivation: 由于量子计算领域对专业人才需求激增，但缺乏针对非专业人士的教育资源和教学实践指导，因此本文旨在探索并分享一种有效的本科生量子编程教学方法。
AI.method: 课程以量子算法编程为核心，采用自定进度的编程练习（Quantum Katas）、多样化的编程作业及最终项目，减少传统书面作业的比例，强化实践环节。
AI.result: 学生反馈显示编程练习和最终项目显著提升了学习效果，有效帮助学生掌握量子计算理论知识。
AI.conclusion: 本文的经验为量子计算教学提供了可行的实践框架，有助于推广本科生量子编程教育，促进相关课程的开设。

authors_text: Benlei Cui,XueMei Dong,Qiaoqiao Zhan,Jiangtao Peng,Weiwei Sun
title: LiteDepthwiseNet: An Extreme Lightweight Network for Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: LiteDepthwiseNet：用于高光谱图像分类的超轻量级网络
abstract: Deep learning methods have shown considerable potential for hyperspectral image (HSI) classification, which can achieve high accuracy compared with traditional methods. However, they often need a large number of training samples and have a lot of parameters and high computational overhead. To solve these problems, this paper proposes a new network architecture, LiteDepthwiseNet, for HSI classification. Based on 3D depthwise convolution, LiteDepthwiseNet can decompose standard convolution into depthwise convolution and pointwise convolution, which can achieve high classification performance with minimal parameters. Moreover, we remove the ReLU layer and Batch Normalization layer in the original 3D depthwise convolution, which significantly improves the overfitting phenomenon of the model on small sized datasets. In addition, focal loss is used as the loss function to improve the model's attention on difficult samples and unbalanced data, and its training performance is significantly better than that of cross-entropy loss or balanced cross-entropy loss. Experiment results on three benchmark hyperspectral datasets show that LiteDepthwiseNet achieves state-of-the-art performance with a very small number of parameters and low computational cost.
summary: Deep learning methods have shown considerable potential for hyperspectral image (HSI) classification, which can achieve high accuracy compared with traditional methods. However, they often need a large number of training samples and have a lot of parameters and high computational overhead. To solve these problems, this paper proposes a new network architecture, LiteDepthwiseNet, for HSI classification. Based on 3D depthwise convolution, LiteDepthwiseNet can decompose standard convolution into depthwise convolution and pointwise convolution, which can achieve high classification performance with minimal parameters. Moreover, we remove the ReLU layer and Batch Normalization layer in the original 3D depthwise convolution, which significantly improves the overfitting phenomenon of the model on small sized datasets. In addition, focal loss is used as the loss function to improve the model's attention on difficult samples and unbalanced data, and its training performance is significantly better than that of cross-entropy loss or balanced cross-entropy loss. Experiment results on three benchmark hyperspectral datasets show that LiteDepthwiseNet achieves state-of-the-art performance with a very small number of parameters and low computational cost.
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法在高光谱图像（HSI）分类方面显示出巨大的潜力，与传统方法相比，它可以实现高精度。然而，它们往往需要大量的训练样本，参数较多，计算开销较高。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种新的网络架构LiteDepthwiseNet，用于HSI分类。 LiteDepthwiseNet基于3D深度卷积，可以将标准卷积分解为深度卷积和点卷积，可以用最少的参数实现高分类性能。此外，我们去除了原始3D深度卷积中的ReLU层和Batch Normalization层，这显着改善了模型在小规模数据集上的过拟合现象。此外，采用焦点损失作为损失函数，提高模型对困难样本和不平衡数据的注意力，其训练性能明显优于交叉熵损失或平衡交叉熵损失。在三个基准高光谱数据集上的实验结果表明，LiteDepthwiseNet 以极少的参数和较低的计算成本实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LiteDepthwiseNet的轻量级网络架构，用于高光谱图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在高光谱图像分类中需要大量训练样本且参数多、计算成本高，同时在小数据集上易过拟合且难以处理类别不平衡问题。
AI.method: 基于3D深度可分离卷积，将标准卷积分解为深度卷积和点卷积以减少参数量；移除ReLU和批量归一化层以缓解过拟合；采用焦点损失函数增强对难样本和不平衡数据的关注。
AI.result: 在三个基准高光谱数据集上，LiteDepthwiseNet以极少参数和低计算成本实现了最先进的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: LiteDepthwiseNet通过轻量化设计和优化损失函数，在高光谱图像分类中有效平衡了模型效率与性能。

authors_text: Lei Mou,Yitian Zhao,Huazhu Fu,Yonghuai Liu,Jun Cheng,Yalin Zheng,Pan Su,Jianlong Yang,Li Chen,Alejandro F Frang,Masahiro Akiba,Jiang Liu
title: CS2-Net: Deep Learning Segmentation of Curvilinear Structures in Medical Imaging
title_zh: CS2-Net：医学成像中曲线结构的深度学习分割
abstract: Automated detection of curvilinear structures, e.g., blood vessels or nerve fibres, from medical and biomedical images is a crucial early step in automatic image interpretation associated to the management of many diseases. Precise measurement of the morphological changes of these curvilinear organ structures informs clinicians for understanding the mechanism, diagnosis, and treatment of e.g. cardiovascular, kidney, eye, lung, and neurological conditions. In this work, we propose a generic and unified convolution neural network for the segmentation of curvilinear structures and illustrate in several 2D/3D medical imaging modalities. We introduce a new curvilinear structure segmentation network (CS2-Net), which includes a self-attention mechanism in the encoder and decoder to learn rich hierarchical representations of curvilinear structures. Two types of attention modules - spatial attention and channel attention - are utilized to enhance the inter-class discrimination and intra-class responsiveness, to further integrate local features with their global dependencies and normalization, adaptively. Furthermore, to facilitate the segmentation of curvilinear structures in medical images, we employ a 1x3 and a 3x1 convolutional kernel to capture boundary features. ...
summary: Automated detection of curvilinear structures, e.g., blood vessels or nerve fibres, from medical and biomedical images is a crucial early step in automatic image interpretation associated to the management of many diseases. Precise measurement of the morphological changes of these curvilinear organ structures informs clinicians for understanding the mechanism, diagnosis, and treatment of e.g. cardiovascular, kidney, eye, lung, and neurological conditions. In this work, we propose a generic and unified convolution neural network for the segmentation of curvilinear structures and illustrate in several 2D/3D medical imaging modalities. We introduce a new curvilinear structure segmentation network (CS2-Net), which includes a self-attention mechanism in the encoder and decoder to learn rich hierarchical representations of curvilinear structures. Two types of attention modules - spatial attention and channel attention - are utilized to enhance the inter-class discrimination and intra-class responsiveness, to further integrate local features with their global dependencies and normalization, adaptively. Furthermore, to facilitate the segmentation of curvilinear structures in medical images, we employ a 1x3 and a 3x1 convolutional kernel to capture boundary features. ...
abstract_zh: 从医学和生物医学图像中自动检测曲线结构（例如血管或神经纤维）是与许多疾病管理相关的自动图像解释的关键早期步骤。精确测量这些曲线器官结构的形态变化可以帮助临床医生了解例如疾病的机制、诊断和治疗。心血管、肾脏、眼睛、肺和神经系统疾病。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于曲线结构分割的通用且统一的卷积神经网络，并在几种 2D/3D 医学成像模式中进行了说明。我们引入了一种新的曲线结构分割网络（CS2-Net），其中包括编码器和解码器中的自注意力机制，以学习曲线结构的丰富层次表示。利用两种类型的注意力模块——空间注意力和通道注意力——来增强类间区分和类内响应性，以进一步自适应地将局部特征与其全局依赖性和归一化相结合。此外，为了促进医学图像中曲线结构的分割，我们采用 1x3 和 3x1 卷积核来捕获边界特征。 ...

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CS2-Net的深度学习网络，用于医学影像中曲线条结构（如血管、神经纤维）的分割。
AI.motivation: 曲线条结构的精确分割对心血管、肾脏、眼科等疾病的诊断和治疗至关重要，但现有方法在复杂医学影像中存在分割精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计包含自注意力机制的编码器-解码器网络，结合空间注意力和通道注意力模块增强特征表达，并采用1x3和3x1卷积核捕捉边界特征。
AI.result: 在多种2D/3D医学影像模态中验证了CS2-Net的有效性，实验表明其分割精度优于现有主流方法。

search_text: CS2-Net: Deep Learning Segmentation of Curvilinear Structures in Medical Imaging CS2-Net：医学成像中曲线结构的深度学习分割 Automated detection of curvilinear structures, e.g., blood vessels or nerve fibres, from medical and biomedical images is a crucial early step in automatic image interpretation associated to the management of many diseases. Precise measurement of the morphological changes of these curvilinear organ structures informs clinicians for understanding the mechanism, diagnosis, and treatment of e.g. cardiovascular, kidney, eye, lung, and neurological conditions. In this work, we propose a generic and unified convolution neural network for the segmentation of curvilinear structures and illustrate in several 2D/3D medical imaging modalities. We introduce a new curvilinear structure segmentation network (CS2-Net), which includes a self-attention mechanism in the encoder and decoder to learn rich hierarchical representations of curvilinear structures. Two types of attention modules - spatial attention and channel attention - are utilized to enhance the inter-class discrimination and intra-class responsiveness, to further integrate local features with their global dependencies and normalization, adaptively. Furthermore, to facilitate the segmentation of curvilinear structures in medical images, we employ a 1x3 and a 3x1 convolutional kernel to capture boundary features. ... 从医学和生物医学图像中自动检测曲线结构（例如血管或神经纤维）是与许多疾病管理相关的自动图像解释的关键早期步骤。精确测量这些曲线器官结构的形态变化可以帮助临床医生了解例如疾病的机制、诊断和治疗。心血管、肾脏、眼睛、肺和神经系统疾病。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于曲线结构分割的通用且统一的卷积神经网络，并在几种 2D/3D 医学成像模式中进行了说明。我们引入了一种新的曲线结构分割网络（CS2-Net），其中包括编码器和解码器中的自注意力机制，以学习曲线结构的丰富层次表示。利用两种类型的注意力模块——空间注意力和通道注意力——来增强类间区分和类内响应性，以进一步自适应地将局部特征与其全局依赖性和归一化相结合。此外，为了促进医学图像中曲线结构的分割，我们采用 1x3 和 3x1 卷积核来捕获边界特征。 ... 本文提出了一种名为CS2-Net的深度学习网络，用于医学影像中曲线条结构（如血管、神经纤维）的分割。 Lei Mou,Yitian Zhao,Huazhu Fu,Yonghuai Liu,Jun Cheng,Yalin Zheng,Pan Su,Jianlong Yang,Li Chen,Alejandro F Frang,Masahiro Akiba,Jiang Liu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Jia Guo,Minghao Chen,Yao Hu,Chen Zhu,Xiaofei He,Deng Cai
title: Reducing the Teacher-Student Gap via Spherical Knowledge Disitllation
title_zh: 通过球形知识蒸馏缩小师生差距
abstract: Knowledge distillation aims at obtaining a compact and effective model by learning the mapping function from a much larger one. Due to the limited capacity of the student, the student would underfit the teacher. Therefore, student performance would unexpectedly drop when distilling from an oversized teacher, termed the capacity gap problem. We investigate this problem by study the gap of confidence between teacher and student. We find that the magnitude of confidence is not necessary for knowledge distillation and could harm the student performance if the student are forced to learn confidence. We propose Spherical Knowledge Distillation to eliminate this gap explicitly, which eases the underfitting problem. We find this novel knowledge representation can improve compact models with much larger teachers and is robust to temperature. We conducted experiments on both CIFAR100 and ImageNet, and achieve significant improvement. Specifically, we train ResNet18 to 73.0 accuracy, which is a substantial improvement over previous SOTA and is on par with resnet34 almost twice the student size. The implementation has been shared at https://github.com/forjiuzhou/Spherical-Knowledge-Distillation.
summary: Knowledge distillation aims at obtaining a compact and effective model by learning the mapping function from a much larger one. Due to the limited capacity of the student, the student would underfit the teacher. Therefore, student performance would unexpectedly drop when distilling from an oversized teacher, termed the capacity gap problem. We investigate this problem by study the gap of confidence between teacher and student. We find that the magnitude of confidence is not necessary for knowledge distillation and could harm the student performance if the student are forced to learn confidence. We propose Spherical Knowledge Distillation to eliminate this gap explicitly, which eases the underfitting problem. We find this novel knowledge representation can improve compact models with much larger teachers and is robust to temperature. We conducted experiments on both CIFAR100 and ImageNet, and achieve significant improvement. Specifically, we train ResNet18 to 73.0 accuracy, which is a substantial improvement over previous SOTA and is on par with resnet34 almost twice the student size. The implementation has been shared at https://github.com/forjiuzhou/Spherical-Knowledge-Distillation.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏的目的是通过从更大的模型中学习映射函数来获得紧凑且有效的模型。由于学生的能力有限，学生可能不适合老师。因此，当从规模过大的老师那里提炼出来时，学生的成绩会出乎意料地下降，这被称为能力差距问题。我们通过研究教师和学生之间的信任差距来调查这个问题。我们发现，信心的大小对于知识提炼来说并不是必需的，如果学生被迫学习信心，可能会损害学生的表现。我们提出球形知识蒸馏来明确消除这种差距，从而缓解欠拟合问题。我们发现这种新颖的知识表示可以改进具有更大教师的紧凑模型，并且对温度具有鲁棒性。我们在CIFAR100和ImageNet上都进行了实验，并取得了显着的改进。具体来说，我们将 ResNet18 训练到 73.0 的准确度，这比之前的 SOTA 有了实质性的改进，并且与 resnet34 相当，几乎是学生规模的两倍。该实现已在 https://github.com/forjiuzhou/Spherical-Knowledge-Distillation 上共享。

AI.tldr: 本文提出球形知识蒸馏方法，通过缩小教师模型与学生模型间的置信度差距，解决知识蒸馏中的容量差距问题。
AI.motivation: 学生模型因容量限制在知识蒸馏中易出现欠拟合，传统方法强制学习教师模型的置信度可能损害学生性能，需探索新的知识表示方式。
AI.method: 设计球形知识蒸馏框架，显式消除教师与学生置信度差距，采用新型知识表示形式并增强对温度参数的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR100和ImageNet数据集上，ResNet18达到73.0%准确率，超越此前最优方法且接近两倍参数量的ResNet34性能。
AI.conclusion: 球形知识蒸馏有效缓解容量差距问题，显著提升紧凑模型性能，方法具有温度鲁棒性且代码已开源。

title: Locomotion Design for an Internally Actuated Cubic Robot for Exploration of Low Gravity Bodies in the Solar System
title_zh: 用于探索太阳系低重力天体的内部驱动立方机器人的运动设计
abstract: The exploration of asteroids and comets is important in the quest for the formation of the Solar System and it is an important step for human space travel. Moving on the surface of asteroids is challenging for future robotic explorers due to the weak gravity force. In this research, an approach that is based on a new kind of jumping rovers is presented. This robotic platform has internal masses and by spinning up these flywheels and suddenly stopping them, it is feasible to perform a hop from a few meters up to hundreds of meters. In contrast to related works where robotic explorers usually stop a flywheel instantaneously, the INAHOPPER prototype takes advantage of on stopping a flywheel by voltage inversion in a short lapse to modify the launch angle, a very useful action over terrains with different degrees of inclination. This article discusses, first, the dynamics of the rover for a 2D model, second, the control algorithm executed in the prototype for braking the flywheel, and third, the analysis of the performance of the flywheel to make simulations of the trajectories over an asteroid.
summary: The exploration of asteroids and comets is important in the quest for the formation of the Solar System and it is an important step for human space travel. Moving on the surface of asteroids is challenging for future robotic explorers due to the weak gravity force. In this research, an approach that is based on a new kind of jumping rovers is presented. This robotic platform has internal masses and by spinning up these flywheels and suddenly stopping them, it is feasible to perform a hop from a few meters up to hundreds of meters. In contrast to related works where robotic explorers usually stop a flywheel instantaneously, the INAHOPPER prototype takes advantage of on stopping a flywheel by voltage inversion in a short lapse to modify the launch angle, a very useful action over terrains with different degrees of inclination. This article discusses, first, the dynamics of the rover for a 2D model, second, the control algorithm executed in the prototype for braking the flywheel, and third, the analysis of the performance of the flywheel to make simulations of the trajectories over an asteroid.
abstract_zh: 小行星和彗星的探索对于探索太阳系的形成具有重要意义，也是人类太空旅行的重要一步。由于重力较弱，在小行星表面移动对于未来的机器人探索者来说是一项挑战。在这项研究中，提出了一种基于新型跳跃漫游车的方法。该机器人平台具有内部质量，通过旋转这些飞轮并突然停止它们，可以执行从几米到数百米的跳跃。与机器人探索者通常立即停止飞轮的相关工作相比，INAHOPPER原型利用在短时间内通过电压反转来停止飞轮来修改发射角度，这对于不同倾斜度的地形来说是非常有用的动作。本文首先讨论二维模型的漫游车动力学，其次讨论原型中执行的用于制动飞轮的控制算法，第三讨论飞轮的性能分析以模拟小行星上空的轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型内部驱动立方机器人设计，用于探索太阳系低重力天体表面。
AI.motivation: 小行星和彗星的探索对理解太阳系形成及人类太空旅行至关重要，但弱重力环境下的移动极具挑战性。
AI.method: 通过内部飞轮的加速与瞬时制动产生跳跃动力，利用电压反转技术调节制动时机以控制跳跃角度，并建立二维动力学模型与控制算法进行轨迹仿真。
AI.result: 验证了飞轮制动控制算法的有效性，实现了数米至数百米的跳跃距离，并通过仿真分析了不同倾斜地形下的运动性能。
AI.conclusion: 该设计通过精确控制飞轮制动实现了低重力环境下适应复杂地形的跳跃移动，为未来天体探索提供了新型机器人方案。

search_text: Locomotion Design for an Internally Actuated Cubic Robot for Exploration of Low Gravity Bodies in the Solar System 用于探索太阳系低重力天体的内部驱动立方机器人的运动设计 The exploration of asteroids and comets is important in the quest for the formation of the Solar System and it is an important step for human space travel. Moving on the surface of asteroids is challenging for future robotic explorers due to the weak gravity force. In this research, an approach that is based on a new kind of jumping rovers is presented. This robotic platform has internal masses and by spinning up these flywheels and suddenly stopping them, it is feasible to perform a hop from a few meters up to hundreds of meters. In contrast to related works where robotic explorers usually stop a flywheel instantaneously, the INAHOPPER prototype takes advantage of on stopping a flywheel by voltage inversion in a short lapse to modify the launch angle, a very useful action over terrains with different degrees of inclination. This article discusses, first, the dynamics of the rover for a 2D model, second, the control algorithm executed in the prototype for braking the flywheel, and third, the analysis of the performance of the flywheel to make simulations of the trajectories over an asteroid. 小行星和彗星的探索对于探索太阳系的形成具有重要意义，也是人类太空旅行的重要一步。由于重力较弱，在小行星表面移动对于未来的机器人探索者来说是一项挑战。在这项研究中，提出了一种基于新型跳跃漫游车的方法。该机器人平台具有内部质量，通过旋转这些飞轮并突然停止它们，可以执行从几米到数百米的跳跃。与机器人探索者通常立即停止飞轮的相关工作相比，INAHOPPER原型利用在短时间内通过电压反转来停止飞轮来修改发射角度，这对于不同倾斜度的地形来说是非常有用的动作。本文首先讨论二维模型的漫游车动力学，其次讨论原型中执行的用于制动飞轮的控制算法，第三讨论飞轮的性能分析以模拟小行星上空的轨迹。 本文提出一种新型内部驱动立方机器人设计，用于探索太阳系低重力天体表面。 Alvaro Bátrez,Gustavo Rodriguez-Gomez,Angélica Muñoz-Meléndez cs.RO,eess.SY

title: Auto-STGCN: Autonomous Spatial-Temporal Graph Convolutional Network Search Based on Reinforcement Learning and Existing Research Results
title_zh: Auto-STGCN：基于强化学习和现有研究成果的自主时空图卷积网络搜索
abstract: In recent years, many spatial-temporal graph convolutional network (STGCN) models are proposed to deal with the spatial-temporal network data forecasting problem. These STGCN models have their own advantages, i.e., each of them puts forward many effective operations and achieves good prediction results in the real applications. If users can effectively utilize and combine these excellent operations integrating the advantages of existing models, then they may obtain more effective STGCN models thus create greater value using existing work. However, they fail to do so due to the lack of domain knowledge, and there is lack of automated system to help users to achieve this goal. In this paper, we fill this gap and propose Auto-STGCN algorithm, which makes use of existing models to automatically explore high-performance STGCN model for specific scenarios. Specifically, we design Unified-STGCN framework, which summarizes the operations of existing architectures, and use parameters to control the usage and characteristic attributes of each operation, so as to realize the parameterized representation of the STGCN architecture and the reorganization and fusion of advantages. Then, we present Auto-STGCN, an optimization method based on reinforcement learning, to quickly search the parameter search space provided by Unified-STGCN, and generate optimal STGCN models automatically. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmark datasets show that our Auto-STGCN can find STGCN models superior to existing STGCN models with heuristic parameters, which demonstrates the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: In recent years, many spatial-temporal graph convolutional network (STGCN) models are proposed to deal with the spatial-temporal network data forecasting problem. These STGCN models have their own advantages, i.e., each of them puts forward many effective operations and achieves good prediction results in the real applications. If users can effectively utilize and combine these excellent operations integrating the advantages of existing models, then they may obtain more effective STGCN models thus create greater value using existing work. However, they fail to do so due to the lack of domain knowledge, and there is lack of automated system to help users to achieve this goal. In this paper, we fill this gap and propose Auto-STGCN algorithm, which makes use of existing models to automatically explore high-performance STGCN model for specific scenarios. Specifically, we design Unified-STGCN framework, which summarizes the operations of existing architectures, and use parameters to control the usage and characteristic attributes of each operation, so as to realize the parameterized representation of the STGCN architecture and the reorganization and fusion of advantages. Then, we present Auto-STGCN, an optimization method based on reinforcement learning, to quickly search the parameter search space provided by Unified-STGCN, and generate optimal STGCN models automatically. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmark datasets show that our Auto-STGCN can find STGCN models superior to existing STGCN models with heuristic parameters, which demonstrates the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 近年来，提出了许多时空图卷积网络（STGCN）模型来处理时空网络数据预测问题。这些STGCN模型都有各自的优点，即各自​​提出了许多有效的操作，并在实际应用中取得了良好的预测结果。如果用户能够有效地利用和组合这些融合现有模型优点的优秀操作，那么就可以获得更有效的STGCN模型，从而利用现有工作创造更大的价值。然而，由于缺乏领域知识，并且缺乏自动化系统来帮助用户实现这一目标，他们未能做到这一点。在本文中，我们填补了这一空白，提出了 Auto-STGCN 算法，该算法利用现有模型自动探索针对特定场景的高性能 STGCN 模型。具体来说，我们设计了Unified-STGCN框架，该框架总结了现有架构的操作，并使用参数来控制每个操作的用途和特征属性，从而实现STGCN架构的参数化表示和优势的重组和融合。然后，我们提出了一种基于强化学习的优化方法Auto-STGCN，可以快速搜索Unified-STGCN提供的参数搜索空间，并自动生成最优的STGCN模型。对真实世界基准数据集的大量实验表明，我们的 Auto-STGCN 可以找到优于具有启发式参数的现有 STGCN 模型的 STGCN 模型，这证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Auto-STGCN算法，通过强化学习自动搜索并生成针对特定场景的高性能时空图卷积网络模型。
AI.motivation: 现有STGCN模型虽各有优势，但缺乏有效整合不同模型操作的自动化系统，导致无法充分发挥现有研究成果的潜力。
AI.method: 设计统一的STGCN框架参数化表示网络结构，结合强化学习优化方法在参数空间中搜索最优模型架构。
AI.result: 在真实基准数据集上的实验表明，Auto-STGCN生成的模型性能优于现有手动设计的STGCN模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的自动化方法能有效整合现有模型优势，为构建高性能时空预测模型提供了新思路。

title: Unsupervised Self-training Algorithm Based on Deep Learning for Optical Aerial Images Change Detection
title_zh: 基于深度学习的光学航拍图像变化检测无监督自训练算法
abstract: Optical aerial images change detection is an important task in earth observation and has been extensively investigated in the past few decades. Generally, the supervised change detection methods with superior performance require a large amount of labeled training data which is obtained by manual annotation with high cost. In this paper, we present a novel unsupervised self-training algorithm (USTA) for optical aerial images change detection. The traditional method such as change vector analysis is used to generate the pseudo labels. We use these pseudo labels to train a well designed convolutional neural network. The network is used as a teacher to classify the original multitemporal images to generate another set of pseudo labels. Then two set of pseudo labels are used to jointly train a student network with the same structure as the teacher. The final change detection result can be obtained by the trained student network. Besides, we design an image filter to control the usage of change information in the pseudo labels in the training process of the network. The whole process of the algorithm is an unsupervised process without manually marked labels. Experimental results on the real datasets demonstrate competitive performance of our proposed method.
summary: Optical aerial images change detection is an important task in earth observation and has been extensively investigated in the past few decades. Generally, the supervised change detection methods with superior performance require a large amount of labeled training data which is obtained by manual annotation with high cost. In this paper, we present a novel unsupervised self-training algorithm (USTA) for optical aerial images change detection. The traditional method such as change vector analysis is used to generate the pseudo labels. We use these pseudo labels to train a well designed convolutional neural network. The network is used as a teacher to classify the original multitemporal images to generate another set of pseudo labels. Then two set of pseudo labels are used to jointly train a student network with the same structure as the teacher. The final change detection result can be obtained by the trained student network. Besides, we design an image filter to control the usage of change information in the pseudo labels in the training process of the network. The whole process of the algorithm is an unsupervised process without manually marked labels. Experimental results on the real datasets demonstrate competitive performance of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 光学航空图像变化检测是对地观测的一项重要任务，在过去几十年中得到了广泛的研究。一般来说，性能优越的有监督变化检测方法需要大量的标记训练数据，这些数据是通过人工标注获得的，成本很高。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于光学航空图像变化检测的新型无监督自训练算法（USTA）。使用变化向量分析等传统方法来生成伪标签。我们使用这些伪标签来训练设计良好的卷积神经网络。该网络用作教师对原始多时相图像进行分类，以生成另一组伪标签。然后使用两组伪标签联合训练与教师结构相同的学生网络。最终的变化检测结果可以通过训练好的学生网络得到。此外，我们设计了一个图像过滤器来控制网络训练过程中伪标签中变化信息的使用。算法的整个过程是一个无监督的过程，没有人工标记标签。真实数据集的实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的无监督自训练算法，用于光学航空图像的变化检测。
AI.motivation: 传统的监督变化检测方法需要大量人工标注的训练数据，成本较高，因此本文旨在提出一种无需人工标注的无监督方法。
AI.method: 本文采用传统方法生成伪标签，并利用这些伪标签训练卷积神经网络。然后，使用训练好的网络作为教师模型生成另一组伪标签，并与第一组伪标签联合训练一个学生网络。此外，设计了一个图像滤波器以控制伪标签中变化信息的使用。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在真实数据集上表现出具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的无监督自训练算法能够在无需人工标注的情况下实现光学航空图像变化检测，并取得了良好的效果。

authors_text: Juntang Zhuang,Tommy Tang,Yifan Ding,Sekhar Tatikonda,Nicha Dvornek,Xenophon Papademetris,James S. Duncan
title: AdaBelief Optimizer: Adapting Stepsizes by the Belief in Observed Gradients
title_zh: AdaBelief 优化器：通过观察梯度的信念来调整步长
abstract: Most popular optimizers for deep learning can be broadly categorized as adaptive methods (e.g. Adam) and accelerated schemes (e.g. stochastic gradient descent (SGD) with momentum). For many models such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs), adaptive methods typically converge faster but generalize worse compared to SGD; for complex settings such as generative adversarial networks (GANs), adaptive methods are typically the default because of their stability.We propose AdaBelief to simultaneously achieve three goals: fast convergence as in adaptive methods, good generalization as in SGD, and training stability. The intuition for AdaBelief is to adapt the stepsize according to the "belief" in the current gradient direction. Viewing the exponential moving average (EMA) of the noisy gradient as the prediction of the gradient at the next time step, if the observed gradient greatly deviates from the prediction, we distrust the current observation and take a small step; if the observed gradient is close to the prediction, we trust it and take a large step. We validate AdaBelief in extensive experiments, showing that it outperforms other methods with fast convergence and high accuracy on image classification and language modeling. Specifically, on ImageNet, AdaBelief achieves comparable accuracy to SGD. Furthermore, in the training of a GAN on Cifar10, AdaBelief demonstrates high stability and improves the quality of generated samples compared to a well-tuned Adam optimizer. Code is available at https://github.com/juntang-zhuang/Adabelief-Optimizer
summary: Most popular optimizers for deep learning can be broadly categorized as adaptive methods (e.g. Adam) and accelerated schemes (e.g. stochastic gradient descent (SGD) with momentum). For many models such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs), adaptive methods typically converge faster but generalize worse compared to SGD; for complex settings such as generative adversarial networks (GANs), adaptive methods are typically the default because of their stability.We propose AdaBelief to simultaneously achieve three goals: fast convergence as in adaptive methods, good generalization as in SGD, and training stability. The intuition for AdaBelief is to adapt the stepsize according to the "belief" in the current gradient direction. Viewing the exponential moving average (EMA) of the noisy gradient as the prediction of the gradient at the next time step, if the observed gradient greatly deviates from the prediction, we distrust the current observation and take a small step; if the observed gradient is close to the prediction, we trust it and take a large step. We validate AdaBelief in extensive experiments, showing that it outperforms other methods with fast convergence and high accuracy on image classification and language modeling. Specifically, on ImageNet, AdaBelief achieves comparable accuracy to SGD. Furthermore, in the training of a GAN on Cifar10, AdaBelief demonstrates high stability and improves the quality of generated samples compared to a well-tuned Adam optimizer. Code is available at https://github.com/juntang-zhuang/Adabelief-Optimizer
abstract_zh: 最流行的深度学习优化器可以大致分为自适应方法（例如 Adam）和加速方案（例如带有动量的随机梯度下降（SGD））。对于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 等许多模型来说，与 SGD 相比，自适应方法通常收敛速度更快，但泛化能力较差；对于诸如生成对抗网络（GAN）之类的复杂设置，自适应方法通常是默认的，因为它们具有稳定性。我们提出 AdaBelief 来同时实现三个目标：自适应方法中的快速收敛、SGD 中的良好泛化以及训练稳定性。 AdaBelief 的直觉是根据当前梯度方向的“信念”来调整步长。将噪声梯度的指数移动平均（EMA）视为对下一个时间步的梯度的预测，如果观测到的梯度与预测相差很大，我们不信任当前的观测并采取一小步；如果观察到的梯度接近预测，我们就会相信它并迈出一大步。我们在大量实验中验证了 AdaBelief，表明它在图像分类和语言建模方面具有快速收敛和高精度，优于其他方法。具体来说，在 ImageNet 上，AdaBelief 达到了与 SGD 相当的精度。此外，在 Cifar10 上训练 GAN 时，与经过良好调整的 Adam 优化器相比，AdaBelief 表现出较高的稳定性并提高了生成样本的质量。代码可在 https://github.com/juntang-zhuang/Adabelief-Optimizer 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaBelief优化器，旨在结合自适应方法的快速收敛、SGD的良好泛化能力和训练稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应优化器（如Adam）在CNN等模型上收敛快但泛化差，而SGD在复杂场景（如GAN）中稳定性不足，需设计兼顾三者的优化器。
AI.method: 通过梯度方向的置信度动态调整步长，利用指数移动平均（EMA）预测下一时刻梯度，若观测梯度与预测偏差大则缩小步长，反之则放大步长。
AI.result: 实验表明AdaBelief在图像分类和语言建模任务中优于其他方法，在ImageNet上达到与SGD相当的精度，且在Cifar10 GAN训练中展现更高稳定性。
AI.conclusion: AdaBelief有效融合自适应方法与SGD优势，为不同深度学习任务提供稳定且高效的优化方案。
