title: Human-guided Robot Behavior Learning: A GAN-assisted Preference-based Reinforcement Learning Approach
title_zh: 人类引导的机器人行为学习：一种基于 GAN 辅助的基于偏好的强化学习方法
abstract: Human demonstrations can provide trustful samples to train reinforcement learning algorithms for robots to learn complex behaviors in real-world environments. However, obtaining sufficient demonstrations may be impractical because many behaviors are difficult for humans to demonstrate. A more practical approach is to replace human demonstrations by human queries, i.e., preference-based reinforcement learning. One key limitation of the existing algorithms is the need for a significant amount of human queries because a large number of labeled data is needed to train neural networks for the approximation of a continuous, high-dimensional reward function. To reduce and minimize the need for human queries, we propose a new GAN-assisted human preference-based reinforcement learning approach that uses a generative adversarial network (GAN) to actively learn human preferences and then replace the role of human in assigning preferences. The adversarial neural network is simple and only has a binary output, hence requiring much less human queries to train. Moreover, a maximum entropy based reinforcement learning algorithm is designed to shape the loss towards the desired regions or away from the undesired regions. To show the effectiveness of the proposed approach, we present some studies on complex robotic tasks without access to the environment reward in a typical MuJoCo robot locomotion environment. The obtained results show our method can achieve a reduction of about 99.8% human time without performance sacrifice.
summary: Human demonstrations can provide trustful samples to train reinforcement learning algorithms for robots to learn complex behaviors in real-world environments. However, obtaining sufficient demonstrations may be impractical because many behaviors are difficult for humans to demonstrate. A more practical approach is to replace human demonstrations by human queries, i.e., preference-based reinforcement learning. One key limitation of the existing algorithms is the need for a significant amount of human queries because a large number of labeled data is needed to train neural networks for the approximation of a continuous, high-dimensional reward function. To reduce and minimize the need for human queries, we propose a new GAN-assisted human preference-based reinforcement learning approach that uses a generative adversarial network (GAN) to actively learn human preferences and then replace the role of human in assigning preferences. The adversarial neural network is simple and only has a binary output, hence requiring much less human queries to train. Moreover, a maximum entropy based reinforcement learning algorithm is designed to shape the loss towards the desired regions or away from the undesired regions. To show the effectiveness of the proposed approach, we present some studies on complex robotic tasks without access to the environment reward in a typical MuJoCo robot locomotion environment. The obtained results show our method can achieve a reduction of about 99.8% human time without performance sacrifice.
abstract_zh: 人类演示可以提供可信的样本来训练机器人的强化学习算法，以学习现实环境中的复杂行为。然而，获得足够的演示可能是不切实际的，因为许多行为对于人类来说很难演示。一种更实用的方法是用人类查询代替人类演示，即基于偏好的强化学习。现有算法的一个关键限制是需要大量的人工查询，因为需要大量标记数据来训练神经网络以逼近连续的高维奖励函数。为了减少和最小化对人类查询的需求，我们提出了一种新的 GAN 辅助的基于人类偏好的强化学习方法，该方法使用生成对抗网络（GAN）主动学习人类偏好，然后取代人类在分配偏好中的角色。对抗性神经网络很简单，只有二进制输出，因此需要更少的人工查询来训练。此外，基于最大熵的强化学习算法被设计为将损失调整为朝向所需区域或远离不需要的区域。为了证明所提出方法的有效性，我们对典型 MuJoCo 机器人运动环境中无法获得环境奖励的复杂机器人任务进行了一些研究。获得的结果表明，我们的方法可以在不牺牲性能的情况下减少约 99.8% 的人工时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合生成对抗网络（GAN）的基于人类偏好的强化学习方法，以减少机器人学习复杂行为时对人类演示的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统基于人类演示的强化学习需要大量人工样本，而基于偏好的强化学习虽用人类查询替代演示，但仍需大量标注数据训练奖励函数，效率低下。
AI.method: 利用GAN主动学习人类偏好，通过对抗网络的二元输出减少查询需求，并结合最大熵强化学习算法优化奖励函数，引导智能体向目标区域学习。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo机器人运动环境中，该方法在无需环境奖励的情况下，将人类交互时间减少约99.8%且保持性能。
AI.conclusion: GAN辅助的偏好强化学习有效降低了人类参与成本，为复杂机器人任务的高效学习提供了可行方案。

title: Multi-label Few/Zero-shot Learning with Knowledge Aggregated from Multiple Label Graphs
title_zh: 利用多标签图聚合知识进行多标签少样本/零样本学习
abstract: Few/Zero-shot learning is a big challenge of many classifications tasks, where a classifier is required to recognise instances of classes that have very few or even no training samples. It becomes more difficult in multi-label classification, where each instance is labelled with more than one class. In this paper, we present a simple multi-graph aggregation model that fuses knowledge from multiple label graphs encoding different semantic label relationships in order to study how the aggregated knowledge can benefit multi-label zero/few-shot document classification. The model utilises three kinds of semantic information, i.e., the pre-trained word embeddings, label description, and pre-defined label relations. Experimental results derived on two large clinical datasets (i.e., MIMIC-II and MIMIC-III) and the EU legislation dataset show that methods equipped with the multi-graph knowledge aggregation achieve significant performance improvement across almost all the measures on few/zero-shot labels.
summary: Few/Zero-shot learning is a big challenge of many classifications tasks, where a classifier is required to recognise instances of classes that have very few or even no training samples. It becomes more difficult in multi-label classification, where each instance is labelled with more than one class. In this paper, we present a simple multi-graph aggregation model that fuses knowledge from multiple label graphs encoding different semantic label relationships in order to study how the aggregated knowledge can benefit multi-label zero/few-shot document classification. The model utilises three kinds of semantic information, i.e., the pre-trained word embeddings, label description, and pre-defined label relations. Experimental results derived on two large clinical datasets (i.e., MIMIC-II and MIMIC-III) and the EU legislation dataset show that methods equipped with the multi-graph knowledge aggregation achieve significant performance improvement across almost all the measures on few/zero-shot labels.
abstract_zh: 少样本/零样本学习是许多分类任务的一大挑战，其中分类器需要识别训练样本很少甚至没有训练样本的类实例。在多标签分类中，它变得更加困难，其中每个实例都被标记为多个类别。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单的多图聚合模型，该模型融合了编码不同语义标签关系的多个标签图的知识，以研究聚合的​​知识如何有利于多标签零/少样本文档分类。该模型利用三种语义信息，即预训练的词嵌入、标签描述和预定义的标签关系。基于两个大型临床数据集（即 MIMIC-II 和 MIMIC-III）和欧盟立法数据集得出的实验结果表明，配备多图知识聚合的方法在很少/零样本标签上的几乎所有度量上都实现了显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多标签图知识聚合的多标签少样本/零样本学习方法，用于改进文档分类性能。
AI.motivation: 多标签分类中，当某些类别样本极少或缺失时，传统方法难以有效利用标签间的语义关系进行预测。
AI.method: 构建多图聚合模型，融合预训练词嵌入、标签描述及预定义标签关系三种语义信息，通过图结构编码标签关联性。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-II/MIMIC-III临床数据集和欧盟法规数据集上，该方法在少样本/零样本场景下显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 多标签图知识聚合能有效提升多标签少样本/零样本学习的性能，尤其适用于医疗文本等数据稀缺领域。

search_text: Multi-label Few/Zero-shot Learning with Knowledge Aggregated from Multiple Label Graphs 利用多标签图聚合知识进行多标签少样本/零样本学习 Few/Zero-shot learning is a big challenge of many classifications tasks, where a classifier is required to recognise instances of classes that have very few or even no training samples. It becomes more difficult in multi-label classification, where each instance is labelled with more than one class. In this paper, we present a simple multi-graph aggregation model that fuses knowledge from multiple label graphs encoding different semantic label relationships in order to study how the aggregated knowledge can benefit multi-label zero/few-shot document classification. The model utilises three kinds of semantic information, i.e., the pre-trained word embeddings, label description, and pre-defined label relations. Experimental results derived on two large clinical datasets (i.e., MIMIC-II and MIMIC-III) and the EU legislation dataset show that methods equipped with the multi-graph knowledge aggregation achieve significant performance improvement across almost all the measures on few/zero-shot labels. 少样本/零样本学习是许多分类任务的一大挑战，其中分类器需要识别训练样本很少甚至没有训练样本的类实例。在多标签分类中，它变得更加困难，其中每个实例都被标记为多个类别。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单的多图聚合模型，该模型融合了编码不同语义标签关系的多个标签图的知识，以研究聚合的​​知识如何有利于多标签零/少样本文档分类。该模型利用三种语义信息，即预训练的词嵌入、标签描述和预定义的标签关系。基于两个大型临床数据集（即 MIMIC-II 和 MIMIC-III）和欧盟立法数据集得出的实验结果表明，配备多图知识聚合的方法在很少/零样本标签上的几乎所有度量上都实现了显着的性能改进。 本文提出一种基于多标签图知识聚合的多标签少样本/零样本学习方法，用于改进文档分类性能。 Jueqing Lu,Lan Du,Ming Liu,Joanna Dipnall cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Razieh Nabi,Joel Pfeiffer,Murat Ali Bayir,Denis Charles,Emre Kıcıman
title: Causal Inference in the Presence of Interference in Sponsored Search Advertising
title_zh: 赞助搜索广告中存在干扰的因果推断
comment: ef:Special issue on Causal Inference and Machine Learning with Network Data, Frontiers in Big Data, 2022
comments: ef:Special issue on Causal Inference and Machine Learning with Network Data, Frontiers in Big Data, 2022
abstract: In classical causal inference, inferring cause-effect relations from data relies on the assumption that units are independent and identically distributed. This assumption is violated in settings where units are related through a network of dependencies. An example of such a setting is ad placement in sponsored search advertising, where the clickability of a particular ad is potentially influenced by where it is placed and where other ads are placed on the search result page. In such scenarios, confounding arises due to not only the individual ad-level covariates but also the placements and covariates of other ads in the system. In this paper, we leverage the language of causal inference in the presence of interference to model interactions among the ads. Quantification of such interactions allows us to better understand the click behavior of users, which in turn impacts the revenue of the host search engine and enhances user satisfaction. We illustrate the utility of our formalization through experiments carried out on the ad placement system of the Bing search engine.
summary: In classical causal inference, inferring cause-effect relations from data relies on the assumption that units are independent and identically distributed. This assumption is violated in settings where units are related through a network of dependencies. An example of such a setting is ad placement in sponsored search advertising, where the clickability of a particular ad is potentially influenced by where it is placed and where other ads are placed on the search result page. In such scenarios, confounding arises due to not only the individual ad-level covariates but also the placements and covariates of other ads in the system. In this paper, we leverage the language of causal inference in the presence of interference to model interactions among the ads. Quantification of such interactions allows us to better understand the click behavior of users, which in turn impacts the revenue of the host search engine and enhances user satisfaction. We illustrate the utility of our formalization through experiments carried out on the ad placement system of the Bing search engine.
abstract_zh: 在经典因果推理中，从数据推断因果关系依赖于单位独立且同分布的假设。在单位通过依赖网络关联的设置中，这一假设被违反。这种设置的一个示例是赞助搜索广告中的广告放置，其中特定广告的可点击性可能受到其放置位置以及其他广告在搜索结果页面上放置位置的影响。在这种情况下，不仅会由于各个广告级别的协变量而产生混淆，而且还会因系统中其他广告的展示位置和协变量而产生混淆。在本文中，我们在存在干扰的情况下利用因果推理语言来对广告之间的交互进行建模。此类交互的量化使我们能够更好地了解用户的点击行为，进而影响托管搜索引擎的收入并提高用户满意度。我们通过在 Bing 搜索引擎的广告投放系统上进行的实验来说明我们的形式化的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在赞助搜索广告场景下，存在广告间相互干扰时的因果推断问题，旨在量化广告位置及相互作用对用户点击行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统因果推断假设数据独立同分布，但广告点击行为受广告位置及竞品广告布局影响，导致混淆因素复杂化，需突破独立性假设以提升效果评估准确性。
AI.method: 采用存在干扰的因果推理框架，构建考虑广告位置关系及相互作用的模型，通过量化广告间干扰效应分析用户点击行为的因果关系。
AI.result: 在必应广告系统实验中验证了方法有效性，证明该模型能更精准刻画广告间干扰效应，从而提升搜索引擎收益与用户满意度。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模广告干扰效应，本文提出的因果推理方法可更准确评估广告效果，为搜索引擎优化广告布局提供了理论支持与实践价值。

title: Dynamic Walking: Toward Agile and Efficient Bipedal Robots
title_zh: 动态行走：迈向敏捷高效的双足机器人
comment: To appear in the Annual Review of Control, Robotics, and Autonomous Systems
comments: To appear in the Annual Review of Control, Robotics, and Autonomous Systems
abstract: Dynamic walking on bipedal robots has evolved from an idea in science fiction to a practical reality. This is due to continued progress in three key areas: a mathematical understanding of locomotion, the computational ability to encode this mathematics through optimization, and the hardware capable of realizing this understanding in practice. In this context, this review article outlines the end-to-end process of methods which have proven effective in the literature for achieving dynamic walking on bipedal robots. We begin by introducing mathematical models of locomotion, from reduced order models that capture essential walking behaviors to hybrid dynamical systems that encode the full order continuous dynamics along with discrete footstrike dynamics. These models form the basis for gait generation via (nonlinear) optimization problems. Finally, models and their generated gaits merge in the context of real-time control, wherein walking behaviors are translated to hardware. The concepts presented are illustrated throughout in simulation, and experimental instantiation on multiple walking platforms are highlighted to demonstrate the ability to realize dynamic walking on bipedal robots that is agile and efficient.
summary: Dynamic walking on bipedal robots has evolved from an idea in science fiction to a practical reality. This is due to continued progress in three key areas: a mathematical understanding of locomotion, the computational ability to encode this mathematics through optimization, and the hardware capable of realizing this understanding in practice. In this context, this review article outlines the end-to-end process of methods which have proven effective in the literature for achieving dynamic walking on bipedal robots. We begin by introducing mathematical models of locomotion, from reduced order models that capture essential walking behaviors to hybrid dynamical systems that encode the full order continuous dynamics along with discrete footstrike dynamics. These models form the basis for gait generation via (nonlinear) optimization problems. Finally, models and their generated gaits merge in the context of real-time control, wherein walking behaviors are translated to hardware. The concepts presented are illustrated throughout in simulation, and experimental instantiation on multiple walking platforms are highlighted to demonstrate the ability to realize dynamic walking on bipedal robots that is agile and efficient.
abstract_zh: 双足机器人的动态行走已经从科幻小说中的想法演变为现实。这是由于三个关键领域的持续进步：对运动的数学理解、通过优化对数学进行编码的计算能力以及能够在实践中实现这种理解的硬件。在这种背景下，这篇评论文章概述了文献中已证明可有效实现双足机器人动态行走的方法的端到端过程。我们首先介绍运动的数学模型，从捕获基本行走行为的降阶模型到编码全阶连续动力学和离散足部撞击动力学的混合动力系统。这些模型构成了通过（非线性）优化问题生成步态的基础。最后，模型及其生成的步态在实时控制的背景下融合，其中步行行为被转换为硬件。所提出的概念在整个仿真中得到了说明，并强调了多个行走平台上的实验实例，以展示在双足机器人上实现敏捷和高效的动态行走的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了实现双足机器人动态行走的有效方法，涵盖从数学建模到硬件实现的全流程。
AI.motivation: 动态行走技术的进步依赖于运动学数学理解、优化计算能力及硬件实现三方面的突破，旨在提升双足机器人的敏捷性与效率。
AI.method: 通过建立从简化模型到混合动力系统的数学模型，结合非线性优化生成步态，并在实时控制中映射至硬件平台。
AI.result: 通过仿真与多平台实验验证，证明了动态行走方法在双足机器人上的可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态行走的实现需数学模型、优化算法与硬件控制的深度融合，为未来敏捷双足机器人发展奠定基础。

motivation: 动态行走技术的进步依赖于运动学数学理解、优化计算能力及硬件实现三方面的突破，旨在提升双足机器人的敏捷性与效率。
method: 通过建立从简化模型到混合动力系统的数学模型，结合非线性优化生成步态，并在实时控制中映射至硬件平台。
result: 通过仿真与多平台实验验证，证明了动态行走方法在双足机器人上的可行性与有效性。
conclusion: 动态行走的实现需数学模型、优化算法与硬件控制的深度融合，为未来敏捷双足机器人发展奠定基础。
search_text: Dynamic Walking: Toward Agile and Efficient Bipedal Robots 动态行走：迈向敏捷高效的双足机器人 Dynamic walking on bipedal robots has evolved from an idea in science fiction to a practical reality. This is due to continued progress in three key areas: a mathematical understanding of locomotion, the computational ability to encode this mathematics through optimization, and the hardware capable of realizing this understanding in practice. In this context, this review article outlines the end-to-end process of methods which have proven effective in the literature for achieving dynamic walking on bipedal robots. We begin by introducing mathematical models of locomotion, from reduced order models that capture essential walking behaviors to hybrid dynamical systems that encode the full order continuous dynamics along with discrete footstrike dynamics. These models form the basis for gait generation via (nonlinear) optimization problems. Finally, models and their generated gaits merge in the context of real-time control, wherein walking behaviors are translated to hardware. The concepts presented are illustrated throughout in simulation, and experimental instantiation on multiple walking platforms are highlighted to demonstrate the ability to realize dynamic walking on bipedal robots that is agile and efficient. 双足机器人的动态行走已经从科幻小说中的想法演变为现实。这是由于三个关键领域的持续进步：对运动的数学理解、通过优化对数学进行编码的计算能力以及能够在实践中实现这种理解的硬件。在这种背景下，这篇评论文章概述了文献中已证明可有效实现双足机器人动态行走的方法的端到端过程。我们首先介绍运动的数学模型，从捕获基本行走行为的降阶模型到编码全阶连续动力学和离散足部撞击动力学的混合动力系统。这些模型构成了通过（非线性）优化问题生成步态的基础。最后，模型及其生成的步态在实时控制的背景下融合，其中步行行为被转换为硬件。所提出的概念在整个仿真中得到了说明，并强调了多个行走平台上的实验实例，以展示在双足机器人上实现敏捷和高效的动态行走的能力。 本文综述了实现双足机器人动态行走的有效方法，涵盖从数学建模到硬件实现的全流程。 Jenna Reher,Aaron D. Ames cs.RO

authors_text: Marianne Boyer,Antoine Frasie,Laurent Bouyer,Jean-Sébastien Roy,Isabelle Poitras,Alexandre Campeau-Lecours
title: Development and Validation of a Data Fusion Algorithm with Low-Cost Inertial Measurement Units to Analyze Shoulder Movements in Manual Workers
title_zh: 使用低成本惯性测量单元开发和验证数据融合算法，以分析体力劳动者的肩部运动
comment: ef:Rehabilitation Engineering and Assistive Technology Society of North America Conference (RESNA), 2020
comments: ef:Rehabilitation Engineering and Assistive Technology Society of North America Conference (RESNA), 2020
abstract: Work-related upper extremity musculoskeletal disorders (WRUED) are a major problem in modern societies as they affect the quality of life of workers and lead to absenteeism and productivity loss. According to studies performed in North America and Western Europe, their prevalence has increased in the last few decades. This challenge calls for improvements in prevention methods. One avenue is through the development of wearable sensor systems to analyze worker's movements and provide feedback to workers and/or clinicians. Such systems could decrease the physical work demands and ultimately prevent musculoskeletal disorders. This paper presents the development and validation of a data fusion algorithm for inertial measurement units to analyze worker's arm elevation. The algorithm was implemented on two commercial sensor systems (Actigraph GT9X and LSM9DS1) and results were compared with the data fusion results from a validated commercial sensor (XSens MVN system). Cross-correlation analyses [r], root-mean-square error (RMSE) and average absolute error of estimate were used to establish the construct validity of the algorithm. Five subjects each performed ten different arm elevation tasks. The results show that the algorithm is valid to evaluate shoulder movements with high correlations between the results of the two different sensors and the commercial sensor (0.900-0.998) and relatively low RMSE value for the ten tasks (1.66-11.24°). The proposed data fusion algorithm could thus be used to estimate arm elevation.

abstract_zh: 与工作相关的上肢肌肉骨骼疾病（WRUED）是现代社会的一个主要问题，因为它们影响工人的生活质量并导致缺勤和生产力损失。根据在北美和西欧进行的研究，其患病率在过去几十年中有所增加。这一挑战需要改进预防方法。一种途径是通过开发可穿戴传感器系统来分析工人的动作并向工人和/或临床医生提供反馈。这样的系统可以减少体力劳动需求并最终预防肌肉骨骼疾病。本文介绍了用于惯性测量单元的数据融合算法的开发和验证，以分析工人的手臂高度。该算法在两个商用传感器系统（Actigraph GT9X 和 LSM9DS1）上实施，并将结果与​​经过验证的商用传感器（XSens MVN 系统）的数据融合结果进行比较。互相关分析 [r]、均方根误差 (RMSE) 和估计的平均绝对误差用于建立算法的结构有效性。五名受试者每人执行十种不同的手臂抬高任务。结果表明，该算法对于评估肩部运动是有效的，两个不同传感器和商用传感器的结果之间具有较高的相关性（0.900-0.998），并且十个任务的 RMSE 值相对较低（1.66-11.24°）。因此，所提出的数据融合算法可用于估计手臂仰角。

AI.tldr: 开发并验证一种基于低成本惯性测量单元的数据融合算法，用于分析体力劳动者肩部运动。
AI.motivation: 工作相关上肢肌肉骨骼疾病（WRUED）导致生活质量下降和生产力损失，需通过可穿戴传感器系统改进预防方法。
AI.method: 在两种商业传感器（Actigraph GT9X和LSM9DS1）上实现数据融合算法，并与验证过的XSens MVN系统数据对比，使用交叉相关分析、均方根误差（RMSE）等指标评估算法有效性。
AI.result: 算法在五名受试者十种肩部抬升任务中表现良好，传感器间相关性达0.900-0.998，RMSE值为1.66-11.24°。
AI.conclusion: 该数据融合算法可有效评估肩部运动，适用于体力劳动者动作分析与疾病预防。

title: Intuitive sequence matching algorithm applied to a sip-and-puff control interface for robotic assistive devices
title_zh: 直观的序列匹配算法应用于机器人辅助设备的吸吸控制界面
comment: ef:Rehabilitation Engineering and Assistive Technology Society of North America Conference (RESNA), 2020
comments: ef:Rehabilitation Engineering and Assistive Technology Society of North America Conference (RESNA), 2020
abstract: This paper presents the development and preliminary validation of a control interface based on a sequence matching algorithm. An important challenge in the field of assistive technology is for users to control high dimensionality devices (e.g., assistive robot with several degrees of freedom, or computer) with low dimensionality control interfaces (e.g., a few switches). Sequence matching consists in the recognition of a pattern obtained from a sensor's signal compared to a predefined pattern library. The objective is to allow the user to input several different commands with a low dimensionality interface (e.g., Morse code allowing inputting several letters with a single switch). In this paper, the algorithm is used in the context of the control of an assistive robotic arm and has been adapted to a sip-and-puff interface where short and long bursts can be detected. Compared to a classic sip-and-puff interface, a preliminary validation with 8 healthy subjects has shown that sequence matching makes the control faster, easier and more comfortable. This paper is a proof of concept that leads the way towards a more advanced algorithm and the usage of more versatile sensors such as inertial measurement units (IMU).
summary: This paper presents the development and preliminary validation of a control interface based on a sequence matching algorithm. An important challenge in the field of assistive technology is for users to control high dimensionality devices (e.g., assistive robot with several degrees of freedom, or computer) with low dimensionality control interfaces (e.g., a few switches). Sequence matching consists in the recognition of a pattern obtained from a sensor's signal compared to a predefined pattern library. The objective is to allow the user to input several different commands with a low dimensionality interface (e.g., Morse code allowing inputting several letters with a single switch). In this paper, the algorithm is used in the context of the control of an assistive robotic arm and has been adapted to a sip-and-puff interface where short and long bursts can be detected. Compared to a classic sip-and-puff interface, a preliminary validation with 8 healthy subjects has shown that sequence matching makes the control faster, easier and more comfortable. This paper is a proof of concept that leads the way towards a more advanced algorithm and the usage of more versatile sensors such as inertial measurement units (IMU).
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了基于序列匹配算法的控制接口的开发和初步验证。辅助技术领域的一个重要挑战是用户用低维控制接口（例如几个开关）来控制高维设备（例如具有多个自由度的辅助机器人或计算机）。序列匹配在于识别从传感器信号获得的模式与预定义模式库的比较。目标是允许用户通过低维界面输入多个不同的命令（例如，莫尔斯电码允许使用单个开关输入多个字母）。在本文中，该算法用于辅助机械臂的控制，并适用于可以检测短脉冲和长脉冲的啜吸接口。与经典的“啜饮”界面相比，对 8 名健康受试者的初步验证表明，序列匹配使控制更快、更容易、更舒适。本文是一个概念验证，它引领了更先进的算法和使用更通用的传感器（例如惯性测量单元（IMU））的道路。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于序列匹配算法的吸气-吹气控制接口，用于机器人辅助设备的控制。
AI.motivation: 高维辅助设备（如多自由度机械臂）需通过低维控制接口（如单开关）操作，传统方法效率低，需更高效的控制算法。
AI.method: 采用序列匹配算法，通过传感器信号与预定义模式库比对，将算法适配至吸气-吹气接口，识别短/长爆发信号。
AI.result: 8名健康受试者测试显示，该接口控制速度更快、操作更简便且舒适度更高。
AI.conclusion: 验证了序列匹配算法在低维控制接口中的可行性，为更复杂算法及多传感器融合应用奠定基础。

authors_text: Fantine Huot,R. Lily Hu,Matthias Ihme,Qing Wang,John Burge,Tianjian Lu,Jason Hickey,Yi-Fan Chen,John Anderson
title: Deep Learning Models for Predicting Wildfires from Historical Remote-Sensing Data
title_zh: 根据历史遥感数据预测野火的深度学习模型
comment: Presented at 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Artificial Intelligence for Humani- tarian Assistance and Disaster Response Workshop, Vancouver, Canada
comments: Presented at 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020), Artificial Intelligence for Humani- tarian Assistance and Disaster Response Workshop, Vancouver, Canada
abstract: Identifying regions that have high likelihood for wildfires is a key component of land and forestry management and disaster preparedness. We create a data set by aggregating nearly a decade of remote-sensing data and historical fire records to predict wildfires. This prediction problem is framed as three machine learning tasks. Results are compared and analyzed for four different deep learning models to estimate wildfire likelihood. The results demonstrate that deep learning models can successfully identify areas of high fire likelihood using aggregated data about vegetation, weather, and topography with an AUC of 83%.
summary: Identifying regions that have high likelihood for wildfires is a key component of land and forestry management and disaster preparedness. We create a data set by aggregating nearly a decade of remote-sensing data and historical fire records to predict wildfires. This prediction problem is framed as three machine learning tasks. Results are compared and analyzed for four different deep learning models to estimate wildfire likelihood. The results demonstrate that deep learning models can successfully identify areas of high fire likelihood using aggregated data about vegetation, weather, and topography with an AUC of 83%.
abstract_zh: 确定极有可能发生野火的区域是土地和林业管理以及备灾的关键组成部分。我们通过汇总近十年的遥感数据和历史火灾记录来创建一个数据集来预测野火。该预测问题被定义为三个机器学习任务。对四种不同深度学习模型的结果进行比较和分析，以估计野火可能性。结果表明，深度学习模型可以使用植被、天气和地形的汇总数据成功识别火灾可能性较高的区域，AUC 为 83%。

AI.tldr: 本文利用深度学习模型结合历史遥感数据和火灾记录，预测野火高发区域。
AI.motivation: 准确预测野火高发区域对土地管理、林业保护和灾害预防具有重要意义。
AI.method: 整合近十年遥感数据与历史火灾记录，构建三个机器学习任务，对比分析四种深度学习模型的预测效果。
AI.result: 深度学习模型在植被、气象和地形数据基础上实现野火预测，AUC值达83%。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习能有效识别野火高风险区域，为相关管理决策提供数据支持。

authors_text: Hera Siddiqui,Ajita Rattani,Dakshina Ranjan Kisku,Tanner Dean
title: AI-based BMI Inference from Facial Images: An Application to Weight Monitoring
title_zh: 基于人工智能的面部图像 BMI 推断：体重监测的应用
abstract: Self-diagnostic image-based methods for healthy weight monitoring is gaining increased interest following the alarming trend of obesity. Only a handful of academic studies exist that investigate AI-based methods for Body Mass Index (BMI) inference from facial images as a solution to healthy weight monitoring and management. To promote further research and development in this area, we evaluate and compare the performance of five different deep-learning based Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architectures i.e., VGG19, ResNet50, DenseNet, MobileNet, and lightCNN for BMI inference from facial images. Experimental results on the three publicly available BMI annotated facial image datasets assembled from social media, namely, VisualBMI, VIP-Attributes, and Bollywood datasets, suggest the efficacy of the deep learning methods in BMI inference from face images with minimum Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of $1.04$ obtained using ResNet50.
summary: Self-diagnostic image-based methods for healthy weight monitoring is gaining increased interest following the alarming trend of obesity. Only a handful of academic studies exist that investigate AI-based methods for Body Mass Index (BMI) inference from facial images as a solution to healthy weight monitoring and management. To promote further research and development in this area, we evaluate and compare the performance of five different deep-learning based Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architectures i.e., VGG19, ResNet50, DenseNet, MobileNet, and lightCNN for BMI inference from facial images. Experimental results on the three publicly available BMI annotated facial image datasets assembled from social media, namely, VisualBMI, VIP-Attributes, and Bollywood datasets, suggest the efficacy of the deep learning methods in BMI inference from face images with minimum Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of $1.04$ obtained using ResNet50.
abstract_zh: 随着肥胖的惊人趋势，基于图像的自我诊断健康体重监测方法越来越受到人们的关注。只有少数学术研究调查基于人工智能的从面部图像推断体重指数 (BMI) 的方法，作为健康体重监测和管理的解决方案。为了促进该领域的进一步研究和发展，我们评估和比较了五种不同的基于深度学习的卷积神经网络（CNN）架构（即 VGG19、ResNet50、DenseNet、MobileNet 和 lightCNN）用于从面部图像推断 BMI 的性能。从社交媒体收集的三个公开的 BMI 注释面部图像数据集（即 VisualBMI、VIP-Attributes 和 Bollywood 数据集）的实验结果表明，深度学习方法在从面部图像推断 BMI 方面的有效性，使用 ResNet50 获得的最小平均绝对误差 (MAE) 为 1.04 美元。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于深度学习的面部图像BMI推断方法，用于健康体重监测。
AI.motivation: 肥胖问题日益严重，但现有基于AI的面部图像BMI研究较少，需推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 比较VGG19、ResNet50等五种CNN架构在VisualBMI等三个公开数据集上的BMI推断性能。
AI.result: ResNet50模型在测试数据集上达到最低平均绝对误差1.04。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法有效实现面部图像BMI推断，ResNet50表现最优，为后续研究提供参考。

title: Auto-calibration Method Using Stop Signs for Urban Autonomous Driving Applications
title_zh: 城市自动驾驶应用中使用停车标志的自动校准方法
comment: 7 pages, 7 figures, 1 table, Accepted to ICRA 2021
comments: 7 pages, 7 figures, 1 table, Accepted to ICRA 2021
abstract: Calibration of sensors is fundamental to robust performance for intelligent vehicles. In natural environments, disturbances can easily challenge calibration. One possibility is to use natural objects of known shape to recalibrate sensors. An approach based on recognition of traffic signs, such as stop signs, and use of them for recalibration of cameras is presented. The approach is based on detection, geometry estimation, calibration, and recursive updating. Results from natural environments are presented that clearly show convergence and improved performance.
summary: Calibration of sensors is fundamental to robust performance for intelligent vehicles. In natural environments, disturbances can easily challenge calibration. One possibility is to use natural objects of known shape to recalibrate sensors. An approach based on recognition of traffic signs, such as stop signs, and use of them for recalibration of cameras is presented. The approach is based on detection, geometry estimation, calibration, and recursive updating. Results from natural environments are presented that clearly show convergence and improved performance.
abstract_zh: 传感器校准是智能车辆稳健性能的基础。在自然环境中，干扰很容易对校准提出挑战。一种可能性是使用已知形状的自然物体来重新校准传感器。提出了一种基于交通标志（例如停车标志）识别并使用它们重新校准摄像机的方法。该方法基于检测、几何估计、校准和递归更新。自然环境的结果清楚地显示了收敛和改进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用停车标志进行城市自动驾驶中传感器自动校准的方法。
AI.motivation: 传感器校准对于智能车辆的稳定性能至关重要，但在自然环境中，干扰因素容易影响校准效果，因此需要一种有效的方法来重新校准传感器。
AI.method: 该方法基于对交通标志（如停车标志）的识别，通过检测、几何估计、校准和递归更新来实现相机的重新校准。
AI.result: 在自然环境中的实验结果表明，该方法具有良好的收敛性和性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 利用停车标志进行传感器校准是一种有效的方法，能够提高城市自动驾驶中传感器的鲁棒性和性能。

title: Viewmaker Networks: Learning Views for Unsupervised Representation Learning
title_zh: Viewmaker Networks：无监督表示学习的学习视图
abstract: Many recent methods for unsupervised representation learning train models to be invariant to different "views," or distorted versions of an input. However, designing these views requires considerable trial and error by human experts, hindering widespread adoption of unsupervised representation learning methods across domains and modalities. To address this, we propose viewmaker networks: generative models that learn to produce useful views from a given input. Viewmakers are stochastic bounded adversaries: they produce views by generating and then adding an $\ell_p$-bounded perturbation to the input, and are trained adversarially with respect to the main encoder network. Remarkably, when pretraining on CIFAR-10, our learned views enable comparable transfer accuracy to the well-tuned SimCLR augmentations -- despite not including transformations like cropping or color jitter. Furthermore, our learned views significantly outperform baseline augmentations on speech recordings (+9% points, on average) and wearable sensor data (+17% points). Viewmakers can also be combined with handcrafted views: they improve robustness to common image corruptions and can increase transfer performance in cases where handcrafted views are less explored. These results suggest that viewmakers may provide a path towards more general representation learning algorithms -- reducing the domain expertise and effort needed to pretrain on a much wider set of domains. Code is available at https://github.com/alextamkin/viewmaker.
summary: Many recent methods for unsupervised representation learning train models to be invariant to different "views," or distorted versions of an input. However, designing these views requires considerable trial and error by human experts, hindering widespread adoption of unsupervised representation learning methods across domains and modalities. To address this, we propose viewmaker networks: generative models that learn to produce useful views from a given input. Viewmakers are stochastic bounded adversaries: they produce views by generating and then adding an $\ell_p$-bounded perturbation to the input, and are trained adversarially with respect to the main encoder network. Remarkably, when pretraining on CIFAR-10, our learned views enable comparable transfer accuracy to the well-tuned SimCLR augmentations -- despite not including transformations like cropping or color jitter. Furthermore, our learned views significantly outperform baseline augmentations on speech recordings (+9% points, on average) and wearable sensor data (+17% points). Viewmakers can also be combined with handcrafted views: they improve robustness to common image corruptions and can increase transfer performance in cases where handcrafted views are less explored. These results suggest that viewmakers may provide a path towards more general representation learning algorithms -- reducing the domain expertise and effort needed to pretrain on a much wider set of domains. Code is available at https://github.com/alextamkin/viewmaker.
abstract_zh: 许多最近的无监督表示学习方法训练模型对于不同的“视图”或输入的扭曲版本保持不变。然而，设计这些视图需要人类专家进行大量的试验和错误，这阻碍了跨领域和模式的无监督表示学习方法的广泛采用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了viewmaker网络：学习从给定输入生成有用视图的生成模型。 Viewmaker 是随机有界对手：他们通过生成然后向输入添加 $\ell_p$ 有界扰动来生成视图，并针对主编码器网络进行对抗性训练。值得注意的是，在 CIFAR-10 上进行预训练时，我们学习的视图可以实现与经过良好调整的 SimCLR 增强功能相当的传输精度 - 尽管不包括裁剪或颜色抖动等转换。此外，我们学习到的视图显着优于语音记录（平均+9%）和可穿戴传感器数据（+17%）的基线增强。 Viewmaker 还可以与手工制作的视图相结合：它们提高了对常见图像损坏的鲁棒性，并且可以在手工制作的视图较少探索的情况下提高传输性能。这些结果表明，观看者可以提供一条通向更通用的表示学习算法的途径——减少在更广泛的领域进行预训练所需的领域专业知识和工作量。代码可在 https://github.com/alextamkin/viewmaker 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Viewmaker Networks的生成模型，用于自动学习无监督表示学习中的有效视图，减少对人工设计视图的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督表示学习方法依赖人工设计的视图（如裁剪、颜色抖动），但这一过程耗时且难以跨领域推广，限制了方法的广泛应用。
AI.method: 通过生成对抗网络（GAN）框架，Viewmaker Networks学习对输入添加ℓ_p有界扰动以生成视图，并与主编码器进行对抗训练，无需人工设计变换。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上，生成的视图性能与SimCLR相当；在语音数据（+9%）和可穿戴传感器数据（+17%）上显著优于基线方法，且与人工视图结合可提升鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Viewmaker Networks为通用表示学习提供了新路径，减少了跨领域预训练对人工设计的依赖，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: Viewmaker Networks: Learning Views for Unsupervised Representation Learning Viewmaker Networks：无监督表示学习的学习视图 Many recent methods for unsupervised representation learning train models to be invariant to different "views," or distorted versions of an input. However, designing these views requires considerable trial and error by human experts, hindering widespread adoption of unsupervised representation learning methods across domains and modalities. To address this, we propose viewmaker networks: generative models that learn to produce useful views from a given input. Viewmakers are stochastic bounded adversaries: they produce views by generating and then adding an $\ell_p$-bounded perturbation to the input, and are trained adversarially with respect to the main encoder network. Remarkably, when pretraining on CIFAR-10, our learned views enable comparable transfer accuracy to the well-tuned SimCLR augmentations -- despite not including transformations like cropping or color jitter. Furthermore, our learned views significantly outperform baseline augmentations on speech recordings (+9% points, on average) and wearable sensor data (+17% points). Viewmakers can also be combined with handcrafted views: they improve robustness to common image corruptions and can increase transfer performance in cases where handcrafted views are less explored. These results suggest that viewmakers may provide a path towards more general representation learning algorithms -- reducing the domain expertise and effort needed to pretrain on a much wider set of domains. Code is available at https://github.com/alextamkin/viewmaker. 许多最近的无监督表示学习方法训练模型对于不同的“视图”或输入的扭曲版本保持不变。然而，设计这些视图需要人类专家进行大量的试验和错误，这阻碍了跨领域和模式的无监督表示学习方法的广泛采用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了viewmaker网络：学习从给定输入生成有用视图的生成模型。 Viewmaker 是随机有界对手：他们通过生成然后向输入添加 $\ell_p$ 有界扰动来生成视图，并针对主编码器网络进行对抗性训练。值得注意的是，在 CIFAR-10 上进行预训练时，我们学习的视图可以实现与经过良好调整的 SimCLR 增强功能相当的传输精度 - 尽管不包括裁剪或颜色抖动等转换。此外，我们学习到的视图显着优于语音记录（平均+9%）和可穿戴传感器数据（+17%）的基线增强。 Viewmaker 还可以与手工制作的视图相结合：它们提高了对常见图像损坏的鲁棒性，并且可以在手工制作的视图较少探索的情况下提高传输性能。这些结果表明，观看者可以提供一条通向更通用的表示学习算法的途径——减少在更广泛的领域进行预训练所需的领域专业知识和工作量。代码可在 https://github.com/alextamkin/viewmaker 获取。 本文提出了一种名为Viewmaker Networks的生成模型，用于自动学习无监督表示学习中的有效视图，减少对人工设计视图的依赖。 Alex Tamkin,Mike Wu,Noah Goodman cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Marwa El Halabi,Slobodan Mitrović,Ashkan Norouzi-Fard,Jakab Tardos,Jakub Tarnawski
title: Fairness in Streaming Submodular Maximization: Algorithms and Hardness
title_zh: 流式子模最大化的公平性：算法和硬度
abstract: Submodular maximization has become established as the method of choice for the task of selecting representative and diverse summaries of data. However, if datapoints have sensitive attributes such as gender or age, such machine learning algorithms, left unchecked, are known to exhibit bias: under- or over-representation of particular groups. This has made the design of fair machine learning algorithms increasingly important. In this work we address the question: Is it possible to create fair summaries for massive datasets? To this end, we develop the first streaming approximation algorithms for submodular maximization under fairness constraints, for both monotone and non-monotone functions. We validate our findings empirically on exemplar-based clustering, movie recommendation, DPP-based summarization, and maximum coverage in social networks, showing that fairness constraints do not significantly impact utility.
summary: Submodular maximization has become established as the method of choice for the task of selecting representative and diverse summaries of data. However, if datapoints have sensitive attributes such as gender or age, such machine learning algorithms, left unchecked, are known to exhibit bias: under- or over-representation of particular groups. This has made the design of fair machine learning algorithms increasingly important. In this work we address the question: Is it possible to create fair summaries for massive datasets? To this end, we develop the first streaming approximation algorithms for submodular maximization under fairness constraints, for both monotone and non-monotone functions. We validate our findings empirically on exemplar-based clustering, movie recommendation, DPP-based summarization, and maximum coverage in social networks, showing that fairness constraints do not significantly impact utility.
abstract_zh: 子模最大化已成为选择具有代表性和多样性的数据摘要任务的首选方法。然而，如果数据点具有性别或年龄等敏感属性，则此类机器学习算法如果不加以控制，就会表现出偏见：特定群体的代表性不足或过多。这使得公平的机器学习算法的设计变得越来越重要。在这项工作中，我们解决了这个问题：是否有可能为海量数据集创建公平的摘要？为此，我们针对单调和非单调函数开发了第一个在公平约束下实现子模最大化的流近似算法。我们在基于样本的聚类、电影推荐、基于 DPP 的摘要和社交网络的最大覆盖范围上实证验证了我们的发现，表明公平性约束不会显着影响效用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在流数据环境下，如何设计满足公平性约束的子模函数最大化算法，以生成无偏的数据摘要。
AI.motivation: 传统子模最大化算法在处理包含敏感属性（如性别、年龄）的数据时可能产生偏差，导致特定群体被低估或高估，因此需要设计兼顾公平性与数据代表性的算法。
AI.method: 提出首个适用于流数据的子模最大化近似算法，在单调和非单调函数场景下均引入公平性约束，并通过聚类、推荐系统等实际任务验证算法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，公平性约束对算法的实用性影响有限，在保证多样性的同时有效抑制了数据偏见。
AI.conclusion: 公平性约束可与子模最大化有效结合，为大规模数据集的公平摘要生成提供了可行方案，且不会显著牺牲算法性能。

title: Autonomous UAV Exploration of Dynamic Environments via Incremental Sampling and Probabilistic Roadmap
title_zh: 通过增量采样和概率路线图进行动态环境的自主无人机探索
comment: 8 Pages, 9 Figures, and 5 Tables. Video Link: https://youtu.be/ileyP4DRBjU. Github Link: https://github.com/Zhefan-Xu/DEP
comments: 8 Pages, 9 Figures, and 5 Tables. Video Link: https://youtu.be/ileyP4DRBjU. Github Link: https://github.com/Zhefan-Xu/DEP
abstract: Autonomous exploration requires robots to generate informative trajectories iteratively. Although sampling-based methods are highly efficient in unmanned aerial vehicle exploration, many of these methods do not effectively utilize the sampled information from the previous planning iterations, leading to redundant computation and longer exploration time. Also, few have explicitly shown their exploration ability in dynamic environments even though they can run real-time. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel dynamic exploration planner (DEP) for exploring unknown environments using incremental sampling and Probabilistic Roadmap (PRM). In our sampling strategy, nodes are added incrementally and distributed evenly in the explored region, yielding the best viewpoints. To further shortening exploration time and ensuring safety, our planner optimizes paths locally and refine them based on the Euclidean Signed Distance Function (ESDF) map. Meanwhile, as the multi-query planner, PRM allows the proposed planner to quickly search alternative paths to avoid dynamic obstacles for safe exploration. Simulation experiments show that our method safely explores dynamic environments and outperforms the benchmark planners in terms of exploration time, path length, and computational time.
summary: Autonomous exploration requires robots to generate informative trajectories iteratively. Although sampling-based methods are highly efficient in unmanned aerial vehicle exploration, many of these methods do not effectively utilize the sampled information from the previous planning iterations, leading to redundant computation and longer exploration time. Also, few have explicitly shown their exploration ability in dynamic environments even though they can run real-time. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel dynamic exploration planner (DEP) for exploring unknown environments using incremental sampling and Probabilistic Roadmap (PRM). In our sampling strategy, nodes are added incrementally and distributed evenly in the explored region, yielding the best viewpoints. To further shortening exploration time and ensuring safety, our planner optimizes paths locally and refine them based on the Euclidean Signed Distance Function (ESDF) map. Meanwhile, as the multi-query planner, PRM allows the proposed planner to quickly search alternative paths to avoid dynamic obstacles for safe exploration. Simulation experiments show that our method safely explores dynamic environments and outperforms the benchmark planners in terms of exploration time, path length, and computational time.
abstract_zh: 自主探索需要机器人迭代地生成信息丰富的轨迹。尽管基于采样的方法在无人机探索中非常高效，但许多方法没有有效利用先前规划迭代中的采样信息，导致冗余计算和较长的探索时间。此外，尽管它们可以实时运行，但很少有人明确展示它们在动态环境中的探索能力。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的动态探索规划器（DEP），用于使用增量采样和概率路线图（PRM）探索未知环境。在我们的采样策略中，节点逐渐添加并均匀分布在探索的区域中，从而产生最佳视点。为了进一步缩短探索时间并确保安全，我们的规划器对路径进行本地优化，并基于欧几里得符号距离函数（ESDF）地图进行细化。同时，作为多查询规划器，PRM 允许建议的规划器快速搜索替代路径，以避免安全探索的动态障碍。仿真实验表明，我们的方法可以安全地探索动态环境，并且在探索时间、路径长度和计算时间方面优于基准规划器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态环境下的自主无人机探索规划方法，结合增量采样与概率路线图（PRM）技术以提升探索效率与安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有采样方法在无人机探索中存在信息复用不足导致计算冗余、探索时间长的问题，且鲜有方法明确验证其在动态环境中的适应性。
AI.method: 设计动态探索规划器（DEP），通过增量采样均匀分布节点生成最佳观测点，结合欧氏符号距离函数（ESDF）优化路径，并利用PRM多查询特性快速规避动态障碍物。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法在探索时间、路径长度和计算效率上均优于基准算法，且能安全应对动态环境中的障碍物。
AI.conclusion: DEP通过增量采样与PRM的结合，有效解决了动态环境探索中的冗余计算与路径安全问题，为无人机自主探索提供了新思路。

search_text: Autonomous UAV Exploration of Dynamic Environments via Incremental Sampling and Probabilistic Roadmap 通过增量采样和概率路线图进行动态环境的自主无人机探索 Autonomous exploration requires robots to generate informative trajectories iteratively. Although sampling-based methods are highly efficient in unmanned aerial vehicle exploration, many of these methods do not effectively utilize the sampled information from the previous planning iterations, leading to redundant computation and longer exploration time. Also, few have explicitly shown their exploration ability in dynamic environments even though they can run real-time. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel dynamic exploration planner (DEP) for exploring unknown environments using incremental sampling and Probabilistic Roadmap (PRM). In our sampling strategy, nodes are added incrementally and distributed evenly in the explored region, yielding the best viewpoints. To further shortening exploration time and ensuring safety, our planner optimizes paths locally and refine them based on the Euclidean Signed Distance Function (ESDF) map. Meanwhile, as the multi-query planner, PRM allows the proposed planner to quickly search alternative paths to avoid dynamic obstacles for safe exploration. Simulation experiments show that our method safely explores dynamic environments and outperforms the benchmark planners in terms of exploration time, path length, and computational time. 自主探索需要机器人迭代地生成信息丰富的轨迹。尽管基于采样的方法在无人机探索中非常高效，但许多方法没有有效利用先前规划迭代中的采样信息，导致冗余计算和较长的探索时间。此外，尽管它们可以实时运行，但很少有人明确展示它们在动态环境中的探索能力。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的动态探索规划器（DEP），用于使用增量采样和概率路线图（PRM）探索未知环境。在我们的采样策略中，节点逐渐添加并均匀分布在探索的区域中，从而产生最佳视点。为了进一步缩短探索时间并确保安全，我们的规划器对路径进行本地优化，并基于欧几里得符号距离函数（ESDF）地图进行细化。同时，作为多查询规划器，PRM 允许建议的规划器快速搜索替代路径，以避免安全探索的动态障碍。仿真实验表明，我们的方法可以安全地探索动态环境，并且在探索时间、路径长度和计算时间方面优于基准规划器。 本文提出一种动态环境下的自主无人机探索规划方法，结合增量采样与概率路线图（PRM）技术以提升探索效率与安全性。 Zhefan Xu,Di Deng,Kenji Shimada cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Yinyu Nie,Yiqun Lin,Xiaoguang Han,Shihui Guo,Jian Chang,Shuguang Cui,Jian Jun Zhang
title: Skeleton-bridged Point Completion: From Global Inference to Local Adjustment
title_zh: 骨架桥接点完成：从全局推理到局部调整
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS 2020; Project Page: https://yinyunie.github.io/SKPCN-page/
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS 2020; Project Page: https://yinyunie.github.io/SKPCN-page/
abstract: Point completion refers to complete the missing geometries of objects from partial point clouds. Existing works usually estimate the missing shape by decoding a latent feature encoded from the input points. However, real-world objects are usually with diverse topologies and surface details, which a latent feature may fail to represent to recover a clean and complete surface. To this end, we propose a skeleton-bridged point completion network (SK-PCN) for shape completion. Given a partial scan, our method first predicts its 3D skeleton to obtain the global structure, and completes the surface by learning displacements from skeletal points. We decouple the shape completion into structure estimation and surface reconstruction, which eases the learning difficulty and benefits our method to obtain on-surface details. Besides, considering the missing features during encoding input points, SK-PCN adopts a local adjustment strategy that merges the input point cloud to our predictions for surface refinement. Comparing with previous methods, our skeleton-bridged manner better supports point normal estimation to obtain the full surface mesh beyond point clouds. The qualitative and quantitative experiments on both point cloud and mesh completion show that our approach outperforms the existing methods on various object categories.
summary: Point completion refers to complete the missing geometries of objects from partial point clouds. Existing works usually estimate the missing shape by decoding a latent feature encoded from the input points. However, real-world objects are usually with diverse topologies and surface details, which a latent feature may fail to represent to recover a clean and complete surface. To this end, we propose a skeleton-bridged point completion network (SK-PCN) for shape completion. Given a partial scan, our method first predicts its 3D skeleton to obtain the global structure, and completes the surface by learning displacements from skeletal points. We decouple the shape completion into structure estimation and surface reconstruction, which eases the learning difficulty and benefits our method to obtain on-surface details. Besides, considering the missing features during encoding input points, SK-PCN adopts a local adjustment strategy that merges the input point cloud to our predictions for surface refinement. Comparing with previous methods, our skeleton-bridged manner better supports point normal estimation to obtain the full surface mesh beyond point clouds. The qualitative and quantitative experiments on both point cloud and mesh completion show that our approach outperforms the existing methods on various object categories.
abstract_zh: 点补全是指从部分点云中补全物体缺失的几何形状。现有的工作通常通过解码从输入点编码的潜在特征来估计丢失的形状。然而，现实世界的物体通常具有不同的拓扑和表面细节，潜在特征可能无法表示以恢复干净且完整的表面。为此，我们提出了一种用于形状补全的骨架桥接点补全网络（SK-PCN）。给定部分扫描，我们的方法首先预测其 3D 骨架以获得全局结构，并通过学习骨架点的位移来完成表面。我们将形状完成解耦为结构估计和表面重建，这减轻了学习难度，有利于我们的方法获得表面细节。此外，考虑到编码输入点期间缺失的特征，SK-PCN 采用局部调整策略，将输入点云合并到我们的预测中以进行表面细化。与以前的方法相比，我们的骨架桥接方式更好地支持点法线估计以获得点云之外的完整表面网格。点云和网格完成的定性和定量实验表明，我们的方法在各种对象类别上优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于骨架桥接的点云补全方法（SK-PCN），通过全局结构推断与局部调整相结合，解决复杂拓扑和表面细节的点云补全问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过编码潜在特征进行点云补全，但难以准确恢复具有复杂拓扑结构和精细表面细节的物体，导致补全效果受限。
AI.method: 方法分为两阶段：首先预测点云的3D骨架以获取全局结构，再通过学习骨骼点的位移完成表面重建；引入局部调整策略融合输入点云优化表面细节，并支持生成完整网格。
AI.result: 在点云和网格补全任务中，SK-PCN在多个物体类别上均优于现有方法，尤其在复杂拓扑和细节保留方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 骨架桥接策略有效分离了结构估计与表面重建难度，结合局部优化显著提升了点云补全的质量与鲁棒性。

authors_text: HanQin Cai,Keaton Hamm,Longxiu Huang,Jiaqi Li,Tao Wang
title: Rapid Robust Principal Component Analysis: CUR Accelerated Inexact Low Rank Estimation
title_zh: 快速稳健主成分分析：CUR 加速不精确低秩估计
abstract: Robust principal component analysis (RPCA) is a widely used tool for dimension reduction. In this work, we propose a novel non-convex algorithm, coined Iterated Robust CUR (IRCUR), for solving RPCA problems, which dramatically improves the computational efficiency in comparison with the existing algorithms. IRCUR achieves this acceleration by employing CUR decomposition when updating the low rank component, which allows us to obtain an accurate low rank approximation via only three small submatrices. Consequently, IRCUR is able to process only the small submatrices and avoid expensive computing on the full matrix through the entire algorithm. Numerical experiments establish the computational advantage of IRCUR over the state-of-art algorithms on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
summary: Robust principal component analysis (RPCA) is a widely used tool for dimension reduction. In this work, we propose a novel non-convex algorithm, coined Iterated Robust CUR (IRCUR), for solving RPCA problems, which dramatically improves the computational efficiency in comparison with the existing algorithms. IRCUR achieves this acceleration by employing CUR decomposition when updating the low rank component, which allows us to obtain an accurate low rank approximation via only three small submatrices. Consequently, IRCUR is able to process only the small submatrices and avoid expensive computing on the full matrix through the entire algorithm. Numerical experiments establish the computational advantage of IRCUR over the state-of-art algorithms on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒主成分分析（RPCA）是一种广泛使用的降维工具。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的非凸算法，称为迭代鲁棒 CUR (IRCUR)，用于解决 RPCA 问题，与现有算法相比，它极大地提高了计算效率。 IRCUR 通过在更新低秩分量时采用 CUR 分解来实现这种加速，这使我们能够仅通过三个小子矩阵获得准确的低秩近似。因此，IRCUR 能够仅处理小子矩阵，并避免通过整个算法对整个矩阵进行昂贵的计算。数值实验证实了 IRCUR 在合成数据集和真实数据集上相对于最先进算法的计算优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为IRCUR的非凸算法，通过CUR分解加速鲁棒主成分分析（RPCA）的低秩估计过程。
AI.motivation: 现有RPCA算法在处理大规模数据时计算效率较低，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 设计IRCUR算法，利用CUR分解仅通过三个小子矩阵更新低秩成分，避免全矩阵计算。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，IRCUR在合成数据和真实数据集上均优于现有算法，计算效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: IRCUR通过CUR分解有效降低了RPCA的计算复杂度，为大规模数据处理提供了高效解决方案。

IRCUR achieves this acceleration by employing CUR decomposition when updating the low rank component, which allows us to obtain an accurate low rank approximation via only three small submatrices. Consequently, IRCUR is able to process only the small submatrices and avoid expensive computing on the full matrix through the entire algorithm. Numerical experiments establish the computational advantage of IRCUR over the state-of-art algorithms on both synthetic and real-world datasets. 鲁棒主成分分析（RPCA）是一种广泛使用的降维工具。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的非凸算法，称为迭代鲁棒 CUR (IRCUR)，用于解决 RPCA 问题，与现有算法相比，它极大地提高了计算效率。 IRCUR 通过在更新低秩分量时采用 CUR 分解来实现这种加速，这使我们能够仅通过三个小子矩阵获得准确的低秩近似。因此，IRCUR 能够仅处理小子矩阵，并避免通过整个算法对整个矩阵进行昂贵的计算。数值实验证实了 IRCUR 在合成数据集和真实数据集上相对于最先进算法的计算优势。 本文提出了一种名为IRCUR的非凸算法，通过CUR分解加速鲁棒主成分分析（RPCA）的低秩估计过程。 HanQin Cai,Keaton Hamm,Longxiu Huang,Jiaqi Li,Tao Wang stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.IT,cs.LG,math.NA,math.OC

title: On Cross-Dataset Generalization in Automatic Detection of Online Abuse
title_zh: 网络滥用自动检测中的跨数据集泛化
comment: 13 pages, 3 figures, published at WOAH-2020 (The 4th Workshop on Online Abuse and Harms)
comments: 13 pages, 3 figures, published at WOAH-2020 (The 4th Workshop on Online Abuse and Harms)
abstract: NLP research has attained high performances in abusive language detection as a supervised classification task. While in research settings, training and test datasets are usually obtained from similar data samples, in practice systems are often applied on data that are different from the training set in topic and class distributions. Also, the ambiguity in class definitions inherited in this task aggravates the discrepancies between source and target datasets. We explore the topic bias and the task formulation bias in cross-dataset generalization. We show that the benign examples in the Wikipedia Detox dataset are biased towards platform-specific topics. We identify these examples using unsupervised topic modeling and manual inspection of topics' keywords. Removing these topics increases cross-dataset generalization, without reducing in-domain classification performance. For a robust dataset design, we suggest applying inexpensive unsupervised methods to inspect the collected data and downsize the non-generalizable content before manually annotating for class labels.
summary: NLP research has attained high performances in abusive language detection as a supervised classification task. While in research settings, training and test datasets are usually obtained from similar data samples, in practice systems are often applied on data that are different from the training set in topic and class distributions. Also, the ambiguity in class definitions inherited in this task aggravates the discrepancies between source and target datasets. We explore the topic bias and the task formulation bias in cross-dataset generalization. We show that the benign examples in the Wikipedia Detox dataset are biased towards platform-specific topics. We identify these examples using unsupervised topic modeling and manual inspection of topics' keywords. Removing these topics increases cross-dataset generalization, without reducing in-domain classification performance. For a robust dataset design, we suggest applying inexpensive unsupervised methods to inspect the collected data and downsize the non-generalizable content before manually annotating for class labels.
abstract_zh: NLP 研究在作为监督分类任务的辱骂语言检测方面取得了很高的成绩。虽然在研究环境中，训练和测试数据集通常是从相似的数据样本中获得的，但在实践中，系统通常应用于与主题和类别分布中的训练集不同的数据。此外，此任务中继承的类定义的模糊性加剧了源数据集和目标数据集之间的差异。我们探讨跨数据集泛化中的主题偏差和任务表述偏差。我们表明，维基百科 Detox 数据集中的良性示例偏向于特定于平台的主题。我们使用无监督主题建模和主题关键字的手动检查来识别这些示例。删除这些主题可以提高跨数据集泛化能力，而不会降低域内分类性能。对于稳健的数据集设计，我们建议应用廉价的无监督方法来检查收集的数据并缩小不可概括的内容，然后再手动注释类标签。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何提升在线滥用语言检测模型在跨数据集场景下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在相似数据集上表现优异，但实际应用中目标数据集与训练集在主题和类别分布上存在差异，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 通过无监督主题建模和人工关键词审查，识别维基百科Detox数据集中偏向特定平台主题的良性样本，并剔除这些主题以优化数据集。
AI.result: 剔除偏倚主题后，模型跨数据集泛化能力提升，且未影响原数据集内的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 建议在数据标注前使用低成本无监督方法筛选非泛化内容，以构建更鲁棒的数据集。

title: A Novel Quantum Algorithm for Ant Colony Optimization
title_zh: 一种新的蚁群优化量子算法
abstract: Ant colony optimization (ACO) is a commonly used meta-heuristic to solve complex combinatorial optimization problems like traveling salesman problem (TSP), vehicle routing problem (VRP), etc. However, classical ACO algorithms provide better optimal solutions but do not reduce computation time overhead to a significant extent. Algorithmic speed-up can be achieved by using parallelism offered by quantum computing. Existing quantum algorithms to solve ACO are either quantum-inspired classical algorithms or hybrid quantum-classical algorithms. Since all these algorithms need the intervention of classical computing, leveraging the true potential of quantum computing on real quantum hardware remains a challenge. This paper's main contribution is to propose a fully quantum algorithm to solve ACO, enhancing the quantum information processing toolbox in the fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC) era. We have Solved the Single Source Single Destination (SSSD) shortest-path problem using our proposed adaptive quantum circuit for representing dynamic pheromone updating strategy in real IBMQ devices. Our quantum ACO technique can be further used as a quantum ORACLE to solve complex optimization problems in a fully quantum setup with significant speed up upon the availability of more qubits.
summary: Ant colony optimization (ACO) is a commonly used meta-heuristic to solve complex combinatorial optimization problems like traveling salesman problem (TSP), vehicle routing problem (VRP), etc. However, classical ACO algorithms provide better optimal solutions but do not reduce computation time overhead to a significant extent. Algorithmic speed-up can be achieved by using parallelism offered by quantum computing. Existing quantum algorithms to solve ACO are either quantum-inspired classical algorithms or hybrid quantum-classical algorithms. Since all these algorithms need the intervention of classical computing, leveraging the true potential of quantum computing on real quantum hardware remains a challenge. This paper's main contribution is to propose a fully quantum algorithm to solve ACO, enhancing the quantum information processing toolbox in the fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC) era. We have Solved the Single Source Single Destination (SSSD) shortest-path problem using our proposed adaptive quantum circuit for representing dynamic pheromone updating strategy in real IBMQ devices. Our quantum ACO technique can be further used as a quantum ORACLE to solve complex optimization problems in a fully quantum setup with significant speed up upon the availability of more qubits.
abstract_zh: 蚁群优化（ACO）是一种常用的元启发式方法，用于解决复杂的组合优化问题，如旅行商问题（TSP）、车辆路径问题（VRP）等。然而，经典的ACO算法提供了更好的最优解，但并没有在很大程度上减少计算时间开销。通过使用量子计算提供的并行性可以实现算法加速。现有的求解 ACO 的量子算法要么是受量子启发的经典算法，要么是混合量子经典算法。由于所有这些算法都需要经典计算的干预，因此在真正的量子硬件上利用量子计算的真正潜力仍然是一个挑战。本文的主要贡献是提出了一种解决ACO的全量子算法，增强了容错量子计算（FTQC）时代的量子信息处理工具箱。我们使用我们提出的自适应量子电路解决了单源单目的地 (SSSD) 最短路径问题，用于表示真实 IBMQ 设备中的动态信息素更新策略。我们的量子 ACO 技术可以进一步用作量子 ORACLE，以解决完全量子设置中的复杂优化问题，并在更多量子位可用时显着加快速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全新的全量子算法用于解决蚁群优化问题（ACO），以提升量子计算在解决复杂优化问题中的效率。
AI.motivation: 经典ACO算法虽能提供较优解，但计算时间开销较大；现有量子算法多为量子启发式或混合方案，未能充分发挥量子硬件潜力。
AI.method: 设计自适应量子电路模拟动态信息素更新策略，并在IBM量子设备上实现单源单汇最短路径问题的求解。
AI.result: 成功在真实量子硬件上验证了量子ACO算法的有效性，为构建全量子优化框架提供了可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 该量子ACO技术可作为量子Oracle用于复杂优化问题，未来随着量子比特数量增加将实现显著加速。

authors_text: Eleni Chiou,Francesco Giganti,Shonit Punwani,Iasonas Kokkinos,Eleftheria Panagiotaki
title: Harnessing Uncertainty in Domain Adaptation for MRI Prostate Lesion Segmentation
title_zh: 利用域适应的不确定性进行 MRI 前列腺病变分割
comment: Accepted at MICCAI 2020. Code is available at https://github.com/elchiou/DA
comments: Accepted at MICCAI 2020. Code is available at https://github.com/elchiou/DA
abstract: The need for training data can impede the adoption of novel imaging modalities for learning-based medical image analysis. Domain adaptation methods partially mitigate this problem by translating training data from a related source domain to a novel target domain, but typically assume that a one-to-one translation is possible. Our work addresses the challenge of adapting to a more informative target domain where multiple target samples can emerge from a single source sample. In particular we consider translating from mp-MRI to VERDICT, a richer MRI modality involving an optimized acquisition protocol for cancer characterization. We explicitly account for the inherent uncertainty of this mapping and exploit it to generate multiple outputs conditioned on a single input. Our results show that this allows us to extract systematically better image representations for the target domain, when used in tandem with both simple, CycleGAN-based baselines, as well as more powerful approaches that integrate discriminative segmentation losses and/or residual adapters. When compared to its deterministic counterparts, our approach yields substantial improvements across a broad range of dataset sizes, increasingly strong baselines, and evaluation measures.
summary: The need for training data can impede the adoption of novel imaging modalities for learning-based medical image analysis. Domain adaptation methods partially mitigate this problem by translating training data from a related source domain to a novel target domain, but typically assume that a one-to-one translation is possible. Our work addresses the challenge of adapting to a more informative target domain where multiple target samples can emerge from a single source sample. In particular we consider translating from mp-MRI to VERDICT, a richer MRI modality involving an optimized acquisition protocol for cancer characterization. We explicitly account for the inherent uncertainty of this mapping and exploit it to generate multiple outputs conditioned on a single input. Our results show that this allows us to extract systematically better image representations for the target domain, when used in tandem with both simple, CycleGAN-based baselines, as well as more powerful approaches that integrate discriminative segmentation losses and/or residual adapters. When compared to its deterministic counterparts, our approach yields substantial improvements across a broad range of dataset sizes, increasingly strong baselines, and evaluation measures.
abstract_zh: 对训练数据的需求可能会阻碍采用新颖的成像方式进行基于学习的医学图像分析。域适应方法通过将训练数据从相关源域翻译到新的目标域来部分缓解这个问题，但通常假设一对一翻译是可能的。我们的工作解决了适应信息更丰富的目标域的挑战，其中多个目标样本可以从单个源样本中出现。我们特别考虑从 mp-MRI 转换为 VERDICT，这是一种更丰富的 MRI 模式，涉及用于癌症表征的优化采集协议。我们明确地考虑了这种映射的固有不确定性，并利用它来生成以单个输入为条件的多个输出。我们的结果表明，当与简单的、基于 CycleGAN 的基线以及集成判别性分割损失和/或残差适配器的更强大的方法结合使用时，这使我们能够系统地为目标域提取更好的图像表示。与确定性的同行相比，我们的方法在广泛的数据集大小、日益强大的基线和评估措施方面都取得了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用不确定性进行领域适应的方法，用于MRI前列腺病变分割，通过生成多个目标样本提升图像表示效果。
AI.motivation: 现有领域适应方法假设源域与目标域存在一一映射关系，但实际中一个源样本可能对应多个目标样本，需处理映射不确定性以提高分割精度。
AI.method: 显式建模映射不确定性，基于单个输入生成多目标输出，并结合CycleGAN基线、分割损失函数及残差适配器优化图像表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种数据集规模和评估指标上显著优于确定性方法，尤其在复杂基线模型中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过不确定性建模生成多目标输出可有效提升领域适应效果，为医学影像分析提供更鲁棒的跨模态分割方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种利用不确定性进行领域适应的方法，用于MRI前列腺病变分割，通过生成多个目标样本提升图像表示效果。
ai_content.motivation: 现有领域适应方法假设源域与目标域存在一一映射关系，但实际中一个源样本可能对应多个目标样本，需处理映射不确定性以提高分割精度。
ai_content.method: 显式建模映射不确定性，基于单个输入生成多目标输出，并结合CycleGAN基线、分割损失函数及残差适配器优化图像表示。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种数据集规模和评估指标上显著优于确定性方法，尤其在复杂基线模型中表现更优。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过不确定性建模生成多目标输出可有效提升领域适应效果，为医学影像分析提供更鲁棒的跨模态分割方案。

search_text: Harnessing Uncertainty in Domain Adaptation for MRI Prostate Lesion Segmentation 利用域适应的不确定性进行 MRI 前列腺病变分割 The need for training data can impede the adoption of novel imaging modalities for learning-based medical image analysis. Domain adaptation methods partially mitigate this problem by translating training data from a related source domain to a novel target domain, but typically assume that a one-to-one translation is possible. Our work addresses the challenge of adapting to a more informative target domain where multiple target samples can emerge from a single source sample. In particular we consider translating from mp-MRI to VERDICT, a richer MRI modality involving an optimized acquisition protocol for cancer characterization. We explicitly account for the inherent uncertainty of this mapping and exploit it to generate multiple outputs conditioned on a single input. Our results show that this allows us to extract systematically better image representations for the target domain, when used in tandem with both simple, CycleGAN-based baselines, as well as more powerful approaches that integrate discriminative segmentation losses and/or residual adapters. When compared to its deterministic counterparts, our approach yields substantial improvements across a broad range of dataset sizes, increasingly strong baselines, and evaluation measures. 对训练数据的需求可能会阻碍采用新颖的成像方式进行基于学习的医学图像分析。域适应方法通过将训练数据从相关源域翻译到新的目标域来部分缓解这个问题，但通常假设一对一翻译是可能的。我们的工作解决了适应信息更丰富的目标域的挑战，其中多个目标样本可以从单个源样本中出现。我们特别考虑从 mp-MRI 转换为 VERDICT，这是一种更丰富的 MRI 模式，涉及用于癌症表征的优化采集协议。我们明确地考虑了这种映射的固有不确定性，并利用它来生成以单个输入为条件的多个输出。我们的结果表明，当与简单的、基于 CycleGAN 的基线以及集成判别性分割损失和/或残差适配器的更强大的方法结合使用时，这使我们能够系统地为目标域提取更好的图像表示。与确定性的同行相比，我们的方法在广泛的数据集大小、日益强大的基线和评估措施方面都取得了显着的改进。 本文提出一种利用不确定性进行领域适应的方法，用于MRI前列腺病变分割，通过生成多个目标样本提升图像表示效果。 Eleni Chiou,Francesco Giganti,Shonit Punwani,Iasonas Kokkinos,Eleftheria Panagiotaki cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: Adaptive tracking control for task-based robot trajectory planning
title_zh: 基于任务的机器人轨迹规划的自适应跟踪控制
abstract: This paper presents a -- Learning from Demonstration -- method to perform robot movement trajectories that can be defined as you go. This way unstructured tasks can be performed, without the need to know exactly all the tasks and start and end positions beforehand. The long-term goal is for children with disabilities to be able to control a robot to manipulate toys in a play environment, and for a helper to demonstrate the desired trajectories as the play tasks change. A relatively inexpensive 3-DOF haptic device made by Novint is used to perform tasks where trajectories of the end-effector are demonstrated and reproduced. Under the condition where the end-effector carries different loads, conventional control systems possess the potential issue that they cannot compensate for the load variation effect. Adaptive tracking control can handle the above issue. Using the Lyapunov stability theory, a set of update laws are derived to give closed-loop stability with proper tracking performance.
summary: This paper presents a -- Learning from Demonstration -- method to perform robot movement trajectories that can be defined as you go. This way unstructured tasks can be performed, without the need to know exactly all the tasks and start and end positions beforehand. The long-term goal is for children with disabilities to be able to control a robot to manipulate toys in a play environment, and for a helper to demonstrate the desired trajectories as the play tasks change. A relatively inexpensive 3-DOF haptic device made by Novint is used to perform tasks where trajectories of the end-effector are demonstrated and reproduced. Under the condition where the end-effector carries different loads, conventional control systems possess the potential issue that they cannot compensate for the load variation effect. Adaptive tracking control can handle the above issue. Using the Lyapunov stability theory, a set of update laws are derived to give closed-loop stability with proper tracking performance.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种从演示中学习的方法来执行可以随时定义的机器人运动轨迹。这样就可以执行非结构化任务，而无需事先确切地知道所有任务以及开始和结束位置。长期目标是让残疾儿童能够控制机器人在游戏环境中操纵玩具，并让帮助者随着游戏任务的变化展示所需的轨迹。 Novint 制造的相对便宜的三自由度触觉设备用于执行演示和再现末端执行器轨迹的任务。在末端执行器承载不同负载的情况下，传统控制系统存在无法补偿负载变化效应的潜在问题。自适应跟踪控制可以解决上述问题。利用李亚普诺夫稳定性理论，导出了一组更新定律，以提供具有适当跟踪性能的闭环稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于演示学习的自适应轨迹跟踪控制方法，用于任务导向的机器人轨迹规划。
AI.motivation: 为了帮助有残疾的儿童在玩耍环境中通过机器人操控玩具，需要一种能够适应任务变化并处理末端执行器负载变化的控制方法。
AI.method: 使用Lyapunov稳定性理论推导出一组更新律，以实现闭环稳定性与良好的跟踪性能，并采用一种相对廉价的3-DOF触觉设备进行轨迹演示与再现。
AI.result: 该方法能够有效处理末端执行器负载变化带来的影响，实现对轨迹的自适应跟踪控制。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的自适应跟踪控制方法为实现任务导向的机器人轨迹规划提供了一种可行的解决方案，尤其适用于需要适应负载变化和任务变化的场景。

title: A Deep Learning Framework for Predicting Digital Asset Price Movement from Trade-by-trade Data
title_zh: 用于根据逐笔交易数据预测数字资产价格变动的深度学习框架
abstract: This paper presents a deep learning framework based on Long Short-term Memory Network(LSTM) that predicts price movement of cryptocurrencies from trade-by-trade data. The main focus of this study is on predicting short-term price changes in a fixed time horizon from a looking back period. By carefully designing features and detailed searching for best hyper-parameters, the model is trained to achieve high performance on nearly a year of trade-by-trade data. The optimal model delivers stable high performance(over 60% accuracy) on out-of-sample test periods. In a realistic trading simulation setting, the prediction made by the model could be easily monetized. Moreover, this study shows that the LSTM model could extract universal features from trade-by-trade data, as the learned parameters well maintain their high performance on other cryptocurrency instruments that were not included in training data. This study exceeds existing researches in term of the scale and precision of data used, as well as the high prediction accuracy achieved.
summary: This paper presents a deep learning framework based on Long Short-term Memory Network(LSTM) that predicts price movement of cryptocurrencies from trade-by-trade data. The main focus of this study is on predicting short-term price changes in a fixed time horizon from a looking back period. By carefully designing features and detailed searching for best hyper-parameters, the model is trained to achieve high performance on nearly a year of trade-by-trade data. The optimal model delivers stable high performance(over 60% accuracy) on out-of-sample test periods. In a realistic trading simulation setting, the prediction made by the model could be easily monetized. Moreover, this study shows that the LSTM model could extract universal features from trade-by-trade data, as the learned parameters well maintain their high performance on other cryptocurrency instruments that were not included in training data. This study exceeds existing researches in term of the scale and precision of data used, as well as the high prediction accuracy achieved.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的深度学习框架，该框架可以根据逐笔交易数据预测加密货币的价格变动。这项研究的主要重点是预测回顾时期内固定时间范围内的短期价格变化。通过仔细设计特征并详细搜索最佳超参数，该模型经过训练，可在近一年的逐个交易数据上实现高性能。最优模型在样本外测试期间提供稳定的高性能（超过 60% 的准确率）。在现实的交易模拟环境中，模型做出的预测可以轻松货币化。此外，这项研究表明，LSTM 模型可以从逐笔交易数据中提取通用特征，因为学习的参数在未包含在训练数据中的其他加密货币工具上很好地保持了高性能。这项研究在使用数据的规模和精度以及所达到的高预测精度方面都超过了现有的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的深度学习框架，利用逐笔交易数据预测加密货币的短期价格走势。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在加密货币价格预测中存在数据规模有限或预测精度不足的问题，需开发更高效且具有泛化能力的模型。
AI.method: 设计LSTM网络架构，通过特征工程优化和超参数调优，使用近一年的逐笔交易数据训练模型，并验证其在未参与训练的加密货币上的泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上实现超过60%的预测准确率，且在现实交易模拟中可有效盈利；参数具有跨加密货币的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在数据规模、预测精度及模型泛化能力上优于现有研究，为加密货币交易提供了可行的深度学习解决方案。

In a realistic trading simulation setting, the prediction made by the model could be easily monetized. Moreover, this study shows that the LSTM model could extract universal features from trade-by-trade data, as the learned parameters well maintain their high performance on other cryptocurrency instruments that were not included in training data. This study exceeds existing researches in term of the scale and precision of data used, as well as the high prediction accuracy achieved. 本文提出了一种基于长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的深度学习框架，该框架可以根据逐笔交易数据预测加密货币的价格变动。这项研究的主要重点是预测回顾时期内固定时间范围内的短期价格变化。通过仔细设计特征并详细搜索最佳超参数，该模型经过训练，可在近一年的逐个交易数据上实现高性能。最优模型在样本外测试期间提供稳定的高性能（超过 60% 的准确率）。在现实的交易模拟环境中，模型做出的预测可以轻松货币化。此外，这项研究表明，LSTM 模型可以从逐笔交易数据中提取通用特征，因为学习的参数在未包含在训练数据中的其他加密货币工具上很好地保持了高性能。这项研究在使用数据的规模和精度以及所达到的高预测精度方面都超过了现有的研究。 本文提出基于长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的深度学习框架，利用逐笔交易数据预测加密货币的短期价格走势。 Qi Zhao q-fin.ST,cs.AI,cs.LG,q-fin.TR

title: Explainability for fair machine learning
title_zh: 公平机器学习的可解释性
abstract: As the decisions made or influenced by machine learning models increasingly impact our lives, it is crucial to detect, understand, and mitigate unfairness. But even simply determining what "unfairness" should mean in a given context is non-trivial: there are many competing definitions, and choosing between them often requires a deep understanding of the underlying task. It is thus tempting to use model explainability to gain insights into model fairness, however existing explainability tools do not reliably indicate whether a model is indeed fair. In this work we present a new approach to explaining fairness in machine learning, based on the Shapley value paradigm. Our fairness explanations attribute a model's overall unfairness to individual input features, even in cases where the model does not operate on sensitive attributes directly. Moreover, motivated by the linearity of Shapley explainability, we propose a meta algorithm for applying existing training-time fairness interventions, wherein one trains a perturbation to the original model, rather than a new model entirely. By explaining the original model, the perturbation, and the fair-corrected model, we gain insight into the accuracy-fairness trade-off that is being made by the intervention. We further show that this meta algorithm enjoys both flexibility and stability benefits with no loss in performance.
summary: As the decisions made or influenced by machine learning models increasingly impact our lives, it is crucial to detect, understand, and mitigate unfairness. But even simply determining what "unfairness" should mean in a given context is non-trivial: there are many competing definitions, and choosing between them often requires a deep understanding of the underlying task. It is thus tempting to use model explainability to gain insights into model fairness, however existing explainability tools do not reliably indicate whether a model is indeed fair. In this work we present a new approach to explaining fairness in machine learning, based on the Shapley value paradigm. Our fairness explanations attribute a model's overall unfairness to individual input features, even in cases where the model does not operate on sensitive attributes directly. Moreover, motivated by the linearity of Shapley explainability, we propose a meta algorithm for applying existing training-time fairness interventions, wherein one trains a perturbation to the original model, rather than a new model entirely. By explaining the original model, the perturbation, and the fair-corrected model, we gain insight into the accuracy-fairness trade-off that is being made by the intervention. We further show that this meta algorithm enjoys both flexibility and stability benefits with no loss in performance.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习模型做出或影响的决策日益影响我们的生活，检测、理解和减轻不公平现象至关重要。但即使简单地确定“不公平”在给定上下文中的含义也很重要：有许多相互竞争的定义，在它们之间进行选择通常需要对基本任务有深入的了解。因此，人们很容易利用模型的可解释性来深入了解模型的公平性，但是现有的可解释性工具并不能可靠地表明模型是否确实公平。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 Shapley 值范式来解释机器学习公平性的新方法。我们的公平性解释将模型的整体不公平性归因于各个输入特征，即使模型不直接对敏感属性进行操作的情况下也是如此。此外，受沙普利可解释性线性的启发，我们提出了一种应用现有训练时间公平干预的元算法，其中训练对原始模型的扰动，而不是完全训练新模型。通过解释原始模型、扰动和公平校正模型，我们深入了解干预所做出的准确性与公平性权衡。我们进一步表明，这种元算法具有灵活性和稳定性优势，且性能没有损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Shapley值范式的新方法，用于解释机器学习模型的公平性问题，并设计元算法通过训练模型扰动来应用公平干预，分析准确率与公平性的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性工具无法可靠判断模型公平性，而公平性定义复杂且需结合具体任务，亟需有效方法揭示模型不公平性的来源并指导干预。
AI.method: 基于Shapley值将模型整体不公平性归因于输入特征，提出元算法通过训练原始模型的扰动而非重建新模型，结合原模型、扰动及修正后模型的解释分析公平性干预效果。
AI.result: 该方法在保持性能的同时提供灵活性和稳定性，能有效揭示公平性干预中的准确率-公平性权衡机制。
AI.conclusion: 本文为公平性分析提供可解释工具，有助于深入理解模型偏差来源及干预效果，推动公平机器学习发展。

authors_text: Damien de Mijolla,Christopher Frye,Markus Kunesch,John Mansir,Ilya Feige
title: Human-interpretable model explainability on high-dimensional data
title_zh: 高维数据的人类可解释模型的可解释性
abstract: The importance of explainability in machine learning continues to grow, as both neural-network architectures and the data they model become increasingly complex. Unique challenges arise when a model's input features become high dimensional: on one hand, principled model-agnostic approaches to explainability become too computationally expensive; on the other, more efficient explainability algorithms lack natural interpretations for general users. In this work, we introduce a framework for human-interpretable explainability on high-dimensional data, consisting of two modules. First, we apply a semantically meaningful latent representation, both to reduce the raw dimensionality of the data, and to ensure its human interpretability. These latent features can be learnt, e.g. explicitly as disentangled representations or implicitly through image-to-image translation, or they can be based on any computable quantities the user chooses. Second, we adapt the Shapley paradigm for model-agnostic explainability to operate on these latent features. This leads to interpretable model explanations that are both theoretically controlled and computationally tractable. We benchmark our approach on synthetic data and demonstrate its effectiveness on several image-classification tasks.
summary: The importance of explainability in machine learning continues to grow, as both neural-network architectures and the data they model become increasingly complex. Unique challenges arise when a model's input features become high dimensional: on one hand, principled model-agnostic approaches to explainability become too computationally expensive; on the other, more efficient explainability algorithms lack natural interpretations for general users. In this work, we introduce a framework for human-interpretable explainability on high-dimensional data, consisting of two modules. First, we apply a semantically meaningful latent representation, both to reduce the raw dimensionality of the data, and to ensure its human interpretability. These latent features can be learnt, e.g. explicitly as disentangled representations or implicitly through image-to-image translation, or they can be based on any computable quantities the user chooses. Second, we adapt the Shapley paradigm for model-agnostic explainability to operate on these latent features. This leads to interpretable model explanations that are both theoretically controlled and computationally tractable. We benchmark our approach on synthetic data and demonstrate its effectiveness on several image-classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 随着神经网络架构及其建模的数据变得越来越复杂，可解释性在机器学习中的重要性不断增长。当模型的输入特征变得高维时，就会出现独特的挑战：一方面，原则上与模型无关的可解释性方法在计算上变得过于昂贵；另一方面，更有效的可解释性算法缺乏对普通用户的自然解释。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个用于高维数据的人类可解释性框架，由两个模块组成。首先，我们应用语义上有意义的潜在表示，既可以减少数据的原始维度，又可以确保其人类可解释性。这些潜在特征是可以学习的，例如显式地作为解缠结的表示或隐式地通过图像到图像的转换，或者它们可以基于用户选择的任何可计算量。其次，我们采用 Shapley 范式来实现与模型无关的可解释性，以对这些潜在特征进行操作。这导致了可解释的模型解释，既在理论上受控，又在计算上易于处理。我们在合成数据上对我们的方法进行基准测试，并证明其在多个图像分类任务上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对高维数据的人类可解释模型解释框架，通过降低数据维度并结合改进的Shapley方法实现高效可解释性。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习模型和数据复杂度提升，现有解释方法在高维数据场景下面临计算成本过高或用户难以理解的双重挑战。
AI.method: 框架包含两个模块：1）通过语义化潜在表示降低数据维度并确保可解释性；2）将Shapley范式适配到潜在特征空间进行模型解释。
AI.result: 在合成数据和图像分类任务中验证了方法有效性，实现了理论严谨且计算可行的可解释性方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高维数据提供了兼顾理论控制与计算效率的可解释性解决方案，平衡了模型复杂性与人类理解需求。
